### Part 091

- Recollection of Days Past ｜ 昔时浮想之思
- The "richest of experiences"? ｜ 「丰富体验」？
- "Playing cards with old friends in a rowdy tavern... What could be more fun than that when you're on the road?"\nHint: Thoma's deck revolves around Weapons and Normal Attacks, using Weapons and Character Skills to enhance Normal Attacks before dealing massive damage. ｜ 「在热热闹闹的酒馆和老朋友打牌…旅行途中，应该没有比这更有意思的事了！」\n【提示】托马的牌组以「武器」和「普通攻击」为主题，擅长通过武器和角色技能提供强化，然后通过「普通攻击」造成大量伤害。
- That is indeed the case. Though I must admit that to my shame, I allowed him to escape with but a single stab from my spear due to a feint on his part. ｜ 没错，但是很惭愧…最后那家伙居然虚晃一招，拼着被我刺了一枪后逃跑了。
- <color=#00E1FFFF>Warrior... Break the seal, only then can you defeat... the dark foe...</color> ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>勇者啊…揭开封印，如此才能打败…漆黑的大敌…</color>
- You are outside of our disputes, and the freest person in all of Fontaine, able to move around most easily. Allow me to share my perspective with you. ｜ 你处在纠纷之外，是枫丹最自由最机动的人。不妨告诉你我的视角吧。
- Why, thank you. I strove to create an outfit that matched her high social station as the Demoiselle. ｜ 谢谢。为了配得上那位「大小姐」的身份，这点程度是必须的。
- Certainly, we'll prepare it for you immediately! ｜ 好的，马上给您下厨！
- Tokunaga ｜ 德长
- Now that the Fading Disorder is cured, I'm sure the Forest will be a lively place again in no time. ｜ 褪色的问题解决之后，森林又会变得热闹起来呢。
- Qi Nan? She lives in Liyue Harbor and is very busy with work at the Ministry of Civil Affairs. Why would she be here? ｜ 戚楠？戚楠住在璃月，每天为总务司的事忙得不可开交，不可能到层岩巨渊这里来的。
- Hahaha, are you afraid you'll fall off? ｜ 哈哈哈哈！你还用担心掉下去吗？
- Heizou, what are you doing here, you little brat? Oh, and the Traveler, too. So I assume you're here to see Lady Yae? ｜ 平藏，你这个小混蛋怎么来了。呀，还有旅行者，难道是来找神子大人的吗？
- Now that you mention it... Nahida, you've been hinting to us since the very beginning... ｜ 这么说来，纳西妲真的从最最开始就一直在提示我们了呀…
- Don't worry about the ingredients, Diona. I'll figure something else out. You should head back, so you can get a head start on working that mixology magic of yours. ｜ 哎呀，总之先回去研发新品嘛，材料的事情我再想想办法。
- Well, it's decided, then! I need to get back now, or the adults will worry. I'll definitely sing for you again! ｜ 那就一言为定！我该回去了，不然大人会担心的。下次，我会再唱歌给你听的。
- Eek! White Fur! Shoo! ｜ 咿！白毛！走开！
- S—Study? They're not gonna make us memorize a whole book, are they? ｜ 学、学习？不会是要我们背书吧？
- If we can increase the alertness of those too exhausted to perceive the subtle notes, but decrease the restlessness of those too agitated to raise their glass, then we can be sure to reach a point of balance where all can enjoy their wine to the fullest extent. ｜ 如果能让心神疲惫之人适当集中，让过分紧张之人适当放松，找到一个折中点，这种情况无疑会好转。
- Mary-Ann's voice really is getting weaker. It's gone from a command to a request... ｜ 虽然「玛丽安」的语气确实越来越弱，从命令变成了恳请…
- Just as Paimon thought... ｜ 果然…
- Desert Watch ｜ 沙海守望
- It may be more dangerous than we imagined. ｜ 可能比想象中更危险。
- Really... How many times do I have to say it? I'm fine! But I'm very angry... ｜ 真是的…都说了，没事的啦！不过，拉娜姐姐很生气哦…
- I know a nice clearing near the Stadium. We only need to test out the potion, so it shouldn't take too much of your time. What do you say? ｜ 圣火竞技场附近有块合适的空地，我们点到为止，不会耽误你们太多时间的，怎么样？
- Should we go find that man again at the square? He seemed like a pretty responsible guy. I'm sure he knows the people here far better than us. ｜ 要不要拜托之前广场上的那位男士帮忙分发？他是个有责任感的人，对居民的了解也比我们更多。
- The will I carry within me will never be eroded nor destroyed. ｜ 我所背负的意志，不损不灭。
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- He's a very nice man, but he won't be pushed around. Please consider the price carefully and try to reach a good deal with Georg. ｜ 格奥尔格先生比较和善，但也不会吃哑巴亏。还请你们谨慎考虑价格，和格奥尔格先生好好勾兑了。
- Okay! ｜ 好——！
- Go on, ask him! Don't let him intimidate you! ｜ 问啊，别被他的气势给压制了！
- More About Shikanoin Heizou: II ｜ 想要了解鹿野院平藏·其二
- They... Are actually accidental byproducts from my first time forging an Ancient Name. ｜ 这些东西…其实我在一次打造古名时，意外诞生的产物。
- Message ｜ 留言
- Tamoto DMG|{param1:P} ATK+{param2:P} DEF ｜ 袖伤害|{param1:P}攻击力+{param2:P}防御力
- Your temple of music must have more than just good tunes — you're a bard, ain't ya? A song's gotta have a good story, or it doesn't make the cut, right? ｜ 音乐殿堂里可不只有好听的旋律，还得有精妙的故事，这样才能被吟游诗人认可，对不对？
- Uh... But you were definitely awake then, Este! Also, while we were below, didn't we even see... ｜ 唔，不过那个时候埃斯特先生明明是很清醒的啊，而且我们在下面不是还见到了…
- Are you Ryuuji's former colleague too? ｜ 你也是龙二之前的同事？

- Oh, and one more thing. ｜ 对了，还有一件事。
- Haha... To be completely up front, this is really quite important to me, so your help in this regard would be greatly appreciated. ｜ 哈哈，这件事对我确实很重要，还希望阁下帮我这个忙了。
- Opening Treasure Chest: I ｜ 打开宝箱·其一
- Let's do something you never normally have the opportunity to do. ｜ 去做一直都没有机会做的事吧。
- (On the title page is a name in big letters: Shafaqat.) ｜ （扉页上大大咧咧地写着一个名字：沙法卡特）

- Millennial Pearl Seahorse ｜ 千年珍珠骏麟
- A type of tiny octopus that normally lives in the depths of the ocean.\nPerhaps out of an overabundance of curiosity, or a desire to travel, it begins to cruise throughout the seas while still extremely young. If it sees a creature it likes, it will follow it everywhere.\nBut who knows what it will be like when it grows up... ｜ 本应是生活在海洋深处的小小章鱼。\n或许是出于其旺盛的好奇心，还有对旅行的向往，在尚处于幼体态时，它就已然在海中四处游弋。如果遇见了中意的生物，它也愿意跟随其四处旅行。\n不过，它长大后究竟会变成什么样呢…
- Maybe if you did your own dirty work rather than dispatching your minions, you wouldn't be so out of breath right now. ｜ 再胖下去，你躲在草丛里的时候可就要藏不住自己了。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- Estienne will only change the subject, and as for Rave... You kids had better keep your guard up around him. ｜ 艾蒂安只会转移话题，雷维…你们几个小孩子最好提防一下他。
- In that sense, they are very important, indeed... ｜ 这样说来，的确很重要…
- "Hand in hand with you before the furnace\nThe flames fail to rise\nFor they are burning in my heart." ｜ 「我和你在炼金炉前手拉手\n火焰没有升起\n因为爱火燃烧在我心中」。
- Do you have some time to help me out? ｜ 有空吗？给我点建议？
- Yikes? Where did these guys come from!? ｜ 呜哇！这群家伙是哪冒出来的！
- That broken mirror once beamed forth reflections bright. But now, dark smoke has gradually spread into three areas. Remember them well: ｜ 在此地，那破碎的镜子曾映照，而如今黑烟逐渐弥漫之处有三，请您记住：
- Wait... Then why didn't you say so in the first place!? ｜ 哦…等等，那你为什么不一开始就这么说呢？

- Whoa, whoa, an old hand at this song-and-dance, are we? ｜ 嘿！你这反应，挺老辣啊？

- Araja ｜ 兰拉迦
- That evil power has both driven him insane and kept him alive over the centuries. So to look at it one way, once it's completely purged from his body, the Mountain King will finally be able to rest in peace. ｜ 可以说既是深渊力量使它疯狂，也是深渊力量维持了它的生命。换言之，如果进行彻底的驱散，山王将安息。
- Talk to Farghani ｜ 与法伽尼对话
- Whoa there, calm down, Gorou! ｜ 冷冷冷冷静啊五郎！
- Hand 3 Harra Fruits to Vardan ｜ 将3份「香辛果」交付给瓦尔坦
- Hahaha, but there's so much more she still wants to learn. ｜ 哈哈哈，不过，她还有很多东西要学呢。
- Heh, it's more exciting to go up against moving opponents! Commanding our Fungi friends to victory should feel more awesome than ever! ｜ 嘿嘿，和动起来的对手较量的时候，感觉更紧张刺激了，指挥蕈兽伙伴们获胜的时候，也更有成就感！
- Ah, Sadife... He's known for his stubbornness, even his teachers can't always deal with him... ｜ 赛达菲学长啊…他可是出了名的死心眼，有时候连老师都对付不来他…
- Fish ｜ 鱼肉
- Feast your eyes, rejoice, and cheer. For this is the unquestionable truth! Look at the signature — nobody is capable of forging that! ｜ 刮目相看啊，喝彩啊，赞美啊。这是不容置疑的真实。你看这个签名，任谁也伪造不了！
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Are things usually pretty hectic around here? ｜ 这个港口平时也不安稳吗？
- It's so dusty. Paimon bets no one has been here in a long, long time. ｜ 灰尘好多啊，肯定很久很久没有人来过了。
- The sturdy shell of a Consecrated Beast.\nThe remains of a ruinous beast that once gnawed at the flesh of great, fallen beings. Even should the beasts sup a sliver of power from the gods of yesteryear, they too will greet the same end as said gods. ｜ 圣骸兽脊背上坚实的骨壳。\n噬啮殒落的伟大生灵之躯骸，并藉此升衍的灾兽之骨。纵然窃得昔日权能的片影，兽群终究无法逃过与诸神相同的终局。
- Hour of Soothing Thunder ｜ 平雷之刻
- You're right. Something's definitely wrong with their nightmares... Our ability to digest dreams isn't just a matter of quantity. It depends on the emotional intensity, too. ｜ 那两个人的噩梦有问题，影响食梦貘消化的因素除了噩梦的数量，还有噩梦的强度。
- Because now, all of Liyue's people need divine protection. ｜ 璃月的所有民众，现在也都很需要神的眷顾啊…
- C—Could you please help get me out of here? If you can find a way to activate the energy storage device beside me, then the door sh—should open. ｜ 能、能不能麻烦两位，放我出来。如果能激活旁边的储能装置，应、应该就能把门打开了。
- This god's spirit... he does not often see people. But I hear that you have met him before. Maybe it is best that you are also the one to meet him this time. ｜ 魔神的残魂…不常见人。但我听说你与它有过一面之缘，由你出面，或许是最合适的。
- Don't push yourself too hard, Layla! You'll end up collapsing from exhaustion again! ｜ 注意体能啊，莱依拉，可别像上次一样累倒哦！
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Furnishings ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设购买获取
- The last time you came to visit, you were still just a kid. But now you're a pillar of the Children of Echoes... No, of all Natlan even! ｜ …你上次来这里做客的时候，还是那么一个小不点。现在你已经是「回声之子」…不，纳塔的顶梁柱了。
- Defeat the Treasure Hoarders blocking the way ｜ 击败拦路的盗宝团
- Ms. Paimon, if my behavior was at all untoward just now, can you forgive me? I didn't mean you any offense. ｜ 派蒙女士，如果我刚才有什么冒犯的行为，可以请你原谅我吗？我绝对没有不尊敬你的意思。
- Action Phase ｜ 行动阶段
- The imaging signal from the Inscribed Mirror is clear enough, but some work will be required to analyze the environmental images. ｜ 「铭随流镜」的影像信号还是足够清晰的，只不过得费点功夫分析环境画面。
- Esteemed Liloupar, allow me to offer my deepest apologies for all the inconveniences and misunderstandings you must have experienced. ｜ 尊敬的利露帕尔，此前的种种不便与误会，请容我向您致歉。
- Exploration Knowledge ｜ 探索知识

- Not precisely, but let's go with your idea, Paimon. ｜ 不一样。不过就按你说的办吧。
- You're a braver person than Paimon... The first time we met Keqing, Paimon found her pretty intimidating... ｜ 你真厉害…我第一次见刻晴的时候，还以为来了个很难对付的人呢…
- Is this the place...? You said she's here, but what do I need to do to see her? ｜ 就是这里么…你说她在这里，可是具体要怎么做才能见到她？
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Each opponent hit by Driftcloud Waves from <color=#FFD780FF>White Clouds at Dawn</color> will grant all nearby party members 1 stack of Storm Pinion for 20s. Max 4 stacks. These will cause the characters' Plunging Attack CRIT Rate to increase by 4%/6%/8%/10% respectively.\nEach Storm Pinion created by hitting an opponent has an independent duration. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>朝起鹤云</color>的闲云冲击波每命中一个敌人，都将为队伍中附近的所有角色产生一层持续20秒，至多叠加4层的「风翎」效果，使角色的下落攻击的暴击率提升4%/6%/8%/10%。\n每次命中敌人产生的「风翎」的持续时间独立计算。

- Fading Candle ｜ 残火灯烛
- Nothing. ｜ 没什么。
- ATK will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>16%</color> for 15s after being affected by Pyro. This effect can be triggered once every 12s. All Elemental DMG Bonus will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color> for 15s after being affected by Hydro, Cryo, Electro, or Dendro. This effect can be triggered once every 12s. ｜ 承受火元素附着后的15秒内，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>16%</color>，每12秒至多触发一次；承受水元素、冰元素、雷元素或草元素附着后的15秒内，所有元素伤害加成提升<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>，每12秒至多触发一次。

- Uh, are you absolutely sure? ｜ 欸？真的认识啊？
- That being said, if the enemy from all those years ago is still lurking and plotting to stir up more trouble, then I definitely won't turn a blind eye. ｜ 当然了，如果当年的敌人依然存在，还想搞什么阴谋诡计的话，我也绝不会听之任之。
- Yeah! We can try using rust remover on the watch! ｜ 对哦！我们可以用除锈润滑油给那块怀表除锈试试。
- We have already received word from Eipekkusu and Sailing Breeze that the materials are all in place for "Shogun Almighty: Reborn as Raiden With Unlimited Power" and "Pretty Please, Kitsune Guuji?"! ｜ 天顶屋与远航之风发来了联络，《转生成为雷电将军，然后天下无敌》与《拜托了我的狐仙宫司》的相关物料都已经就位！
- Right, there's one other thing I could use your help with. If you ever run into Curve and Agent Talochard, please tell them the following: ｜ 对了，倒是另有件事，确实想麻烦两位，如果你们遇见曲线和托萝莎探员，请帮我转告他们。

- Of course, of course! Still, it's uphill much of the way, so I might have to ask for your support too. ｜ 当然，当然。不过那边上坡路很多，等会儿你要扶着奶奶哦。

- $[K1]: When your active character is <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2701]</color>, equip this card.\nAfter $[A2701] equips this card, immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S27012]</color> once.\nYour $[A2701], who has this card equipped, can accumulate 1 more stack of <color=#FFFFFFFF>Radical Vitality</color>.\n(You must have $[A2701] in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ $[K1]：我方出战角色为<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A2701]</color>时，装备此牌。\n$[A2701]装备此牌后，立刻使用一次<color=#FFD780FF>$[S27012]</color>。\n装备有此牌的$[A2701]，可累积的<color=#FFFFFFFF>「活化激能」</color>层数+1。\n（牌组中包含$[A2701]，才能加入牌组）

- There isn't much time. Keep up, little ones! ｜ 时间不多，小家伙们可跟紧了！

- Spino Blaster ｜ 「飞迸湍流大作战」

- No, I'm a little dizzy... ｜ 还是不了，我有点晕…
- ...I... I'm such an idiot... ｜ …我…真是个笨蛋…
- And as for this prince... the goddess will also bestow upon you the rainbow glory, so your future will always be filled with light! ｜ 还有这位王子，本女神要额外再赐予你七彩的荣耀，愿你的未来充满明亮！
- ... ｜ ……
- Massive Electro energy is coursing through this thundering ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou shall earn Weapon Ascension Materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座雷鸣不止的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的雷元素之力。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得强化装备的物质。
- Break bricks within the time limit to score points ｜ 请在限定时间内击碎游艺方块以获取积分
- Your show of ability today far surpasses that of Signora's initial assessment of you in Mondstadt. Tell me, how could that be? ｜ 旅者，你今天展现出的实力，比「女士」在蒙德对你的评价更强，这是为什么呢？

- A simple long table made from Fragrant Cedar Wood that can be found in Qiaoying Village. The wide table has an exceptional load-bearing capacity and can be used as an ad-hoc shelf when not serving its main role as a long table. This type of table is resistant to insect infestation to the point that it can last for decades and accompany a family across three generations' worth of memories... ｜ 可见于翘英庄内的简易长桌，以「垂香木」的余料搭建而成，桌面空间宽敞，承重能力优秀，充当长桌之余还能作为临时货架使用。这种长桌的防虫防潮处理也相当到位，以至于一张桌子能用上几十年，陪伴一家居民三代人，承载诸多回忆…
- *nom nom* ｜ （嚼嚼）
- Yes! I have to go! ｜ 是的，可莉一定会去！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Titu ｜ 蒂图

- Maybe it's all this noise around us that's driven them out? ｜ 可能是因为现在城里太热闹了，它们都被吵得跑出来了吧？
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- A group of hilichurls is wandering in the wilderness. Some of them are Geo-enhanced. Defeat all of them and put an end to this threat. ｜ 一群丘丘人正在野外游荡，威胁着过往行人，其中一部分以「岩」强化了自身。消灭所有魔物，清除这股威胁。

- The feather of an exotic bird rarely seen on this continent. ｜ 异国的奇妙鸟类的羽毛，在这片大陆上非常罕见。
- A timepiece from a nation of old that waited for their warriors' return. What flows inside is not sand, but bits of ice that never melt. ｜ 等待勇士归来的故国人民所用的时计。其中流淌的并不是沙，而是不化的冰屑。
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Sounds good to me, that's around the same price we've agreed in previous years, too. We have a deal! ｜ 不错，和往年价格很接近，就这样成交吧！
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- So even if Dougier's not there in person, he'll still always have eyes on the members. ｜ 这样的话，无论杜吉耶本人是否在这里，他的眼睛永远不会挪开。
- I'm back, and so is Kapatcir. ｜ 我回来了。卡帕奇莉也回来了。
- I spend all my days handling the most trivial of matters, but so long as it helps you in your adventure, or makes your life easier in some small way, I couldn't be happier. That's because each time I get a thank-you, it makes me feel like my work at least has some meaning, no matter how insignificant it seems. ｜ 我每天做的都是一些琐碎的小事，但只要这些小事能帮到你的冒险、你的生活，我就会很开心…因为你的道谢，会让我觉得这些小事，也都有小小的意义。
- "I've gotten the upper hand, you know?" ｜ 「被我占据优势了哦？」
- Knowing me... I just know that today could not have been such a happy day without you. ｜ 像我这种脾气…如果没有你的话，今天我不会过得这么开心。
- A proud crown that once belonged to the Viridescent Venerer. It is as lush and green as the breezes of the wild. ｜ 曾属于绿野猎人的骄傲头冠，如同原野之风一般青翠。
- Seeking to enter the volcano with only the strength you now possess... it's a bit too much to hope for. ｜ 这样的实力，就想前往火山，实在是有点勉强了啊。

- Oh? Who else was looking for him? ｜ 还有谁啊？

- Colorful flowers... ｜ 鲜艳的花卉…
- What are we waiting for, anyway? C'mon, let's gooo! Or they'll start thinkin' we're scared of 'em! ｜ 不用等太久！要不然对面还以为我们怕了他们。
- A tasty, technicolor treat that is delightfully crisp and sweet. When displayed prominently on snack stands, it possesses an almost magical ability to make children's pocket money disappear. ｜ 色彩缤纷的零食。吃起来酥脆又香甜。若是摆在小吃摊上，则会拥有不可思议的魔法——能在不知不觉的情况下，吞掉孩子们口袋里的零花钱。

- The whale in the dream ｜ 梦中所见之鲸

- Then... I guess I'll just have... little bite... ｜ 那我就先吃一些好了…

- Well, she told us you'd be here! How's everything going? ｜ 还多亏了她告诉我们，你在这里呢！龙二调查得怎么样啦？
- This cruel fate befits not one of royal blood! ｜ 皇女的命运，不应在此完结…！

- Eh? Why aren't you answering us again? ｜ 怎么又不说话了？

- Now, try to recall things you care about. They don't need to be related to this case. ｜ 试着回忆一下你在意的事情吧，不必非要和案件有关。

- Copy ｜ 复制
- Huh? No, I'm not saying that there's something wrong with Quinn. I just think that if you want to send people presents... ｜ 啊？不不，我不是说昆恩有什么问题，只不过…关于「给别人挑选礼物」这件事…

- A powerful opponent based on a Cryo Abyss Mage. It is able to launch icy cones at ground and aerial targets, as well as fire off vertical pillars of ice. Be sure to avoid them. ｜ 以「冰深渊法师」为原型，使用冰元素作战的强大敌人，能够施放攻击地面与空中目标的冰锥攻击、以及纵向的冰柱，需要注意躲避。

- Just as I thought, I left them in the place I was taking references from. I tend to put the things I've used on the ground while I paint out of habit. ｜ 果然是我忘在取景的地方了，我每次画画的时候都习惯把用过的东西放在地上。
- Note: There is no such thing as fried chicken that never runs out, just as there's no such thing as children who never grow up. ｜ 备注：世界上没有吃不完的炸鸡，就像世界上没有长不大的孩子。
- Just you wait. I'm sure that our Eighth seat will be filled by someone even more powerful. And when that happens, we Fatui will be all the stronger for it! ｜ 看着吧，第八席的位置一定会有更厉害的人物顶上的。到时候，我们愚人众的力量只会更加强大！

- So... What do you want us to help with? ｜ 所以…你想要我们帮忙做什么呀？
- Ah, there you are. The award ceremony is over, then? ｜ 你们来了。看来颁奖仪式已经结束了。
- A hat once worn by the witch who dreamt of burning away all of the demons in the world. The large brim blocked her sight. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的炎之魔女曾经戴过的帽子。宽大的帽檐能遮挡她的视线。
- I urge you to think about what I've said. Offloading your pain onto others is the only way a person can live comfortably in this world. ｜ 我劝你再好好想想吧。这世上只有一种办法可以活得轻松，就是把痛苦交给别人去承受。

- Gain a <color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color> Elemental DMG Bonus for all elements and receive the might of the Mistsplitter's Emblem. At stack levels 1/2/3, the Mistsplitter's Emblem provides a <color=#99FFFFFF>12/24/42%</color> Elemental DMG Bonus for the character's Elemental Type. The character will obtain 1 stack of Mistsplitter's Emblem in each of the following scenarios: Normal Attack deals Elemental DMG (stack lasts 5s), casting Elemental Burst (stack lasts 10s); Energy is less than 100% (stack disappears when Energy is full). Each stack's duration is calculated independently. ｜ 获得<color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>所有元素伤害加成，并能获得「雾切之巴印」的威势。雾切之巴印：持有1/2/3层雾切之巴印时，获得<color=#99FFFFFF>12/24/42%</color>自己的元素类型的元素伤害加成。在下列情况下，角色将各获得1层雾切之巴印：普通攻击造成元素伤害时，持续5秒；施放元素爆发时，持续10秒；此外，角色元素能量低于100%时，将获得1层雾切之巴印，此雾切之巴印会在角色的元素能量充满时消失。每层雾切之巴印的持续时间独立计算。

- They said I would forget everything in the end. I would forget everything I learned in my life, forget my best friend... everyone and everything. ｜ 他们说我最后会忘掉一切，忘掉毕生所学的知识，忘掉最好的朋友…什么也留不下。

- Whoa, what a lineup! We'll be unstoppable! ｜ 哇，这个组合，赢定了！
- Touch the inscription ｜ 触碰铭印

- Yep, that's right. Me! All by myself. Nobody else. ｜ 是啊，没错，都是本大爷一个人干的。
- Naturally, I, the Prinzessin der Verurteilung, cannot long linger here in this "Furball Fortress," for the pressing matters of many different worlds await the attention of Oz and myself... ｜ 当然，本皇女也不会在这「猫茸茸城堡」长久驻足，毕竟还有太多太多世界的要务等待本皇女和奥兹去处理…
- That's for you to explore, I fear. ｜ 那就要留给你们去探索了。
- ...Her parents said that this is how she was like at first. ｜ …我听小姐的父母说，在一开始的时候，她曾经就是这个样子的。
- Tribal Challenge ｜ 部族挑战

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making an Aralia "Renzou" Street Lamp.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「孔雀木『连造』路灯」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- I have faith in you too, Mamere. ｜ 我也相信玛梅赫。
- Grants <color=#FFFFFFFF>2 $[K6] points</color> for your active character. ｜ 为我方出战角色提供<color=#FFFFFFFF>2点$[K6]</color>。

- Don't worry about it, Paimon, she's like that! Sometimes, when I'm not looking, she'll just vanish into the shadow of the trees. Then at others, the sun might dazzle me, or the birds might call overhead... and there she is. ｜ 派蒙姐姐别在意，她就是这样的！有的时候，一不注意，她就消失在树的影子里了。有时候被阳光晃了眼睛，或者是听到鸟叫回头，又会看见她。
- Game Master ｜ 主持人
- Fatui Skirmisher ｜ 愚人众先遣队
- There are only a few families in our village, all with a long history. And we know each other's roots. How could we have any secrets? ｜ 咱们村子就这么几户人家，都是历史悠久的家系，彼此知根知底。你说，哪来的秘密？
- Behold My Righteous Strike! ｜ 看我正义的一击！
- Yeah, so be careful with it... ｜ 嗯，要小心保存…
- Defeat Local Legend: Cihuacoatl of Chimeric Bone. ｜ 战胜地方传奇·嵌合神骨的蛇姬。
- (The puppy wags its tail excitedly, as if saying, "I don't understand!") ｜ （小狗兴奋地摇着尾巴，好像在说「我不懂耶！」）
- Thanks, but I don't want to trouble you anymore. ｜ 谢谢，但我不想再麻烦你了。
- There is a slacker who claims to be the "Prince of Mischief" terrorizing Hanamizaka. Children have reportedly been losing valuables in the area, the bulk of which are Onikabuto, Genius Invokation TCG cards, and so on... ｜ 花见坂出没自称「混世魔王」的闲散分子，据查，似乎有孩童出现财物损失，多为鬼兜虫、七圣召唤卡牌等…
- #Oho, what's this? Someone doesn't wanna get friendly with our {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}? ｜ #谁敢不喜欢我家{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}？
- Connector DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 连接伤害|{param1:P}
- Watch out! ｜ 小心！
- A hard feather from a large seacliff hawk. The basalt tip of the feather sometimes glistens with a cool dew. ｜ 来自矶岩巨鸢的刚羽，玄石的羽尖有时会凝结有清冷的露珠。
- The musket is my favorite weapon. It's both powerful and threatening... sometimes the latter trait is far more useful. ｜ 铳枪是我最喜欢的武器，它具有强大的杀伤力和威慑力。有些时候，后者甚至比前者更有用。
- ...Oh, the scent of lies! ｜ …闻到了谎言的味道！
- Warts? Are those edible? We bake-danuki do know quite a bit about cooking. ｜ 蒸物？是吃的吗？我们妖狸对料理倒是颇有心得。
- We're preparing to leave Sumeru and head to Fontaine. ｜ 我们准备离开须弥，前往枫丹了。
- Invalid item amount to discard ｜ 道具丢弃数量非法
- Hey! You just sobered up and you're already thinking about more drinks? ｜ 喂，你明明才刚清醒不久，就又要去喝吗？
- You've known me for some time now... I think you understand my personality, don't you? ｜ 认识至今，我的性格，你应该已经了解了吧？
- Remember, after it runs for a while, it will need to rest a bit before it can point you to the location of the Future Stars again. ｜ #{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}要记得哦，它运行一段时间之后要休息一会儿才能再指出未来星的位置。
- I think the health drink that guy from Sumeru is working on has some promise. Maybe I should invest a little in it... ｜ 我觉得须弥人搞的什么健康饮料，说不定有点希望，要不给他投资一点…
- Can't imagine that... ｜ 无法想象…
- If there's anything you need, just tell me anytime. ｜ 如果有需要我的地方，也可以随时告诉我。
- The Fatui are in possession of a diagram of Mondstadt's defenses. ｜ 愚人众手上有一张城防图。
- Here we are. When I was little, I would often take this road to go down to the river valley to play. ｜ 就是这里了。我小的时候，经常通过这条路，到前边的河谷玩。
- The Mora purse that Lyudochka left behind. It contains a decent sum of Mora, but even Paimon doesn't want to use it. ｜ 柳达希卡留下的摩拉袋，里面应该装着不少钱，不过就连派蒙都不打算接受它。

- Anyway, that's just what I've heard. I've never been there myself. ｜ 不过说到底，奶奶我也没有去过那边啦，以上全是听来的。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- It's also by chance that I've met so many people, learned so many things, and discovered that people associate watching fireworks with the things that are most precious to them. ｜ 碰巧认识了很多人，听说了很多事，知道他们都把心中珍视之物寄托在了烟花里。
- Every 4s a character is on the field, they will deal <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color> more DMG and take <color=#99FFFFFF>2.4%</color> more DMG. This effect has a maximum of 5 stacks and will not be reset if the character leaves the field, but will be reduced by 1 stack when the character takes DMG. ｜ 角色在场上时，每4秒提升<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>造成的伤害，<color=#99FFFFFF>2.4%</color>受到的伤害。该效果最多叠加5层，不随角色退场重置，受到伤害后会减少1层效果。
- So it makes me really happy to see her here with friends today! ｜ 今天看她带人过来，我也很开心哦！
- Well then, let's go. We can take this opportunity to pay my old home a visit. ｜ 那...我们走吧，就当借着此番机会重游故地了。
- Not used to being around so many people? ｜ 是不是不适应人多的环境？
- Please try this! ｜ 请尝尝这个！
- A great black monster that has come from the abyssal dark, eroding the memories of the earth. It can warp itself and transform into a formidable foe. Some of its attacks can cause stackable Attrition that, after a time, will cause your active character to lose HP. During combat, the Tenebrous Papilla will use Beseech the Dark to grant itself a Void Ward. At this time, use <color=#f39001>a certain number of elemental attacks</color> to break the Ward, which will cause it to enter a confused state. <color=#f39001>Nightsoul-aligned elemental attacks</color> will break the Ward more effectively. ｜ 来自深邃晦暗的异界，侵蚀大地中记忆的漆黑魔兽。能够扭曲自己的姿态，变化成强大的敌人。其部分攻击会施加可叠加的「蚀破」状态，会在一定时间后，使队伍中自己的当前场上角色损失生命值。战斗中，深邃摹结株会进行「晦暗祝祷」，为自己赋予虚界力护罩。如在此时利用<color=#f39001>元素攻击到一定次数</color>破坏护罩，即可使其陷入混乱，<color=#f39001>具有夜魂性质的元素攻击</color>会更有效率地突破其防御。
- Sige...winne... You... ｜ 希格…雯…你…
- Principal Cast ｜ 可出战角色
- "Provide for free," hmm? Heh. A respectable virtue indeed. ｜ 无偿提供…哼，真是让人尊敬的品德。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4级后解锁
- Sorry, I'm a little dizzy at the moment, but I can take it! Ugh... ｜ 抱歉…我有点头晕，不过我还能挺得住的！欸哟…嘶…
- Eating like this might have a negative effect on your health. Maybe we should consider some other options. ｜ 感觉吃东西会影响你的身体健康，还是试试看其他的办法吧。
- But Paimon gets it! Without that kind of nerve, no matter what you do, it can be hard to master it quickly! ｜ 也不是不能理解啦，如果没有一股劲头的话，无论做什么事，本领都不会快快进步的吧？
- Let's give it a try. ｜ 只能尽力找找吧。
- Paimon doesn't quite get you... ｜ 我不太理解…

- Cheers! ｜ 干杯
- I made this harpastum especially for you. Now every day can be Ludi Harpastum, hee-hee! ｜ 这是我为可莉做的特制羽球，只要可莉想玩，天天都是羽球节，好不好？
- My name is Ladep, and I'm a student of Spantamad. ｜ 我是拉德普，是悉般多摩学院的学生。

- Paimon thinks she gets it... So you guys are having a meeting to discuss... the most convenient and safest way to deal with monsters? ｜ 好像听懂了，你们这是在开会讨论…用什么办法对付魔物才最方便，最安全？
- Complete {0} to unlock ｜ 完成「{0}」后开启
- That's true. This is your home, after all, Esnoir. Paimon's sure you like it here. Also... ｜ 嗯。这里毕竟是埃斯诺尔的家呢。埃斯诺尔肯定也很喜欢这里。而且…
- You can consider it payment for the favor from last time! ｜ 也算是作为上一次我帮助你们的回报，礼尚往来嘛！

- But there's nothing we can do about that. Our priority is to get to the next affected zone. ｜ 不管怎么说，当务之急是去下个地点看看。
- I—I need to think this over! ｜ 我，我得好好思考一下！
- I'm grateful for the faith he puts in me. ｜ 很感谢他能这么相信我。
- Someone told me to bring you this letter. ｜ 有人托我带给你一封信。
- Ah, it's 'cause they come to check the fires. If it's me here, I can buy a bit more time. ｜ 呃，是这样，会有人来抽查火把的情况…我在这里还能拖一拖时间…$UNRELEASED

- Hey, Traveler! Hey, Detective Heizou! ｜ 喂！旅行者，平藏先生！
- What about your companions? ｜ 你的同伴呢？
- Good. In that case, the first page. ｜ 好，那么，第一页。
- Meow... "Your opponent sounds anxious to begin. Do not delay!" ｜ 喵…「看来对方已经等不及了，不如快去吧！」
- Talk to the Melancholic Young Woman ｜ 与忧愁的女子对话
- Leadership Skill: Blazing Breakthrough ｜ 领队战技·烈焰破袭
- Yeah! Today was great! ｜ 我也是！
- Wait for my word. ｜ 总之，等我消息吧。
- On festive occasions, one should offer words of blessing. ｜ 佳节应赠吉语。
- This Windward Art will replace your Elemental Burst ｜ 此秘技将取代「元素爆发」
- Ah, those were good times. I kinda miss the student life. ｜ 真怀念啊，好久没当学生了。
- #Hey, you're {NICKNAME}, aren't you? ｜ #嘿，你是叫{NICKNAME}对吧。
- Yves, a diver from Fontaine, seems to be busy... ｜ 枫丹的潜水员伊维斯似乎正在忙碌…
- How many times have I told you not to leave heavy objects by the road! When are you going to learn? ｜ 都说了不要在道路周围堆放重物！怎么还在犯这种错误？
- A feathered accessory that carries the longing for a certain someone, like a migratory bird on the wind. ｜ 寄托谁人的思念的羽饰，就如与风一同去往远方的候鸟。
- Iaune is rushed to the doctor... ｜ 艾尤恩被火速运去了医生所在处…
- If I'd arrived a few days ago, I'd be done with my business and on my way, instead of being bothered by the noise all night and unable to sleep... ｜ 我要是早来几天，现在都做完生意走人了，又何至于被吵到整晚整晚睡不着…
- Paimon, why don't you wait out here for me? ｜ 派蒙，你在外面等我就好。
- Impressive. Deeming this kind of place not worth your attention based on experience and knowledge. Just like how easily you defeated my arch-nemesis... Now that I've seen how you work first-hand... I'm impressed. ｜ 不愧是见多识广的冒险家，对这样的神秘场所不屑一顾。刚才也是，轻易就击败了我的夙敌…亲眼见识，不得不服。
- But, this statue is holding... What is that? ｜ 现在…神像手里捧着的…是什么…？
- Your consciousness plunges into darkness. Nahida seems to be slumbering here... ｜ 你的意识进入了一片黑暗，而纳西妲似乎正沉睡于这片黑暗之中…
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Are you heading back? ｜ 要回去了吗？
- A stylized wind glider. Twice we intersected, parted, and were reunited. ｜ 风之翼款式。两度的交错、分离与重逢。
- I only just noticed how orderly all this furniture is. ｜ 我刚刚发现这里所有家具都放得非常整齐。
- Yunning, we're back. ｜ 韵宁，我们回来了。
- There are three punched tapes to recover. Or there should be only three of them on the shelf. They should be pretty easy to find. Thanks for doing this, you two. ｜ 要回收的打孔纸带有三份。应该说，书架上只有三份打孔纸带了。应该很容易就能找到的，就麻烦两位了。
- Why's there a note under the chest? Was it left by the same person who left the treasure map? ｜ 箱子底下怎么会有纸条？会是留藏宝图的人留下的吗？
- Paimon remembers the person protecting the egg gave it a name... So this little one would be "Aguara," right? ｜ 我记得之前保护这枚龙蛋的人给它取名…这个小家伙的名字是「阿瓜拉」？
- Ah, if it's about that, there's no need to apologize. After my husband died, Spina di Rosula sent us a lot of Mora and support. I understood your guilt and apology to be genuine. ｜ 这个的话，不必道歉了。丈夫死后，刺玫会送来了非常多的慰问品和摩拉…我能感受到来自你们的愧疚与歉意。
- (Hope Omid doesn't get in my way...) ｜ （希望奥米德不要妨碍我…）
- Huh!? Wait, you're Shenhe! This is a surprise! ｜ 不…不对，这不是申鹤嘛！我果然还是被惊讶到了！
- Arana, come with us! Your friend must want to see you again! ｜ 兰拉娜，我们一起去吧！你的朋友，一定也想再见到你！
- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- Permingeat ｜ 佩尔曼雅
- Court of Justice's Mellow Aroma ｜ 「正义之廷的醇香」
- Thank you, Traveler! That was terrifying... the Treasure Hoarders are such savages these days. ｜ 谢谢你，旅行者，呼…刚才吓死我了，盗宝团真是越来越猖狂了。
- Elemental Skill: IV ｜ 元素战技·其四
- ...I'll admit, we thought about it at one point. ｜ …我承认，当初确实有动过这心思。
- What, you haven't learned yet, Diona? ｜ 迪奥娜，你学会了吗？
- 5-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P}
- Look! ｜ 你看!
- Huh... ｜ 这样啊…
- Reward for completing all achievements under "Domains and Spiral Abyss: Series I" ｜ 达成「秘境与深境螺旋·第一辑」下所有成就时获取。
- That's why he can pull off this kind of thing... ｜ 所以才能做到这些…
- Is she not a true god present in this world? If you already have a new god, why try to create another one? ｜ 她难道不是真实存在的神明吗？既然已经拥有一个新神，为什么还要创造别的神？
- #Nara {NICKNAME} and Paimon, I see. Thank you so much. If fate hadn't brought us together, it would have taken me much longer to recover. ｜ #那菈{NICKNAME}和派蒙，我明白了。真是十分感谢。倘若不是在这里与你们有缘相遇，要恢复还得花上一点时间。
- The couple's goals. ｜ 这对夫妇的目的。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Yeah... Sorry Yoimiya, but we need to keep our promise to the Aranara. ｜ 嗯，虽然有点对不起宵宫，但我们也要维护和兰那罗的约定才行。
- Take a picture at Windrise that captures the river and shade of the trees ｜ 在风起地拍摄带有河流与树荫的景色
- Well, let me make it up to you at least. Here, take this paper — on the house. ｜ 啊，作为补偿，这份报纸你们收下吧。
- Some new little thingamajig has hit the market among the Children of Echoes recently, and after learning about it from Xilonen, the situation seems a bit worrying... ｜ 这段时间，「回声之子」的市场上流通起了一种新鲜的小玩意，你和派蒙从希诺宁那里得知了有关它们的信息，情况似乎有些令人不安…
- The Autopsy Report of Takatsukasa Isamu ｜ 鹰司勇的尸检报告
- A special container obtained from Madame Ping. According to her, this dispensary has the power to "generate seeds"... ｜ 从萍姥姥处获得的神奇匣子。据萍姥姥说，这匣子具有「化种」之能…
- Occasionally, Master Diluc, the owner of the winery, will cover my shift. ｜ 偶尔酒庄老板迪卢克老爷会来带班。

- Massive Cryo energy is coursing through this freezing ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou shall earn Talent level-up materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座寒冷的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的冰元素之力。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得令人天赋成长的物质。
- Thank you, kind soul. Thank goodness they're okay, I was so worried! ｜ 谢谢你，好心人。还好它们没事，担心死我了。
- A skewer of mushrooms and poultry. At first glance it's hard to tell which is which. ｜ 由野菇和禽肉组成的烤串。乍一看有些难以区分两者。

- "M" ｜ 「M」
- Alhaitham seldom discusses personalities or dispositions with others. He believes that the prevalent theories about them are wrong. Suppose someone insists that one's character has nothing to do with their abilities and opinions, the person with such a view will find themselves unable to judge any aspect of another person. A smart person will often hold different attitudes towards a foolish person and another smart person, and the foolish often think differently when facing success and failure. People's views on Alhaitham are proof of this point — given his superb talents and egocentric personality, no one wants to get too close to him, but still, they see him as an outstanding scholar.\nThis is exactly the public image Alhaitham desires. Many scholars are rigid and inflexible, but Alhaitham is not one of them. As a matter of fact, his occasional sarcasm in part reflects his philosophy. Society (or the collective) relies on rules to regulate individuals, and language is one of these regulative tools. Turning language against its original design serves to challenge unreasonable rules, and one can thus stay out of trouble.\nThe word "talented" is abused within the Akademiya, and so are "born differently," "touched by the archon," and such... In Sumeru, one's talents are a trial. Outstanding talent is not necessarily seen as a perfect gift, but it also divides people. For instance, to compliment someone with unimaginable achievements, ordinary folk often call them a "genius," or "superhuman," or a "prodigy"... But upon reflection, one will soon notice another layer of meaning that even the speakers themselves have not realized: That the talented and the ordinary are categorically different.\nIf someone is capable of things that others aren't, they must have been endowed with some special abilities and gifts. Excessive compliments for and wild imagination regarding outstanding people only serve to alienate them. "They are successful because they are different" — such is the typical excuse favored by underachievers. These ignorant notions mean nothing to Alhaitham. Though he does know his way around people, he will not waste his time on such trivial matters.\nRules define borders and set limits. Yet these rules should not be judged solely on the number of people they limit. Therefore, Alhaitham has come up with his own set of rules with which he perceives everything and challenges the world. It is the crystallization of his philosophy. To maintain these rules of his own fashioning, Alhaitham acts on his own will and deals with anything that appears harmful in his eyes.\nOnly with objective judgment can one see the truth. By acknowledging the differences between individuals and recognizing differing levels of capabilities and mental capacities, one will discover the answer right away: Judgment from others is inconsequential, but to leave the right of judgment in others' hands is equal to denying oneself. To be "different" should not simply be a label given to you by others. Rather, the talented should have long understood that their uniqueness is also a gift.\nTo put it another way, when a talented person truly understands that they are different and that they are indisputably ingenious, only then can they truly understand the value of their abilities. And as for cowards who remain blinded by perspectives advocated by the great majority, they have not yet found their true selves. ｜ 艾尔海森从不与人轻易探讨个性或性格。他认为主流推崇的观点有误，假使一个人坚称人的个性与能力及思想无关，他便无法界定被评判之人的任何事物。聪明者面对愚蠢者与另一聪明者的态度通常不同，愚昧者在成功与失败时所想亦有不同。他人对艾尔海森的评价也恰好验证了该理论——因其优秀的才能与自我的个性，人们往往不愿离他太近，只将他视为一个客观优秀的人才。\n这正是艾尔海森想要的定位。学者中不乏死脑筋的读书人，而他不是。事实上，言辞时而尖锐也是艾尔海森思想的一部分体现。社会（或称集体）往往以规则束缚个体，言语正是其枝丫之一，反向操纵词句是对不合理规则的反击，凭借这点，人们就能远离麻烦。\n天才一词早已在教令院泛滥，甚至奇才、鬼才…生活在须弥，才能本就是一种试炼。过于拔群的能力未必该被视作完美的礼物，它会将人们潜在分离开。普通人总在窥见自身无法想象的辉煌成就时脱口而出一些溢美之词：天才、超人、与众不同…只需要好好想一想，就能读懂连说话者自己也没察觉到的深意：天才本质是与常人不同的群体。\n一个人能做到他人做不到的事，那他一定有特别的能力和身份。对优秀者的过分吹捧及想象，究其根源不过是种异化。与我不同者可成大器，这是庸俗之人常用的借口。这种种愚昧规则对艾尔海森来说没有意义，哪怕他懂得如何为人处世，也不愿将精力分散到无谓之事上。\n「规则」是边界，亦是束缚。受约束者的数量不该是衡量规则优劣的唯一准则，由此，他得出了他的规则。它是他看待万物、与世界抗衡的力量，是他一切思想的最终体现。为了维护独属于自己的规则，艾尔海森将依循自身意志行动，处理掉在他看来有害的事物。\n唯有客观者才能看到真实。认清个体各不相同，看到能力与心智的差距。答案就在眼前：来自他人的区分不过是点缀，将评价权交到他人手里是对自身的否定。与众不同不应是出自他人的一个标签，天才们早该明白特别也是一种财富。\n又或者，可以这样说：当一个天才发自内心彻底明白他确实与众不同，是彻头彻尾的天才，他才真正意识到才能的价值。至于那些畏首畏尾，仍在被主流观点麻痹的人，他们尚未完全找到自己。

- Oh, child, it's you! The Moonchase Festival is a most lively time here in Liyue, so feel free to walk around and see the sights. ｜ 是你啊，孩子。逐月节的璃月可是很热闹的，到处多逛逛吧，呵呵。
- Few mercenaries get to enjoy their later years. Failing health tends to take the joy out of reputation and wealth, and many mercenaries never even made much of the latter to begin with. ｜ 大部分佣兵晚年都过得不怎么样，财富与名声换不来健康，更别提很多人连财富和名声都没有。

- A peculiar type of fish with a single horn. Round and firm, its belly is as bouncy as a balloon... Actually, there really is a balloon-like swim bladder in there.\nWhile the Phony Phlogiston Unihornfish can provide graffiti enthusiasts with precious paints, they can only live in liquid phlogiston environments. Thus, the Graffiti Alliance began to explore raising this kind of fish in ordinary aqueous environments. To accomplish this, the previous Graffiti Alliance's leader's previous predecessor began to work with the Natlan Fishing Association, expending an enormous sum to import clockwork fish from Fontaine, using "Maintenance Mek" tech to build an ecological simulation mek with onboard data collection capabilities and conduct extensive observations and research. Alas, the results were most disappointing: the horn-like crystal structures on Unihornfish heads ceased to shine with flame-like light after the fish left their liquid phlogiston environment, and so, the plan ended in failure.\nFortunately, due to the way their dorsal fin extends above the water while they swim, these mek Unihornfish look kind of like sharks from a distance. Thanks to this, the People of the Springs ended up buying an appropriate quantity of these "Pseudoshark Unihornfish" from the Graffiti Alliance and Natlan Fishing Association. They are used for giving tourists who go surfing a thrilling yet safe experience, as well as to scare lawbreakers in certain waters. ｜ 生有独角的奇特鱼类，体型圆润敦实，鱼肚富有弹力，堪比气球…其实真的内置了类似气球的浮力舱。\n「拟似燃素独角鱼」能为涂鸦爱好者们带来珍贵的颜料，却又仅能在液态燃素环境中生存，「涂鸦联盟」开始探索在普通水域饲养这种鱼类的可行性。为此，「涂鸦联盟」的上上上任盟主联合纳塔钓鱼协会，斥巨资从枫丹引入了发条鱼类，即「维护机关」的技术，开发了内置数据收集系统的生态模仿机关，进行了一番观察和研究。结果令人遗憾，离开了液态燃素环境后，独角鱼的晶体角状物再也不会焕发出火焰般的光彩，这一计划以失败告终。\n好在，这种机关独角鱼游动时，远看水面以上的部分，就如鲨鱼的背鳍，「流泉之众」向「涂鸦联盟」和纳塔钓鱼协会适量购买了这种「伪装鲨鲨」，用于为冲浪的游客提供刺激而安全的体验，以及在部分水域震慑不法分子。
- Haha, I see you already have the knightly virtue of modesty. ｜ 哈哈哈。连骑士般的「谦虚」品德也已经具备了啊！

- Sure thing, leave it to us! ｜ 包在我们身上！
- He's not a bad person, but I just wish he'd help me out more in my attempts to leave the country. I mean, couldn't we at least go to some mysterious place like Tsurumi Island? ｜ 他人还不错啦，就是在出国方面一直没帮上什么忙。哪怕不能出国，也可以去鹤观那种一看就很神秘的地方呀。
- The Flower-Feather Clan believe in and worship the Wayob, which manifests upon the land with the power of totems and Nightsouls.\nThey say that long ago, Wayob Manifestations looked very different from how they do today, taking on a rougher form that was more akin to that of an obsidian statue. But once their outline had been recorded in woven scrolls, there have been few changes in their appearance since.\nThe people of the Flower-Feather Clan believe their Wayob has the power to control fire and burning flames, and can also control the flow of heat and blazing winds. ｜ 「花羽会」部族所信仰与崇拜的「大灵」，借由图腾与夜魂之力，于大地之上显化的形体。\n据说很久以前大灵显化身的造型与如今也有很大的差别，是更粗糙，更接近黑曜石像的姿态。可是随着织卷记录下了大灵显化身的轮廓后，就很少再有变化了。\n「花羽会」的人相信他们的「大灵」拥有控制火焰与燃烧的力量，能够执掌热量与焚风的流转。
- Best not to stick your nose into other people's private lives. ｜ 不要随便打探他们的私生活。
- We can ask Alhaitham about that later. ｜ 等出去后，我们找机会问问艾尔海森吧。
- Oh, Paimon gets it now. We'll pretend to draw a Bamboo Slip, and then take the opportunity to get the powder onto her. Hehe, leave it to Paimon! ｜ 派蒙明白啦！我们装成去解签的样子，趁机把竹签上的粉末粘在她身上！好，看我的吧！
- We would like to borrow a high-precision celestial globe. ｜ 简单来说，我们想借一台高精度的星象仪。
- Erm, even though we know it's just a game, we still need to be careful... ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}，虽然是玩游戏，但是也要注意喔。
- You will have an ill-fated and unexpected encounter in a cave in the south of Watatsumi Island — a hive of scum and villainy. ｜ 两位在海祇岛的南方的洞窟，贼匪的巢穴，会遭遇不期而至的厄运…
- After a period of high-speed operation, its internal components begin to vibrate intensely, damaging them... ｜ 只要高速行进时间超过一个阶段，它的内部结构就会开始高强度振动，内部元件也随之损坏…
- The underground kingdom once relied on the ancient ruins in the caves to build secret chambers that serve as a guide for those who no longer professed faith in the gods.\nThough the godless nation has long been destroyed, wandering guides yet linger here, preaching a path that leads toward the discordant tunes of the abyss... ｜ 地下的古国曾依托幽深岩穴中的古老遗迹修造隐秘的门厅，为所有不再敬拜神明的人类指引前行的道路。\n如今无神的国度已然覆灭，却依旧有徘徊在此的引路之人，宣讲着通往黑暗的扭曲福音…

- It is a Plume of Purifying Light! I don't know how, but the obsession contained within it has been cleared away. ｜ 这个是「净光翎」啦！虽然不知道怎么回事，不过寄宿在其中的执念似乎已经消弭了。
- A seed obtained from Sakuya. A quality seed full of life, just waiting to be planted in the fields of the Realm Within. After some time, it will grow into a Dreambloom: Pearbell. ｜ 从咲耶处获取的种子，富有活力，品质上佳，种植于壶中洞天的田亩后，可在一段时间后生长为「梦里花·棠铃」。
- Let's get a move on, enough dawdling. ｜ 快动身吧，不要耽搁了。

- I heard the Yashiro Commission has arranged for Sailing Breeze to prepare some special drinks for the volunteers as a way of saying thank-you. ｜ 听说社奉行安排了远航之风，要给你们这些志愿者准备特别饮料作为感谢呢。

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\n1. During the character trial event "Test Run," you can use fixed lineups containing the selected trial characters to enter specific stages and test them out.\n2. The trial characters will have a fixed level and will come with a set of weapons and artifacts. The lineup and characters' equipped weapons and artifacts cannot be changed.\n3. Additional Elemental Orbs will drop during trial event challenges to facilitate the testing of the trial characters' Elemental Bursts.\n4. Once the stage challenge is complete, you may collect your rewards upon exiting the stage or stay within the stage to continue trying the characters out.\n5. The trial stage can be repeated, but its challenge completion rewards may only be collected once.\n6. Some in-game functions may be disabled or only partially displayed during trial stages. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则说明】</color>\n1.在角色试用活动「且试身手」开启期间内，可以使用包含所选试用角色的固定阵容进入指定的关卡进行体验。\n2.试用的角色为固定等级，且拥有一套武器圣遗物搭配。试用关卡中的队伍阵容和角色的武器圣遗物搭配无法修改。\n3.为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。\n4.在关卡达成挑战后，退出关卡即可获得奖励。也可以继续在关卡中体验试用角色。\n5.可重复进入同一个关卡进行体验，但是挑战达成的奖励只能获得一次。\n6.在试用的关卡中，部分功能会被屏蔽或显示不完整。

- Your characters deal +1 DMG.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When your active character takes DMG that is not {SPRITE_PRESET#3505}Arkhe: Pneuma aligned:</color> Negate 2 DMG.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>After your active character takes DMG that is {SPRITE_PRESET#3505}Arkhe: Pneuma aligned:</color> A $[K1015] occurs, and remove this effect. ｜ 我方角色造成的伤害+1。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>我方出战角色受到不具有「{SPRITE_PRESET#3505}始基力：芒性」的伤害时：</color>抵消2点伤害。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>我方角色受到具有「{SPRITE_PRESET#3505}始基力：芒性」的伤害后：</color>发生$[K1015]，移除此效果。

- This dragon-shaped combat machine is a being that inspires fear, much like the lord who once ruled these vast lands.\nThis mysterious, tireless mechanical monstrosity seems to be proof that the now-destroyed realm had reached heights that mortals should never have. ｜ 如同古时曾制御大地的君王一般，令人望而生畏的龙形战斗机械。\n这架不知疲倦的神秘机械巨兽似乎证明，传说已经覆灭的国度确已触及了人所不应抵达的领域。

- The problem is I didn't leave any spare materials either... ｜ 不过材料都用光了，没有留自己的份…
- But here... I don't have that feeling. Perhaps I did come here in the past, but it just didn't leave a strong impression on me. ｜ 但是在这里，我没有类似的感觉。或许以前的我真的来过这里，但并没有留下什么印象深刻的记忆。

- It's pretty high up there, isn't it? Don't worry, if you're afraid you can't make it up there, I'm sure Master wouldn't mind if you don't clean the statue. ｜ 位置是不是有点高？如果你觉得爬上去比较勉强，不打扫也没关系，师父不会介意的。

- What!? There's someone else here? ｜ 哎？！这里竟然还有别人？
- But how? Like... pinch ourselves? ｜ 怎么醒来？掐自己吗？
- Sofas ｜ 沙发
- You find Rawat's journal within a hidden compartment, and it seems to record the location of a private lab... ｜ 你在隔层中找到了拉瓦特的笔记，上面记录了一处私人实验室的位置…
- Yes, they are quite amusing. I even wonder if I should start taking notes on the formats of some of the programs. Who knows? Perhaps it'll come in handy for the next Ludi Harpastum. ｜ 嗯，这里的演出节目挺有趣的。我甚至在想，要不要把某些节目的形式记下来，下次羽球节或许用得上。
- The final stone slate you obtained. Secrets within secrets, eh? ｜ 最后拿到的一块石板。在秘密之下还有秘密。
- Careful! ｜ …当心点。
- Guard of the Sword and Strongbox Secure Transport Agency, and the head of the "Mighty Mythical Beasts" Wushou troupe. ｜ 剑匣镖局的镖师，威水舞兽队的话事人。
- Let's be quiet and just listen in. ｜ 我们就安静当听众就好了吧。
- An ancient and mysterious roll of parchment. It looks like a note left by an adventurer. New words keep appearing on it. ｜ 一卷古老而神秘的羊皮纸，看上去是某个冒险家留下来的笔记。似乎不断有新的文字出现。
- I'm sorry to trouble you. This was all my fault... ｜ 对不起，都怪我，又要劳烦你们帮忙了…
- Expose hidden trigger to start driving ｜ 出隐藏触发器开始开车$HIDDEN
- A massive amount of Pyro energy is coursing through this scorching ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou will get scorched by merely being here.\nYou shall earn Talent level-up materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座炽热的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的火元素之力。\n置身其中会受到持续的高热灼烧。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得令人天赋成长的物质。
- Hmm... I think the most suitable model is... Xu Liushi! ｜ 嗯…最合适的模特就是…徐六石瞭望手！
- It's precisely because of the environment that such phlogiston-packed fruit can grow in the first place. ｜ 正是在这样的环境里，才能生长出那些贮藏燃素的果子。
- Why not? Is it because the Fatooey are bad, bad people? Dadda says that they don't brush their teeth before they sleep and eat with their hands... ｜ 为森么呀？是不是因为…驴人众很坏很坏？把拔缩，碎觉卜刷牙、赤饭时用手抓…
- A strange machine that can imitate the power of a God? Wow, haha, I didn't know the Fatui had plans like that. Their imaginations are truly running wild. ｜ 奇怪的装置？甚至能模仿神的能力？啊哈哈，愚人众还有这种计划吗，真是异想天开啊。

- Yes. I know it sounds like a huge honor, inheriting both these titles from Vennessa... ｜ 是的，继承温妮莎大人的名号虽然十分荣幸…
- "All comments will be screened and evaluated by staff before they are posted. Please refrain from leaving comments that are over-the-top and be nice!" ｜ 「出于多种考量，所有留言将由工作人员审核后发表，也请各位观众不要发表太过激烈的言论，友善地留言！」
- Oh, you know, I seem to remember that you have a lot of homework today. ｜ 唉…我记得，你今天还有不少功课要做吧？
- In any case, have you encountered any Sacred Simulacra in your adventures? Those were ritual spirits often used by people in ancient times to protect their homes. There should be some nearby. ｜ 先前你们四处冒险时，不知是否遇到过「仙像」呢？那是古时常用的仪式精灵，当时的人们常常用它守护家宅。这周边应当也有仙像。
- So, here, take a seat. Let go of your troubles, and I will help you relax. ｜ 请坐，抛下你的一切烦恼，由我陪你放松片刻吧。

- Yep. We'll leave the Children of Echoes to you guys. Flower-Feather Clan, hang in there, we're coming! ｜ 嗯，那回声之子的人就交给你们了，我们去花羽会！
- C'mon, everyone, up and at 'em! Stormstress's got the wind at our backs! ｜ 伙伴们！在「信风舞姬」的支援下压制对手吧！

- Diona's outfit. The work uniform of the Cat's Tail's star bartender. ｜ 迪奥娜的装扮款式。猫尾酒吧明星调酒师工作时的日常装束。

- The Mausoleum of King Deshret ｜ 赤王陵
- Lucky Dog's Goblet ｜ 幸运儿之杯

- Like... dying for a cause? ｜ 死得其所的意思吗？
- Defeat %2% Blazing Axe Mitachurl(s) ｜ 击败%2%个火斧丘丘暴徒
- Indeed, and that is one of my clan's great virtues! ｜ 没错，那正是我们家族的美德之一！
- Traveler, have you already wiped out the monsters in that camp? ｜ 旅行者，你已经把那片营地里的魔物都清理掉了吗？
- Why not just ask the amazing Albedo? ｜ 为什么不问神奇的阿贝多？
- You mean... ｜ 你的意思是说…
- Please, take these notes of mine. Just give them a quick flick through when you encounter scenery on your journey. Perhaps they'll help you take pictures of even greater artistry! ｜ 那就请你们收下我的手记，之后的旅途中，没事对着眼前的风景读一读，也许眼前就能浮现出富有张力的构图！
- S—Sorry! ｜ 对——对不起！

- Get some rest, Ei. ｜ 影也是。
- Who's Mayta? ｜ 马伊塔是谁？
- That's because I'm despicable. I figure that if I say all these things, kind people like you wouldn't have the heart to ask me for things in return, right? ｜ 因为我是很卑鄙的。这些话说出来，你们这么善良的人肯定就不好意思向我讨要报酬了，对吧？

- Sure. ｜ 没问题。
- ... ｜ ……

- Who are you? ｜ 你是？
- Hahaha... You're so unreasonable, my lady. ｜ 哈哈哈…你可真不讲道理啊，小姐。
- So. Still an undergraduate, huh? ｜ 你还没有毕业？
- Ah, I understand now. You really are an interesting person, Detective Heizou. ｜ 原来如此，我明白了…鹿野院阁下真是有趣的人。
- Good to know. As for the issue you needed my help with, I have someone on the case — you can expect a resolution very shortly. ｜ 这样就好。你交代我的事情，我也已经派人去处理了，很快就会有结果。

- If it wasn't for my injury... I could be out there chasing down even bigger treasure hoards with the captain and my old crew mates... ｜ 要是没受伤…肯定能和大姐头一起，找到更多宝藏吧…
- Gambler's Brooch ｜ 赌徒的胸花
- You know as well as I do that she's always been like this. Why start fretting about it now? ｜ 我说，过去那么多年她都是这样，现在你又是为什么担心呢？
- I don't, and neither do I care. ｜ 不知道，也没兴趣。
- Yes! My wife needs Zaytun Peaches for cooking meals. Ten peaches will do for a couple of days. ｜ 对对，是我老婆做菜要用墩墩桃，有十个的话，就够这两天用了。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Pipe down. The louder you all are, the more nervous she'll become. ｜ 别吵，你们吵起来她就更紧张了。
- *sigh* Let's stop here. Traveler, I've ordered another batch of wood from Hamawi. Please help me take a look at how it's going. ｜ 唉，闲话就说到这，旅行者，我又找哈马维订了一批木头，请你帮我去看看吧。
- What did you realize? ｜ 你思考了什么？
- "I have traveled far and wide in Inazuma since leaving home, and seen many new things along the way. Though material luxuries have not been a feature of my journey, it has yet been a rich and rewarding one, with the boundless earth and sky to call my abode, and all the wonders of nature as my partners in poetry." ｜ 「自离开家以来，一路造访稻妻各地，颇长见识。旅途虽贫苦，但以天地为屋宇，万物为诗友，也是很有滋味。」
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Everything went better than I thought. I'm a little too happy... I'll be fine in a moment... ｜ 比我想象中还顺利。让我有点开心过头了…等一下就好了…
- I got admitted into the Akademiya a few years ago, so I left Mondstadt and came here. ｜ 几年前我收到了教令院的录取通知书，就离开蒙德来这里求学了。
- None, none whatsoever! I'll stake my whole reputation on it — no fakes, no defects! I give you my word! ｜ 没有，绝对没有！我以名誉担保，绝对没有任何瑕疵品！
- Newsflash Field Duration|{param7:F1}s ｜ 「临事场域」持续时间|{param7:F1}秒
- But fret not! I'm here once again to resolve this crisis once and for all, alleviating your fears and dispelling any doubts you may have! ｜ 但不必担心，我再次回到这里，就是为了将这次的危机彻底解决，消除你们的恐慌和疑虑！
- Oh, right! Paimon remembers now. Actually, Paimon guessed who it is already, but y'know, no point in saying it out loud or anything... ｜ 对哦！我想起来了，其实我早就猜到是谁了啦，但是我不说。
- Do you like magic? ｜ 你喜欢魔术吗？
- Amateur Weasel Thief ｜ 新手盗宝鼬
- A perfectly good Jade Chamber... Gone, just like that... ｜ 唉，挺好的一个群玉阁，就这么没了…
- Just watch, I used that money to buy more ore. Once my ore business really gets going, I can finally get out of this dump. ｜ 你看，我用那笔钱买来了更多的矿石，等我矿石的生意周转起来，我就能从这个鬼地方搬走了。
- Oh right, if you suddenly talk about traps from an evil organization, Paimon's not sure if Katheryne can understand. ｜ 对哦，突然跟凯瑟琳小姐说什么邪恶组织的陷阱之类，她应该也听不懂吧？
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Well hello... You found me at last. I've been waiting for you. ｜ 欸，终于找到我了么？我可是等你们好久了。
- With what? Oh, Paimon gets it. It's toys we're making, after all, so we must infuse every process with real passion! ｜ 满满的什么？我明白了，毕竟做的是「玩具」，所以要倾注制作者满满的热爱！
- Feelings About Ascension: Intro ｜ 突破的感受·起
- Touch ｜ 触摸
- But she is presently occupied with other matters, and I happen to have a little time to spare. This will be a good chance for me to pay a visit to the bride and groom. ｜ 但她近日另有事务在身，我又刚好有时间，借此机会见见那两位新人，倒也不错。
- Kageroumaru ｜ 影狼丸
- Perhaps you two have heard of the Akasha before. It's our beloved Greater Lord Rukkhadevata's lasting legacy, a treasure trove of collected knowledge. ｜ 二位或许已经听说过，「虚{RUBY#[D]阿卡西}空」是大慈树王大人留下的遗产，是能够汇集知识的宝库。
- Haha, looks like my efforts have paid off! See, Adelinde? ｜ #哈哈，不枉我事事想着{NICKNAME}，看到了吧，爱德琳。
- Everyone is happy to hear that you are preparing for Festival Utsava with Arama. ｜ 听说你要和兰罗摩一起准备无忧节，大家都很高兴。
- Unfortunately for them, I ruined their plans... Hehe... ｜ 只可惜我碍了他们的事，呵呵…
- ...those Mora-grubbers from the Kanjou Commission. ｜ …是勘定奉行那些唯利是图的家伙。
- Talk to Sorush ｜ 与斯露莎对话
- Charlotte ｜ 夏洛蒂
- After watching Miss Furina's performance, I think I'm starting to understand our director's infatuation with musicals. ｜ 在看了芙宁娜女士的表演后，我逐渐理解为何团长对于音乐剧如此着迷了。
- Finally! At long last, it is done! Fortunately, I remember these specifications... ｜ 终于！全部完成了，幸好我还记得那些制作规范…
- So Collei, what exactly are we going to be doing today? ｜ 柯莱，我们今天都要做些什么？
- It's a little bit like you and the Shogun. ｜ 可能就像将军与你的区别吧。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Sorry. All this talk, and I haven't even introduced myself! Manqu's the name. I am a researcher for the Saurian Relics Association, and am responsible for scholarly inquiries into certain tribal customs... ｜ 抱歉，自顾自地说了那么多还没做自我介绍。我的名字是曼科，是龙遗物研究协会的研究员，负责考察一些部族风俗…
- I was concerned for their safety, so I thought I'd follow them. ｜ 我担心他们的安全，所以就跟出来了。
- "Last month, I sailed to a country whose king had never seen a horse. Can you believe it?" ｜ 「有人相信吗？我上个月出海到了一个国家，他们的国王连马都没见过。」
- All merchants are to strictly abide by the instructions of all harbor officials when unloading goods. Regulations concerning cargo handling are not to be violated! ｜ 望各位商家卸货时严格遵循港务官员指示，杜绝违规操作。
- Hmm... Some of it looks like a construction log... It mentions "Aaru," but there's no way to know if it's in any way connected to Aaru Village. Too bad the records say little more... ｜ 唔…有一些吧，看起来像是什么工程记录…里面提到了「阿如」，不知道和阿如村是什么关系。可惜没有更多记载了…
- So, how has the treasure-hunting been going? ｜ 怎么样？寻宝有什么发现吗？
- Actually, Ma'am... You look very familiar. Have we met before? Here in the shrine? ｜ 说起来，这位巫女小姐…好像有点眼熟？我们以前见过吗？就在这神社里…
- The easier you find it to receive joy, the more energy you have to share that joy with other people. ｜ 很容易就感到幸福的话，就会有很多的能量，然后就可以把幸福的感觉传递给别人。
- Now there's a stone slate! Lucky us, huh? ｜ 是石板！运气不错嘛。
- Two servings of Mora Meat to go. ...Good chat, bye! ｜ 两份摩拉肉，打包带走。我们先告辞了！
- All the same, with you there, I believe such small matters should be no obstacle. In any case, Sorush has only just obtained the Chaplet and cannot collect enough Khvarena. ｜ 不过无妨，有你们在的话，这点小事想来也没有什么妨碍。本来斯露莎刚刚得到花冠，还无从聚集足够的灵光之力。
- I know Watatsumi Island very well. I can carry on being your guide, if you'd like. ｜ 我对海祇岛也很熟悉，可以继续帮你做向导。
- Good. Keep it up. ｜ 嗯，继续吧。
- Canyon Confrontation ｜ 峡谷中的往复
- Event Card ｜ 事件牌
- Don't worry, I'll definitely be back for the big party. But I have some business to attend to in Ritou first. ｜ 放心，我不会错过最后的庆典，只是现在还要去离岛办点事。
- We will return. ｜ 我们还会回来的。
- I asked a lot of people, and Mr. Sayid... You know who he is, right? He's that researcher. ｜ 我问了很多人，然后那位萨义德先生…你知道吗？就是那位学者。
- Hmm...? Who art thou, to disturb mine... Ah, it's you, kind humans. ｜ 嗯…？尔等何人？扰我…啊，是你们，好心的人类…
- Zzz... ｜ 呼…

- ...Yep! ｜ …对！

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Forest Watcher's Considerations.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『巡林官的牵记』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- La vaguelette ｜ 轻涟
- Just like you, I'm a traveler, visiting Mondstadt from another land. ｜ 和你一样，我也是从别处来到蒙德的旅人。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- I've heard all about your accomplishments. Ever since you arrived, I've been hoping to meet you and offer you Natlan's highest level of hospitality. ｜ 你的事迹我都听说了，自你踏入纳塔的那一刻我就想与你见一面，并且给你最高的访客待遇。
- It's just... For people who stumble upon this place by accident, I think my current form is more approachable than my true one... I—I don't want people to get scared when they see me... ｜ 只是…对误入蜃境的旅人来说，比起真身，我现在的样子要更容易亲近吧。我…我不想被人投以害怕的眼神…
- Interesting Things ｜ 感兴趣的见闻…
- Oh! I never would have guessed you had such literary talent. These lines are perfect! ｜ 欸！看不出来，你还挺有天赋的嘛，这一幅真不错。
- Spirit Soother ｜ 安神秘法
- The world opens itself before those with noble hearts. ｜ 只要不失去你的崇高，整个世界都会向你敞开。
- It certainly is a possibility. Also, there are some points regarding the stories of The Five Kasen that have left me rather curious. ｜ 的确有这种可能性。而且，五歌仙故事本身也有一些令我在意的东西。
- The truly great doctors often possess vast medical knowledge as well as great communication skills. And, when the patient and the doctor do not speak the same language, observation and empathy become even more important. That's why Ifa can make friends with just about anyone.\nSuffice it to say, if someone is on bad terms with Ifa — human or saurian — I doubt the problem lies with him, haha. ｜ 除了精湛的医术外，一个好医生往往拥有很强的沟通能力。而当与医患语言不通时，就需要更敏锐的观察力和同理心。这就是为什么伊法总是能和不同性格的人交上朋友吧。\n所以说，如有人或者龙和伊法关系不好…哈哈，我想应该不是伊法的问题。
- Talk to Mary-Ann ｜ 与「玛丽安」对话
- The young researchers of the Akademiya commonly make use of experimental tools to cook. To save time and maximize efficiency, people from Kshahrewar — experts in machinery — have invented this device, which can draw energy from mineral ores to increase their work efficiency.\nUsing these lamps to make coffee or grill meat really has that "laboratory" feel to it, which explains its decent popularity amongst researchers, and how some enthusiasts have made some improvements to it.\nThe superlative burning lamp in your hands is a civilian test type that is meant to be put into mass production. Thus, it has had its output restricted and open flame eliminated to reduce any safety hazards. ｜ 教令院的年轻学者有着利用实验器材进行烹饪的习惯。为了提高效率，节约时间，专精于机关的「妙论派」中有人发明了这种能将矿物中的能量提取出来，增加功率的装置。\n用这种灯来煮咖啡、烤肉是一件很有研究室风情的事情，因此在学者之中相当流行，也有好事者进行了各种改造。\n手中的这盏超燃灯是准备进行投产的民用试验型，限制了出力功率，消除了明火，以降低安全隐患。
- After a good long while... ｜ 过了好一阵子…
- Diligent Samurai ｜ 勤奋的武士
- Investigate the trees inside Ashvattha's Concourse ｜ 调查觉树之堂中的树木
- Well... what can we do about that? Oh, Paimon knows, how about Paimon shares some of her luck with you! ｜ 那…那怎么办，要不这样吧，我把我的运气分一点给你！
- We used to be chefs. ｜ 我们以前是厨师。
- That's my Crystal Light. It's been locked up. ｜ 是我的「晶灯」，被锁起来了…
- Heavy crafting equipment made from Brightwood. It is somewhat difficult to operate compared to ordinary pottery wheels and requires the close cooperation between two users. However, with larger pottery wheels, one can easily craft pottery pieces the height of a person. The wheel is usually locked with a wooden stick to keep playful children away. ｜ 以「辉木」打造的重型工匠设备，相较于普通的制陶桌，操作较为费力，需要两人密切配合，优点则是能制作尺寸接近一人高的大型陶器。平常，以木棍锁定转盘，防止贪玩的孩子将其当成游乐设施。
- Although my body was suffering during those days, that voice encouraged me and told me many wondrous things. ｜ 生病那几天，我虽然身体很难受，但那个声音经常出现鼓励我，还告诉了我许许多多有趣的事。
- That said, being in charge of everything inevitably takes its toll. It's exhausting at times. ｜ 话虽如此，事事亲为仍很费神。
- Invitation Cost ｜ 邀约消耗
- Mm, Paimon's not that thirsty, but thanks anyway! ｜ 嗯…我还不太渴。谢谢你啦，护士长。
- Pahsiv, disappeared! ｜ 珀西芙，无影踪？
- I did indeed call upon some felines to frolic there. Consider it a test of your intellect. ｜ 奴家让几个好动的小猫去那边晃悠，就是为了看看汝等的悟性如何。
- Spiritbreath Thorn/Surging Blade DMG Interval|{param11:I}s/{param12:I}s ｜ 灵息之刺/流涌之刃伤害间隔|{param11:I}秒/{param12:I}秒
- ? ｜ ？

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- About Jeht... ｜ 关于婕德…
- Tutelage: Umigozen's Mansion ｜ 稽古·御前府邸
- Ah, that's the one from yesterday... ｜ 啊，是昨天那个…
- It's probably some roundabout way of cheering us on? ｜ 应该是类似加油一类的话吧。
- ...But you'll have to stay alive to do that. I'm so sorry, can you not hear anything yet? ｜ …但你们得活到那时候才行，真抱歉，你们还没听到什么吗？
- That's quite something! A fine piece of writing! ｜ 哎哟，真不错，这字写得真不错…
- After hearing about the Akademiya Extravaganza from Wiqas, you decide to take on the role as Guest Commentator. Head to the main venue and ask the organizer for the details. ｜ 从维卡斯那里得知了学院庆典的内容，并决定担任「特邀评论员」。到主会场向主持人打听比赛详情吧。
- Stone Gate Bulletin Board ｜ 石门公告板
- And nothing too bad happened! ｜ 也没什么问题嘛！
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- 100 years ago? Are you pulling my leg? What sort of book can remain popular for 100 years? ｜ ——一百年前？你们没在开玩笑吧！什么书能流行一百年啊？
- Defeat all opponents: #1#/%1% ｜ 击败所有敌人 #1#/%1%
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P}+{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}+{param4:F1P}
- Domain of Blessing: Necropolis ｜ 祝圣秘境：骸馆
- Testimony from a resident near The Steambird.\n"If you're asking about anyone suspicious... I did always see a little kid going to the newspaper, but he never went inside. He'd just mosey around near Sir Arthur. Maybe he just likes toys like that." ｜ 蒸汽鸟报社附近居民的证言。\n「要问可疑的家伙…我倒总看见一个小朋友来报社，但他从不进门，只是围着门口的亚瑟先生转悠，可能是喜欢这样的玩具吧。」
- Hehe, great job! Then I assume the corresponding circuits over here should also be working now, too. ｜ 嘿嘿，好！这边对应的机关回路应该也已经能正常运作了吧？
- As a citizen of Liyue, I pray that this place will remain forever safe. But as a Millelith... ｜ 作为一个璃月子民，我期望这里千世万代安宁，但作为一个千岩军…
- It seems that someone in Inazuma City is looking for an exceptional fighter... ｜ 在稻妻城，似乎有人在寻找格外出众的战士…
- What a coincidence. ｜ 真巧。
- Overloaded: Extreme Explosion ｜ 超载·极致爆炎
- The merchant is happy to have another adventurer to protect him. But to be honest, I'm really not good at communicating with people who are that enthusiastic... *sigh* ｜ 那位客商倒是很高兴多了个冒险家来保护他…但老实说，我真的不擅长和这种太过热情的人交流啊，唉…
- Next, I will go to my friends in the Shogunate army to see if there's anything I can help with. I hope to see you again in the future. ｜ 接下来我会去幕府军的朋友那边，看看能帮上什么忙，希望来日有缘再见。
- I... I didn't see... ｜ 我，我也没看到…
- Prince ｜ 「小王子」
- The spring water gushes forth from underground... ｜ 泉水从地下涌出…
- Vijnana Suffusion Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 通塞识持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- About the scent... ｜ 关于气味…
- Biting Shards ｜ 凛冽之刺
- This is clearly a premeditated act. The responsible party's objective has yet to be revealed, so I came here to investigate. ｜ 显然，这是一次有预谋的行动。对方的目的尚未浮出水面，我来海岛就是想查清这一点。
- "Come now, Diluc, be nice! Do you really want to stay here and do nothing at all? We might as well find a way to pass the time. I simply thought collecting seashells might be fun. It was last time — although, we were much younger then." ｜ 「哎呀别那么凶嘛！谁让我们哪里都去不了呢？还不如找点有趣的事打发时间。捞贝壳是个不错的选择哦，想来我们也就小时候一起去捞过贝壳而已。」
- As it turns out, the secretive deal just involved some perfectly normal cargo. You were totally in the dark... ｜ 神秘的交易内容居然最后只是一批普通的货物，你完全被蒙在了鼓里…
- Oh, and there are a couple of good places to eat along our route. We can stop and grab a bite when it's time. ｜ 哦，沿途有几家馆子，都是我常去的好店，到饭点了一起随便吃吃啦？
- Librarian ｜ 图书管理员
- But, he's not as young as he used to be, and he's got some old injuries that still bother him. He's not cut out for any more attempts. ｜ 他年龄大了，还有老伤，真的已经不适合比赛了。
- Isn't that because they also find those meteorites dangerous? ｜ 因为冒险家协会也觉得陨石很危险。
- Notice ｜ 告示
- I feel so... at ease. It's hard to find this feeling anywhere else. ｜ 它让我有一种，其他地方都没有的…安心感？
- Whoa, slow down. Take your time. ｜ 哇，别激动啦，跟我们慢慢说吧。
- I've only seen a few of Director Zosimos's films, so I have some hazy ideas. But we encountered great difficulty trying to realize them. ｜ 我原本只看过佐西摩斯导演展示的几部「映影」，有一些朦胧的想法。可是在实现这些想法的过程中，我们遇到了很多困难。
- The final topic an alchemist must tackle is the study of the very essence of life and the world.\nNor shall the Chief Alchemist of the Knights of Favonius be content to let his research be confined within Teyvat's boundaries.\nYet, to study life from other worlds, he must first find a suitable specimen... ｜ 探究生命与世界的本质，是炼金术士的终极课题。\n西风骑士团的首席炼金术士，他不愿意让他的研究受困于提瓦特的边界。\n而想要研究异世界生命的话，首先需要找到一个优秀的样本…
- Oh, we're out of time today. ｜ 啊，今天的时间要结束了么。
- You sure caught on quickly. ｜ 你很清楚嘛。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Yumemiru "Decorum" Kimono Rack.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「梦见木『礼待』着物架」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- In this challenge, the checkpoints are positioned in a <color=#FFCC33>ring-like shape</color> that <color=#FFCC33>gradually rises</color>. Choose suitable Construction Materials to pave an efficient path. ｜ 在此局挑战中，检定点所处的位置<color=#FFCC33>呈环形分布</color>，且<color=#FFCC33>高度逐渐上升</color>，选择合适的建造物材，搭建出一条合理的通路。
- Then since Fontaine's prophecy is all about seawater, couldn't you just use your power to solve the crisis? ｜ 既然枫丹的预言是跟海水有关，难道没办法用你的力量把危机直接解决掉吗？
- Ah... Ugh... ｜ 扑通。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Yumemiru "Seiken" Offering Box.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「梦见木『诚见』塞钱箱」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Once I have enough data, I find the stories that are connected and cross-reference them. ｜ 在搜集到大量的资料后，我会找出彼此之间有联系的故事，再对这些故事进行「交叉对比」。
- Image Sampling Kamera ｜ 图形样本留影机
- Huitzilopochtli has ceased operation. So, this is your decision, I presume? ｜ 「维奇洛波奇特利」停下了，这就是你做出的选择？
- Fine. I will be here. ｜ 好，反正，我一直在这。
- Bulletin Board ｜ 公告板
- Aouh... ｜ 呀…
- Sweet-Flower Medaka ｜ 甜甜花鳉
- Seal Clue ｜ 封印线索
- Complete Dispelling Disaster: II ｜ 完成祛灾·之二
- Maybe it's because I look like an easy target, but I often run into bandits when I'm on the road — but I always manage to chase them off! I don't go all out, though, because if the company was held liable for the injuries I caused... Well, I'd get canned! ｜ 大概是以为我看起来比较好欺负吧，我送货时，遇到过好多想来抢劫的盗贼。但他们无一例外全被我给打跑了！不过我没有用全力。毕竟…要是打伤了人算到公司头上的话，我可是会被开除的呀！
- Nothing... I'm just a little embarrassed about making people worry about me... ｜ 没事啦…就是，冷不丁被别人操心了一下，还有点不好意思…
- *sigh* It eludes me. Cities truly are mysterious. ｜ 唉，搞不懂，城市可真神秘。
- Hazardous materials. ｜ 都是危险品。
- Still, you have my guarantee as concierge that this is a safe and comfortable place. I sincerely hope you enjoy your time here. ｜ 不过我以「礼宾员」的身份保证，这里是安全又舒适的地方！如果两位能在这里玩得开心，那就更好啦。
- Wow, Talochard really is like a child sometimes... She gets moody so quickly, but also perks up just as quickly... ｜ 哇，托萝莎的性格真的好像一个小孩子啊，低落起来很突然…振作起来也很突然…
- Happy to have another helper. Now, let's go pick some grapes! ｜ 多一个帮手是好事，来，我们去摘葡萄吧。
- The flower quickly withers, barely moments after being in full bloom... ｜ 刚刚盛放的花朵很快便枯萎了…
- I have his Orders with me. ｜ 我带着命令书呢。
- A gamepiece based on Cryo Slimes. Each unit has 3 slimes.\nA small monster created by the sedimentation of Cryo dispersed throughout nature, it is one of the most common dangers faced by adventurers and the security services of various nations alike.\nFor a human warrior with a given amount of training, a single slime poses a very limited threat. But when moving in groups, they become far more dangerous. They can be considered a standard unit for executing Elemental warfare, and discovering effective tactics for dealing with other Elemental creatures. ｜ 以「冰史莱姆」为原型的兵棋，每个单位编有3名成员。\n逸散在自然之中的冰元素沉积形成的小小魔物，也是各国将士与冒险家们最常应对的威胁之一。\n对于经受了一定训练的人类战士而言，单个史莱姆的战力相当有限，但集群行动时，它们的危险性则会大大上升，可被视为运用元素力作战的基准单位，进而探索高效应对其他元素生物的策略。
- *sigh* I'm sorry, but there's a... small issue... with our chain of command. ｜ 唉…真是抱歉。我们的指挥网络发生了一点小小的…故障…
- If all goes well, I will tell you everything I know. ｜ 如果一切「安全」结束，我一定知无不言。
- (Yunyun sticks out its tongue without comprehension, but lets you rub its cheek anyway.) ｜ （云云不解地吐了吐舌头，但还是让你揉了脸颊。）
- Shut it! I couldn't care less about preserving this piece of trash. I would destroy it right now if I could! ｜ 闭嘴，我才不在乎这些愚昧部族的造物，毁了它反倒对我更有利！
- Then I thought of you, Cyno. You and I both wield the same power, yet the lives we lead could not be more different. ｜ 然后我想到你。赛诺，你也拥有这份力量，却过着与我截然不同的人生。
- Amber ｜ 安柏
- Perhaps, perhaps! It's possible, and quite understandable, too. ｜ 或许吧，或许吧。我明白，我也明白。
- The subject of my first research was the elements. In this world, manipulating the elements requires a Vision, though I can't see anything resembling one on your person. ｜ 说回第一项研究，是关于元素力的。这个世界的人想要使用元素力，就必须拥有神之眼，但我没看到你身上有类似的东西。

- Ragged Records ｜ 残破的记录
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- So you mean we still need to investigate some more? Okay... If you say so... ｜ 还是要继续调查吗…好、好吧…
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- If we're talking about a "true culprit," that could only be "that thing" inside the Primordial Sea, right? ｜ 说到可能作为罪魁祸首的家伙，也只能是存在于胎海之中的「它」了吧？
- Talk to the mysterious person ｜ 与神秘人对话
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Yep, totally agree! If only I'd known you were looking for this chest... ｜ 说的是，说的是！没想到北斗大姐头也用得上这宝箱…
- Although things are different now, even the Akademiya was unable to handle the cores back then. ｜ 虽然现在情况不同了，不过在当时，就连教令院也没有处理这些炉心的办法。
- Everlasting Lord of Arcane Wisdom ｜ 七叶寂照秘密主
- The Mikawa Flower Festival! The humans are gonna... They're gonna... What were they gonna do? ｜ 我想起来了！人类在办「三川花祭」！要抓吾等…要抓吾等…干什么来着…
- Tiny Miracle's Feather ｜ 奇迹之羽
- Old Maintenance Raven ｜ 维修工老鸦
- Let me make some adjustments. ｜ 容我再调整一下状态。
- #Uh... Um, hey there, {NICKNAME} and Paimon. What do you need from me? ｜ #呃，那个…{NICKNAME}，还有派蒙小姐，找薇蕾有什么事吗？
- Berserker's Bone Goblet ｜ 战狂的骨杯
- Surely his power cannot match that of the astrological genius of the century? ｜ 难道他比身为罕见占星天才的莫娜女士更强大？
- I'll use them to brew some tea. Hopefully, that'll do my throat some good... ｜ 我等会就拿它们去泡茶喝，希望能让我的嗓子好受些…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Nay, say not so, Dominus. We took up arms against divine destiny, and our deeds challenged the laws of heaven. We resisted that prophecy, resisted it most valiantly... ｜ 不，大人。我们曾向天命举起刀剑，我们创造的事业挑战了高天的律法。面对那个预言，我们奋起反抗…
- Paimon remembers that he played against Itto some time back, didn't he? Why'd he come all the way here to Mt. Aocang? ｜ 上次他好像在和一斗一起玩耍来着？这回怎么跑到奥藏山来了…
- What do you suggest? ｜ 嗯？怎么说？
- The lift is running... ｜ 升降机正在运行中…
- Flowing Flame ｜ 流火焦灼
- Keep your voice down, and I can show you some real goodies... ｜ 小点声，我给你看看这里的好东西…
- Overwhelming Force ｜ 多重猛击
- As the Khvarena's Light Shows ｜ 如是灵光悉示现

- It didn't cost anything... ｜ 并没有那么贵…
- Beastly Rift ｜ 兽境裂隙
- A meticulously well-maintained woman's hat that keeps wrinkles safely out of sight. ｜ 精心保养的女士帽，即使是眼角的皱纹也可以完美遮盖。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Huh!? What were those last two!? ｜ 欸！你刚才说什么味道！？
- Sustained Warmth ｜ 和煦的延音
- To think that Mr. Toranosuke would have time... ｜ 虎之助先生居然有空…
- Even the strings look specially designed to keep the bags closed nice and tight. ｜ 连系绳都是特制的，可以紧紧扎住袋口。

- Who're you talking about, huh? What do you mean, "not on caring for them"? So you're an expert, is that it? After studying Sumpter Beasts for just a couple days? Huh? ｜ 谁不会养？你说谁不会养！你会养，你上了几天学你就会养？嗯？
- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- Harbors are transport hubs, after all. Can't ever be too careful. ｜ 码头毕竟是交通枢纽，必须谨慎行事。
- Babel ｜ 芭别尔
- Omelette Rice ｜ 蛋包饭

- The mechanism at the center of this Domain will constantly fire a barrage of projectiles. Evade them till the time limit ends.\nA certain amount of Facundity will be lost each time you are hit by a projectile. The projectiles may change during the challenge. ｜ 秘境中心的机关将不断释放弹幕。躲避弹幕，坚持到限定时间结束。\n被弹幕命中后将损失一定的「表现力」。挑战期间，弹幕可能发生变化。
- "Oh no, the ship! This is Ako Domeki's pride and joy! I can't believe it... Ako only just gave us the ship, and now we're suddenly stranded here on this island in the middle of nowhere, and all our treasure's gone! We had this coming... This is our punishment! Oh, we never should have stolen that stupid puppet! Why, why did we—"\n"Shut it! We are going to fix Captain Ako's ship, you hear? No matter what it takes!" ｜ 「糟了，这可是赤穗百目鬼的宝贝船啊！才交给我们就搁浅在这种鬼地方，钱和珠宝也全丢了…报应，都是报应！就不该偷那台该死的傀儡武士，我们…」\n「闭嘴！赤穗老大给我们的船，无论如何都要修好！」
- The king has issued a formal decree. In light of the irrefutable proof of your crime, you're to be executed before tomorrow's sunrise. If you want to escape, it has to be now. ｜ 国王已经下令，物证确凿，明天日出之前就要将你们处刑，要逃的话只有现在了。

- *sigh* This isn't good enough. It's evident from these past few days that practice alone isn't enough to improve our marksmanship. ｜ 这也太惨了…不过从这几天的情况来看，想要提升射箭的「技巧」，单纯的重复训练是不够的。
- The briefcase used by the General Mahamatra Cyno has an approximately cylindrical cross section and has ornaments that signify its status. This briefcase can hold more documents and implements than the standard style that the Akademiya uses. Of course, the need to use so many objects in a single investigation indicates that the task is of such extreme complexity that only a few people in the Akademiya can accomplish it — chief among them, of course, being General Mahamatra Cyno.\nThe briefcase's large size has also been an encumbrance: Every time Cyno leaves the house with this briefcase, he will invariably be spotted by various people, and word will quickly spread that "the General Mahamatra is off on official duty," which can get in the way of his investigations. As such, Cyno often takes advantage of this notion by going out empty-handed and acting like he's not working, which can catch his targets off guard, or by taking the briefcase to the tavern to sit at a table for a long game of Genius Invokation TCG until any onlookers tire of watching him. With time, the briefcase has thus come to symbolize the "unpredictable work hours of the General Mahamatra." ｜ 大风纪官赛诺专用的公文包，截面近似圆筒形，装有彰显身份的饰物。相比教令院标准的款式，这种公文包能够容纳更多文件与器具。当然，需要在一次调查行动中用到如此之多的器物，说明这项任务极其复杂，放眼教令院也只有寥寥数人能完成，其中为首的自然就是大风纪官赛诺了。\n公文包过大的尺寸也会带来一些不便之处：每当赛诺带着这个公文包出门时，都会被各种人目击，「大风纪官要去执行公务」的消息很快就会传播开来，不利于进行调查。因此，赛诺时常利用这种惯性思维，空手出门，摆出一副没在工作的样子，打对方一个措手不及，或是带着这个公文包去酒馆休息，坐在桌边悠悠哉哉玩上半天的「七圣召唤」，让对方的眼线疲于盯梢。久而久之，这个公文包逐渐成了一种象征——「大风纪官飘忽不定的公务时间」。
- Humanity's best friend!\nThis canine breed sports three-colored fur, a result of many bloodlines mixing. Specimens of this species are strong and more intelligent than most, and thus are often kept as pets or work dogs.\nIt is said, however, that Chestnut Hunting Hounds will show a lazier, more gluttonous side to themselves when not given orders by their master. Most notably, they never refuse offers of food, resulting in upset stomachs and owners alike. ｜ 人类最好的朋友！\n毛皮呈三色的犬类，有着多种犬类相融的血统，体格健壮，较为聪敏，多被当做宠物犬和工作犬培育。\n但据说深栗猎犬没有接到主人的命令时，常表现得过于放松，相当贪吃，对陌生人的食物总是来者不拒，因此常常闹肚子，让饲主担忧不已。

- \nI kept going and ran into some trouble at bottom of the tree hollow. But Arama helped me deal with it without too much of a fuss.\nArama's memories may have been affected with the use of power. My current objective is to remove the seal in this area.\nIt looks like the seal contains the powers of many Aranara and that its key component is a Stone Lock. ｜ \n继续深入后来到了树洞的底部。遇到了一些糟糕的情况，但在兰罗摩的帮助下无惊无险地解决了。\n兰罗摩的记忆似乎因为使用能力，受到了影响。目前的目标是解开这附近的封印。\n封印似乎是由各种兰那罗的能力构成的，其中的关键好像是「石头锁」。

- No, they are a tolerant sort. As long as you don't ruffle their feathers, you'll be fine. ｜ 不，这群绅士们都很宽容，只要你不直接上去摸羽毛就行。
- What in the world are you saying... ｜ 你在说什么怪话…

- What is my truth...? ｜ 属于我的真实吗…

- After a fierce battle, the vanquished Durin crashed to ruin here, falling into the thick snow. ｜ 激战最后，被打败的杜林从空中坠落，跌入了茫茫白雪。

- A blue arrow fletching imbued with the sentiment of travelers that had once faded into the horizon. ｜ 蓝色的箭羽，其上凝结着旅人消逝远去的眷恋。
- Hobbies? Rock 'n' roll, of course! You ever have that something you put your all into? When everything you love comes together into one thing, the place and time loses all importance. You just need to enjoy it to the fullest, and express yourself to your heart's content! Haha... Ah, I can never get enough of that feeling. ｜ 爱好那当然是摇滚！你有没有全情投入过某件事呢？当你与你最爱的东西合二为一，时间空间什么的都不再重要，只需要尽情享受，尽情宣泄——对对！这样沉醉进去的感觉，上百次上千次都不够！
- Stop it! ｜ 被打了！
- But we can remove the Abyss threat against your tribe if we can find it, and that would be amazing, too! ｜ 不过要是能找到的话，就能帮助部族的大家解除深渊的威胁了，也是一件大好事呢！

- Gifts? What are you going to give us? ｜ 赠送礼物？你要送我们什么好东西？
- That's fine, we're not forcing everyone to accept this. Personally, I just think it would be great if everyone thought things through before taking an animal's life. ｜ 没关系，我们并不强求所有人都接受，但我个人希望所有人在杀生前想一想这件事。
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 5 consecutive shots with a bow.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nPerforms a more precise <color=#FFD780FF>Aimed Shot</color> with increased DMG.\nWhile aiming, flames will accumulate on the arrowhead before being fired off as an attack. Has different effects based on how long the energy has been charged:\n·Charge Level 1: Fires off a flaming arrow that deals <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color>.\n·Charge Level 2: Generates a maximum of 3 Kindling Arrows based on time spent charging, releasing them as part of this Aimed Shot. Kindling Arrows will home in on nearby opponents, dealing <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG</color> on hit.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nFires off a shower of arrows in mid-air before falling and striking the ground, dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多五段的连续弓箭射击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n进行伤害更高、更为精准的<color=#FFD780FF>瞄准射击</color>。\n瞄准时，火焰会在箭矢上持续积聚，并随攻击发射出去。根据蓄力时间长短，能造成不同的效果：\n·一段蓄力：射出附有烈焰的箭矢，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害</color>；\n·二段蓄力：依据蓄力时间，产生至多3枚焰硝矢，随宵宫这次瞄准射击释放。焰硝矢会自行追踪附近的敌人，并在命中时造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中射出箭雨，并迅速下坠冲击地面，在落地时造成范围伤害。
- The protagonist doesn't have any particularly exciting abilities, but never fails to defeat strong opponents. It's all thanks to their wealth of experience and cunning strategies. ｜ 这本书的主角没有特别酷炫的能力，却能不断战胜强敌，靠的就是稳定的积累和出其不意的策略。
