- Ugh, that attack came out of nowhere... Should've paid more attention to my surroundings... ｜ 都怪我沉迷战斗，没注意到有人偷袭…
- {0}/{1} ｜ {0}/{1}
- That's why, when the world became pitch black, the Kitsune Saiguu was worried that Ioroi might die while fighting against this inexorable evil in his capacity as protector of the forest. ｜ 所以，当天地变得漆黑时，「狐斋宫」担心五百藏为了守护森林，会挺身与绝对无法抗衡的强敌战斗，并因此死去。
- Crimson Agates seem to contain a bizarre power that does not belong to this land, and it is coveted by monsters and evildoers alike. Defeat them, and these crystals may yet be yours. ｜ 绯红玉髓中寄寓着似乎不属于这片大地的诡谲能量，也是渴慕力量的魔物与恶徒的目标。如果能击败这些敌人，或许就能得到这种结晶了。
- Recipe: Fine Tea, Full Moon ｜ 食谱：茶好月圆
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- In fairness, repeating a few set phrases ad nauseum is all parrots know how to do. ｜ 毕竟鹦鹉只会重复它掌握了的词。
- Please try this! ｜ 请尝尝这个！
- Besides, we might actually pick up a thing or two from you. Like going on adventures with the Fungi, or putting ourselves in a dire situation to make our bond a little more... resilient! ｜ 而且，说不定我们也能向你学习呢，比如…一起和蕈兽伙伴冒险，适当吃一点点苦，来让我们的默契更加…坚不可摧！
- But since the Princess's tower has been unsealed, we should move as soon as we can, right? ｜ 但是，既然现在公主的高塔封印已经解除，我们要尽快行动才行，对吧？
- And you are...? ｜ 你是…
- Since my life is like rain and my death is like tea. ｜ 既然我生如雨，我灭如茶。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- Chauvigne... Why are you still angry? *sigh* Perhaps you really shouldn't have ventured outside... ｜ 肖维涅…你究竟在为什么生气？唉，也许你真的不该去外面远游…
- Hehe, you're excited too, huh, little guy... Let's head back and report to Kimosi and company. ｜ 嘿嘿，小家伙也很兴奋…我们回去向基莫西他们报告吧。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Reckless Toy Guard ｜ 冒失的积木小人
- Many deserve thanks on this occasion — Director Hu for her steadfastness, the Ministry of Civil Affairs for their leadership... ｜ 璃月之难，既是堂主果决，又是总务司统管，由众人合力，方才转祸为福。
- Let's see if we can find any clues here before we plan our next step. ｜ 这样吧，我们先在附近找找线索，再做下一步打算。
- Ugh, there's no use in complaining. That's no way to celebrate... ｜ 哎呀，不说了，不说了。大过节的可不能这样…
- Adventures just aren't that lucrative these days. Even though I got these jobs via the Adventurers' Guild, in actual fact most of them are just running errands for other people. ｜ 现在冒险活动实在不怎么赚钱，所以虽然说是冒险家协会，实际大部分时候都在到处帮人忙。
- Apparently, the exhibitor paid a large sum to rent out the hotel and surrounding buildings. They're being used as temporary storage facilities and lodging for exhibition personnel. ｜ 听说策展方出了一大笔钱，租下了旅馆和周边的建筑，来充当临时仓库和相关人员的住所。
- DoT|{param1:P} ｜ 持续伤害|{param1:P}
- Complete Place of Interest: Den of Thieves ｜ 完成「调查点·匪贼之窝」
- Whoa... Ugh, okay. ｜ 唔…可恶，好吧。
- What were the orders you received? Let's double-check. ｜ 是的。你接到的命令是什么？我们再核对一下。
- I'll mark all the camps I've stayed at on the map for you, so please take a look at those spots. ｜ 我把这次待过的营地标注在你的地图上，请你去那边看看吧。
- Is this Julien's letter? Looks like he's already left... Hope things go well for him in the future! ｜ 这是于连留下的信吗？看来他已经离开了…希望他之后能一切顺利！
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Stonehut of Echoes: High-Top Boots."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「回声石屋-『高筒长靴』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- A gamepiece based on Hydro Samachurls.\nA wizened, mumbling hilichurl, one that chants of the power of Hydro. For reasons unknown they have mastered the secret of summoning water and rain.\n"Hydro" often plays a pivotal role on the battlefield, and effectively using the effects created by its power can yield considerable advantages. Using these commonly-found Hydro Samachurls as a starting point to research water-based tactics not only acts as a cost-saving measure, but allows for steady, incremental progress. ｜ 以「水丘丘萨满」为原型的兵棋。\n嘟嘟囔囔的老年丘丘人，水元素的吟颂者，因不明原因掌握了生水唤雨的秘诀。\n「水」在战斗中时常发挥出关键的作用，合理运用各种水力与水元素造成的影响，能为战士们获取可观的优势。从寻常可见的水丘丘萨满切入，研究水的战术，显然是一种成本可控，循序渐进的方案。
- Okay, okay... *sigh*... ｜ 好、好吧…唉…
- Login Failed ｜ 登录失败
- Come in, come in! We are having a discount at Angel's Share! ｜ 不进来坐坐吗？「天使的馈赠」酒馆优惠酬宾哦！
- Inazuma Remarkable Chest Reward ｜ 稻妻地区奇馈宝箱奖励
- I went to look for Kinich, since he's got the better head for investigating between us. Yesterday, he sent word that he found Aphids with Abyssal contamination. ｜ 我去找了基尼奇，他在调查这方面比较在行。昨天他传来消息，确实发现了被深渊污染的蜜虫。
- I had this super high fever, and Granny wasn't around. I was feeling all icky and gross. But then, this snowy-white crane flew down from the sky! ｜ 那年我发了高烧，奶奶不在身旁。我只觉得身体很烫、很不舒服，就在这时，有一只纯白无瑕的仙鹤从天而降。

- Scriptwriting and performances are our greatest strengths at the Yun-Han Opera Troupe, and we love doing them, but beyond the stage... Well, that can get tricky. ｜ 写戏演戏是我们整个云翰社最擅长、也最喜欢做的事，但场外因素…嗯…应对起来就比较麻烦。
- Hee-hee~ Paimon's in a really great mood today! Dunno why, but Paimon's head is filled with happy thoughts! ｜ #哼哼~{NICKNAME}，不知道为什么，刚才我突然想起了一些开心的事，感觉心情很不错！
- ...Hmm? ｜ 欸？
- *deep breath* It's really no big deal. Two points aren't enough to decide victory or defeat just yet. ｜ 呼…也不是什么大事，不就是两点积分嘛，又不会直接决定胜负。
- Hey, did you hear that? Seems there's some sort of strange noise coming from up there. ｜ 咦，你听到了吗？上面似乎传来了什么奇怪的声音。
- In this place where streams and waves converge, the People of the Springs gather to honor your bravery. ｜ 涓流与浪涛皆归于此地，流泉之众，在此集结！
- Yay! Sweet Flower it is then! ｜ 好耶！就决定是甜甜花了！
- No, don't get me wrong. I'm not driving you away... ｜ …不，我不是在赶你走…
- It's a real pity that he couldn't be around for this. As well as being a true connoisseur of traditional art forms, he's able to appreciate Xinyan's performances, too... ｜ 钟离先生不在这里，多少有些可惜，他是位相当懂行的观众，又欣赏得来辛焱的演出…
- Although Master Diluc appears to have little interest in wine, ｜ 虽然迪卢克老爷似乎并不怎么喜欢酒…
- ...Back to the point. I... I, "Hanachirusato," am filth condensed from the memory of the Kitsune Saiguu. ｜ …言归正传。我…我「花散里」，是「狐斋宫」大人的记忆，凝聚而成的污秽。
- How can the information in the Akasha be inaccurate...? What the Akasha decrees is fact — that is common knowledge to all of us... ｜ 虚空中的信息…怎么可能是假的呢，这对我们来说应该是常识的范畴…
- Is that so... Very well. Then please speak, witness of Teyvat, my accuser and fated opponent. ｜ 是吗…也好，既是指控人，又是见证者，还是我命中注定的对手。
- "Wealth leads to unending conflicts between people, yet you alone transcend the value of gold. Baleful thunder and wrathful waves bring terror to mortal hearts, yet again and again, you've braved them to find new worlds." ｜ 「财富令人争夺不休，而你越过了黄金；雷霆与怒涛令人心生恐惧，你却渡过汪洋。」
- Though, I don't really believe Taj would ever try to do something like that. I'm just telling you what I know. It's the job of the matra to find the truth and track down criminals. ｜ 我自己也不相信塔杰会做这种事。我只是提供我知道的线索，调查真相、抓捕犯人是你们风纪官的职责。
- The third line should be something about delicious food... ｜ 第三句好像是什么好吃的东西来着…
- Guest Message ｜ 客人留言
- Ooh, that sounds good... Paimon's feeling relaxed already. ｜ 光是听听就觉得自己轻松了好多！
- This information is very useful to me. I'm so grateful. Here's some compensation, please take it. ｜ 这些信息对我来说都非常有用，实在感谢，这些报酬还请你不要推辞。
- Fitting, isn't it? That the City of Freedom should be home to children with such boundless powers of imagination. ｜ 生在自由之都，这些孩子理应拥有无穷的想象力。
- How's it going, Traveler? Did you place the order for me? ｜ 旅行者，怎么样？你帮我订到货了吗？

- Do you really dare? ｜ 你敢吗？
- Jut's Spices Advertisement ｜ 朱特香料店广告
- Is Yoimiya in? ｜ 请问宵宫在吗？
- Are young people so rare here? ｜ 年轻人很少见吗？
- We heard you were out searching for clues, and we wanted to help. ｜ 听说你们在调查线索，我们想来帮忙。
- Anyway, don't you think it's super quiet here? No strange mechanical monsters around the statue and stuff... This place is so different from other parts of Ochkanatlan... ｜ 不过话说回来，这地方还真是安静呢。雕像附近也没有什么奇怪的机器怪物，和奥奇卡纳塔其他地方真是天差地别呢…
- One moment... Huh. There's still some missing. ｜ 好的…还是少了…
- Really? Let me see them! Wow... these really are the official Orders of the Knights! ｜ 真的？给我看看。哇…真的是骑士团的命令书。
- And you are...? ｜ 你是…？
- #Good morning, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，早。
- I mean, I'm retired now. No shame in losing for me now, right? Haha. ｜ 都退役了，也没什么丢脸不丢脸的了，哈哈。
- "...To no longer be bound by complex morality or by hierarchy and obligation. To breathe the free air for the first time, and to receive freedom's fruit in turn..." ｜ 「…不再被繁杂的道德拘束，不再有等级和义务的羁绊。第一次呼吸到自由的空气，第一次获得自由的报酬…」
- Oh, Paimon gets it. If people start to ask those kinds of questions, the stories suddenly become a lot less inspirational. ｜ 有道理，要是产生了这种疑问，就没有什么鼓舞的作用了。
- Hat Guy, I'm back! ...Hmm? What were you guys talking about? ｜ 阿帽，我回来了。嗯？你们刚才聊什么了吗？
- Did you manage to find them? ｜ 那些东西，你都找到了吗？

- That amazing? ｜ 这么厉害？
- No... no! Impossible! ｜ 不…不——！不可能！

- ...Mostly because if he'd just managed to get one more drink down him, Wagner would have had to name his most prized weapon "Pinky the Rabbit"... *sigh* ... ｜ …他要是能再多喝一杯，瓦格纳就要给自己最满意的兵器起名叫「粉红毛兔兔」了，唉…
- #Well, I've fought my fair share of battles, both big and small. And I say, after the show {F#she}{M#he} put on just now, {F#she}{M#he}'s more than convinced me of {F#her}{M#his} ability. ｜ #大大小小的战斗，我也经历过无数次了，只看这一场，我也能清楚感觉到{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}强劲的实力。
- But within The Chasm, the medium through which the Spike's energy travels is not soil but rock, which has very different properties. This caused a major discrepancy between the earlier calculations and the actual results. ｜ 可在层岩巨渊这里，光钉的能量传播的介质不是泥土，而是质料属性不同的岩石，这种变化使原先计算的结果产生了偏差。

- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}

- Good day to you both. It's been quite a long time. You're looking well, as ever. ｜ 贵安，两位。好久不见了，你们还是很有精神呢。

- Could it be related to the wedding announcement? ｜ 是不是和之前宣布的婚事有关系啊？

- Are you in trouble? Let me help you out, then escort you back. ｜ 遇到麻烦了？我帮你，然后再带你回去。
- Report the situation to Zhiping ｜ 向治平汇报情况
- It's just that... it doesn't seem like Clervie is lying either... ｜ 可是，难道克雷薇在说谎吗？总觉得也不太像…
- I'll give you a clue: She's currently in charge of the Shogun's Army, she visits the shrine at this time every month, and she is our guest today. ｜ 正统领着幕府军的人，每个月的这个时间，都会来神社祭拜，也是我们今天的客人。

- Take care, Almighty Shogun. You too, Traveler... And you too, um, uh... y—you take care too, anyway. ｜ 将军大人慢走，旅行者慢走，还有这位…呃…总之，也请慢走。
- Do you know Siraj? ｜ 你认识西拉杰？
- A potion that keeps one from getting electro-shocked. Induces a tingling sensation when drank. However, its principle is to fill the body with inversely-charged electrons to cancel out the damage from being electro-shocked. ｜ 可以防止触电的药水。喝下去感觉酥酥麻麻的奇特药物，据说绝缘的原理其实是让人体内充满相反的雷电，以此抵消电击的伤害。
- Navia ｜ 娜维娅
- Looks pretty lush to Paimon. Doesn't it look nice? ｜ 明明看上去还很茂盛，感觉很亲切呢！
- What... Are you here to peddle goods like the Fontaine guy? I don't have time for this. ｜ 什么啊…你也是来推销货物的吗？我可没空听你说闲话。
- There is still some preparation to do, but don't worry. Everything's on track. ｜ 不用担心，准备工作在逐步推进。

- Complete the challenge and reach a rating of A ｜ 完成挑战且评价达到A

- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Is this what they call "fellowship between countrymen"? ｜ 是「同乡之谊」吗？
- I know a good diver. ｜ 我认识一个擅长潜水的人。
- What happened? Who beat you all up? ｜ 怎么回事？你们是被谁打成这个样子的？
- Narrator ｜ 旁白
- Exactly. Usually, when someone tells us they've lost something, we end up searching all over the place for it. But this time, you managed to solve the problem with just a big stack of documents... ｜ 是啊，一般听说钗子丢了，我们的第一反应都是到处去找。从来没想过，用这么一大堆文书来解决问题…
- Come. Before our dear Favonian friends arrive. ｜ 走吧，趁骑士团还没赶来。
- So, what would you say to that? This question's really interesting, but Paimon's already hungry for answers! ｜ 唔，那么答案是什么呢？因为这个问题太神奇了，让人很好奇。
- Very well. The story begins before the Court of Fontaine as you know it was born... ｜ 嗯，那是在你们熟悉的「枫丹廷」尚未诞生的过去…
- Vanarana ｜ 桓那兰那
- Honed in flame! ｜ 束火！
- Actually, there is another key factor behind my reasoning, though you may not believe me. ｜ 其实我还有一个更关键的理由，只是你们也许不会信。
- So you came all the way to the Thousand Winds Temple, then what? You were trapped by the mechanism? ｜ 一路走到了千风神殿，然后呢？被困在机关里了吗？
- "Hans Archibald?" Anemo Archon Barbatos softly speaks Stanley's true name and whips up a gentle breeze. As Hans releases his old friend's spirit into the care of the Anemo Archon, he catches one last glimpse at the face of his dear friend, the adventurer whose name he has cried out so many times in the course of his life... ｜ 「汉斯・亚齐博尔德？」，轻念着眼前人原本的名字，风神巴巴托斯唤起了温柔的风。当名为汉斯・亚齐博尔德的冒险家将故友的灵魂交给风神时，他再次看到了那被他呼唤了千万遍的旧友，向他伸出手来…
- Trying to sleep? Hehe, alright. I'll be generous and let you try my Mora Hypnosis! Don't say I never gave you anything! It goes like this: 10,000 Mora in my coin purse, 20,000 Mora in my coin purse, 30,000 Mora in my coin purse, 40... 40,000 Mora hehe... Mora hehe... Zzz... ｜ 你要睡觉了吗？嘿嘿，我就大发慈悲让你试试我的摩拉歌谣催眠法吧！一万摩拉入口袋，两万摩拉入口袋，三万摩拉入口袋，四、嘿四万…嘿嘿，摩拉，嘿嘿…
- I don't fully understand yet. But my intuition tells me that the reason for everything... it's that seed. ｜ 我还不能完全理解。但直觉告诉我，一切的根源…就是那颗种子。
- Untimely Enthusiasm ｜ 不太适时的热情
- Oh? I take it that you are not from around here, then. ｜ 嗯？这么问的话，您是从国外来的吗？
- That's right granny. We'll follow you back home, and search for it ourselves! ｜ 对，婆婆，我们陪您回家，然后我们自己来找。
- Autumn ｜ 秋
- Are you two hurt? I brought bandages and hemostatics. ｜ 你们有受伤吗？我带了绷带和止血药。
- ...Ah to heck with it! How often do you get to come to the city? Let's not get hung up over the prices! ｜ 不管了。你也难得来一趟须弥城，别光顾着考虑摩拉的问题！
- Lirio ｜ 莉莉尤
- The floorboards need sweeping, the rugs need washing, maybe even replacing, and as for all those books on the shelves... Looks like they could do with someone going through and organizing them a little better. ｜ 地板需要打扫，地毯也需要重新洗涤和更换，还有书架上的书籍…看上去也该重新整理整理了。
- I'm here about those items you needed... ｜ 关于筹备的物资…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- You're right... We should leave the other case to Cyno. There's not much we can do from here, anyway. ｜ 嗯…那边的问题就交给赛诺处理吧，我们光是在这里想也是浪费时间。
- / ｜ /
- Natlan Shrine of Depths Key ｜ 纳塔地灵龛之钥
- So you don't have a permit, Mr. Roald? ｜ 所以，罗尔德先生并没有拿到官府的通行许可…？
- Journey to Tsurumi ｜ 鹤观之行
- If Mr. Takayuki was in better health, there might be a way through. But now... ｜ 如果孝行老爷的身体还健康的话，说不定还有办法，可是现在…
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Wait wait wait, why are you talking just like the old hag!? ｜ 等一下等一下，为什么学老太婆说话啊！
- Diligent Competitor ｜ 勤勉的角技者
- There is not just one secret path to the surface. ｜ 通往地面的密道…大概不止一条。
- Still not too clear on the how or the why, though. ｜ 但我也不明白其中原理。
- It's so weird that it's not working... There must be something about Natlan... ｜ 真是奇怪，难道这也是纳塔特殊的风土人情之一吗？
- All party members gain a 60% Geo DMG Bonus. ｜ 队伍中所有角色获得60%岩元素伤害加成。
- Well then, guess I can only wait until my son's back to punish those boars. ｜ 这样啊，那我只能等儿子休假回来，再教训这些坏东西了
- Enjoy the festival! ｜ 享受节日！
- Daily Missions ｜ 今日任务
- Cowell's Plan and the Situation Inside the Tunnel ｜ 考威尔的作案计划与地道内的状况
- What's this strange pattern here? Is it a drawing or something? Paimon wonders what it's used for... ｜ 这里有个好奇怪的图案，是什么涂鸦吗…不知道有什么用呢…
- Yes, very dangerous. They can beguile human hearts, turn friends into enemies... The humans must be very careful... ｜ 嗯。它能蛊惑人心，让好朋友变成仇人。一定要小心…
- We've delivered the meal. ｜ 餐品送到了。
- There's something terribly wrong in Fontaine, that's what! Something's got to change, and we're all responsible for making that happen! We have to band together and fight for our rights! ｜ 枫丹出了大问题！现状必须要得到改变，在这一点上，我们每个人都有责任！必须团结起来，为我们自己争取利益！
- "January 5th: Three tents sold." ｜ 「一月五日，售出帐篷三顶。」
- Huh? What was that? Did you hear that? Paimon heard something! ｜ 欸？什么声音？你们有听到吗？好像有声音！
- Here. This plum branch is for you. ｜ 来，这根梅枝送给你。
- She left so soon... Paimon didn't even get to finish her story... ｜ 没想到这么快就要和她分别。我的故事还没讲完…
- Seems like they're using Melusines against you... ｜ 犯人似乎将美露莘当成你的软肋…
- Furat ｜ 富拉特
- If you say so. ｜ 这句我就当是真的好了。
- It's just a minor error. This kind of thing was bound to happen. A small modification to the Shogun should fix it. ｜ 操作失误啦，这种事难免的，之后我调整一下将军就好。
- You can't rush into important things. ｜ 越是重要，越不能冲动。
- Landscape ｜ 景观
- Miner ｜ 矿工
- "Slippery Shack" ｜ 「滑滑小屋」
- Okay! Let me finish my other stuff first, and then I can help you put up posters around the city... ｜ 对了！等我解决了手上的任务，可以帮你们在城里贴告示…
- Complete 3 Heated Battle Mode matches ｜ 完成3场热斗模式对局
- It seems that we must come up with a new special blend after all... ｜ 果然，还是要推出一款全新的特调饮品才行吧…
- Well, yes, he did get slapped around by the two of you. Twice. ｜ 是啊…还被你们揍了两遍。
- Bait ｜ 鱼饵
- Unlocks the associated character ｜ 角色解锁
- The route should be safe from here on out. We'll be heading off now. ｜ 之后的路应该安全，我们就先告辞了。
- That's right! Moonchase is a big festival where we celebrate the arrival of the fall by moonlight. The old folks say that thousands of years ago, this was the time of year when the adepti would seek the Way. ｜ 对，逐月节是我们璃月人庆祝秋季明月的盛大节日。听老人们说，早在几千年前，仙人们还会在这段日子求取仙道呢！
- Rhythm Ball ｜ 节拍撞球
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P}
- Absorb the power of the Aura to obtain an <color=#FF5E41FF>ATK increase</color> ｜ 成功吸收光环的力量，获得<color=#FF5E41FF>攻击力提升效果</color>
- Jeht ｜ 婕德
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2级后解锁
- After Lunja and her group left, a little Aranara pops his head out, looking desperate for help. See what he needs help with. ｜ 打发走卢妮雅一行人后，一个小小的兰那罗探出头来，似乎在急切地求助，看看他有何需求吧？
- Oh, sure. I'll go get someone else to help. That said, it's been quite dangerous outside lately. ｜ 咦？好吧…那我去找别人帮忙。不过最近外面好像不太平啊。
- Food ｜ 食物
- Remember, stay cool and act natural, or he'll suspect us for sure! ｜ 等会找到他，我们得表现自然点，别被他怀疑了。
- Something on your mind? ｜ 有什么烦恼…
- After the sides have been served, ask them what they'd like to have for their main course — save yourself that extra trip. ｜ 上完小菜之后再问问他们想吃些什么主菜，免得再跑一趟。
- Still, I'm determined to train as hard as I can! That way, I won't lose to anyone — except the Coach, anyway! ｜ 不过，为了不输给伊安珊教练以外的其他人，我还是得加把劲锻炼才行！
- 5-Hit DMG|{param5:P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param5:P}
- Scholar ｜ 学士
- That's not true. Traveler, you may be unaware that the Takatsukasa Clan has always been assisting the Kujou Clan in the Tenryou Commission, but who doesn't want to be the boss, right? ｜ 这可不是流言蜚语，旅行者，你们可能不知道，在天领奉行，鹰司家明面上一直辅佐九条家，但谁不想当回老大？
- Treasure Hoarder Boss ｜ 盗宝团头目
- I'm quite good at handicrafts, so I also sell small badges and ornaments. ｜ 我很会做手工，所以小徽章、小摆件什么的，店里也有卖。
- Hmm, that means there must be four clues... ｜ 看来有四份的是藏宝线索…

---
### Part 093

- Adeptus Amber: A Striking Sight ｜ 仙家琥珀-「刚烈自见」
- ...I'll take your silence as a yes! Haha. Thank you for giving us this opportunity... It really is a dream come true. ｜ 不说话就是没问题了，哈哈。谢谢你们能提供这样的机会，简直就像做梦一样。
- It's nearly time for afternoon tea. ｜ 明明是该喝下午茶的时间。
- Meanwhile, the Shogunate is only concerned about restarting production as soon as possible. I hear that they're even considering calling the consultants from Fontaine back again. ｜ 不过，幕府那边似乎还在一门心思地想着复产。我听说，他们甚至打算再次邀请枫丹顾问。
- Worry not, just leave it to me. ｜ 放心，就交给婆婆吧。
- Thank you, Mom. ｜ 谢谢，妈妈。
- I can happily accept that if someone was trying to take advantage of my marriage, I should absolutely refuse to go through with it... ｜ 现在我也能简单地接受这个想法——因为有人想利用我的婚姻，所以我必须果断拒绝…
- to plant the petal belonging to Frozen Soul ｜ 种下「冰封之心」的花瓣
- "Chaos"? Isn't that just another word for "thinking on your feet"? *sigh* You know what? Forget it. ｜ 什么无序、混乱，这不就是很多人推崇的「灵活的应对」吗。唉，算了。
- "Hope the business goes well. It's a battlefield out there in the liquor business." ｜ 「祝贵店生意兴隆。酒业的竞争可是很激烈的。」
- CD|{param10:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param10:F1}秒
- Hold on there, Paimon. Let's get a grasp of the situation before we get too hasty. ｜ 派蒙，稍等一下。我认为搞清状况之前不该贸然行动。
- Indeed. What will it be? ｜ 奖励呢？
- Oh! Monsieur Neuvillette, that power you showed when you took him down... Who are you, really? ｜ 那维莱特，你刚才压制公子的时候所展现出来的力量…你到底是什么人呀？
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:P}

- Vision ｜ 神之眼
- Receiving a Gift: III ｜ 收到赠礼·其三
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- It probably wasn't just about today. ｜ 也许不仅是今天的事吧。
- You'll know what I mean if you ever get the chance to go out to sea with us. ｜ 以后有机会和我们一起出海的话，你就能明白我的意思了。
- Ornate Kabuto ｜ 华饰之兜
- Um... ｜ 啊…
- Oh, the green mushroom, you mean? The taste is the same as the red ones. There's nothing special there... ｜ 绿蘑菇吗？味道和红蘑菇完全一样，没什么特点…
- ...It turned out that there's a <color=#00E1FFFF>Ruin Hunter</color> standing guard inside. That's why I said that my luck was terrible. ｜ 但是里面居然有个<color=#00E1FFFF>遗迹猎者</color>守着，这就是我说「运气差」的原因。
- *sigh* Maybe I'm really not good at making pizza... ｜ 唉，也许我真的不太会做「披萨」这种菜吧…
- Inn Waitress ｜ 客栈女侍
- White Cruising Wave ｜ 巡航的白浪
- My, this is unfortunate. The shop's been undergoing renovations recently. ｜ 哦呀哦呀，真是不巧，店里最近正在翻修…
- What? You encountered the strange ice... and you were able to melt it? ｜ 什么？你说你遇见了奇怪的冰…然后把它给融化了？
- Chromatic Ode of Candies and Roses - Event Ending ｜ 「彩糖与蔷薇的幻色颂」活动结束提醒
- Thanks, Paimon. ｜ 谢谢你，派蒙。
- I dare you to try. ｜ 让我见识一下。
- (Most of the inscription has been scratched out, but you can make out "...clear dew... three...") ｜ （大部分字迹被磨毁，仅能依稀辨识出——「…清露…三…」）
- Rushing Hound: Swift as the Wind ｜ 犬奔·疾如风
- Adventurer ｜ 冒险家
- Hah! You see, the treasury doesn't just have one gate, but three. ｜ 哈，宝库的大门不是一道，而是三道。
- Ley Line Outcrop: Blossom of Revelation (Sumeru) ｜ 地脉衍出·启示之花 - 须弥
- We'll do our best to support you. ｜ 我们会全力支持你。
- *sigh* You would think that... But this time is different... ｜ 哎，所以说，这次不太一样…
- Onion-covered toast. Not quite cooked right. You'll notice its imperfection, even if you eat it while fishing. ｜ 铺满洋葱的吐司。但烤得有些不对劲，即使一边钓鱼一边啃，也能尝出味道的差别。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Actually, I've been reflecting on that habit of mine quite often. It seeps into my writing as well, to the point where I once wrote over 20 pages before ever getting to the point. ｜ 确实，我也时常反省这点。写作时，也发生过「用了超过二十页的篇幅才切入正题」的经历。
- But didn't Raimondo say that we needed to use it to make the ruins descend? If it can't move... ｜ 但雷蒙多不是说，要用它把这座废墟给降下去吗？如果动不起来的话…
- Now you're just throwing numbers out. ｜ 数字编得太离谱了！
- A soft flower that has taken on the many shades of the capricious ocean. It shines with wondrous colors under the moon's silver light. ｜ 染上多变海色的轻柔之花，在月光下闪烁着奇妙的色彩。
- Is the wound better? ｜ 伤口好些了吗？
- Okay, we'll leave it there for now. You two, please follow me. ｜ 好啦，现在解散吧。两位，请跟我来。
- (Hm... Such a difficult decision! It feels like she's a warm-hearted person, and she was just trying to be hospitable to us... Turning on her now makes it feel like we're the bad guys here...) ｜ （唔…好难决定！感觉她是个很热情的好人呢，刚刚还想招待我们，我们一下子就翻脸，会不会太绝情…）
- I understand. ｜ 嗯，我明白。
- Darknight Blaze ｜ 夜行暗火
- The target is in a special locale, please go to the notice board to access the mission location ｜ 目标处于特殊场景中，请先前往公告板进入任务场景
- Exchanging material for manpower and intelligence, and using all three to solve issues — that's our Ministry's specialty. ｜ 用物资资源来换取人力资源和情报资源…进而将一切问题解决，这就是我和我所在的「总务司」擅长的做法。
- I didn't know how to look after it at the time, so I got Granny to look after it for a while. It's looking pretty buff these days... ｜ 当时我不知道怎么饲养这种动物，就拜托姥姥帮我照看了一段时间，现在看来，这只鬼兜虫还挺健壮的…
- Still looks like a long way off before the mines can reopen... ｜ 看来矿区距离重新开放还遥遥无期…
- Hmph! Well, Paimon hopes he turns over a new leaf and stops causing trouble! ｜ 哼！希望他以后好好改过自新，不要再做坏事了！
- Sort by Performance Time ｜ 演奏时间排序
- The trust that these four Fungi place in their beast-tamers, and the bond they now share, have grown stronger than the Wisdom Orb. ｜ 这四只蕈兽对驯兽师的认可，他们之间的情感和默契，已经凌驾于「意智宝珠」的影响之上了。
- Time Remaining: #1#s ｜ 剩余时间：#1#秒
- Riptide Burst DMG|{param10:F1P} ｜ 断流·破 伤害|{param10:F1P}
- About the Vision ｜ 关于「神之眼」…
- Now you mention it, a guy I work with said he'd seen some very peculiar Crystal Ore not far from here. ｜ 听我的一位工友说，他好像在这附近看到了变异了的水晶矿。
- I'm a little busy right now, though. I'll come find you once we're done at the hot springs. ｜ 不过我现在还有更重要的事情呢。等泡完温泉，我再去找你们吧。
- He doesn't remember our past experiences... ｜ 我们之前的经历，他不记得了呢…
- I don't know how to straighten Mr. Garcia out, as I have no experience dealing with this kind of situation. ｜ 我也不知道如何疏导加尔恰先生，毕竟我也没有这种方面的经验。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P}+{param5:F1P}+{param6:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}+{param5:F1P}+{param6:F1P}
- "Cassiodor" ｜ 「卡西奥多」
- Woof woof woof! ｜ 汪汪汪！
- CRIT hits will generate Elemental Particles and Orbs. Can only occur once every 15s. ｜ 造成暴击时，会生成获得元素晶球和元素微粒。该效果每15秒只能触发一次。
- Someone marches up and interrupts your conversation... ｜ 有人趾高气昂地向你们走来，打断了你们的谈话…
- I'll go inform my superiors now. Please do take care of the paperwork as soon as possible. Don't delay this any longer. ｜ 那我就先这么跟上头回复了。麻烦你们尽快办好相应的手续，不要再拖延了。
- Perhaps we should instead discuss where you shall have dinner with Ms. Kaia next, sir. ｜ 我们还是来讨论一下您下次和迦雅小姐共进晚餐的地点吧，先生。
- ...Alright, since we're this far in, I might as well just tell you the rest too. If I don't return tonight, you'll no longer be a consultant... Because you'll be the 78th Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. ｜ 好啦，既然已经说到这了，那我就把所有事一并讲完。客卿，万一今晚我真回不来，你就是第七十八代往生堂堂主。
- Domain of Mastery: Full Moon ｜ 精通秘境：圆镜
- Know much about Falcon Coast? ｜ 关于鹰翔海滩。
- Allow me to ask you... ｜ 请允许我提问。
- Such Nara can open the "treasure chests" prepared by Araminali. ｜ 这样的那菈，可以打开兰弥那离准备好的「宝箱」。
- Buff:\nGeo DMG increased.\n\nNotable Hazard:\nAbyss Pylon presence detected in the area. Pylon(s) will constantly summon monsters and must be destroyed post-haste. ｜ 增益效果：\n可造成的岩元素伤害提升。\n\n需要注意的危机：\n此地出现了「深渊界门」，会不断召唤新的深渊魔物，需尽快破坏。
- We should help! ｜ 我们也帮帮忙吧！
- ...Well, whatever the case, thanks so much for your help. Here, take your payment. I'll go get him something nice to eat now... ｜ …无论如何，还是多谢你帮忙，这些报酬收下吧。我也要去给那孩子准备点好吃的…
- Everything's ready... ｜ 眼下万事俱备…
- About the damage to the Sacred Sakura... ｜ 关于神樱树的伤痕…
- Adventure Item ｜ 冒险道具
- Ematol ｜ 艾玛托
- Hmph. Fine then. So it's <color=#00E1FFFF>Sara, Charles and Margaret's</color> stuff you want us to help with, right? ｜ 哼，那好吧。我记得是…<color=#00E1FFFF>莎拉小姐、查尔斯先生还有玛格丽特小姐</color>那边，对吧？
- Never mind that for now! You Skeptics... how could you! ｜ 先别管我们了，你们矫论团怎么可以这样！
- Haypasia was born in Sumeru, and remains a scholar of the Akademiya. Her situation has not become dire enough to necessitate her transfer to another nation. ｜ 海芭夏出身须弥，又是教令院学者，眼下情况也还没到必须冒着转运风险将患者送去别国的程度。
- Explore a World Quest in a specific area ｜ 探索特定地区的世界任务
- We have to find all three conches. ｜ 看来得找到这三个海螺…
- Go to Tokoyo Reisen ｜ 前往常夜灵川
- #Our real trump card? {NICKNAME} of course. ｜ #真正的底牌——是{NICKNAME}呀。
- In that case, let us remove the seal. Then you can gather the power of Khvarena with the Great Songs. ｜ 既然这样就由我们来解开这里的封印，然后便可以用「灵光绝唱」聚集起灵光的力量了。
- Common Cast Iron Stove ｜ 铸铁泛用炉具
- Phonia ｜ 方妮雅
- Anemo RES ｜ 风元素抗性
- Alright then, Traveler, I'm counting on you. ｜ 那就拜托你啦，旅行者。
- Crumpled Namelist ｜ 被揉皱的名单
- Catch up with Mamesuke and Shibasuke ｜ 跟上豆助和柴助
- Wait, this feeling... ｜ 等下，这种感觉，难道是…
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT], summons 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C135011]</color>. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]，召唤<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C135011]</color>。
- ...Ayaka? ｜ 「绫华？」
- CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- You don't have much time, and you're injured on top of that. What do you plan to do next? ｜ 你的时间不多了，现在还受了伤，下一步打算怎么做呢？
- #Hello there, my dear, gallant {F#girl}{M#boy}! I have good news and bad news regarding the Mikage Furnace. Which would you like to hear first? ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BOYC|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_GIRLC]}，真是幸会！关于「御影炉心」，我有一个好消息和一个坏消息，您想先听哪一个？
- Auspicious Motif 59 ｜ 祝语纹样·之五十九
- In fact, aside from our inability to physically interact with each other, there's something else you should know about this space. With Caribert gone, we won't be able to remember anything that happened here... ｜ 其实，在这里你我不仅无法相互触碰，从卡利贝尔消失时起，这个空间内的一切也无法留存在任何人的记忆里…
- Really, how can you be so unperturbed? ｜ 我说啊，你怎么一副习以为常的表情。

Maybe I'm just like a Dendro Slime hiding in the earth, burying myself in numbers and reports in order to escape reality. ｜ 虽然身为仙兽的混血后裔，但同时也有着人类的血脉。这么多年来，我也不知道自己算不算融入了璃月港的人类生活…可能，我只是像钻进地里的草史莱姆一样，把自己埋在数据和报表中间来逃避吧。

- Some forward scouts will use the word "Octave" to indicate that they've run out of arrows and are returning to camp... Or "Vera" to mean "the conditions are good, we should engage the enemy"... Hey, why don't we also come up with some code words? It'll come in handy, especially if we'll be working together long term. Go ahead, I'm good with any of your ideas! ｜ 有的前锋会用「奥克塔维」表示「弩箭耗尽，正在返回营地」；用「薇拉」表示「状况良好，可以交战」。要不然，我们也约定几个暗语？毕竟我们会长期合作，这样更方便。哦，你说了算，我都听你的！
- A nearby merchant folds his arms and gives you a disdainful look. You get the impression that he's someone who has long gotten used to the sight before him. ｜ 商贩抱着双臂，面容不屑，似乎早已对眼前的景象见怪不怪了。
- Don't be offended if you try to greet me on the street and I don't respond. It's simply because I'm wearing my soundproof earpieces, that's all. ｜ 要是在街上和我打招呼我却没有反应的话，不要见怪。我只是开了耳机隔音而已。
- A pair of genial and clever wood-carved eyes that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving."\nIt was modeled after the eyes of the Port Ormos hotel owner's daughter, Sareh. She warmly welcomes every customer and offers candy to the children playing in the hotel. Therefore, Razi suggested, "If the carvings have Sareh's eyes, that would draw children close, right?" ｜ 友善机灵的木刻双眼，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。\n以奥摩斯港旅店老板的女儿莎莉的双眼为参考制作。她热情接待每一位来访的客人，也会给来玩的小朋友们糖果。所以，拉齐提议道：「如果木刻拥有莎莉姐姐那样的双眼，一定会让小朋友们感到很亲切吧。」
- Food ｜ 食物
- Once enabled, the corresponding Recommended Settings will be used for both the <color=#F39000>General Lock Plan</color> and the <color=#F39000>Set Lock Plan</color>.\nAre you sure you want to use Recommended Settings? ｜ 采用推荐设置后，<color=#F39000>通用锁定方案</color>将启用通用锁定方案的推荐设置，<color=#F39000>套装锁定方案</color>将启用套装锁定方案的推荐设置。\n是否采用推荐设置？

- When an opponent is defeated, all party members will be affected by <color=#FFCC33>Corrosion</color>. Characters being Corroded will lose a fraction of their HP every second. Active characters can be brought down by Corrosion. When a non-active character's HP is less than 15%, they will no longer lose HP due to Corrosion. Corrosion lasts for 8s and can stack. The duration of each stack is independent of the others. ｜ 敌人被击败后，队伍中所有角色会承受<color=#FFCC33>「侵蚀」</color>效果。处于侵蚀状态下的角色将会每秒损失部分生命值。当前场上角色可能会因为侵蚀效果损失的生命值而倒下。处于队伍后台的角色生命值低于15%时，不会因为侵蚀而损失生命值。侵蚀效果持续8秒，可以叠加，每层效果独立计时。

- The individual constituents of this rock cluster seem to be distributed in an orderly manner — almost as if they were soldiers standing in formation. Hence, it has been given the name "Formation Rock." First discovered near a Millelith camp, over time it has come to stand for the awesome will of the Millelith, faced with which "even rocks are compelled to fall in line." ｜ 紧密簇拥的岩石，似乎呈现出某种排布的规律，如同列兵布阵。因而有了「兵阵石」的称谓。这些岩石最早被发现于千岩军的营地附近，久而久之，就有了千岩军意志惊人，「磐石随之而动」的佳话。
- Carnivorous plants that use the alluring appearance of their flowers to deceive their prey. Their vine-like stalks are surprisingly tough to cut through. Perhaps the organ shaped like a <color=#FFE14BFF>Cryo core</color> growing near their roots could be the key to defeating them... ｜ 会利用怒放花朵的外形欺瞒猎物的掠食性植物，形似藤蔓的茎干十分坚硬。在根部似乎生长着类似<color=#FFE14BFF>冰元素核心</color>的某种器官，或许是战胜它的关键也说不定…

- A common sundry stand with a red roof.\nTo the everyday folks of Mondstadt, red represents boldness and passion. In Liyue, the same color has traditionally come to symbolize prosperity.\nOf course, if the shopkeeper is a blind drunk, no amount of red will save their business. ｜ 寻常的杂货摊位，采用了红色的顶棚。\n在蒙德平民的观念中，红色代表奔放与热情；璃月传统则认为，红色有「生意红火」的寓意。\n但要是店主醉酒怠工，再好的兆头都是白搭。

- They say that alchemical divination is the Dendro Archon's divine revelation. So then, if Nahida has referred to herself as the Moon... ｜ 炼金占卜据说是神明的启示，纳西妲又曾把自己比作「月亮」，看来…
- C'mon, you take some too. If you spot any lil' Saurians having a roadside rest, do share it with them. ｜ 也分你一些，如果遇到在路边休息的小龙，可以给它们哦。
- And that won't get in the way of my continued study of adeptal mechanical arts, either. ｜ 这也不耽误我继续学习仙家的机关术。
- ...I've heard many tales of Zhiyi. For example... um... I can't remember... ｜ 本大侠听过许多他的故事，比如…唔…有点记不清了…
- No, we're gonna stay and help. There's too many of them! ｜ 不，他们人多，我们也留下来帮忙吧！

- Diona, the bartender at The Cat's Tail, hates all alcoholic beverages, but has a rare talent for bartending. \nNo matter the drink, as long as the mixing is in her hands, it will be unimaginably delicious. \nHer excellent bartending skills and her cat's ears and tail that run in her family, are a big hit with the hunters, making The Cat's Tail extremely popular. \nHowever, please take care not to touch Diona's ears or tail when ordering at the bar. If you cross her, the consequences will be dire. ｜ 「猫尾酒馆」的调酒师迪奥娜厌恶一切酒类饮料，却有着罕见的调酒天赋。\n不论什么品种的酒，只要经她之手调制以后，都会变成难以想象的美味佳酿。\n她超凡的调酒水平还有家族遗传的猫耳猫尾备受酒客欢迎，给「猫尾酒馆」带来了不小的人气。\n不过，前来酒馆点单时还请注意，请勿随意触碰迪奥娜的耳朵和尾巴，一旦惹怒了她，后果会很糟糕。
- High... Guess this must be the place we're looking for, then! ｜ 可能性高…那我看这里一定就是我们要找的「水仙十字结社」了！
- Ally at Low HP: II ｜ 同伴生命值低·其二
- Noelle headed off towards With Wind Comes Glory a moment ago, right? ｜ 诺艾尔刚才好像往玛乔丽小姐的「荣光之风」那边走了？
- If so, maybe we should just observe Benoit's house to see if there are any new developments, right? ｜ 这样的话，我们就应该过一阵子再来看看伯努瓦家有没有什么新情况，对吧？
- But today, we received numerous complaints that a group of people has been hogging the Tanuki photo board. ｜ 但是今天我们接到了好几起投诉，说有伙人霸占了一块狸猫合影板。
- Seems like trouble. ｜ 麻烦还真不少！
- D'you ever think we seem like a pair of thieves? Hiding here to ambush Kaveh, it almost feels like we're here to extort him or something... ｜ 你有没有觉得我们这副嘴脸像小偷？而且不知道为什么，躲在这里堵卡维有种要去敲诈勒索的感觉…
- Hmm... These are all daily supplies for camping. Looks like they were taken from a nearby tribe... ｜ 唔…都是露营用的日常物资，看起来像是从附近的部落取来的呢…
- This pot used to carry concentrated and extremely potent concoctions. It is now empty, but still gives off a strong smell of medicine. ｜ 原本装满了提炼后极浓的药汁，如今只剩下浓烈的药味。
- Liyue Harbor's Herbalist Gui needs ten Mints. ｜ 璃月港的阿桂需要十份薄荷。
- We closed Akitsu Yuugei a while ago and carefully checked it for any issues. ｜ 我们前段时间封闭了秋津游艺，并且认真排查故障。
- It's very possible that someone who appears strong on the outside has learned to compartmentalize their negative emotions... And that is far from healthy. ｜ 有些生灵看着坚强，其实只是习惯了与自己的心病共存…但那远远谈不上「无恙」。
- Hmm... To be honest, it makes me angry. ｜ 这个嘛…说实话，我很生气。

- Anyway, it's nothing you should fret about. Little Chang will do as Little Chang pleases. ｜ 好啦，你们也别太操心了，这是小常他自己的事情。

- A monster born from highly-concentrated Pyro elements that can float in the air.\nThere was once an Akademiya student who conducted research into their behavior. He believed that Specters were a form of Crystalfly; since they both had powers of flight and both were birthed in areas saturated with elemental energy. He has not graduated yet. ｜ 高浓度的火元素孕育而生的魔物，能够飘浮在空中。\n曾经有教令院的学生对它们的生态进行过研究。他认为晶蝶能飞、会在元素浓度高的区域诞生，和飘浮灵完全一样。所以飘浮灵是一种晶蝶。他现在也没毕业。

- So, what he gave you was... ｜ 所以，他刚才交给你的东西是…
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Release all the Flames of the High Gate ｜ 解放所有「高门之火」
- What's wrong? ｜ 怎么了？
- About Us: Red Ropes ｜ 关于我们·红绳
- Did you find anything? ｜ 有新发现吗？
- Blue Horned Lizard ｜ 蓝角蜥
- My old wound often aches in humid weather, so it pretty much hurts all the time in Sumeru City. ｜ 我的旧伤在潮湿的天气中经常隐隐作痛，放在须弥城，差不多就是一直在疼。
- Impressive. This courtyard is every bit as striking as the headquarters of the Tenryou Commission. ｜ 嗯，单论气势，这间庭院并不逊色于天领奉行府。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- I will remember your teachings, and my efforts will be unceasing! Henceforth, I shall not waste a single second more! ｜ 我会牢记你们的教诲，一直保持这股干劲的！从现在开始，我一秒时间都不会浪费！
- So I went with Option B: putting up a commission at the Adventurers' Guild. ｜ 所以，我就退而求其次，在冒险家协会那边挂了一个委托。
- You start to repair the Offering Box... ｜ 开始维修「塞钱箱」…
- I've never heard of anything like that before! ｜ 这种原因我听都没听过！
- Hehe... I'm incredible! I'll go get Curve. Now we can search for evidence to our heart's content! ｜ 嘿嘿…我真厉害！我去让曲线过来，现在就尽情地搜查一下犯罪证据吧！
- You are always running around helping out Qingce Village. Thank you, child. ｜ 倒是你，孩子，一直为我们这轻策庄东奔西跑的，辛苦你了。
- Hu Tao ｜ 胡桃
- You silently escort Mihir back to the Vourukasha Oasis... ｜ 一路无话，护送米希尔回到了甘露花海…
- So, what about Xiao Lanterns... ｜ 关于霄灯…
- If you really want to help me, then give me some peace and quiet. ｜ 你要是真想帮我，就让我一个人好好静静吧。
- Poloa ｜ 波鲁亚
- Me? Nothing. Mr. Raimondo asked me to help supervise the reconstruction work, but... Well, I'm completely clueless about that kind of thing. ｜ 我？我什么也不负责，雷蒙多先生要我过来协助科学院重建工作，但…但我对这件事也一窍不通。
- You... I... Forget it. Looks like your "strength" really is all-rounded. ｜ 您…您，我…算了，看来您的实力，确实是很全面…
- Natlan ｜ 纳塔
- The Mushroom Pizza tastes really good, you must try it if you have the chance. ｜ 那种「烤蘑菇披萨」味道可是很不错的，有机会的话你一定要去尝尝看。
- I need to stay in an undisturbed environment. So, I will leave the investigating to you. ｜ 我必须留在不受干扰的环境里，调查就拜托你们了。
- No, no... Still no. This composition is too deliberate... ｜ 不对，不对…还是不对，这里的塑型太刻意了…
- By the way... Remember to focus constantly on your heartfelt wishes when you enter inside. ｜ 对了，在进入空间时，记得不断在心中重复你的愿望哦。
- Inazuma ｜ 稻妻
- Huh...? ｜ 嗯…？
- Huh? You mean that Tighnari already knows that what you saw weren't hallucinations? But if that's the case, why would he try to hide that from us? ｜ 欸，你的意思是…提纳里知道你看见的不是幻觉，却故意这么说来搪塞我们？
- All yours, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙拿着吧。
- Yep, your chief has already made that pretty clear! ｜ 嗯嗯，你们部族的首领已经向我们说明过了。
- Salsa ｜ 萨莎
- Let me see... Ah yes, No. 98. <color=#00E1FFFF> "Should a visitor from afar come to see me, and should my whereabouts be unknown, direct them to proceed southward until they arrive at a tree with purple foliage."</color> ｜ 让我想想。第九十八条…<color=#00E1FFFF>「有客远来，寻我不见；可来南边，紫叶树前」</color>。
- Got launched into the air by items 5 times or more ｜ 被道具击飞5次及以上
- When your opponent generates a falling block, <color=#F39000>2</color> random regular blocks on their field will gain <color=#b863ee>Shadowstorm</color>.\n<color=#b863ee>Shadowstorm</color>: If a block with this effect is not cleared in the current block-fall, Blasting Thunder will be triggered, turning up to 8 surrounding blocks into obstacles. ｜ 对手下落方块生成时，使其场地中随机<color=#F39000>2</color>个普通方块获得<color=#b863ee>「阴雷」</color>。\n<color=#b863ee>「阴雷」</color>：若持有此效果的方块在当次下落未被消除则触发雷暴，使周边至多8个方块转化为阻碍方块。
- Ranging Flame DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 剑域炽焰伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Urgent Neko Parcel Hit DMG|{param7:F1P} ｜ 猫箱急件冲撞伤害|{param7:F1P}
- I'm under orders to ensure the security of this location. It's imperative that construction stays on schedule. Hopefully, there won't be any setbacks. ｜ 在下奉命保卫这里的安全，工期要紧，希望别出什么岔子。
- The relics in the ruins are highly valuable, so I'm worried that Treasure Hoarders and bandits might try to steal them. Since the tent isn't here yet and I can't fall asleep, I came here to patrol. ｜ 遗迹里的文物价值不菲，我担心晚上有盗宝团之类的贼人觊觎。这帐篷还没送到，横竖也睡不好觉，干脆带人过来巡逻一下。
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Vacant Hilichurl ｜ 呆呆的丘丘人
- Vijnana-Khanda Field Duration|{param2:F1}s ｜ 识蕴领域持续时间|{param2:F1}秒
- You hold yourselves to pretty high standards, coming here so early to power-up your Fungi. No wonder you've made it this far. ｜ 你们对自己的要求倒也挺严苛的，这么早就来培养蕈兽。难怪能一路顺利晋级。
- Break the Boss Brick within the time limit ｜ 请在限定时间内击败「坏坏方块王」
- Guess preservation's the way to go. ｜ 唔，总之先保持住枫达的原味吧…
- What happened here? Why are you all suspended in midair...? ｜ 这里发生了什么？为什么还有人悬在空中呀？
- Using Suppressive Rolls will spend <color=#FFCC33>all</color> your present Invokation Dice and release a shockwave, dealing AoE DMG to nearby opponents and randomly granting <color=#FFCC33>1–3</color> buffs.\nThe <color=#FFCC33>more</color> dice of the same Element as the active character spent, the <color=#FFCC33>higher</color> DMG the shockwave deals, and the more likely you will gain multiple buffs. ｜ 使用「制敌骰术」后，将消耗当前所拥有的<color=#FFCC33>全部</color>「七圣妙骰」，释放出一阵冲击波，对周围的敌人造成范围伤害，并随机获得<color=#FFCC33>1到3种</color>助益。\n「制敌骰术」消耗的「七圣妙骰」中，与当前场上的角色元素类型相同的<color=#FFCC33>越多</color>，释放的冲击波所造成的伤害就<color=#FFCC33>越高</color>，也更容易获得多个助益。
- {0} has not yet finished the prerequisite quest(s). This player cannot participate in the challenge. ｜ 玩家{0}未完成前置任务，无法参与挑战
- Rather Aged Notes ｜ 有相当年头的记事
- Get a good night's sleep once this is all over. ｜ 回头好好睡一觉吧。
- Seems like I'm not going back home for the holidays again this year... ｜ 今年，我是不是又不能回家过节了啊…
- This entire Lumidouce Harbor is under my protection. Anyone causing trouble around here is my business. ｜ 这片柔灯港是我罩着的地方，如果有人想要在这里搞破坏，不管这事情是真是假，我都要管。
- Delicious Minty Bean Soup ｜ 美味的薄荷豆汤
- I can't put my finger on it, but this island has a rather... mysterious atmosphere... ｜ 总觉得这座岛上有什么…不过模模糊糊的，该说是「神秘的氛围」吗…
- Perhaps you've already noticed, but that slab of ice is surrounded by a great many blue plants. ｜ 不知道你注意到没有，在那块冰的周围，生长着很多蓝色的植物。
- And Paimon said that she would get boatloads of tasty snacks! You looked super confused at the time, but said it was an adorable thing to say! ｜ 我说，会买很多很多好吃的和好喝的，你一副不理解的样子，但还是说我「可爱」。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- I was worried that you would find this place childish. ｜ 我怕这些对你来说太过幼稚。
- About Keqing: Changing Perspective ｜ 关于刻晴·改观
- You and Paimon return to Liyue, preparing to take part in the annual Lantern Rite. As expected, there are familiar faces to be seen as you walk around the harbor... ｜ 你和派蒙回到璃月，准备参加一年一度的海灯节，在港口漫步时，果不其然见到了熟悉的面孔…
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- This is the security perimeter of Blackcliff Forge. Please watch what you do. ｜ 这附近是黑岩厂的警戒范围，注意举止。
- Open the map to see the area with ongoing events. Proceed to an area to learn about the events going on there.\nThe Adventurer Handbook also keeps a record of many things. Check it regularly. ｜ 打开地图界面，可以看到发生事件的地区，直接前往事件区域查看\n冒险之证也记录了很多情报，常看看吧
- Ah, you don't know? It's a... Ah, let's say it's a rather popular newspaper in the Court of Fontaine. ｜ 您不知道吗？《蒸汽鸟日报》是枫丹廷的一家…嗯…知名度颇高的报纸。
- It's like Xinyan said — she has her way of confirming trustworthiness... and we have ours! ｜ 辛焱不是说过吗？她会用她的方式确认同伴是否可信，我们也有我们的办法。
- "Spirit Gathering: Phenomenal Convergence" ｜ 「游灵觅聚·夜国综象」
- This lineup is full of elemental creatures... rather familiar combat units! ｜ 这边的阵容是元素生物…很熟悉的作战单位！
- Gravier ｜ 加维
- Welcome, contestants, to the Nilotpala Cup Beast Tamers Tournament! I am Kautilya, a senior Amurta researcher and the organizer of today's tournament. ｜ 庆贺吧，各位参赛者！欢迎来到「月莲杯驯兽师大赛」！我是大赛负责人，生论派资深学者考特里亚。
- Great Archon, you have a long life ahead of you. Isn't it too early to draw such a conclusion? ｜ 草神大人您拥有漫长的生命旅途，现在下此结论是否为时过早？
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Why aren't you saying anything? Too ashamed? ｜ 你怎么不说话，是不是心虚了？
- Dismantle the training equipment ｜ 拆除训练设施
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Go to the place where the Abyss Tumor appeared ｜ 前往「深渊瘤石」出现之处
- Uh, Ou—Oura... Ouwhatnides of the where now? Ugh, what a tongue-twister! Paimon's just gonna call you "Osse" for short. That's close enough, right? What do you think? ｜ 乌…乌…乌什么斯？舌头都要打结了！就叫你「小呜斯」好了，跟猫咪喜欢的「噗嘶噗嘶」声发音也很相近，是个不错的称呼吧？
- Radiant Spincrystal 111 ｜ 旋曜玉帛·其一百一十一
- What's been going on with you? ｜ 你最近…
- See you tomorrow, Professor Aisha... ｜ 明天见，艾莎老师…
- Hah, you got me. ｜ 让你抓住机会了。
- Little Tatankasaur ｜ 小突角龙
- Score {param2} points ｜ 得分达到{param2}
- Huh? Are you okay? ｜ 嗯？你怎么了吗？
- Besides, Paimon seriously doubts if your pocket is thick enough to afford the hole this stone is gonna burn through. ｜ 而且，你哪来的钱够买「老石」呀。
- Keep exploring ｜ 继续探索
- What happened? ｜ 到底发生什么了？
- The situation has seen no true improvement. The Pyro Archon did not fulfill her promise. ｜ 情况并未真正好转。火神没有兑现她的诺言。
- Mora Maker ｜ 生财之道
- Mika didn't submit much, but he did draw a vegetation map for Master Tighnari and wrote up a dragon-spotting calendar for Cyno... ｜ 米卡先生没有太多线索，但他为提纳里师父绘制了植物分布图，还给赛诺先生做了一张风龙出没的周期表。
- A new notice board has been placed near the Weinlesefest market. What is it for...? ｜ 佳酿节的美酒集市附近新安置了一块公告板，到底是做什么用的呢…
- Wolsey says that it's meant to be both a surprise and a risk precisely 'cause it's a free meal. If you don't want any risks, then you've gotta use Coupons. ｜ 韦尔赛叔叔说过，因为是免费的饭嘛，所以「惊喜和风险并存」。如果不想承担任何风险，就得付出特许券。
- Neuvillette is not the type to take much time off. Taking even a half-day for himself is already a huge step in the right direction. ｜ 我的这位雇主几乎不怎么休假，能空出半天已经是值得称赞的极大进步了。
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- Paimon, mind your language, please. ｜ 派蒙，不要乱用词语。
- One found you with such ease every time. 'Tis a truth most evident: One always recognizes one's own... no matter what form they may take. ｜ 而本仙总能轻易地找到正确答案。鹤时如此，人时亦然。
- CD|{param9:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param9:F1}秒
- Given the Arataki Gang's financial situation— ｜ 但荒泷派的经费…

- Overflowing Mastery ｜ 精通移涌
- This was your story just as much as Clervie's... ｜ 这本就是关于你们的故事…
- Food ｜ 食物
- *sigh* I know these kinds of stories are all the rage nowadays, but... I really can't bring myself to like them. ｜ 虽然我知道这样的故事也会很流行，但…我不喜欢，真的喜欢不起来。
- Default ｜ 默认
- If Paimon ate those two extra macarons, then may they turn into stone in her stomach! ｜ 我发誓，如果派蒙多吃了两个马卡龙，那它们就立刻在派蒙的肚子里变成石头！
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>When the Action Phase begins:</color> All characters gain 2 stacks of <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C122]</color>. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>行动阶段开始时：</color>所有角色附属2层<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C122]</color>。
- Person Idly Chatting by the Roadside ｜ 路边闲聊的人
- Experimental records? ｜ 实验记录…
- The people of Mondstadt have many special rituals during this cozy, romantic time known as the Windblume Festival. ｜ 在风花节这样浪漫惬意的节日里，蒙德人有许多特别的风俗。
- Kayvan prepares the bait and begins fishing... ｜ 凯万制作了鱼饵，开始垂钓…
- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- Changchang's Little Friend ｜ 畅畅和她的小伙伴
- Ah, hello! How are things? Is there anything you'd like to know about the ores? You can ask me anything! ｜ 啊，怎么了，有什么想知道的关于矿石的事吗，不管是什么事都可以问我哦！
- So young... ｜ 好年轻啊…
- ♪~ ｜ ♪~
- My dear President, I fear this flower isn't amenable to being cultivated in Fontaine. ｜ 会长，这朵花恐怕没法在枫丹养活啊。
- So there should be plenty more opportunities to awaken it, right? I've also heard some other incantations and versions recently, so I can give 'em all a try. ｜ 所以应该还有很多让它觉醒的机会吧？最近也听说了一些别的咒语、说法之类，也想都试试看呢。
- ..."Things you never had the chance to say before it was too late"... When silence is the final word, we mourn the loss of things unheard... ｜ …「没来得及说出的话」，若就此沉寂，未免有些可惜…
- Was the item dangerous? ｜ 这个东西本身具有任何危险性吗？
- So it's a public welfare project? ｜ 公益项目？
- Have you finished reading the fan novel that we bought together? ｜ 我们一起买的这本同人小说，你读完了吗？
- (test) Sorry, something urgent has just come up. ｜ (test)抱歉，突然有了其他急事…
- C'mon, we'll take you. ｜ 可以带你一程。
- With the restoration of the Night Kingdom, our people are now free to leave our borders, and many have set their sights on the wonders of Teyvat. ｜ 随着夜神之国的恢复，人们想要离开纳塔也不再有严格的限制，很多人将目光投向了提瓦特各处的奇观胜景。
- So, what's the clan's history... ｜ 关于古华派的历史…
- Are you still trying to persuade me? I'm not going anywhere with you. Not at all... ｜ 你们还想劝我回去吗？我可不会跟你们走…
- Anyway, point is — those chumps are out, and Arataki Itto is in! I'm running the show from here on out. ｜ 总而言之，那些家伙的位置，现在由本大爷来坐。
- And it's all thanks to your advice. As of today, I have finally ceased to be fishless... I must sincerely express my deepest gratitude to you both! ｜ 多亏你们的提醒，我今天才打破了一直没有收获的僵局…我必须好好表达对你们的感谢之情！
- Wise Doctor's Pinion ｜ 贤医之羽
- We're here! Um... This is the Yashiro Commission's headquarters, so... ｜ 到啦，这里是社奉行府，所以…
- "Alive"? ｜ 「活着」？

- Iai: Sheathed ｜ 居合·纳刀
- Umm... I'm not sure...? ｜ 不太清楚…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Huh? You think we should ask her about it? But she's never opened up to us about family stuff before... What if she shuts us out? ｜ 欸？要去问她吗…？以我们和她的关系…她要是不愿意说怎么办？
- #Travelers, please ensure that you follow our {REGEX#OVERSEA[Server_BrandTips_Oversea|Server_BrandTips_Domestic]} while in the Divine Ingenuity event. To create a healthy gaming environment, please read and confirm that you will not instigate or take part in:\n\n1. The creation of content that discriminates against any race, gender, religion, sexual orientation, ethnicity, political alignment, or region.\n2. The bullying or insulting of any Travelers or groups of Travelers.\n3. Inappropriate sharing of content.\n4. Disrespecting another Traveler's creations.\n5. Pointless functions or repeating loops that draw heavily from resources.\n6. Any other content or behavior that violates the Terms of Service.\n\nWe may have to restrict your use of the game services if you do not follow these rules. This may include suspension, restriction, or a ban on participation in "Divine Ingenuity," login suspension, or account forfeiture. ｜ #旅行者在参与「神工天巧」活动时，请按照{REGEX#OVERSEA[Server_BrandTips_Oversea|Server_BrandTips_Domestic]}使用，为共同营造良好的游戏氛围，您知悉并确认不会发起及/或参与:\n1.任何涉及种族、性别、宗教、性向、民族、政治、地域等的歧视内容；\n2.对任一旅行者或任一群体旅行者有任何的霸凌或侮辱等内容；\n3.不适宜的分享行为；\n4.不尊重其他旅行者的成果；\n5.无意义或无限循环、高频等占用资源的功能；\n6.其他用户协议中禁止或不适宜的内容。\n\n如果旅行者未遵守上述规范，您对游戏服务的使用可能会受到相应限制，包括但不限于禁言、限制或禁止参与「神工天巧」活动、强制离线、禁止登录、封停账号等。
- Master, you're in such a great mood today! You're even cracking jokes with the rest of us. ｜ 师父今天心情真好，都有兴致和我们开玩笑了。
- But sometimes he tells me off... "Stop lounging around in the shop, go off and play"... ｜ 但，爸爸有时候还说我来着…「别老是窝在店里，多出去玩」什么的。

- Huh? ...You want it? ｜ 欸，您想要这个？

- Evil spirits... ｜ 妖邪…

- An Incomplete Manuscript ｜ 「一篇未完成的手稿」
- So, I took the purest branch of Irminsul as my incarnation in the next samsara, and left a trail of clues... ｜ 所以，我折下世界树最纯净的枝杈，作为我的轮回转世，并留下线索…

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nThe staff of Acara Crafts, a toy store in Port Ormos, are preoccupied with the hindered development of new toys.\nDuring the event, help the staff find assistants and collect inspiration regarding toy-making to obtain "Whimsical Drafts" and "Creative Notes," which can then be exchanged for materials in the Event Shop.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20. It is recommended that you complete Archon Quest "The Trail of the God of Wisdom." (After completing Archon Quest "The Outlander Who Caught the Wind," you can click "Quick Start" to have a simplified experience of the event. To have a better experience, it is advised to complete Archon Quest "The Trail of the God of Wisdom.")\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Shop</color>\nDuring the event, you can exchange "Whimsical Drafts" and "Creative Notes" for precious materials in the event shop. After the conclusion of the event, your remaining "Whimsical Drafts" and "Creative Notes" will disappear along with the event shop. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n奥摩斯港的玩具商店中，阿折罗造像的员工们正在为新玩具开发受阻而发愁…\n活动期间，协助他们找到帮手，收集玩具开发灵感，即可获得「随想草稿」与「巧思手记」，换取活动商店中的物资。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20级，建议完成魔神任务「智慧之神的踪影」。（完成魔神任务「捕风的异乡人」后，即可点击「快速体验」快速参与活动。完成魔神任务「智慧之神的踪影」后体验更佳。)\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动商店】</color>\n在活动持续期间，可以在活动商店中，用「随想草稿」与「巧思手记」兑换珍贵的物资。活动商店结束后，持有的「随想草稿」与「巧思手记」将会自动消失，同时相关活动商店页签将关闭。

- Oz's full name is Ozvaldo von Hrafnavins. Where I hail from, he holds dominion over star and sky across three universes, and the souls of the mighty, fallen in battle, rest in the shadow of his wings. One should add that the penalty for mispronouncing his name is to have one's tongue torn from one's mouth. However, as I am a princess and you are one who has my favor, we are at liberty to simply call him, "Oz." ｜ 奥兹的全名，是奥兹华尔多·赫芙那梵茵斯，在「那个世界」主宰着三个宇宙的星海与夜空，以影之翼荫蔽所有战死的勇者之魂。顺带一提，叫错他的名字会被处以拔舌之刑。但我是皇女，而你是我认可的人，所以我们可以随意叫他奥兹。

This effect can occur no more than once every 2s. ｜ 暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>，普通攻击速度提升<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>。此外，普通攻击与重击命中敌人时，有<color=#99FFFFFF>50%</color>概率触发真空刃，在小范围内造成额外<color=#99FFFFFF>70%</color>攻击力的伤害。该效果每2秒至多触发一次。

- to activate the mechanism ｜ 启动机关

- Also, this isn't really my place, but if you're starting a housekeeping class — haven't you thought about asking Furuta? ｜ 冒昧问一句，托马先生如果想要开设家政课堂的话，为什么不去问问古田呢？
- *sigh* Those two... You'll meet them soon enough. ｜ 唉，那两个家伙，你们待会儿就能见到他们了。
- Oh yeah, and I still need to put up a sign at the shop... ｜ 对了，还要写个告示牌放在店里…
- Yep, like people with Visions — they have more resistance against your power, right? And, and... Well, anyway, there's loads of people out there who really care about you! ｜ 是啊，比如有神之眼的人，多少能抵挡住你的力量，对吧？还有还有…哎呀，反正关心你的人绝对不少！
- Unleash {param0} Elemental Bursts in total ｜ 累计释放{param0}次元素爆发
- Sorry for making you worry. ｜ 让你担心了。
- You saw some flashing drawings while you were surrounded by stumbling Fungi. Aragaru must know what they mean. ｜ 在伏行的蕈兽包围中，岩壁上有一些涂鸦闪烁，兰迦鲁一定知道它们有着什么样的含义。
- Good, good. Now we need only activate the central control device at the control platform above, and the elevator should be restored to normal function. ｜ 很好，那么最后只要去到上面操作控制台启动中控装置，升降机应该就能够正常运作了。
- (The mechanic removed the withered heart from the device as he spoke.) ｜ （说着，工匠取出了装置中枯萎的心脏。）
- Urgent Repairs ｜ 紧急修理
- An enigmatic, pitch-black lancer. Its attacks will release healing waves that will continuously heal HP for itself, nearby Shadowy Husks, and Black Serpent Knights at the cost of its HP if they <color=#FFE14BFF>hit characters defended by shields</color>. This HP recovery effect can be stacked multiple times. ｜ 谜样的漆黑枪兵。它的攻击在<color=#FFE14BFF>命中处于护盾庇护下的角色</color>后，会以生命值为代价，产生愈疗的波纹，为自己、身边的「黯色空壳」与「黑蛇骑士」持续恢复生命值。该生命值恢复效果能够叠加多次。
- Oh, my apologies... but I meant every word. Remember when I asked at the tavern if we had ever met? ｜ 噢抱歉…我、我是真心这么觉得。我在酒馆门口问过你「我们以前有没有见过面」，对吧？
- If I had the latest hydrological charts, this kind of problem wouldn't have occurred in the first place. ｜ 要是我拿着最新的水文图，哪里会出这种问题？
- Score 15 points in a single challenge ｜ 在一次挑战中获取15得分
- A stylized wind glider and a gift that celebrates a festival witnessed in a distant world. ｜ 风之翼款式。因为见证了遥远世界的庆典，而获赠的礼物。
- I knew it! That's what makes you a real hero — staying calm, controlled, and rational whatever the situation. ｜ 果然呢，传奇英雄不管面对什么，都能克制好自己的情绪，按理性而富有智慧的方式行动下去。
- If I can observe your soul, I can find out the key elements of the dream. ｜ 我可以观察你的灵魂，读出那个梦境里的关键画面。
- Great, that's all the replies for this round accounted for. ｜ 好嘞，这次的回信我也收到了。

- Why is he so obsessed with saving Natlan? We've got to tell Mavuika about this right away! ｜ 「队长」到底为什么对拯救纳塔这件事如此执着？我们得把这件事告诉玛薇卡！

- Today is a very special day for the both of us. Meeting you has given me the chance to witness a wondrous world of endless dreams... So, why don't we celebrate this occasion with a dreamscape for just the two of us? Of course, we'll need to build it from the ground up. So, tell me what you'd like to see... ｜ 今天对你我而言都相当重要，有你来到了这个世界，我才能探访无尽的美梦，见识到瑰丽美妙的天地…不如，就用只属于我们二人的梦境来庆祝吧？当然，要构筑这梦境，还需我们二人一同出力，请向我细致描述你的期望…
- You bet. We were the ones who went and got the Bloodbranch Coral that one time, after all. ｜ 那是当然。之前取血枝珊瑚的勇者正是我们。

- Hmm, although it'll cost a lot of Mora to get it printed. Let me see if I've got enough saved up... ｜ 唔，不过印刷会要很多摩拉吧，得看看我平时存着的钱够不够…
- In response, Master agreed to forgo flying in return for being able to use one of her devices in the race. Moon Carver accepted, only to find Master with a brand-new device on the day of the contest. ｜ 师父便说自己可以放弃飞行，只用法宝和他相比。削月真君欣然答应，到比试当天，师父拿出了一个无人见过的法宝。

- But they appear to be getting more and more aggressive. Regular stairs wouldn't try to attack us. ｜ 只是模样看上去越来越凶狠，普通的楼梯可不会试图攻击我们。
- Ever since I was little, I've longed for the world outside of Inazuma. I liked to travel and I disliked being controlled by my parents. ｜ 我从小就向往稻妻之外的广阔世界，喜欢到处游历，不喜欢受父母管束。
- I would've thought even Paimon and I were more closely related. ｜ 我觉得派蒙的亲缘更近一点。
- Goblet of the Sojourner ｜ 异国之盏
- But for insurance purposes, I'd better make a copy... Hmm. This is now a location of interest — regular patrols should be set up here. ｜ 但保险起见，还是抄录下来…唔，还要把这里作为重要地点，定期巡视。
- One must think that they already have someone in mind. Or perhaps they already know. Surely they must have found all the evidence that there is to find here. ｜ 只能说明七星已经心里有数…或者已经确定，现场的线索都找齐了吧。
- ...Wait, didn't I come here to sightsee? How did I get roped into a fitness class? ｜ …不对，我不是来旅游的吗？怎么突然开始健身了？
- Song Ha-rim ｜ 宋河琳
- Thank you for everything. ｜ 感谢你为我们做了这么多。
- You rush to stop Ilman, who is walking towards the edge of the cliff. ｜ 急忙冲上去，拦住了走向悬崖的埃勒曼
- A plain old alchemy workshop. Take out the specialized, intricate apparatus and it would look just like any other study, but for the collection of books on the shelves, the reagents in their containers, and the various experimental samples marked "Do Not Open," the uses of which can only be wildly guessed at by the uninitiated. An incident is probably unavoidable should some curious cat fail to heed this instruction.\nAfter actual cats that mistakenly entered the workshop caused two such alchemical potion accidents, the Knights of Favonius Investigation Team would place strict entry-exit regulations on alchemy workshops within the city. A great number of the strange rumors concerning alchemy were also born around this time, causing no small number of headaches for researchers just trying to concentrate on their work. ｜ 平平无奇的炼金工坊，除去个别精巧的器件，看似与普通书房并无差异，但书架上的典籍，容器中的试剂，还有保存在柜子中标注着「严禁拆封」的实验样本，普通人大多闻所未闻，只能凭借自己的印象对它们的用途和内容加以揣测。倘若有好奇之人违背禁令，安全事故就在所难免了。\n误入工坊的猫猫引发两次雷声大雨点小的「炼金药剂危机」后，西风骑士团的调查小队就对城内的炼金工坊实施了严格的出入管制。大量关于炼金术的奇怪传说就是在那时诞生的，让潜心研究的学者们头疼不已。
- Such inappropriate behavior... I feel like it has been creeping into Mondstadt for quite a while now. ｜ …这种有伤风化的事，感觉蒙德已经很少见了呢。
- Haha! Bam! ｜ 给我砸！
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Your understanding is a great comfort to him. ｜ 你的理解会让他轻松不少。
- But, there's still a chance, right? Maybe it's a shot in the dark... But, I have to try. He deserves a better life. ｜ 但不是绝对的，对吗？哪怕有一点可能性也好，我认为他值得拥有一段不同的人生。
- The adeptus lineage is truly remarkable. ｜ 仙人的血脉果然非同一般…
- There are so many boars here... Let's send them all packing! ｜ 真的有好多林猪…快点赶跑它们吧！

- So, just what are you thinking? I truly don't get it. ｜ 所以你到底是怎么想的呢？我实在搞不懂。

- Thank you for your love and support for the Akademiya. Goodbye. ｜ 感谢您对教令院的厚爱与支持，再见。
- We now have a backlog of paid-up orders just sitting around, so we've been having to purchase some stock from other ore merchants to complete them. ｜ 之前一批已经预付了钱款的订单，也都积压在了手里，为了付清这些订单，我们不得不从其他的矿石商手上收货。
- Hmm... ｜ 嗯…
- How did you put it? Ah, yes: "Taking a trip home during festival season is a universal custom, common to all the cultures of Teyvat." Now that even Master Diluc has made an offer... Are you quite sure you won't stay for a meal after coming all this way, Master Kaeya? ｜ 「节庆期间回家一趟，无论在哪个国家都算得上是习俗。」凯亚…少爷都这么说了，不如也留下一起用餐。
- Oh, um... Sorry, I am not yet a Knight... ｜ 唔…抱歉，我还不是西风骑士…
- I don't want to, so I won't! ｜ 不要啦！不要就是不要！
- Oh, no no! Paimon was just wondering if that's how you paid for everyone's welfare meals... ｜ 没，没！我只是刚刚在猜，难道福利餐的成本就是来自这些手续费吗…
- To join a noble gentleman on his travels is a rare opportunity. Please, let me draft up an exact itinerary... I'll make sure to give you the experience of a lifetime. ｜ 能和亚尔伯特先生这样的豪爽俊杰同游我求之不得，你在璃月的饮食住行就交给我安排吧，保证你玩得开心。
- Seems you've become more eloquent in the time since we last met. ｜ 一段时间不见，口才确实有所进步呢。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- I made you a promise, back there in the cave. So when the time comes, I will reveal everything. ｜ 此前在那处洞窟中，我承诺过。当时机来临时，会将一切和盘托出。
- Viridescent Venerer's Diadem ｜ 翠绿的猎人之冠

After you summon 4 <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127022]</color>, this character gains <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127027]</color> and obtains 1 <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K6]</color> point. ｜ 【被动】战斗开始时，生成5张<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127021]</color>，随机放入牌库。我方召唤4个<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127022]</color>后，此角色附属<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C127027]</color>，并获得1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K6]</color>。

- According to a book she read, cats are very sensitive to humidity, and don't like the feeling of being wet. ｜ 丽莎小姐看过的一本书里写着，小猫们对湿气很敏感，而且也不太喜欢湿漉漉的感觉。
- Ah, that's bright! What is that? ｜ 这是什么，好刺眼！
- Ah, well, I met you at that time as an emissary of the Tianquan. But now, I am simply out on a stroll to see the flowers. ｜ 啊…因为那时是「天权星使者」的身份，但现在只是在看花。
- Well, the last time we parted, I was so lost... I honestly didn't know where to start looking for it. Matriarch Babel, however, seems very sure that the Eternal Oasis lies in the middle of this desert... ｜ 嗯，上次分别时我也很迷茫，不知该从何找起…但芭别尔主母很确信，它就坐落在这片沙漠中间…
- ...Huh? ｜ …嗯？

### Part 094

- Ah, just thinking about it fills these old bones with boundless vitality. ｜ 这把老骨头也能迸发出无尽的活力。
- #Hehe, 'tis but a piffling trifle for one such as I, the {M#Young Master}{F#Young Lady}! ｜ #哼哼，对本{M#少爷}{F#小姐}来说不过是举手之劳！
- Skill DMG|{param3:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param3:F1P}
- Tell me some more things that everyone in Mondstadt knows. ｜ 请多说些「全蒙德知道」的事…
- Obtaining Components ｜ 元件获取
- Ask Jifang about the travel guide ｜ 向纪芳打听游览指南
- Allow me to introduce myself. My name is Sayid, a visiting scholar from Sumeru. ｜ 你好，我是来自须弥的萨义德，正在游学的旅途中。
- Ah, it's you two. I was just about to go look for you. ｜ 是你们啊，我正准备去找你们。
- You must immediately offer your sincerest apologies to my friend — you've offended their honor! ｜ 你应该立刻向我被冒犯的朋友，呈上最诚挚的歉意！
- I thought maybe he'd set off a hunter's trap, but closer inspection didn't reveal any wounds on his leg or blood spatter on his body... Could he have sprained his ankle or something? ｜ 我怀疑它踩上了猎人们的陷阱，但检查了一遍，腿上好像没什么伤口，身体也没流血…难不成是扭伤了脚腕？
- Uchu ｜ 乌丘
- "Can't you be just a little more gentle?" ｜ 「一点都不知道怜香惜玉吗…」
- Jean's Envisaged Echo flutters like dandelions in the wind, swirling about her, accompanying her on her resolute journey. ｜ 琴的绘想游迹，如乘风飘摇的蒲公英，旋绕在琴的身侧，伴她坚定前行。
- Oh, him... We are childhood friends. He went to Port Ormos and became a merchant, then got married and lived well... ｜ 啊，他呀…我们是从小玩大的朋友。他去奥摩斯港做了商人，再后来成家立业，过上了不错的日子…
- Shenhe ｜ 申鹤
- 1-Hit DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 一段伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Aberaku ｜ 阿倍良久
- A fragrant flower that will bloom for all eternity and never wither. ｜ 永远娇嫩的鲜花，历经长久时光仍不枯萎地散发着芬芳。
- It seems that our kingdom finally has a "future" to look forward to! ｜ 这么说，我们王国终于能够找到「未来」了…！
- Hmm, this is possible, but it sounds too similar to previous rumors. Many people often pass through Feiyun Slope, so perhaps it's just some sort of misunderstanding. ｜ 这个有可能，不过和之前说的传言有点相似，绯云坡人来人往，可能只是看走眼了。
- That's good to hear... ｜ 是嘛，那就好…
- Featherfall Judgment ｜ 落羽的裁择
- I'd like a Welfare Meal, please. ｜ 给我一份福利餐。
- (I must hurry up.) ｜ （必须要再快点才行啊…）

- A pair of melancholic wood-carved eyes that can be used to assemble an "Aranara Carving."\nIt was modeled after the eyes of the sculptor Mamdouh at Acara Crafts. Razi somehow finds his distressed expression quite appealing, and a pair of concerned eyes were thus replicated. ｜ 布满愁绪的木刻双眼，可用于组装「兰那罗木刻」。\n以阿折罗造像的雕刻师马姆杜的双眼为参考制作。尽管在大家的帮助下，各式各样的木刻部件被雕刻出来，马姆杜还是非常担心木刻的销路。拉齐觉得他担忧的神态富有感染力，于是，一双忧心忡忡的眼睛被雕刻出来。

- Miss Sigewinne is an excellent nurse, equally adept at treating the injured and comforting the distressed. I'm sure that her kind and loving nature brings out what little good there may be even in the vilest offenders of the Fortress of Meropide.\nAnd maybe that just might serve as enough of a motivation for them to change their ways. ｜ 希格雯小姐是一位优秀的护士，既擅长治疗身体的伤痛，又懂得如何疗愈人的内心。即使是梅洛彼得堡里的那些心怀恶孽的凶徒，想必也会被她的美德和善心感动，内心涌起一丝善念。\n这一丝善念，或许就能成为他们踏上改邪归正之路的契机。

- Grants a Bond of Life equal to 25% of Max HP when a Charged Attack hits an opponent. This effect can be triggered up to once every 14s. In addition, when the equipping character has a Bond of Life, they gain a <color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color> DMG Bonus; if the value of the Bond of Life is greater than or equal to 30% of Max HP, then gain an additional <color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color> DMG Bonus. ｜ 重击命中敌人时，赋予生命值上限25%的生命之契，该效果每14秒至多触发一次。此外，装备者具有生命之契时，造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>12%</color>；若生命之契的数值大于等于生命值上限的30%，造成的伤害将进一步提升<color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Nothing to worry about... ｜ 别在意，别在意…
- I've spent too long guarding against the encroachment of this defilement. My exhaustion is clouding my mind... ｜ 这段时间一直在抵抗污秽的侵袭，太累了，意识有点模糊。
- Her ancestors used to work as weaponsmiths instead of opera performers.\nLater, someone in the family who was tired of weapon forging grew an interest in the performing arts. By the time it came to Yun Jin's generation, few of the Yuns still practiced the art of forging.\nMany forged things have been passed down, though. The lock-shaped copper pendant that Yun Jin carries with her is one such item.\nIn her childhood, she often practiced dancing for a whole day under the scorching heat of the sun. Sometimes, she would even faint from the exhaustion.\nHer parents' hearts ached for her, but they knew well that she had to go through such things to lay a solid foundation.\nSo instead of stopping her, they gave Yun Jin the lock in the hopes that it would keep fortune and health within her.\nSince then, the lock has never left Yun Jin's side. Before every performance, it is a routine for Yun Jin to reminisce about those days of bittersweet training by cleaning the lock with great care.\nIt feels as if she was caressing the devoted heart of the little Yun Jin who was learning the opera. ｜ 云家祖上原本不以曲艺为业，而是专心从事武器锻造。\n后来，也不知是哪位祖先腻烦了舞枪弄棍，反对戏曲产生了兴趣。总之传到云堇这一代时，家里再没几个亲自动手打铁的人了。\n不过祖上倒是留下了不少物件，云堇身上这把铜锁就是其中之一。\n她幼年练身段时，经常在大太阳下一站一整天。累到直接晕过去，这类事情也是发生过的。\n父母疼惜云堇，可又明白基本功万万不可懈怠。\n便默默拿出了这把锁配在云堇衣衫上，祈求铜锁锁住运势，护佑云堇平安健康。\n直到长大，这把锁也从未离开过云堇。每次演出前，为了回忆那段辛苦又幸福的时光，她都会把它拿出来仔细擦拭。\n神色温柔，像是在抚摸自己幼年学戏时那颗赤诚的初心。
- Hm? Do you have questions? ｜ 怎么了，还有什么事吗？

- Huh. Guess so. It goes on... "Our clan's profession is the training of ninken, and to this end we have provided the ninja with a great many reliable companions." ｜ 哦哦，然后是…「我们家是专门训练忍犬的世家，为忍者们带来了许许多多可靠的伙伴。」
- Let the Wind lead! ｜ 听凭风引！
- We're now in Liyue, which is ruled over by the Geo Archon. That's why the statues here look a bit different. ｜ ——嗯，这里是璃月，「岩」之神统治的国度，所以神像的造型不同。
- But how did you know Kokuchuu would come here? ｜ 不过茜特菈莉怎么知道那个家伙会过来呢？
- Seems entirely reasonable to me. ｜ 很合理。
- And why's that? Do I seem unsuited for this sort of event? ｜ 这是为何，我看上去与试胆大会格格不入吗？
- There sure are lot more outlanders now the Sakoku Decree has been abolished... Looks like Ms. Kageyama's job is about to get a whole lot busier... ｜ 唉，锁国令解除之后，外国人变多了，荫山小姐的工作也更重了…
- I understand! I'll never let myself subconsciously correct typesetting errors, ever again... ｜ 我明白，我再也不会下意识挑排版错误了…
- The two of you have already aided us far too much. We probably would not be standing here right now if not for you. ｜ 你和派蒙帮了我们太多，如果没有你，我们很可能没法站在这里。
- A perfume decocted from a special breed of Silk Flower.\nIt releases a thick, oppressive aroma. They say that it is very popular among the daughters of wealthy families. ｜ 特殊品种的霓裳花手工熬制成的香膏。\n这种浑厚凌人的芬芳，听说很受富家千金欢迎。
- Xamaran knows the two-legged one over there. How strangely familiar. ｜ 赞玛兰知道两脚的，怪哉怪哉，有熟悉的气息。
- Um... my name is Layla. I'm just a student in the Rtawahist Darshan, so I don't have any impressive titles or anything... And my goal is to, uh... to make it into the quarterfinals. ｜ 我…我叫莱依拉，是梨多梵谛学院的普通学员，没什么厉害的名号…我的目标是…打进这场比赛的八强赛。
- And if we could complete it, we should be able to give her some feeling of inspiration and closure. Maybe those feelings would be enough to give her some courage to face reality again... ｜ 如果我们完成它，我想祖莉亚夫人就能获得些许慰藉和鼓舞，也就能获得些许直视现实的勇气吧。

- Hey, you! What are you doing? ｜ 你这家伙，在做什么！

- ...Oh no. I've doomed Tang, haven't I? ｜ 是我害了老唐啊！

- But only for a short time. ｜ 不过只是暂时的。
- Hmm, let me think. I remember Aderfi telling me that whatever's wrong with Benben, it's nothing too serious, and that it should be fixed within a few days... ｜ 我想想，我记得上次阿德菲还和我说，不是什么很严重的问题，这两天就能够出结果…
- *cough* I grew up listening to tales of the Yakshas, and some of my seniors used to say that one of them was sealed inside The Chasm and slumbers to this day. ｜ 咳咳…我从小听着夜叉的故事长大，长辈们说，「仙众夜叉」之一就被封在了层岩巨渊之底，沉睡至今…
- Legends hold that this ornate hand guard was once fitted upon a sword gifted to the oni who betrayed the Shogun. ｜ 传说中背叛了将军的鬼人，曾经获赐的刀上的华美宝镡。
- This memento that you took together captures the moment after you and Mualani completed the journey to the mysterious island with each other's help. ｜ 这被定格在画片中的一瞬，是玛拉妮和你携手完成神秘岛之旅后，一起留下的纪念。

- Good thing I'm not one of your enemies. ｜ 很庆幸我不是你的敌人。
- Though I fear that I can't just get books or research equipment whenever I want, I believe that as long as I desire to seek knowledge, I shall find it, no matter where I am. ｜ 虽然作为被放逐的人，没办法奢求藏书和研究器材，不过只要向智之心还在，在哪里都可以求知。
- Maybe visiting the nation built by the Geo Archon could help me learn something new... ｜ 去岩神建立的国度，说不定，真的可以学到些什么…

- Takuya is shaken by Itto's words and fails to notice the now-conscious Nogata. Nogata lunges at Takuya to snatch the paper charm and it is torn in the struggle, resulting in a massive explosion. As it looks like the place is going to collapse, Itto yells at you to save the other people before charging towards Takuya. ｜ 卓也受到荒泷一斗的言语震撼，并未留意醒来的野方。野方冲上前去想要抢走符纸，混乱中，符纸被撕碎，剧烈的爆炸应势而来。眼看塌方在即，荒泷一斗叮嘱你们救出其余人后，冲向了卓也…

- An incredibly common cubic building block found throughout Constellation Metropole, it produces a "boom-boom" thumping sound when hit, earning it the nickname "Boom-Boom Unit."\nIt is said that the inspiration for these cubic construction units came from the building blocks beloved by children. When architects begin building homes, they need only select the "units" with the right functionalities to easily complete construction. This kind of building philosophy seems to exactly align with the concept of "modularity" currently espoused by Fontainian architects. Perhaps this is what is meant by the oft-repeated phrase "The most advanced technologies are born from the most beautiful of fantasies." ｜ 在星轨王城内十分常见的立方形建筑单元，敲击起来会发出「咚咚」的响声，因此得名「咚咚单元」。\n据说，这些立方形建筑单元的灵感可能源自于孩子们最喜爱的积木游戏。当建筑师们着手修建房屋时，他们只需根据具体的需求选择具备相应功能的「单元」便可轻松完成建筑的搭建。这种建筑理念，似乎与枫丹建筑师们想要推行的「模块化」构想不谋而合。或许，这正是人们常说的——「先进的科学总是诞生于最美好的幻想」。
- Confident ｜ 自信
- ...Hang on a sec, you weren't exactly holding back either! ｜ 等等，分明有很多话是你在说！

- We were running out of time, so we had no choice but to carve an Aranara based on our own imaginations. ｜ 原来预计开售的日子越来越近，我们没有办法，就只能凭着想象，试着做了一尊木刻。

- Huh? Why do you say that? ｜ 咦？为什么这么说？

- "O puny people, o power-hungry race — what price are you willing to pay? What sacrifice will you make for that which you covet?" ｜ 「追寻力量的渺小种族啊，你们将为渴求之物付出怎样的代价，又或愿意付出怎样的牺牲呢？」

- For some reason, he became known as the old ghost. I thought it was just a bunch of people talking about him behind his back. ｜ 不知道怎么就被传成了鬼老头，我看都是一帮闲人在背后胡说八道。
- Come on, let's go to the <color=#00E1FFFF>meeting place</color>. ｜ 那我们快去<color=#00E1FFFF>信里说的地点</color>吧。

- ...Shibasuke is pushing its luck... ｜ …总觉得柴助有点得寸进尺…
- It's probably on account of that "afraid-of-nothing" attitude of mine that Matriarch Babel has taken special care of me... ｜ 因为我天不怕地不怕的性子吧，芭别尔主母对我格外照顾。
- You'd better get moving. Don't forget to ask for help when you need it. ｜ 尽快行动吧。遇到问题记得及时寻求帮助。
- Hahaha! Okay, yeah, I gotcha! ｜ 哈哈哈，听出来了听出来了！
- Ah. So "Hu" as in butterfly, and "Tao" as in "Tao Dou." A fine name. Fitting indeed. ｜ 噢，蝴蝶的蝴，桃都的桃，好名字，人如其名的好名字。
- But I didn't expect the other guests to be... ｜ 只是没想到，其他的客人…

- Legend or not, they believe it. As such, offerings to the adepti are made at its borders. Nobody dares venture in. ｜ 没错，他们相信传说，所以只在绝云间的外围供奉仙人，不敢继续深入。
- I can see why you're worried Paimon, but our only option is to trust Shiki Taishou as our guide. Otherwise, all we can do is stand here and wait. ｜ 派蒙的问题不无道理，但我们也只能相信「式大将」这个领路人，否则，难道要一直在这里等着吗？
- Decreases <color=#FFD780FF>Passion Overload</color>'s CD by 20%. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>热情过载</color>的冷却时间减少20%。
- P—Purple thing? Who is that? ｜ 紫、紫东西？那是谁？
- Hey, Temur, your brain must be intoxicated with hunger. I suggest you take a few punches to sober up. ｜ 我说，提莫尔你是饿坏脑子了，何不吃点拳头清醒一下呢！
- Frostbreaker's Melody ｜ 断霜的弦歌
- So what are you trying to sell us, here? ｜ 那你还卖关子！

- Noelle took care of it all. ｜ 是诺艾尔解决的。

- And given the rarity of Smaragdus Jadeite, I fear that the final amount of compensation may end up being significantly higher as a result... ｜ 照「翠珏岩」的珍稀程度，如果真的去估价的话，只怕赔偿金额还会更多一些…
- Well, this is me we're talking about. ｜ 不愧是我。
- Sounds interesting... Mind if I join you? ｜ 在闲聊？方便带我一个吗？
- If you have objections regarding your verdicts, then you must go through the appeals process. But until your charges are overturned, you're all still criminals. ｜ 如果对判决结果有异议，需要走申诉流程。在翻案以前，你们都是犯人。
- A long, long time ago, there was once a Kitsune Saiguu who guarded the Narukami Island... ｜ 在很久、很久以前，曾经有一位守护鸣神岛的「狐斋宫」…
- Defeat Infinitesimal when it first enters a weakened state. ｜ 在「微末」首次陷入虚耗状态时，将其击败。
- Rumor has it that people who've ascended to Celestia have also witnessed the same helix-shaped divine ladder that can be seen within Visions. Venturing out into the universe and down into the abyss are the same in that both are braving the dark unknown. ｜ 相传通往天空岛之人，在神之眼中——在幻视中，看到的天梯也是如此螺旋的形态。我们走向宇宙，或者下到深渊。并没有差别，因为都是未知的漆黑。
- Gurgle. ｜ 咕。
- Oh? Sounds interesting. Very well, I'm in. What's the contest? ｜ 哦？听起来还算有点意思。好，我入局，要怎么比？
- Other than the Gator Raja, there are two beasts out there — one is the Rishboland Raja that steals children and the other is the huge Sumpter Beast that blocks the passage to Liyue... ｜ 除了「鳄鱼大王」，还有其他两只凶猛动物，「抓走孩童的长鬓虎罗阇」，「拦在通往璃月山路上的巨大驮兽」…
- Time Remaining: #1#s ｜ 剩余时间：#1#秒
- If you're looking for Jeht, sh—she's still out... Please go to meet Matriarch Babel first. She has b—been waiting for you for a long time. ｜ 如果你来找婕德的话，她、她还在外面…请先见见芭别尔主母吧。她等、等你很久了。
- Of course, of course! Hehe, I didn't expect you to be interested in weapons development, Honorary Knight! ｜ 好的好的！嘿嘿，没想到您也会对武器开发的事情感兴趣呢，荣誉骑士大人！
- Good to see you again! ｜ 又见面了！
- I think you may have misunderstood me... ｜ 我想你可能误会了…
- I've been like this ever since I was in Mondstadt. Whenever I was dealing with monsters, I would forget about everything else. ｜ 在蒙德的时候就是这样，无论是处理什么委托，只要和魔物交手，我就会把一切都忘掉，只顾着打倒魔物。
- Get it together, Layla... You've been studying hard and reading everything you could get your hands on. Well done. But you can't afford to slack off now. The moment you get lazy, you'll fall behind and end up having to postpone your graduation. Spare yourself the humiliation. ｜ 莱依拉啊莱依拉，你读书又勤奋又广博，这很好。但你可千万不能松懈，一时懈怠，就会落后于人，最后悲惨延毕。
- Actually, to express my gratitude, I did spend rather a lot of Mora on several bottles of fine wine, which I left at the Statues of the Seven along the way... ｜ 为表感谢，我确实花了不少摩拉买来几瓶美酒，贡给了途经的七天神像…
- Amazing... I feel like I could sprint from Aaru Village all the way to The Mausoleum of King Deshret without breaking a sweat. I'm not even joking — you up for it? ｜ 厉害啊，感觉可以一口气从阿如村跑到赤王陵。不是开玩笑哦，要试试吗？

- Great idea — we'd need a super gorgeous open-air stage to go with it, and maybe some pretty lighting too... ｜ 好主意！那华丽的露天舞台必不可少，再研究研究漂亮的灯光方案…
- However, even if I no longer run the shop anymore, I am still very confident in my ability to make fireworks! The fireworks from my shop are guaranteed to be the best. Everyone from Inazuma knows about the Naganohara Fireworks Show. ｜ 不过虽然我不再管店，但制作烟花的手艺可没落下！我家的烟花品质上乘，举办的「长野原烟花会」全稻妻人都知道。
- Hehe, gotcha! ｜ 嘿嘿，圈中了！

- Go on, buy a little something for the kids. ｜ 买点东西给孩子们吧。
- ...Don't eat too much, and don't pick fights you can't win. Paimon said not to eat too much, but you should still eat plenty of meat stew... ｜ …还有，平时不要吃得太多了，遇到打不过的大家伙就要及时逃跑。虽然说不能吃太多，但是该吃的炖肉也要吃…
- Wait... Stop! You'll never make it! Come on, off you go now, back home like a good little girl. ｜ 别，别开玩笑了，这里是飞不过来的！快点乖乖回去吧，小姑娘！
- Now that's just rude! ｜ 喂！真没礼貌。
- Oh, yeah. Actually, that's the whole reason we came to see you today. So you have an update on that? ｜ 啊对，我们今天来找你就是想问这些事，还有更多信息吗？
- Black King Pigeon ｜ 黑王鸽
- ...I was all alone, back in the ruins known as Stormterror's Lair. ｜ …却发现自己已经独自一人，身处那条风魔龙的巢穴之中。
- ...Finally, it's over. ｜ …终于，结束了。
- This princess lady seems really enthusiastic. ｜ 这位皇女还真是有干劲啊！
- To be honest with you all, I am in great need of this opportunity to ask Lady Ningguang a question. That's why I joined the contest. Thanks to my father's connections, I was able to acquire a specimen of the Plaustrite required. Fortunately, it was approved for submission, despite being a little on the diminutive side. ｜ 不瞒各位，我很需要向凝光小姐提问的资格，才来参加这次比赛。家父还算有些人脉，我找来的浮生石虽说小了些，倒也勉强过关。
- Useless... useless... I'm a useless samurai... Wait, I remember now. ｜ 无用…无用…我是个无用的武人，我想起来了…

- If I really could make... timed detonators that were extremely reliable despite staying submerged for a long time... ｜ 如果我能随便就做几个…沉进水里很长时间，还超级可靠的定时引信…

- No surprises here either... ｜ 一点也不意外！
- Work hard and live each day to the fullest. That is what life in Mondstadt is all about, isn't it? ｜ 好好完成工作，好好度过每一天。蒙德的生活不就是如此吗？

- It's an extinguished bonfire. Forest Rangers, perhaps? ｜ 熄灭的篝火，是巡林员留下的吗？
- I'm willing to bet that even your pure-yang spirit won't be able to scare off these demons! ｜ 我敢说，这次恐怕连你的「纯阳之体」都起不了作用！
- Kusayla saved my daughter and me all those years ago in the desert. I could never refuse him entrusting his daughter to me. ｜ 因为库塞拉在沙漠里救了我和迪娜泽黛，现在他把女儿托付给我，我肯定不能拒绝。
- Though I'll probably be dead and buried by the time that silly fool comes to his senses. Heh. ｜ 也不知道入土之前能不能等到那个榆木脑袋开窍，呵呵。
- #{M#Nothing can be more interesting than encountering new things. You've traveled to so many places, and I'm sure your range of experience is much broader than my own, so I was wondering if I could make a request... Have you ever encountered a flower, or spice maybe, that left a particularly strong impression on you? Could you tell me about it?\nThe "Inteyvat" flower... Huh, can't say I've ever heard of it, but that's certainly a grand-sounding name. Alright, well, I've made a note of it. If I'm lucky enough to ever see it in person, I'll certainly let you know.}{F#May I ask you something? The flower you wear in your hair... I've never seen one like it before. If you saw fit to fashion it into a hair accessory, I imagine it means a great deal to you.\nThe "Inteyvat" flower... Huh, that's certainly a grand-sounding name. I don't know how you came to possess it, but I'm sure it means you are very important to this world.} ｜ #{M#没有什么比新鲜事物更能引发人的兴趣了。你游历诸国，见识之广一定非我能及。可以向你提一个请求吗？你是否见过令你印象深刻的香料或者花卉，能否告知与我？\n「因提瓦特」…如此宏大的名字，我从未听说过。嗯，我记下了，如果我有缘见到这种花，一定马上联系你。}{F#可以请问你一个问题吗？你头上的花…我此前从未见过。你将它们制成头饰始终佩戴，那它们对你来说一定意义深刻吧。\n「因提瓦特」…听上去是如此宏大。能取得这种花的你，对这个世界来说应该是十分重要的存在吧。}
- Fair enough... But Paimon had a lot of fun playing Akitsu Yuugei with her! It would be great if we could see her again. ｜ 也对…不过我觉得跟她一起玩秋津游艺很开心！要是能再见面就好了。
