- ...Grundeland. Just what are you up to this time? Find another opportunity to exploit? Or are you trying to take credit for our research again? ｜ …戈伦德兰，你又在打什么主意，你又抓住了这次机会？嗯？要把我们的研究据为己有？
- A very small percentage of individuals may experience epileptic seizures when exposed to certain visual images, including certain light patterns of flashing lights in video games. Playing video games may induce an epileptic seizure in these individuals. Certain conditions may induce previously undetected epileptic symptoms even in persons who have no prior history of seizures or epilepsy. If you, or anyone in your family, have any history of prior seizures or epilepsy, consult your physician prior to playing. If you experience any of the following symptoms while playing a video game — eye soreness, altered vision, migraines, muscle twitching, convulsions, blackouts, loss of awareness or disorientation, IMMEDIATELY stop playing and consult your physician before resuming play.\n\nIn addition to the above symptoms, if you have a headache, dizziness, nausea, similar symptoms of motion sickness, or if you feel a discomfort or pain in any body part whilst playing, IMMEDIATELY stop playing. If the condition persists, seek medical attention. ｜ 有极少数的人在观看一些视觉影像时可能会突然癫痫发作，这些影像包括电子游戏中出现的闪光或图形。在进行电子游戏时，这些人可能会出现癫痫症状。甚至连不具有癫痫史的人，也可能在进行电子游戏时，出现类似癫痫症状。如果您或您的家人有癫痫史，请在进行游戏之前先与医生咨询。如果您在游玩电子游戏时出现以下症状，包括眼睛疼痛、视觉异常、偏头痛、痉挛或意识障碍(诸如昏迷)等，请立即中止游戏，并且请您于再次进行本游戏之前咨询您的医生。\n\n除上述症状外，当您感到头痛、头晕眼花、恶心想吐或类似晕车症状时，以及当身体的某些部位感到不舒服或疼痛时，请立即中止游戏。若在中止游戏后，症状仍没有减退，请立即寻求医生的诊疗。
- So, starting from now, I'm just not going to speak to either of you. ｜ 从此刻开始，我不会和你们说话了。
- (Feelings of affection, intimacy, nostalgia, sadness, and anxiety also come to my mind... These seem to be what the people of Sumeru feel about their departed archon.) ｜ （此外，爱戴、亲近、怀念、悲伤、不安等等情绪也涌进了脑海…那些好像是须弥人对这位神的感情。）
- It's a pie made with seasonal fruits, pieces of cheese, and chicken. When enjoyed together with a special fruit cocktail, it is most superb. ｜ 那是一种用时令水果、奶酪片和鸡肉做成的派，再配上一点特色果酒，真是至高无上的美味…
- As far as I'm concerned, as long as they can be used to cure Antu's illness, that's enough. Nothing else matters. ｜ 对我来说，知道它能用来治安杜的病就够了，其他的我不关心。

- Perhaps... he might have forgotten the way in his fright. ｜ 我想…那家伙不会是因为太害怕，连路都记错了吧。
- Whoa, what a nasty guy. Maybe we shouldn't even bother talking to him... ｜ 哇，脾气好臭，真不想跟他说话…

- Sure! We've shared our stories with others before, though it feels like so long ago... ｜ 没问题！之前我们也给人讲过故事呢，感觉已经过了好久了…

- I am well aware of Durin's past, and I sincerely hope that things never escalate to that point. Still, we need to be prepared for every possibility. ｜ 我了解杜林的过去，并不希望事态发展到那一步。但凡事都需做好充足的准备。

- Why, explorers, wayfarers. Those willing to leave everything behind and travel far abroad. ｜ 他们是探索家，旅行家，自愿丢开一切，朝着远方游历的人。
- Had Ganyu not come to visit, one would likely have stayed firmly put in one's abode to resume research of gadgets and mechanics. ｜ 要不是甘雨来访，本仙怕是要再度闭关潜心研究机关术了。
- Well, it's not that we don't want to help you... ｜ 实在不是我们不想帮忙…
- A basic, common component often found in various creations of an ancient civilization, the function of which seems to be ensuring that these creations continue operating. Due to their close similarity in makeup to the components used in Pursina's Spikes, they can be used to replace its damaged parts. To think that Pursina's Spikes need such priceless objects to repair them... What a terrifyingly high-maintenance device. ｜ 常见于古代文明所留下的种种造物之中，似乎是保障它们运行的基础元件之一。由于「普尔希娜光钉」所使用的零部件材质与之类似，因此可以用它替换损坏的零部件。竟然要用如此珍贵的物品来维修，「普尔希娜光钉」的使用与维护代价实在高昂。
- That's not what happened. ｜ 不是这样的。
- (I've looked all around, but I haven't found any clues.) ｜ （四下环顾一番，没有看到什么线索。）
- See you! Stay safe! ｜ 嗯，再见，要注意安全呀！
- #That's right, we've had a ton of those in our journey, haven't we, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #甜甜花酿鸡！我和{NICKNAME}在旅途中，吃了很多哦！
- Dominus Cassiodor, you say... I heard that the Sebastos had sent him to Aremorica. Has he returned so soon? ｜ 嗯…卡西奥多大人吗，我听说伟大的至尊将他派往了埃雷莫利卡，难道这么快就回来了？
- "So you can bet there's gotta be a ton of treasure in these ruins. What else would they be hiding in the rocks and concealing in the waters?" ｜ 「所以说，这片遗迹肯定有丰厚的宝藏。不然为啥要隐于磐岩，镇于江海呢！」
- Thanks for your help. I should be able to continue with the aid of these paints. Come over and take a look when you have the time, alright? ｜ 多谢您帮忙，有了这些颜料我就能继续画画了，您要是有空的话，可以多过来看看。
- We could use the Thunderbird's feathers... ｜ 如果用雷鸟的羽毛…
- And he still has the astral iron strings with him! ｜ 唔~星铁弦果然还在这小家伙身上。

- Well, we kinda ran into Clervie last night... and that's what she told us. ｜ 其实，我们昨天晚上见到了克雷薇，这是她告诉我们的。
- I'm a ship craftsman. I'm responsible for ship repairs and maintenance. ｜ 我是船上的工匠，负责船只修理和维护工作。

- If Gaming truly sees a kite as a reflection of himself... Then I fear I understand his words even less. ｜ 如你所说，嘉明是在联想自己的话…我就更费解了。
- I just wanted to enjoy the scenery, so don't worry about me. ｜ 我就是来这里看看风景而已啦，别担心我。
- A rich dessert. First, the syrup is boiled till clear, then mixed with fillings and sesame paste from Sumeru. Then at last, the evenly-mixed syrup is poured into a mold and allowed to solidify into this crunchy form. It is said that the cold lands of Snezhnaya are a host to a similar dish, with a slightly different flavor profile. Of course, both sides naturally believe theirs to be the greatest in all Teyvat. ｜ 馅料丰富的甜点。先将糖水熬制到清澈，再与馅料和须弥芝麻酱一起混合，最后等搅拌均匀的糖浆在模具内晾干成松脆的成品即可。据说在寒冷的至冬国也有相似甜点，只是口味略有不同。当然，两国人民自然都认为自家的蜜糖才是全提瓦特最好吃的。
- Whatever's motivating them to speed up must be psychological. For instance... reaching the home stretch. ｜ 会出现这种反常，我猜与「心理」因素有关。比如…已经快到据点了。
- But why should Lord Kazuha be the only one excluded? ｜ 为何只有万叶卿遭到排斥？
- Congratulations! ｜ 恭喜你！
- I'm quite curious, actually. If it were you, which would you use? ｜ 我有些好奇你的意见，如果是你会用哪句呢？

- Even if there's a catch to this, it can't be as bad as being a shrine maiden for the day... ｜ 况且就算有什么问题，也比当巫女要好多了…
- But the situation here on the islands isn't very clear! Let's head back once we've resolved everything! ｜ 不过现在群岛的状况还不是很明朗呢！等问题全部解决之后我们再一起回去吧！
- Paimon has so many questions. Who placed these items? And why did they place them here? ｜ 仔细想想，这些东西到底是什么人出于什么目的放在这里的？而且，为什么要放在这里呢？
- I really want to do something for them so that they'll have a chance to meet again... ｜ 为了它们有机会能重逢，我很想再做点什么…
- A crystal that you picked up in the ruins after completing the duel against The Knave.\nThe already-cooled blood and fire still maintain the shape of a feather, that is framed with solidified sleek black threads.\nBefore their thoughts have matured, young children are reliant on the meticulous care of their parents, just as fledglings need the aegis of an adult wing. But young birds too will one day spread their now-abundant plumage and fly away for more distant skies. Such is life, and such is fate.\nIt is to fulfill such wishes that "Father" wove dangerous spider-silk into a facsimile of feathers, that she might grant her family some warmth. ｜ 完成与「仆人」的决斗后，在废墟中拾起的晶片。\n已经冷却的血与火依旧维持着羽毛的形状，周围缭绕着凝固的黑色细线。\n心智尚未成熟之时，稚童们总是依赖父母的精心照料，如同雏鸟需要羽翼的庇护。而雏鸟也终将羽翼渐丰，飞向更为辽远的苍空。生灵如此，命运亦然。\n为了满足这份愿望，「父亲」将危险的蛛丝织成羽毛，模仿成鸟的翅膀，为家中带去些许温暖。
- Uhh, yeah. That's getting kinda creepy. ｜ 呜哇，这么说就有点点恐怖了。
- I sleep like this when I'm in jail? Hah! Good one. I do slumber like a king. ｜ 我在牢房里也这样睡？你可真会开玩笑。本大爷的睡姿肯定是全世界最帅…
- Reliquary ｜ 圣物匣
- "I understand now! Simply controlling what I eat and drink isn't enough. I need to adopt a more practical and effective approach!" ｜ 「我明白了！光依靠饮食终究是不靠谱的，还是要采用最切实有效的办法才好。」
- Twilight <color=#6957C2FF>Arbiter</color> ｜ <color=#6957C2FF>雳裁</color>冥昭
- Follow me. Let's go up. ｜ 跟我来，我们往上走。
- "Iron, Blood, Broken Armor" ｜ 「铁与血与破甲」
- As a special intelligence officer who works under Ningguang, Yelan comes and goes like a shadow.\nEven the ruling Qixing with their vast powers must find some dark corners hard to reach.\nThis is where Yelan comes in, with her task being to clean these corners up by dint of her exceptional capabilities as an intelligence agent.\nA word to the wise: do not try to lie to her, for falsehoods may last as long as fragile bubbles before her meticulous thoughts. ｜ 身为天权星凝光麾下的特别情报官，夜兰一向神出鬼没，行踪如影。\n在七星总揽事务的璃月，有些黑暗角落，就算是七星的光芒也难以触及。\n凭借优秀的情报能力，将这些角落打扫干净，这就是夜兰的工作。\n请不要试图对她撒谎，在她缜密的思维面前，谎言将如泡沫一般，一戳即破。
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- No Custom Plans to delete ｜ 没有可删除的自定义方案
- Return to Cabin to debrief ｜ 回小屋复命
- <color=#C87D1DFF>After opposing characters receive Bloom DMG:</color> Spend 2 less Elemental Dice when playing your next Action Card. The next time your characters deal Hydro or Dendro DMG to an opposing character, the DMG is increased by 2. ｜ <color=#C87D1DFF>敌方角色受到绽放反应伤害后：</color>我方下次打出行动牌时少花费2个元素骰；我方下次对敌方出战角色造成的水元素或草元素伤害+2。
- Fractured Fruit Fragment ｜ 碎果裂片
- Taking my leave now! ｜ 就此告辞！
- Purchasable {0}/{1} ｜ 可购{0}/{1}
- #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> The "Meaty tribe," huh? These hilichurls pick the funniest names.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> The hilichurls of the Meaty tribe make regular sacrifices. The altars they build are really huge.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> What do they pray for?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> "For meat to eat every day"! It's an awesome wish, isn't it?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> ...I suppose I should have expected that answer. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>「好肉族」…丘丘人的部族名真是奇妙。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>「好肉族」的丘丘人，会定期祭祀。他们的祭坛建得很壮观喔。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>祭祀的内容是？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>「每天都有肉吃」！是很棒的愿望吧？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>…可以想见的答案，我不意外。
- Don't eat that! It's a cactus! ｜ 别吃！那是仙人掌
- Water and soil quality... ｜ 水土的本质…
- 3-Hit DMG|{param3:F1P}+{param4:F1P} ｜ 三段伤害|{param3:F1P}+{param4:F1P}
- If you don't take the payment now, I'll be forced to send someone to deliver the package to the Arataki Gang. ｜ 这工钱要是现在不结清，我也只能回头再派人…把这包裹送去荒泷派了。
- Maawe and Monetoo (I) ｜ 玛阿威与幻写灵·卷一
- Scarlet Seal Duration|{param19:F1}s ｜ 丹火印持续时间|{param19:F1}秒
- Cannot create Replica in current state ｜ 当前状态无法生成摹本
- Glory's Wish ｜ 葛罗丽的心愿
- This isn't the first time something like this has happened. ｜ 这种情况也不是第一次了…
- You are not friends ｜ 好友关系已解除
- It turns out that the seat number it picked wasn't random at all. The machine picks that same number every time. ｜ 结果就发现，根本不是随机的结果，不管怎么按，它的结果都是固定的。
- Perhaps you can try asking around some more. ｜ 或许你们可以找其他人再打听一下。
- We've taken loads of monsters like them down in the past! ｜ 我们已经解决掉过很多这样的怪物啦！
- Neat Note ｜ 工整的字条
- A graceful bird with broad wings and slender legs.\nIt has beautiful violet feathers and enjoys walking across streams or paddy fields in silence. It is referred to as the "Uraume Bird" in ancient Inazuma songs. Once present everywhere, they seem to have become more and more rare. ｜ 高贵优雅的鸟类，生着宽阔的双翼与修长的腿。\n长着堇色的美丽羽毛，喜欢沉静地漫步在溪流或稻田之中。在稻妻的古歌中称之为「里梅鸟」，曾经有着非常广泛的分布，但近来似乎越来越少见了。
- Our task is a bit abstract, but it's interesting all the same. ｜ 有点抽象，但也挺有意思。
- CD|{param10:F1}s – {param11:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param10:F1}秒到{param11:F1}秒
- (Korina, Desyree, Joinville, Jolienne, Essonnes... And Mr. Giverny and Mrs. Bernette, who we met earlier...) ｜ （柯莉娜、黛丝蕾、瑞安维尔、约莲妮、埃松…还有刚才遇到的吉沃尼和贝妮蒂。）
- Ah, it's a school of martial arts that we created ourselves with Grandpa Shousen's advice. The aim was to develop invincible martial arts using the Temari. ｜ 啊，是我们在涉川爷爷的提点下，自创的流派。目的是用手鞠开发出无敌的武术。
- Someone has seized control of the life-force, and someone has opened the beast-realm. ｜ 有谁掌控了生命之力，又有什么人开辟了兽之国度。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- I guess I was mistaken when I declared that something was missing, that something from this island had evaporated into thin air... Because even something that evaporates is not gone. It's still there, just in a different state of being. ｜ 我想我最初的理解就错了，我说这片岛屿缺少的东西人间蒸发了。但是，蒸发并不是消失，它依然存在。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- I'm glad you're okay... ｜ 没事就好…
- Charged Attack DMG|{param5:P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param5:P}
- With a joyful look, Hora grabs the Driftyball before rolling around in the pool. The water splashes everywhere, washing all the mud on his body off... ｜ 霍莱开心地抱起了「漂流球」，在水塘里打起了滚。水波翻涌之间，它身上的污泥也都被洗干净了…
- Something must have happened in the <color=#00E1FFFF>temple</color>. ｜ 这个<color=#00E1FFFF>神庙</color>里发生了一些事。
- We were about to call it a day, but thanks to you, we've got more work to do! ｜ 我们本想差不多收工了，但遇上你，也只好打起精神再干一票。
- Formula yet to be learned ｜ 制作方法待学习
- My apologies, I didn't mean to frighten her. ｜ 抱、抱歉，我没有恶意，我没想到会吓到她…
- Akademiya Emblem-Marked Contract ｜ 印有教令院徽记的约契
- Me? Oh, I was just packing my things up and preparing to leave. ｜ 嗯？我刚收拾好营地行李，正准备离开呢。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param9:P}/{param10:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param9:P}/{param10:P}
- Complete "Masquerade of the Guilty" ｜ 完成「罪人舞步旋」剧情
- Oh no! It looks like someone already took whatever was here. ｜ 不对，好像是东西已经被人拿走了。
- Blazing Like a Flaming Flower ｜ 烈焰花般燃烧
- The tallest thing in the whole country. ｜ 就整个白夜之国最高的建筑。
- But my strengths are not in scouting and luring the enemy, and I'm not as agile as Amber. Hmm... I don't know if I would be of any assistance to her... ｜ 可是，我不太擅长侦察和诱敌，身手也没有安柏那么灵活。也不知道，能不能帮上她的忙…
- Sorush cannot switch gadgets while flying ｜ 斯露莎飞行中不能切换小道具
- The same goes for us. ｜ 我们也一样。
- Artifact Strongbox: Gilded Dreams ｜ 圣匣：饰金之梦
- I should find a chance to thank him personally. ｜ 应该要找个机会，专门向他道谢才对。
- Hehe, I feel right at home! But it takes a lot to faze me — I've always been comfortable with new places and new faces. ｜ 嘻嘻，从小到大我既不怕生又不认床，在这里真的没有一点不习惯哎。
- Really? He sure did a great job telling the story, but as for how useful it'll be... ｜ 真的吗？他刚才讲得是很精彩啦，可是要说有用还是没用…
- Thank you again, children. You can have a look around if there's anything else you want to see. ｜ 这次也谢谢你们两个小娃娃，你们要是还有什么想看的，就到处转转好了。
- Sing! ｜ 唱歌！
- What's going on? We heard that you guys left with someone that looked like a mercenary. Did you guys split up? ｜ 什么情况？我们明明听说，你们和一个佣兵模样的人一起离开了啊？难道后来你们又分头行动了？
- Anyway, let's see if we can find any leads. ｜ 总之，先寻找一些线索吧。
- Next time you draw a good card, try to keep a straight face. ｜ 下次抽到好牌时，表情别这么明显。
- As of now, you know the truth: That the adeptus who rescued the drowning man was none other than Streetward Rambler. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，现在你已知道，出手救人的仙女正是歌尘浪市真君。
- They were the first memento we received when we arrived in this beautiful world — they are proof that we are alive. ｜ 就像刚才说的那样…「信物」是我们来到这个美丽的世界上得到的第一件纪念品，也是我们生命的证明。
- Huh? Have you been up to something behind Paimon's back? ｜ 唔？你们在背着我搞什么名堂。
- Huh... ｜ 欸…
- Based on what we've made so far, I think we'll be able to make... this much! ｜ 这个月的营业金额…恐怕能上这个数！
- Harpastum Bombs Loaded... Blow 'Em Away! ｜ 「羽球？爆弹！炸飞啦！」
- The blueprints you have retrieved, adeptal fate you have received. Come hither and seek your audience. ｜ 能取来图纸，确有仙缘。上前来见吧。
- Does leaving the flying squad mean one is no longer a warrior? Does joining the flying squad automatically make one a warrior? There are no such things. ｜ 离开飞行队就不是勇士了吗？进入飞行队就一定是勇士了吗？没有这种话。
- Bewildered Adventurer ｜ 迷茫的冒险家
- "Not unable. Merely unwilling. This feels... beneath me." ｜ 「不是不能，是不愿意，有点嫌弃。」
- If you're comparing the Guhua Clan to street performers, we have nothing to talk about. ｜ 要看戏法去街上看，我不奉陪。
- Online ID ｜ Online ID
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- A monster once cornered an adventurer, but was then picked off by a hunting eagle... That eagle dropped this feather, which now carries some of the adventurer's good luck. ｜ 挡在面前的魔物却被捕食的鹰隼盯上，偶尔能带来这种程度运气的翎羽。
- Obtain the Divine Bridle ｜ 获得「神舆之辔」
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- #If it's not too much of an imposition, would you mind giving me some guidance on my sword work, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，不耽误你时间的话，能请你为我做一些剑术上的指导吗？
- Anyway, you've still got some unfinished business to attend to in the overworld, correct? ｜ 水上还有没处理完的麻烦是吗？
- Good luck. As for your training route, just leave it to us. ｜ 加油。修行的路线就交给我们吧。
- Could I ask you to protect me for a while longer? ｜ 但是，能不能请你们接着保护我一段时间？
- "Blooming flowers"! ｜ 「盛放的花冠」！
- The people of Fontaine love messing about with mechanical devices, and relatively few, by contrast, spend time developing such trinkets as these. ｜ 枫丹人喜欢折腾机械，反而很少有人在这种小物件上花费心思。
- Well then why didn't you stop him!? ｜ 那你为什么不阻止他？！
- Tubby ｜ 阿圆
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P}
- CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- So, what do you make of it? Have you seen it somewhere as well? ｜ 怎么样，你们有什么见解吗？或是一些新的目击消息？
- Come on...! It was a remnant of King Deshret's bygone civilization and we found some messages left by a priest of the King, and learned about the existence of forbidden knowledge. ｜ 那处遗迹属于赤王文明，我们在那里找到了赤王祭司留下的信息，了解到「禁忌知识」这一存在。
- The Scattered Past ｜ 溯及以往
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- It's called a "supreme cuisine machine"! Is such a name so hard to recall? ｜ 是新机关烹饪神机！名字有那么难记吗？
- Alright, let's go report back to Tsuyuko. ｜ 好了，我们赶紧回去找露子复命吧。
- Hilichurl Fighter ｜ 打手丘丘人
- (No! We can't let her get away!) ｜ （不行——不能放她走！）
- Suppose that a large shade cloth was originally hung from a tree, bending the branches. ｜ 假定曾有一块很大的遮光布悬挂在树上，树枝因此被压弯。
- I lost my way, then I got chased by a boar, then the hilichurls joined the chase... ｜ 先是迷了路，然后又被野猪追了一路，最后是丘丘人…
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I wish the older students would stop coming over to ask. This really, truly is just a toy. ｜ 哎哟，可别再有学长学姐过来问了，这真就只是一个普通的玩具而已啊…
- The Mountain King is a hero to my tribe — an object of worship, even. Ending his life would be like desecrating a statue. ｜ 山王是部族的英雄，也是部族骄傲的精神偶像，这尊偶像不能倒下。
- Today, two visitors have completed Daiya's Three-Day Reverie and set a new record! ｜ 就在今天，有两位游客彻底完成了「黛依阿的三日遐想」，创造了本项目的记录！
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Hehe, so I knew you'd show up here eventually! ｜ 哼哼，我就知道在这里能等到你的！
- Qucusaurus ｜ 绒翼龙
- Glimpses of Mysterious Inazuma ｜ 稻妻秘见录
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- What's the hurry? Did something happen to the machine again? ｜ 咦？你怎么急匆匆的，是那台机器又出什么问题了吗？
- Rouge's Writings ｜ 鲁热的信条
- Fine! Since I'm a generous guy, I can give you one round, no problemo. I'll just defeat you next time! ｜ 行！本大爷宽宏大量，让你一局也无所谓，反正接下来，本大爷还会赢回来的！
- There's quite a few people around here. Let's go chat with them and see what they have to say. ｜ 这附近的人真不少，我们去和他们聊聊吧。
- It's just a shame that I couldn't have met him, or talked to him about my dreams... ｜ 不过，只可惜没能来得及与他相识，没能来得及向他倾诉我的妄想…
- Obtain a stage score of {param2} ｜ 本关积分达到{param2}
- No! If you're planning on harming him, then I would rather never find my brother. ｜ 不可以！如果你们要对付哥哥，那我宁愿永远找不到哥哥。
- Well, then let's go! ｜ 那我们出发吧！
- Uh... Wait a second. I'm a little lost here... I get the part about hiding the substance in the pets, but those... What did you call them again? Floating barrels? Why even put the animals in there in the first place? ｜ 唔…等等，我有点跟不上你们的思路…用宠物伪装的事我知道了，可他们为什么要用那个什么浮桶来装猫呀？
- Everybody's already here. Looks like we're the last ones to arrive. ｜ 大家都在，看来我们是最晚到的。
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Island of Crystal and Pearl." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「海祇之岛」。
- When all our work is done, I will personally see to it that you're generously rewarded. ｜ 等工作告一段落，姐姐会亲自准备报酬的。
- Lanoire ｜ 莉诺尔
- (Other than that, there are notes regarding the Electro Wards left by the Raiden Shogun, the possible effects should the sealed remains of a god be released, with an attached addendum — an observational report of the afflicted in Higi Village.) ｜ （除此之外的内容则是有关雷电将军留下的雷元素镇物系统，与魔神残渣一旦泄漏可能造成的后果，并且附有对绯木村患者的观察记录。）
- Good Night ｜ 晚安…
- Description ｜ 描述
- Y'know, we've come all this way, but we still don't know who our commissioner was! ｜ 不过说起来，虽然做了这么多事情，我们都还不知道委托人是谁呢！
- Once upon a time, these were knights of the realm and carriers of significant status.\nThe long years and a curse seems to have robbed them of their reason and memory. Now, all that remains within that armor is the will to "fight for something, someone, and some matter."\nDepending on how much wear and tear they have undergone, they are by turns known as "Shadowy Husks" or "Black Serpent Knights." ｜ 曾经似乎是具有相当身份的王国骑士。\n如今似乎随着岁月与诅咒，失去了几乎全部的智性与记忆，只有「为了何事、何人、何物而战」的意志还残留在铠甲当中吧。\n依据损耗的程度，分别被称为「黯色空壳」与「黑蛇骑士」。
- As an individual, you don't have any sense of belonging... And you seem to have even fewer convictions than a typical scholar. ｜ 你作为个体，不怎么具有归属感…相比一般学者，显得更无信仰。
- Noise Filtering ｜ 去除杂音
- Question 2: By which virtue did the ancients defeat the dragon? ｜ 问题二：究竟是什么品质打败了恶龙？
- Tracking... ｜ 狩猎…
- Blessing Level increased. Characters will receive attribute buffs ｜ 祝福等级提升，角色获得属性增益
- We'll help! That sounds like a lot to make, and we don't want you to tire yourself out. ｜ 我们也来帮忙！这么多菜，别把特拉佐莉女士累坏了。
- Heavy horns you can find on the bodies of defeated mitachurls. ｜ 「沉重号角」的话…能从那些「丘丘人暴徒」身上找到。
- Come, come, have a drink! Consider it my treat — just a little something for all you've done for me. ｜ 哈哈，这杯算请你了！多谢你为我们做的一切。
- Increases all party members' ATK by 274 for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色攻击力提高274点，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Brave Heart ｜ 勇士之心
- "Here lies Risutaiosu no Mikoto, who loved to imitate the craftsmen who molded with clay, creating sculptures of the female officials of the court that were exquisite and lifelike." ｜ 「其名里栖太御须命，好仿匠人以黏土塑型，造宫中女官像，五官精巧，栩栩如生。」
- Wanna give it a shot? ｜ 要试试看吗…
- After a while, you and Paimon arrive at the Lil' Fungi's Fun-Tastic Fiesta booth... ｜ 一段时间后，你与派蒙来到了「小小灵蕈大幻戏」的摊位前…
- Fortunately, we don't seem to lack supplies, and even our motley crew has people who can keep their cool when the stakes are high. ｜ 好在物资看起来还不缺。这支拼拼凑凑的队伍里，也有擅于应对危机的人。
- Cannot change party setup or consume food due to challenge restrictions ｜ 由于挑战限制，目前无法调整队伍配置或使用食物
- Ah, there is one place. I once worked at Yae Publishing House as a proofreader for new novel releases under a pseudonym. I... really loved their novels. ｜ 啊，有一个地方似乎可以！我之前曾经用过一个假名在八重堂打过工，做小说新刊的校对。因为我很喜欢读八重堂出版的小说。
- "...Woke this morning feeling so fine, got something special on my mind~ Met a girl in the neighborhood last night~" ｜ 「…今早醒来，心情大好~哼哼…昨晚在邻家遇到一个女孩~」
- The Way Into the Mountain ｜ 觐山之路
- Welcome! The weather's rather fine today, isn't it? Is there anything I can help you with? ｜ 欢迎光临！今天天气真不错，有什么需要帮助的吗？
- The Knave is well aware of the plans Lyney and the others have hatched. She proposes a deal that seems to be a good chance to get to the bottom of all this... ｜ 「仆人」对林尼他们的动向一清二楚，同时提出了一个交易。这似乎是搞清真相的好机会…

- After Paimon and Tubby had a talk about Merusea Village, the latter combined the former's descriptions with her own imagination to create this stone covered in strange plants.\nWhile this stone is quite tall, it is divided into two sections, with the first being a large stone commonly seen in Merusea Village, while the other is an egg-shaped rock responsible for supporting the overall weight.\nMelusines may be small and ill-suited to climbing, but with the aid of simple tools such as stairs, they should be able to get up and down giant stones like these without issue! ｜ 派蒙与阿圆聊到海沫村见闻后，阿圆结合了派蒙的描述与自己的遐想，构筑了这种覆有奇异植被的岩石。\n这种巨岩虽高耸硕大，分为上下两层，一层是海沫村常见的扁平巨石，另一层则是负责承重的卵状巨岩。\n虽说美露莘们个子小小，不太擅长攀爬，但通过梯子这种简单的工具，上下这种巨石完全没有问题！

- Legend has it that while some adepti were pursuing the adeptal path, they would wander across mountains and rivers, enjoying various gourmet dishes, using such means to quiet their hearts. Their path would be called the "Trail of Delicacies" by those who came after.\nNow, the Adventurers' Guild has combined this fascinating challenge with the traditions of the Moonchase Festival, placing many treasure chests along the Trail of Delicacies.\nFollow three such Trails, defeat any foes that lurk around them, and the handsome rewards shall be yours! ｜ 传说某些仙人在求取仙道前，曾寻壑经丘，享用佳肴，以此平心静气。他们的足迹被后世之人称为「珍肴霞踪」。\n如今，冒险家协会将意趣盎然的挑战与逐月节的传统相结合，在「珍肴霞踪」的关键地点布置了宝箱。\n追溯三条「珍肴霞踪」，击败盘踞在附近的敌人，就能赢取丰厚的奖励！

- In front of the camping tent, both you and your opponent are sitting cross-legged. The desert dweller shuffles the cards with dexterous hands, and those pieces of paper almost seem to flicker under the sun. You can clearly sense the tension in the air, to the point where you can even hear the sound of the wind blowing over the gravel in the distance. Now everything is set, and after a brief silence, someone says "Duel!" Thereupon, the game starts... ｜ 在营地的帐篷前，你牌局的对手和你一样盘腿而坐。沙漠人用灵巧的手切牌，无数纸片在光芒映照下烁动。气氛有一丝紧张，你绷紧神经，甚至感觉自己能清晰听到远处风吹拂过砂砾的声响。一切准备完毕，短暂沉默之后，不知是谁说了声「来吧！」，于是一场牌局就此开始…

- Anyway, there's no point in tying yourself in knots over the contract. - Hurry, we've got to fend them off! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，快拦住那些魔物！
- A flower blossom known as "Wealth" which grows from the Ley Lines in response to someone's desires. Perhaps the treasures within it can satisfy a person's monetary desires, for now... ｜ 名为「藏金」的花蕾。回应着某人的渴望而从地脉衍出，其中的馈藏，也许能暂时满足人心之财欲…
- Ally at Low HP: I ｜ 同伴生命值低·其一
- Might these be tools used to maintain Seymour? Guess it might be best not to mess with them, then... ｜ #说不定是用来维护西摩尔的工具吧？唔，就像{NICKNAME}说的，还是不要乱翻比较好…
- Obtained through capture ｜ 捕捉获得
- And you! Are you trying to rub salt in my wounds? Scram! Get lost! Don't bother me! ｜ …你该不会是故意来揭我伤疤的吧？走开，走开，别打扰我了！
- Don't you know my name? ｜ 你不是知道我的名字吗？
- Finally, you arrive at the chu{RUBY#[D]Basement}rch Florian described. ｜ 终于，你们来到了那个教{RUBY#[D]地下室}堂附近。
- Yes, she's doing much better. After being confined to her bed all this time, I thought a little walk would do her some good. Last I saw her, she was taking the path towards the north crossing. ｜ 嗯，已经好多了。因为她躺了太久，我让她在附近散散步，然后就看见她往北边的路口去了。
- So, what made you change your mind? ｜ 欸，是什么会让你觉得…
- I didn't expect the person in charge of approving leaves of absence to respond so seriously, with a "May poetic puissance be yours"... and half a month's leave to go with it... ｜ 没想到，总务司负责批假的人居然认真地回复我，说什么「祝诗运亨通」…然后给我批了半个月的假…
- You're very good at this. ｜ 你的身手很不错。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Seize them! ｜ #抓住{M#他}{F#她}们！
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Final warning. ｜ 请你后退。
- This letter is from Guy. ｜ 这是盖伊的信。

- To avoid being spotted by guards, you cautiously return to a safe place... ｜ 为避免被看守发现，小心谨慎地回到了安全地点…
- Good Night ｜ 晚安…
- And whenever we trade qucusaurs for Phlogiston Wings, we deal with his henchmen. ｜ 平时交接绒翼龙和「燃素翼」，都是通过他手下的几个心腹…
- Strange... I'm almost certain I've seen lots of <color=#00E1FFFF>red Wolfhooks</color> growing here before... ｜ 真奇怪，我明明记得这周围有很多那种<color=#00E1FFFF>红色钩钩果</color>的…
- Plunge DMG|{param7:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param7:F1P}
- This sounds like a great one! ｜ 听名字感觉是非常王道的故事呢！
- Hmm. I suppose it would not hurt to tell you. We need them to make implements for the Rite of Parting. ｜ 嗯…说也无妨。是制作「送仙典仪」的器具所用。
- Ah yes, a phonograph operated by Lynette was used to achieve that effect. ｜ 这个嘛，当然是用的留声装置，是靠琳妮特控制的。
- Oh? And how might I be of assistance? ｜ 有何事？请讲。
- Primordial Jade Cutter ｜ 磐岩结绿
- Let's help him then. ｜ 既然如此就答应吧。
- Ugh. Let's just focus on putting this statue back on the altar, then! ｜ 呜哇，那我们还是快点把那个黑曜石像放回祭坛上吧！

- The second row is in the common script, and it goes as follows: ｜ 第二排为通用文字，上书内容如下：
- You could say so. ｜ 还算顺利吧。
- Fontaine Villa: Illusory Annex ｜ 枫丹院墅-「幻景别宫」
- Not going yourself? ｜ 你自己怎么不去？
- Of course! Ugh, that Wriothesley... I still remember going down to the Fortress to grill him for information on my father's case. Boy, did he take me for a ride... without telling me anything, of course. ｜ 对啊。那个莱欧斯利，亏我以前找机会去水下问他有没有什么关于我父亲案子的消息，他绕了一圈也没说出什么消息来…

- No with a capital N-O! Do not challenge the authority of examiner Amber! ｜ 别这么看着人家，绝·对·不·行。
- The Abyss... The Abyss is coming... ｜ 深渊…深渊就要来了…
- What? Oh no, that makes us thieves. Ohh, Paimon's sorry... Let's put it back, quick. ｜ 什么？完蛋了，那我们不就成小偷了？对不起对不起…我们快把东西放回去吧…
- Liloupar ｜ 利露帕尔
- You must complete 3 consecutive challenge rounds during the "Brewing Developments" stages. Each challenge round requires you to <color=#FFE14BFF>defeat opponents that will continuously appear within a time limit to accrue points</color>. Your party setup can be changed between rounds to deal with different types of opponents. When the challenge ends, you will obtain test-related emblems based on your score. ｜ 在「合剂演进」中，旅行者需要连续进行3轮挑战，每轮挑战需<color=#FFE14BFF>在时限内击败不断出现的敌人以获得评分</color>，战斗轮次之间可以更改队伍配置，更换上阵角色，以应对不同的敌人。挑战结束后，将依据试验评分获得相应级别的试验纹章。
- Wait, why are you praising Paimon so seriously all of a sudden? Paimon's not used to this... ｜ 欸？怎么突然这么一本正经地夸我…好不习惯喔！
- No... treasure? ｜ 没有…宝藏？
- Kamera Continuous Regeneration|{param4:F1P} ATK+{param5:I} ｜ 相机持续治疗量|{param4:F1P}攻击力+{param5:I}
- Now that I've heard everyone else's stories... ｜ 听完了其他人的故事…
- When you sail close to a Glimmering Beacon, pulses will appear on the minimap. The closer you are to the Glimmering Beacon, the stronger the pulses will be.\nAdjust your course to follow the pulses to ensure that you are heading toward the Beacon. ｜ 驾驶「浪船」接近「烁光信标」到一定范围后，小地图上将出现「波纹标识」。距离「烁光信标」越近，「波纹标识」的波动程度越强。\n根据「波纹标识」的波动程度调整航行的方向，旅行者即可确保自己正在接近「烁光信标」。
- Max ATK Bonus|{param4:F1} ｜ 最大攻击力加成|{param4:F1}点
- Haha, I did say that, didn't I? Well, I'm a man of my word — you'll be compensated generously for your work. ｜ 哈哈，说话算话，一言为定。这酬劳绝对少不了你的！
- Feather of Jagged Peaks ｜ 嵯峨群峰之翼

- Fungi Buster ｜ 绝不菇息！
- I presided over every sacrifice, and I accepted every one of your blessings! ｜ 我主持了每一次祭献，我接受了你的每一场恩典！
- Hmm, Paimon sorta understands what Lessig is saying. ｜ 唔…感觉似乎能够理解莱斯格说的话…
- Six Paths of Sage Silkcraft ｜ 正绢六通
- As a reward, I have placed a little something for you before the treasure door. I'm sure you will like it. ｜ 作为嘉奖，我在秘宝之门前放置了一点礼物，相信你会喜欢
- The submerged wreckage of a once-proud ship. Countless mysterious creatures now dwell within what should have been the vessel's silent final resting place.\nIf you can eliminate the monsters within, you will be granted access to materials that can enlighten you as to the nature of talents and their advancement. ｜ 沉没的船舶遗迹，原本应当空无一物的终末之地，如今盘踞着无数神秘的奇异生命体。\n能够消灭其中的魔物的话，或许能获得令人参悟天赋成长的物资吧。
- Gladiator's Destiny ｜ 角斗士的归宿
- For someone like Tepal, who dreams of flying freely, this definitely doesn't cut it. ｜ 对于向往「自由飞行」的特帕尔来讲，离他的「梦想」恐怕还远着吧。
- Skill DMG|{param1:F2P} Max HP ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F2P}生命值上限
- See you. I hope you have a pleasant time. After all, I imagine a town with too many talkers and too few thinkers could be a bit much. ｜ 再见，希望你能过得愉快，毕竟任何人初到这里，一个说话的嘴多而思考的头脑少的小镇，可有够他受的。
- Huh? Is sleeping something serious for Aranara? ｜ 对兰那罗来说，睡觉是很严重的事情喔！
- Just a warning: if an internal elemental reaction occurs for any other reason, that's a bad sign. ｜ 这也是一种对健康的预警，如果内部的元素反应由其他意外引起，那才会引发真正的危险。
- Let's give it a try. ｜ 只能尽力找找吧。
- That's right. Didn't Zurvan say that the Great Songs have nothing to do with humanity? ｜ 对哦，祖尔宛不是说过，「灵光绝唱」和人类没有什么关联吗？
- We should part ways here. ｜ #就这么先分别吧，{NICKNAME}。
- *gasp*... It's... ｜ …？！这是…

- Search ｜ 翻找
- How did it go? Did you manage to convince them? ｜ 怎么样，你说服他们了吗？
- Of course, of course, Khvarena's Envoy. And we of the Order of Skeptics shall surely help you see your duty through. ｜ 当然，这是当然，灵光的尊使。我们矫论团也一定会帮您达成使命。
- Forest Fairy ｜ 森林仙子
- It's a bit noisy today, isn't it? ｜ 今天是不是有点吵闹啊？
- A field study, to record and research ancient life forms and their remains. Well, and I'm also here to observe the abnormalities in the geological layers. ｜ 实地考察，记录与研究古代生物，以及它们的孑遗。嗯…还有就是，观察地质层的异变情况。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Magnifico ｜ 马尼菲科
- (Prepare for 1 turn)\nDeals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ （需准备1个行动轮）\n造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。
- I've been busy preparing an environment comfortable for Nara, just for your visit. But I've not traveled alongside Nara for far too long, so I do not trust my own judgment. ｜ 我一直想为来访的你们，准备能让那菈也感到舒适的环境。但我已经许久不曾与那菈同行了，所以对自己的判断并不自信。

- It should be readers' hearts that you're trying to stir. ｜ 你要感动的应该是读者吧。
- Perhaps I should take a trip back to the pharmacy to pack everything up, and have them delivered a few boxes at a time... ｜ 还是我回去一趟，把所有东西装好箱再分批送进来…
- The wind feels great here. I'd love to see how it feels in some faraway place. ｜ 这里的风感觉真好，真想再去更远的地方看看哪。
- Battle Phase ｜ 战斗阶段
- I am Caterpillar, as you know. Speaking of which, how's the young lady you were protecting doing? ｜ 我是卡特皮拉，你当然知道吧。话说，你要保护的小姑娘现在怎么样了？
- Caelestinum Finale Termini ｜ 终天闭幕曲
- Villain Powerup I: Opponents' ATK increased ｜ 反派强化I：敌人的攻击力提升
- We will! Thanks, granny! ｜ 嗯！我们记住啦，谢谢婆婆！
- Unlock the road ahead using the Rhythm of the Beastly Trail ｜ 利用「兽径的曲调」，开启通路
- Still, it's really strange... given Auntie's skill, how could it take so long for her to make one? I hope someone didn't give her the idea of making fewer and selling for more. ｜ 真是奇怪了，以婶婶的手艺，怎么可能造得这么慢。只怕是谁给她出了个主意，造得少一点，就能卖得贵一些。
- Not bad? If he keeps going like this, he's going to confuse even himself. ｜ 还不错？这、这样写下去，到最后他自己都会被这些设定弄晕的！
- Here's one of their latest products: water from Sumeru's Apam Woods. ｜ 这一款是最近推出的新品，来自须弥的水天丛林。
- Alright, off we go! ｜ 好，出发！
- Little Guy? ｜ 小家伙？
- Well, this is my first job — one to remember! Of course I had to double my enthusiasm! ｜ 这可是我值得纪念的第一次工作，当然得拿出一倍的干劲来！
- What? ｜ 嗯？
- Studying the law allows one to have grounded conversations, whilst learning martial arts allows one to prevail against groundless violence. Hey, wait a minute... does this count as martial arts...? ｜ 学习律法是为了跟别人有理有据地谈话，习武防身则是为了应付无理无据的场合。欸，等等…我这能算习武吗…
- He might've escaped through a secret tunnel. ｜ 他可能通过密道逃走了。
- Tragedies like that won't ever happen again. ｜ 当初的悲剧已经不会再发生了。
- Ah, this looks like the Flower-Feather Clan... I remember when I first arrived, I didn't think much of it at all. ｜ 花羽会的风格吗…还记得我刚来部族的时候，看什么都不顺眼。
- Hah, I didn't say that. Taruka's my brother, and you got him caught up in that whole mess. On the off-chance something had happened to him... ｜ 我哪有这么说。塔卢加可是我的亲弟弟，都是因为你，让他卷入那么危险的事件里，要是他有个万一…
- After the whopperflowers eat someone... ｜ 骗骗花吃了人之后…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- About Baizhu: Modern vs. Ancient Medicine ｜ 关于白术自己·今方古方
- You arrive onboard the ship... ｜ 旅行者到达了船上…
- So better to head to Yujing Terrace, to the high ground. ｜ 总之就往「玉京台」走吧，往高处去！
- Wushou Dance Doll: Sleepy Suanni ｜ 舞兽玩偶-「懒懒困猊」
- For a Tomorrow Without Tears ｜ 为了没有眼泪的明天
- But if you'd given up hope on this world, why did you feel the need to do this? ｜ 可既然你已经对这个世界绝望，又为什么还要做这些事？
- Aratani's Message ｜ 荒谷的留言
- But recently all of our informants, including the ones that had infiltrated the guards, suddenly vanished and have not been heard from since. ｜ 但最近一段时间，我们安插的所有探子，包括渗透进来的看守都离奇消失了，再也没有回音。
- CD|{param5:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Moreover, the logs contained no records of the port authorities' activities. In other words, your activities. ｜ 而且那个「航行记录」…并不包括驻港人员，也就是你自己。
- This is Dodoco, my oldest and bestest friend! Okay, now I've introduced you, don't forget her name again alright? No more calling Dodoco "that silly doll Klee always hangs on her rucksack." ｜ 这是嘟嘟可，是可莉很久以前就交到的好朋友。要记得它的名字哦，以后别叫它「挂在你包上的玩偶」啦。
- Activate the energy storage device by the cage through the viewing terminal to unlock the cage. ｜ 通过采阅终端激活牢笼旁的储能装置以开启牢门
- You receive word of the latest crisis while trying to help Thoma win respect... ｜ 在寻找能让托马获得尊重的办法时，意外得知了最近出现的危机…
- Adventurer ｜ 冒险家
- I don't get it. ｜ 我没明白。
- Kimosi ｜ 基莫西
- Y'know, you put some random flowers together and that made the store's business better, just like that! ｜ 仔细想想，保琳小姐你只是随便搭配了花卉，就让店里的生意变好了。
- Some like to travel, some prefer solitude, while others... really enjoy using wine to stimulate their creativity. ｜ 有些人喜欢到处旅行、有些人喜欢独自沉思，还有些人嘛…格外喜欢用酒来刺激自己的思维。
- "There seems to be a very unusual customer in the tavern..."\n"Well, it isn't every day that someone piques your interest. How about we go check this person out together?"\n"Forget it... I wouldn't dare to utter a word in front of him even if I went." ｜ 「酒馆里好像有一位很不同寻常的客人…」\n「能让你感兴趣的人物不多见啊。陪你凑个热闹？」\n「算了算了…去了也不敢搭话的。」
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Salty and Meaty" Painted Plate.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『咸鲜肉香』彩陶盘」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- *sigh* Meteorites, monsters... I can only hope that nothing truly messy happens. ｜ 唉，又是陨石，又是魔物…千万别再出什么乱子了。
- Hey, this doesn't have to do with refining our tastes! Paimon's pretty sure most ordinary people can't tell the difference... How'd you do it anyway? ｜ 这不是见解高低的问题吧！一般人肯定喝不出来区别，你是怎么做到的？
- I've been really getting into stories about the unnatural recently. Especially ones about shapeshifting youkai — they're so fascinating. Before that, I was really into ninjutsu for a while, and before that... Hmm? You think I'm not dedicated enough? N—No! It's not like that, you got me all wrong! ｜ 最近的话，我比较喜欢怪谈故事，那些千变万化的妖怪实在是神奇。之前的话，对忍术也有不小的兴趣。嗯？三分钟热度？…不，不是这样的！
- Huh, if you were hearing their emotions, then Paimon wonders what happened to them. ｜ 唔…如果真的是这样的话，那个人究竟经历了什么呢…
- Honestly! Did they learn their trade from those journalists? And did they master those dastardly arts of opportunistic deception? ｜ 真是活见鬼，它们是不是找那群记者取过经了，掌握了欺软怕硬的精髓？
- No way! Even Klee gets to be a Knight of Favonius!? ｜ 什么？竟然连可莉都是骑士吗！
- O—Okay, erm, yes; let's get the latest on my love life. And then, I should like for you to go with me to the Mingxiao Lantern site— ｜ 那、那好吧，先看一下恋爱运，然后我们一起到明霄灯那边…

- Complete Wyrmrest Forest: Part IV ｜ 完成林中龙眠·其四
- ...Well, well, I suppose there's no point saying anything now. ｜ …哎呀哎呀，看来现在，再说什么都没有用了。
- Whether it's studying, or even just life in general... There are so many things I have yet to get the hang of. ｜ 我没把握的东西太多了，学业也好，生活也好。
- Traveler, have you decided on your wish? ｜ 旅行者想好许什么愿望了吗？
- Obtain Supersense Particles {param2} times ｜ 获取{param2}次「超感光粒」
- Though, it's not like you could've granted the power to resonate with Pyro even if you wanted to... ｜ 虽然和火元素共鸣的力量也不是你给的…
- Don't worry about it! It's just nice to go clothes shopping together. ｜ 别这么说，一起逛街买衣服是件多开心的事啊。
- And I can be their assistant. ｜ 我将担任两位男士的助手。
- If you asked me to glide over there, I'd probably fall into the water halfway. ｜ 要我用风之翼飞过去，飞一半我就要掉水里…
- So it's her... ｜ 原来是她…
- Feelings About Ascension: Intro ｜ 突破的感受·起
- About Paimon's Species ｜ 关于派蒙的物种…

- Watch the magic show ｜ 观看魔术表演
- Teppei takes you to see General Gorou of the resistance, and explains what happened. ｜ 哲平带你们面见了反抗军大将五郎，陈述了事情经过。

- One of Liyue's famous dishes. Between the fierce heat, the boiling oil, and the sautéing process, this is a stern test of one's skills. Cook for a few seconds too few, and your ingredients might be left raw. Too many, and they will be overcooked and lacking in crispness. As such, this dish is often chosen by experienced Liyue chefs to display their mastery. ｜ 璃月名菜之一。猛火滚油、颠锅翻勺，颇为考验火候的控制，欠一时则生而不熟，过半刻则老而不脆，是老道的璃月大厨炫技时常选的菜品。

Some researchers believe that this peculiarity stems from their natural desire to perform. ｜ 活泼好动的小型鳉鱼，以优美的花瓣型鱼尾闻名。\n有着难以捉摸的行为方式，常能见到它们毫无征兆地挣扎起来，似乎正忍受着某种看不见的痛苦，但在其落单的情况下，便不会发生这种事情。有学者猜测，这可能与它们天生的表演欲有关。

- A small earthenware tea stove that is highly portable and easy to use. Its heating efficiency is considerable, making it a fine companion to any new tea-tasting endeavor.\nInviting some friends for a nice chat over a pot of some fresh new tea is a popular pastime in Qiaoying Village. Still, heed the advice of tea regulars from the village and Yilong Wharf: "Watch the fire and keep your windows open for circulation. That's how to stay safe while making tea on the stove." ｜ 陶制的小型茶炉，易于搬运和使用，加热效率可观，是品鉴新茶时的良伴。\n邀请三两好友围坐于炉火之畔相聚长谈，一品鲜嫩的新茶，是沉玉谷地区颇为热门的消遣。不过，还请谨记翘英庄和遗珑埠茶客们的提醒——「小心用火，时刻开窗通风，方能保证围炉煮茶时的安全。」

- Is that so? Sorry. But based on how you float, you shouldn't be exhausting any stamina. ｜ 原来如此，抱歉。虽然从派蒙飘浮的样子来看，应该不会消耗体力才对。
- Zhongli turns up just in time to break the awkward atmosphere... ｜ 钟离适时出现，打破了这尴尬的氛围…
- Legend has it that in ancient times, the Order of Skeptics would hold a ritual of purification for them, so as to bring them all back to the Vourukasha Oasis. ｜ 传说在古时矫论团会为她们举行净罪的仪式，使她们得以重回「甘露花海」。
- A building found in the Court of Fontaine's Vasari Passage. The famous Café Lutece combines this design with an open air patio, creating a space where customers can enjoy the coffee outside, surrounded by its aroma. It is said that construction costs in Vasari Passage are relatively low due to the use of improved slag cement. Slag cement normally contains trace amounts of a smell reminiscent of powdered ore. While it may go unnoticed by the ordinary person, for those in the catering industry, it is highly detrimental to the long-term storage of goods. Thanks to the strict aromatic standards of a previous owner of Café Lutece, and with the help of The Steambird and protests from many others in the industry throughout the city, researchers dared not ignore the issue and began researching an improved formula that removed the lingering odor. As a result, some coffee enthusiasts have nicknamed the latest generation of slag cement "Coffee Ground Cement." ｜ 可见于枫丹廷瓦萨里回廊的建筑，著名的「咖啡厅·露泽」便将这样的房屋与露天空间相结合，打造出了一片醇香弥漫，享受咖啡的区域。据说，瓦萨里回廊的建筑造价相对低廉，却应用了改进工艺的炉渣水泥——原本炉渣水泥中含有一股浅淡的，矿石粉末般的气息，普通人难以分辨，但对于贩卖食物和饮品的店铺而言，不利于货品的长期储存。而得益于露泽咖啡厅早先某任店主对香气近乎苛刻的标准，借助《蒸汽鸟报》联合了城内大量餐饮同行进行抗议，研究员们可不敢怠慢，全速优化了炉渣水泥的配方，除去了建材中这些不利于餐饮店的气味。因此，也有咖啡爱好者将最新一代的炉渣水泥戏称为「咖啡渣水泥」。
- Hehe. ｜ 呵呵。
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」

- I'll wait here for you two. I won't leave until you come back. ｜ #我就在这里等着{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}和派蒙姐姐，你们一天不回来我就一天不离开。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hmm...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>What are you mulling over, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>{NICKNAME}, do you remember Gorou's fluffy ears?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon really wants something like that... Or maybe horns similar to the ones Ganyu has. Ganyu's horns are pretty cute as well.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>{NICKNAME}, do you have any ideas?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Let me see, hmm... Oh, I found something!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Really? Aw, {NICKNAME}, Paimon always knew you were reliable!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Ta-da! I present to you the Tusk of Monoceros Caeli!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Paimon doesn't need that!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>*sigh* If Paimon can't have Gorou's fluffy ears, then maybe at least something like his fluffy tail...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Bubadada! Here you go — Tail of Boreas!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>...Not that! Also, combining those two is definitely not the look Paimon is going for! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙在烦恼什么呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>{NICKNAME}，你还记得五郎那毛茸茸的耳朵吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我也好想要那个…或者像甘雨一样，有可爱的角也不错。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>{NICKNAME}，你有什么好办法吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>让我找找…啊，有了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>真的吗？{NICKNAME}，我就知道你是最可靠的！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>锵锵~「吞天之鲸·只角」！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不是要这个啦！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>唉…不过仔细想想，五郎不仅有毛茸茸的耳朵，还有尾巴呢…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>锵锵~「北风之尾」！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>都说了不需要啦！而且这两个组合起来绝对会很奇怪吧！

- No wonder they've set their sights on this sword. ｜ 难怪这把剑会被愚人众当成目标。

Even if our territory were to shrink, we could still live freely. ｜ 你们属于大河与山林。你们原本可以选择离开他们和我一起活下去。让人的属于人，自然的属于自然。即使领地变小，依旧可以自在地活下去。

- This year's Mingxiao Lantern is supposed to be a sight well worth the wait. The Plaustrite that will lift the lantern into the air is the largest in twenty years! ｜ 今年的「明霄灯」壮景可期啊。用来让巨灯浮空的那块「浮生石」，是二十年来最大的一块。
- But to share all this with a group of friends, only to find myself one friend short before the final verse is sung, before the poet has uttered the last line, before everything has concluded... I don't know, something about it just irritates me. ｜ 在歌没有唱完，诗还未说尽，一切都没结束的时候少了一个可分享的朋友，这可不符合我的美学。
- Shortly after, I spotted a suspicious man near Hanamizaka. He left in a panic after I just asked a couple of questions. ｜ 随后，我在花见坂附近发现了可疑的人。但只是略微盘问了几句，他就慌张地离开了。
- The Sebastos, Remus, founded a nation above the High Sea that is Fontaine, and the ancestors of the present-day Fontainians named him the "Dark Lord Remus" in their terror. ｜ 由我们的至尊「雷穆斯」所建立的，统治着枫丹高海的国家。现在枫丹人的祖先也曾恐惧地将至尊称为「魔王利魔世」。

- Xingqiu once wrote a martial arts novel named "A Legend of Sword" based on his own experiences, intending to publish it in Liyue Harbor.\nTo his surprise, his manuscript was rejected by local publishing houses, who believed that no one would have any interest in a story with "a setting as wildly unrealistic as the plot is banal."\nUndeterred, Xingqiu had a few copies printed privately, and sneakily placed them on the shelves of Wanwen Bookhouse during one of his many trips there. But just as the publishers had suspected, it failed to garner much interest from readers. This was quite a blow to Xingqiu's confidence.\nUnbeknownst to him, however, a passing merchant from Inazuma did purchase a copy to bring home, where it received rave reviews. Writers the region over attempted to copy the success of "A Legend of Sword," but none succeeded — it maintains permanent residency in the number one bestseller spot to this day. ｜ 行秋以自身经历为素材，撰写了一部武侠小说《沉秋拾剑录》，想要在璃月港出版。\n不料，却被璃月港的出版机构以「设定过于离谱，剧情却意外地俗套，没人会喜欢」为由拒了稿。\n不服气的行秋自己印了几本，偷偷放在常去的书店「万文集舍」里，然而，确实没人爱看，令他颇受打击。\n行秋不知道的是，路过的稻妻客商看到这本书，买下一本带回稻妻国，竟在当地广受好评。稻妻文人争相模仿，却无一部能超越《沉秋拾剑录》。自此这本书便在稻妻文坛常驻一席之地。
- Ah, Mualani... She is the friendliest person I've ever met. I lived with the People of the Springs during my time in Natlan, and I never could have opened up my shop there without her help. She dragged me to the Speaker's Chamber, and just like that, I was face-to-face with the Pyro Archon with no warning at all, scared out of my mind...\nHer personality is like a wave, sometimes cresting high above the water, gliding deep beneath the surface, or even crashing straight against the shore. It's hard to keep up...\nOh, her mental state? I don't think you need to worry. She's in a very good spot. If anything, I should go to her for therapy... ｜ 玛拉妮啊…她是我见过最热心的人了，长住纳塔期间，我定居的地方正是「流泉之众」，要是没有她的帮助，我在「流泉之众」的店铺可开不起来。当时她直接带着我去「话事处」找火神女士，确实吓了我一跳…\n不过，她的性格也像是海浪一样，有时候飞上浪尖，有时候沉在浪底，还有时候潜进暗流里，我根本捉摸不透她…\n心理？不用担心她，她是我见过心理状态最好的人之一。我可能还需要向她倾诉呢…
- Don't worry about me. You should go enjoy the festival. ｜ 不用担心我，好好享受祭典吧。
- I have given up all I ever stood for... ｜ 我已摒弃此生所坚持的一切…
- Huh? What's Asagiri doing over there? And she's got a terrible look on her face to boot. ｜ 咦？朝雾小姐怎么在那里，还一副愁眉苦脸的样子…
- Grandmaster Hanakado ｜ 「花角玉将」
- You're kidding! The Captain? ｜ 欸——不会吧，「队长」？
- Yes. Xbalanque was undoubtedly slain at that time... But he was reborn then, and thus became the so-called god of fire, the Pyro Archon. ｜ 是啊，那时候的希巴拉克毫无疑问已经一度死亡…但是在他重又复生之时，才成为了所谓的火神。

- Monsters are evil! They deserve nothing more than the merciless slaughter they will get! ｜ 对付那些魔物，心中只需念着除恶务尽就是！
- Julie, it's okay. ｜ 朱莉，我没事的。
- She went on an adventure early this morning — probably to rehearse for what's to come after she leaves this place. It's just as well, I have a few headaches to go take care of soon... ｜ 她一早就去「探险」了，可能是为离开之后做预演吧。正好，待会儿要去处理一些麻烦事…
- A mechanism that continually absorbs the force it receives.\nApparently, when the power within reaches bursting point, it will explode in a dazzling display of fireworks. But the amount of force needed to trigger this explosion seems to vary each time... So why not take turns attacking it with your friends? They say that whoever makes it go "kaboom" will have extraordinarily good luck for the rest of the day. ｜ 会将受到的力不断吸收入体内的机关。\n据说体内的力量积攒到了极限之后就会爆发而出，化作出绚丽的礼花。不过，到底多大的力才能让它爆发呢，似乎每一次都有点不太一样…因此和好友轮流攻击试试吧，据说，最后让它爆发礼花的人，在一天之内都会有了不得的好运。
- Heh. Looking at you, even I begin to look forward to the future of terrestrial beings! ｜ 哼，看到你们的样子，老夫也有些期待那些地上生灵的未来了！
- Most places were fine, but there are all these haystacks lying around. ｜ 其他的地方还好，但是，周围还有很多堆起来的草垛。

- Get him! Don't let him get away! ｜ 抓住他！别让这家伙跑了！
- ...No, never mind. Please give the hash brown to Timmie as soon as you can. ｜ …不，没事，请您快点把土豆饼送给提米吧。
- Later, I'm gonna look around some more. ｜ 再见，我还要再逛一会儿。
- And that is me, old and unskilled though I may be. ｜ 呵呵…不才正是老叟。
- *cough* No... This is still no good... It won't do... ｜ 咳、咳…这样…还是不行…

- Oh, all that? Ah, don't worry about it. ｜ 你问这个啊，没关系的啦。

- Brave Nara... Though I cannot see the sky, I know that you are as warm as the sun... ｜ 勇敢的那菈…就算看不到天空，你也有着太阳般的温暖…

After use</color>, <color=#FFE00FFF>gain all the following effects at the same time</color><color=#ECE5D8FF>: \n1. <color=#FFE00FFF>Transform</color> all Normal Bullets and Homing Rounds on the field into <color=#ECE5D8FF>Labyrinth Coins</color>.\n2. </color><color=#FFE00FFF>Your character's Movement SPD will be increased, their movement will not consume Stamina, and they will become invincible</color> <color=#ECE5D8FF>for {1}s.\n3. Your character gains</color> an <color=#FFE00FFF>Auto-Attack Aura</color>, <color=#ECE5D8FF>which will automatically attack all Wicked Warlocks within range once every {2}s for {3}s.</color> ｜ <color=#ECE5D8FF>一次挑战中至多使用{0}次。施放后，</color><color=#FFE00FFF>同时获得以下全部效果</color><color=#ECE5D8FF>：\n1.场上的普通弹与追踪弹将</color><color=#FFE00FFF>转化</color><color=#ECE5D8FF>为迷宫币。\n2.</color><color=#FFE00FFF>角色的移动速度提升，角色行动不再消耗体力，并进入无敌状态</color><color=#ECE5D8FF>，持续{1}秒。\n3.角色获得</color><color=#FFE00FFF>自动攻击领域</color><color=#ECE5D8FF>，每{2}秒对范围内的坏坏法师进行一次攻击，持续{3}秒。</color>

- Previously, I was watching the excellent performances of the participants in a corner of the tournament venue, seeking to be inspired by the most thrilling fighting scenes. - Wait... How about a bigger share of the profits and two... maybe three toys? ｜ 那…给你们的分成多一些，玩具可以拿走两个…要么…三个？

- A traditional and highly efficient mill. Driving that barrel requires a great deal of power, which is usually where an attached waterwheel comes in.\nHowever, the following legend exists in Qingce Village: that a certain thaumaturge once passed this way when he was stricken by some chronic malady. Needing some Mist Flower dust desperately, he turned the mill with his bare hands at a speed that far outmatched any waterwheel. ｜ 传统而高效的磨坊，驱动沉重的滚磨需要庞大的力量，通常会搭配水车使用。\n不过轻策庄一带也有这样的逸闻流传——某位驱邪方士云游至此，旧病发作，急需冰雾花的粉末，迫不得已，只能徒手推动滚磨，速度远胜水车的驱动。

- A Crystalfly Trap, developed by a senior researcher named Fawitzki from Fontaine Research Institute of Kinetic Energy Engineering.\nAt the time, the Research Institute believed the research to be completely worthless, and so sold the patent to The Steambird for a pittance. The Steambird in turn wished to try to use the Crystal Cores to manufacture flash bulbs for Kameras, but the research failed due to technical challenges. ｜ 由枫丹动能工程科学研究院高级研究员法维茨基所开发的「晶蝶诱捕装置」。\n过去在科学院认为是毫无价值的研究，因此这项发明的专利被以非常低廉的价格出售给了试图利用晶核来制作留影机闪光灯的蒸汽鸟报社，只不过这个研究折戟于技术难点。

- That you choose to show up here proves that you have more bravery in you than I had originally thought. And now that you are here, I have a proposal... ｜ 你能出现在这里，说明你比我想象的要勇敢。既然这样，我倒是有一个提议…
- Take a break, both of you. ｜ 休息一会儿吧，两位。
- Urakusai ｜ 有乐斋

- Gleeful Songs ｜ 彩色歌谣
- Irminsul Fruits can explode? ｜ 「地脉之果」会爆炸？
- Yes, "complicated" is indeed one way to put it. Visitors often get lost when they visit Sumeru for the first time, and they have a tendency to pick all kinds of mushrooms and fruits in the rainforest without discretion. ｜ 确实有点复杂…陌生人第一次到须弥很容易迷路，还会在雨林里乱摘蘑菇和水果吃。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启
- Alright, well all that remains for me to say is: Butterfly Dew is now on sale! ｜ 那么就不再劳烦大家等待了，「蝶彩露」正式开售！
- I once spent six months working undercover for an exposé piece about a merchant who was selling shoddy food products. I disguised myself as a vagrant, infiltrated the back kitchen, took a job as a kitchen hand, and stuck around until I'd gathered enough solid evidence about their misdeeds. Then, I put it all in an article and had it published in the paper. The backlash was intense. They were punished for their crimes, sure, but that didn't stop them from launching a vicious campaign of vengeance against me almost immediately. I was coming home to threat letters sitting on my bedside table on a daily basis, and we'd also find mud slung on the front door to our office... The Steambird quickly filed a report to the Gardes, and I was sent to Mondstadt to report on Genius Invokation TCG. It took a while before I could safely return to Fontaine. These kind of things happen all the time. I honestly don't know Euphrasie deals with it... ｜ 为了揭示真相，我曾经假扮成游民，混进了一家伪劣食品商的后厨做了六个月的杂工，在搜集到足够的第一手资料后，我就将他们干的事都写成报道，登在了报纸上。\n报道的反响十分强烈，那家伪劣食品商也受到了惩罚，但他们的报复也随之而来，我每天回家时床头柜上都放着一封恐吓信，报社的门口也总是被人泼泥巴…\n报社很快报了警，而我则被指派去蒙德做「七圣召唤」报道，过了好一阵子才回枫丹。\n唉，这样的事发生了很多次，真不知道欧芙小姐是怎么把它们全摆平的…
- Do we need to enter the dream of the Vasara Tree this time too? ｜ 这次也要进入莎兰树的梦？

- Eh, fair point... *sigh* Time to go to work. ｜ 说的也是…唉，干活吧。

I must remark that the young madam's tastes are similar to that of adepti, indicating you are certainly a figure of no ordinary status — we are honored to have your patronage. ｜ 没关系，客栈留言板上大家尽可畅所欲言。只是小姐的品味与仙人略同，想必出身不俗。有幸光临是我们的荣幸。

- A type of tea tree with green leaves that can be found in Qiaoying Village. The Chenyu Adeptea of the Vale, renowned throughout Teyvat, is largely harvested from this species.\nIt is said that tea trees have very stringent requirements for their healthy growth. Amurta researchers have tried many times to transplant them to Sumeru, but they have all failed due to lacking suitable water and soil. Fortunately, this is no trouble at all for a Realm Within that can nourish all things. ｜ 叶色青翠的茶树，分布于沉玉谷的翘英庄一带，闻名于提瓦特的沉玉仙茗正是从这种茶树上采摘收集而来的。\n据说，茶树对生长环境的要求十分严苛。有生论派学者多次尝试在须弥引种这类茶树，但均因水土不适而失败。还好，对于能够温润万物的壶中洞天而言，并没有这样的困扰。
- We'll take things from here. Just focus on getting some rest... Here, this way... ｜ 这里交给我们处理，你需要先平复一下。来，请往这边走…

- Oh, Lynette said he'd be waiting for us at the "usual haunt"... But, um... Where is that? ｜ 琳妮特说他会在「老地方」等我们。呃…老地方指的是哪里呢？

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- You and Paimon put in a good amount of hard work to sort your stories into a version that the children might find interesting. Thankfully, they like your stories. Although they don't seem to have told the truth about the mysterious creatures, this isn't the time to go into detail. Now, go with Rana to clear out some Withering Zones. You're doing this so the children of Vimara Village can play safely, after all. ｜ 为了将想到的事情整理成能让孩子们也觉得有趣的版本，和派蒙一起费了不少功夫。孩子们对故事满意，真是太好了。虽然孩子们对「神秘生物」的态度十分可疑，不过目前也无法太过深究。接下来，就随拉娜一同去清理一些死域吧。再怎么说，也是为了让维摩庄的孩子们能安全地玩耍。

- Beep... Beep-boop beep... Bee-eep... ｜ 哔…哔卜哔哔，哔哔…
- Certified player Sulaykha. Though this carpet store owner is quite young, she is still a renowned merchant, and a force to be reckoned with at cards. ｜ 协会认证牌手苏莱卡。毛毯店的老板，虽然年纪轻轻，但是也是远近闻名的大商人，是需要在牌桌上谨慎对待的对手。
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- (Kaveh still looks dejected, and even the wine didn't help his mood. How can I help cheer him up?) ｜ （卡维看起来心情很低落，杯中的酒并没有让他好转。有什么能让他振作起来的方法吗？）
- Character Story 2 ｜ 角色故事2
- Sacred Simulacrum ｜ 仙像
- Excuse me for prying, Ms. Shenhe, but... are you competing as well? ｜ 恕我冒昧，申鹤小姐…也是来参赛的吗？
- Hmph. We count as such, I suppose. We shall cooperate... even though my final goal is to create a more beautiful world for Ms. Lyris. ｜ 哼。姑且算是这样吧。虽然我的最终目标是为莉利丝小姐创造出一个更美好的新世界，但这并不妨碍我们现在一起努力。
- Yes, yes, and where's your team? ｜ 嗯嗯，所以你的队伍呢？
- In the end, the First Sage took care of many disasters in Sumeru City and founded the Akademiya. What a happy ending! ｜ 后来，最初的贤者化解了须弥城的诸多灾厄，并且创办了教令院，真是皆大欢喜。
- Flaming grass... Oh, you mean Flaming Flowers! ｜ 冒火草…啊！说的是烈焰花吧。
- I must reflect on the cause of this discrepancy. Was our source at fault, or did we make an error in our calculations? ｜ 果然还是要反思反思，究竟是情报侧的误差还是判断上的偏差呢…

- That is where the spirit veins of Chenyu Vale converge. Through it, I can transmit my adeptal energy throughout the vale, restoring its water and its soil... ｜ 那是沉玉谷的灵脉汇集的地方。通过它，我能将我的仙力一瞬间投遍沉玉谷全地，调和水土…
- This and that. ｜ 我想买些东西。

- Sure. ｜ 我知道了。
- Forest Fairy ｜ 森林仙子
- Ahh yes, that does sounds like my Itto. ｜ 果然像是一斗那孩子会做的事啊。
- In Inazuma, people will sometimes pray to deities by offering certain kinds of cypress leaves.\nBut as such rituals lack scale, they are often forgotten amidst the many, both large and small, that are conducted throughout the land.\nThough some time has passed, Ayato still remembers his mother mentioning that though these cypresses are evergreen, their leaves are not needle-like.\nInstead, they have large, crisp leaves that will not wither and fall even when new ones grow.\nAs such, it is associated with the concept of "prosperity," and was often used in ancient times as ritual plating for food offerings.\nToday, people no longer use leaves as mats upon which to spread food, but the habit of offering cypress leaves persists nonetheless.\nPerhaps it was just a hobby of hers, or perhaps she was just well-read in general, but whatever the case, his mother always had a great deal to say about festival affairs.\n"Perhaps the Kamisato Clan of the Yashiro Commission were born to protect the deities."\nIn his younger years, Ayato had not fully agreed with this statement.\nHe believed that the Kamisato Clan was the Kamisato Clan, and that it belonged to the family's members. That was the reason for its existence, and any service to the gods was a job, a matter of circumstance.\nBut such presumptuous words could never be said out loud, and in any case, Ayato could not bear to interrupt his mother when she looked so excited.\nNo matter how long she would go on, Ayato would always sit in front of her and listen in silence, even if his legs might fall asleep in the process.\nWith the passing of years, Ayato's days would be taken up by swordsmanship and books. The one giving the "lessons" was now his father, and the lesson content would turn from ritual affairs to matters that the clan's successor should be concerned with.\nHis duty to the clan would be something that would occupy yet more space in Ayato's life. Nor was the Raiden Shogun just a mere symbol as she was in his childhood. Now, she was the Ogosho, the mighty defender of Inazuma's eternal peace.\n"The Kamisato Clan stands today because of Narukami's mercy. As such, the Clan must defend the road to Eternity, and follow the Shogun eternally."\n"This was our agreement, and it is the unchanging rule of our clan. Remember this well."\nAs for the specifics of what happened, Ayato had already gleaned some of them from reading their ancestral teachings. It was the Kamisato elders' failings that had resulted in the nationally-important Raiden Gokaden to suffer great loss. If not for Guuji Yae's intervention on their behalf, causing the Shogun to show them mercy, the Kamisato Clan may have joined others in falling from grace and ceasing to exist.\nThis was the grace of Her Excellency, and at the same time, it was a warning from Her servant.\nAs such, Ayato never snubbed his father's teachings. Though he still believed in protecting his clan above all else, he also understood that Inazuma was sustained by the Electro Archon's protection. Only peace in Inazuma could guarantee the longevity and prosperity of the clan.\nNo matter how things might change in Inazuma, the Kamisato Clan alone would never betray the Almighty Narukami.\nEven if his heart said differently, he could only bury it deep beneath well-maintained appearances.\nJust as his mother said back then—\n"The divinely-protected cypress will sprout new leaves from ancient branches.\nSo, too, can the camellia in the courtyard remain fragrant even in the most bitter winter." ｜ 在稻妻，人们有时会向神明供奉某种柏木的叶子以示祈祷。\n但稻妻大大小小的祭神仪式太多，这种仪式因缺乏规模，常常被人忽略。\n虽已时隔许久，绫人仍记得，按照母亲所说，这种柏木虽是常绿的乔木，树叶却不是针形。\n它的叶片较大，脉络清晰。即便长出新叶，旧叶也不会凋落。\n因而有了「繁荣」的寓意，在古时常被用来当作供奉食物的食器。\n时至今日，人们不再用树叶盛放食物，供奉柏叶的习惯却留存了下来。\n不知是兴趣使然，抑或本就见多识广。总之，母亲一讲起有关祭礼的事情就滔滔不绝。\n「神里家世代管理社奉行，可能天生就是为了守护神明而存在的吧。」\n对此，年幼的绫人并不完全赞同。\n他认为，神里家就是神里家，是属于家人的地方。家族是因为家人才得以存在，侍奉神明不过是顺势为之的工作罢了。\n但这种话是不能说出口的，想法过于僭越。而且母亲讲解时兴致十分高昂，令人不忍打断。\n无论母亲一口气讲上多久，绫人都会端坐在母亲面前，哪怕腿都坐麻了，也要静静听完。\n岁月如梭，绫人渐渐长大，每天的时间都被剑术和书本占用。「讲课」的人从母亲变成了父亲，内容也从祭礼知识换成了家族继承人必学的课程。\n家族责任在绫人生活中的占比再次增大。「雷电将军」也不再是幼童心中虚幻的象征，而是成为了真实存在的神明，成为了维护稻妻永恒安宁的大御所大人。\n「从前，神里家曾受过鸣神恩惠，才得以延续至今。因此无论如何，神里家定要恪守『永恒』之道，追随将军大人直到永远。」\n「这是既成的约定，是不可违抗的族规，你要牢记在心。」\n个中缘由，绫人在阅读祖训时早已得知一些。由于神里祖辈失职，导致国之重器「雷电五传」严重折损。若非八重宫司进言使将军大人降下宽大饶恕，神里家或许早已随其他落魄权贵一同消散。\n这是大御所大人的恩赐，也是神明眷属的警示。\n因此，对于父亲的教诲，神里绫人自然不会怠慢。尽管守护家族的信念高于一切，但他也明白一个道理：稻妻因雷神的守护而存续；唯有稻妻安定，才能保证家族长久繁荣。\n不论今后稻妻局势如何发展，唯独神里家不可向御建鸣神主尊举起叛旗。\n即使心有异向，也只能隐入深藏在表象之下的暗河。\n正如母亲从前所说的那样——\n神守之柏，古枝犹在，已焕新材。\n在庭之椿，勿为冬困，寒中清芬。

- And I think I've found it. The seeds of a story are to be found in life and one's travels, and not in the character profiles, flowcharts, setting maps, and definitely not in things that you learn just to learn how to write them. ｜ 我觉得我终于找到了。故事的种子是生活与旅行，而不是我所一直拘泥的人设、大纲、设定，更不是为了这些去学习体验的事物。

- Is that all? ｜ 没招了？

- Um, Paimon's sorry... So, how old are you, actually? ｜ 不好意思…那…您今年几岁？

- You're as stubborn as a mule. ｜ 你还真是倔强…

- Enter hidden mode for 5s. During this time, you cannot be discovered by the Hunter.\nEntering this mode will dispel your current disguise.\nThe Hunter's Windward Arts "Capture!," "Mysterious Hunch," and "Sensor Aura" will all still take effect against a hidden Rebel.\nWhen a Rebel gets close enough to a Signaling Device to repair it, their hidden state will lose effect. 30s CD. ｜ 暂时进入隐形状态，持续5秒。效果持续期间，不会被「猎手」发现。\n进入隐形状态时，将解除当前的伪装。\n猎手的秘技「捕获！」、「神秘预感」和「感应光环」仍然会对隐形状态下的游侠生效。\n「游侠」进入「发信机」的可维修范围附近时，隐形效果会暂时失效。技能冷却时间30秒。
- Hmph! Stubborn until the end, huh? You can trick my sister, but you can't trick me. I betrayed the boss, and the boss isn't kind enough to spare me! ｜ 哼，死到临头还嘴硬，你们骗得过我妹妹，别想骗过我。我背叛了老大，老大会这么好心放过我吗？

- A bamboo slip that was used as a marking in some unremarkable spot. Can be exchanged with Gendou Ringo of the Grand Narukami Shrine for fortune-telling Fortune Slips. ｜ 在不起眼的地方做了标记的竹签。通过鸣神大社的玄冬林檎小姐，可以兑换成阐明运势的「御神签」。

- Meow~ ｜ 喵~
- Hmph, what an honor. ｜ 哼，很荣幸。
- Eula is the bearer of the Lawrence family crest, the "Glacial Seal." It is the highest martial symbol of the clan and represents the spirit of the Lawrence Clan in the early days of Mondstadt before their fall from grace: cold and unsullied, undaunted by any flame, composed and unshaken in all circumstances.\nFew among their number have passed the clan's trials in a thousand years, and the hopes of the clan are passed down from one seal-bearer to the next.\nEula was still quite young when she underwent the trial but she passed with ease, taking up the seal in the process. Then she departed with that badge of honor in her possession and has barely contacted the clan since.\nHer icy sword is a manifestation of the strength represented by the seal, striking with the cold, brutal force of a relentless blizzard and driving her foes into retreat.\nYet, sharp and bright as ice as she is, she has the title of "Spindrift Knight," a name that leads many who hear it to assume that she manipulates Hydro instead of Cryo.\nThere is a story behind that misunderstanding — the story of a habit.\nEula carries an exquisitely crafted bone whistle with her at all times. Each time she blows it, the vivid sound of ocean waves rings out loud and clear, far and wide.\nSince the area her company is in charge of borders the sea, reproducing the sound of waves can be an excellent means of disturbing the enemy's judgment, or of deceiving less intelligent monsters into believing that a tsunami is inbound, causing them to flee in panic.\nUsing this unique combat tactic has helped Eula emerge victorious against larger forces than her own on numerous occasions, and has also earned her the moniker of "Spindrift Knight."\nOf course, a bone whistle is capable of imitating many other sounds, and Eula has her reasons for imitating the ocean waves.\nIt would seem that something akin to the "Glacier Knight" should suit her better.\nBut perhaps Eula herself prefers the rolling waves to the cold and unyielding ice...\nRoaming freely across the world, gentle but firm with the reefs and sands in their dominion...\nYes, she yearns not to be sharp and rigid like ice, but to be free and unbound like the ocean spray. ｜ 优菈掌管着劳伦斯的家徽「坚冰之印」。它是家族武力的至高象征，代表着蒙德开垦初期劳伦斯一族尚未堕落的意志：冷冽高洁不惧怒焰、坚韧沉着不被撼动。\n千年来，成功通过家族试炼的只有寥寥几人。这枚家徽会与家族的希望一同交由他们来传承。\n优菈接受试炼时年纪尚小，却轻松通过试炼，获授「坚冰之印」。带着这份荣耀，她离开了家族，此后联系甚少。\n她的冰之剑，正是如此实力的体现——像寒风暴雪般凛冽，足以逼退任何人。\n剔透又璀璨的她本应如同寒冰，却有着「浪花骑士」之名。人们听见这一名字，总会以为她能够驱动水元素力。\n误会背后，是一种习惯。\n优菈会随身携带一支精巧的骨哨。每当她吹起骨哨，四周便会响起惟妙惟肖的海浪声。\n她所带领的队伍，执勤区域临近海岸。海浪声是一大助力，能干扰敌方判断，也能令智力低下的魔物误认为海啸将至，四散而逃。\n凭借这种技巧，优菈多次以少胜多。因独特的战术手段，她被称为「浪花骑士」。\n当然，骨哨本身可模拟的音色绝不止一种。优菈选择海浪，有她自己的理由。\n比起「浪花」一词，「坚冰骑士」更适合她。\n或许，与冷硬的坚冰相比，她更喜爱翻卷的浪花…\n奔行于世间，面对暗礁与砂石能以恰到好处的烈度将其包容。\n比起锐利的封闭者，自由不羁的浪花才符合她的向往。
- Huh... Paimon still doesn't see any sign of Tlazolli... ｜ 唔…不对不对，我们是来找特拉佐莉女士的，这周围也没看见她呀。

- No, I didn't go home. My mother and father passed away two years ago, so it's just me now. ｜ 哦，我没成家，前年我家老爷子和老娘走了，就剩我一个人。
- We've only just met! What does she mean, "help"? ｜ 这个人怎么一见面就要人帮忙！

- A tally will be kept for the active character when they use Normal, Charged, or Plunging Attacks to deal Pyro DMG to an opponent. When the tally reaches <color=#f39001>{0}</color>, the count will be reset and an <color=#f39001>enhanced</color> Infernal Shockwave will be unleashed at the opponent's position, dealing AoE Pyro DMG. This effect can be triggered up to once every <color=#f39001>{1}</color>s, and the count will be cleared when the character leaves the field ｜ 当前场上的角色通过普通攻击、重击或下落攻击对敌人造成火元素伤害时，将为该角色进行计数，计数达到<color=#f39001>{0}</color>点时将清空计数，并在敌人的位置释放<color=#f39001>强化</color>烈焰冲击波，造成火元素范围伤害，此效果每<color=#f39001>{1}</color>秒至多触发一次，角色退场时将移除计数

- My parents told me if I want to travel, I must earn enough money first... ｜ 因为我爸妈说，想要去外面旅行的话，必须要有足够的钱才行…
- Read ｜ 阅读
- I read it in a novel from the Yae Publishing House... it was a long time ago. You wouldn't believe how many Dango it took to convince my friend to let me borrow it. ｜ 从一本八重堂出版的小说…那是好久以前的事了。当时我用好几个团子当贿赂，那个朋友才答应借我看。

- Maybe we can go ask around about the Card Snatcher while you have your meeting with Ningguang. ｜ 还不如一边在城里打听「卡牌怪盗」的事，一边等夏洛蒂你回来。
- Paimon hopes that Uncle He will recover. ｜ 希望老何能够恢复。
- #Good, that's good. You've got a fine future ahead of you, {M#lad}{F#lass}. ｜ #这反应真好，真是前途无量的{M#少年}{F#少女}啊。
- You're done cleaning the spring over there? Thanks a lot, then. Here, take this as your reward. ｜ 你已经收拾好那边的温泉了吧？真是多谢你了，这些东西给你，就当做是报酬吧。
- Hello ｜ 初次见面…
- I'm sure you wouldn't put up with these outlanders acting as they please on our land, Lady Sorush? ｜ 斯露莎大人当然也不会容忍这些家伙在我们的土地上肆意妄为吧？
- Hmm? Traveler, you got a headache? ｜ 欸，旅行者，你头痛吗？

- *sigh* When will I find someone who'll accompany me back there... ｜ 唉，什么时候才能找到人陪我回去看看呢…
- fa ｜ fa
- Sango has already marked the locations of some Treasure Hoarder camps. I have also marked them on the map for you. ｜ 社长已经把一些盗宝团营地的所在地标记给我了，我也帮你标在地图上。
- Oh, and don't worry — as soon as I get back I'll tell the Knights to mop up the rest of the hilichurls as soon as possible. ｜ 哦对了，别担心，我回去也会报告骑士团，把残留的丘丘人营地尽快处理掉的。
- That is correct. Indeed, it is more accurate to say that we should thank that Harbinger for buying us some time. Without him, the whale would have likely come onto land far sooner. ｜ 是的，应该说它早就想要到陆地上来了，现在才第一次出现在我们面前，是多亏了那位愚人众的执行官吧。

- Herman seems to be troubled... ｜ 赫尔曼先生正在发愁…$HIDDEN
- Look, when you're a megastar like Yun Jin, you gotta start taking things a little more seriously. Saying she'll be back doesn't give me a whole lot of reassurance when she's showing no regard for her own safety. ｜ 嗨，咱家这位角儿要较起真来，别说回来了，连自个儿的安危都顾不上。
- Oh. It's Sorush's Yasnapati! Is there anything I can help you with? ｜ 是斯露莎姐姐的「谒颂主」！我还有什么可以帮到你的吗？
- The root of all wisdom on earth. Under the luxuriant Divine Tree, the sages of the academy city have accumulated all the knowledge there is to be gathered. Welcome to Sumeru, O Traveler seeking answers. ｜ 地上一切智慧的渊薮。在繁枝茂叶的圣树之下，学城的贤者们已遍计所有知识。欢迎来到须弥，寻找答案的旅人。
- Let's play Genius Invokation TCG. ｜ 进行「七圣召唤」的对局吧。

- In the "Race to the Top" stage, the more <color=#ffcc33>Valor</color> you possess, the higher your score when the challenge ends.\nYou can use the following methods to gain <color=#ffcc33>Valor</color>: Gaining and holding onto <color=#ffcc33>Fortune Teabricks</color>, staying on the <color=#ffcc33>platform(s)</color>, and using your Bumper Wushou to knock away other participants. ｜ 在「时杰竞登高」关卡中，持有的<color=#ffcc33>「豪气」</color>越多，挑战结束时获得的评分就越高。\n通过以下方式均可获得<color=#ffcc33>「豪气」</color>：成功争夺并持有<color=#ffcc33>「生财茶饼」</color>、持续停留在<color=#ffcc33>「登高之处」</color>、使用「舞兽碰碰」弹开其他参与者。
- Hmm? Oh, was I... Was I sleeping? ｜ 欸？啊，我、我是睡着了吗？
- ...Nope, still not seeing it. ｜ 还是没看出来。
- Just hearing you say that makes me wanna watch Nahida do that too... ｜ 听得我想看纳西妲摇摆…

- "A strange man wearing a mask and wielding a pole was once seen in the distance around Guili Plains. There's something eerie about his presence." ｜ 「在归离原附近曾经远远看到过一个戴着面具手持长枪的怪人，从他的身上能感到不太好的气息。」
- Mmm, that's good. That means you didn't raise any suspicions when you infiltrated the infirmary. ｜ 嗯，那就好，说明你潜入医务室没有遭到怀疑。
- Shinobu is asking us to do the impossible here! ｜ 阿忍这是给我们出了一个大难题啊！
- It wasn't much. ｜ 没什么大不了的。
- Night of Serenity in the Sandy Breeze ｜ 「宁静深夜的沙风」
- A shining, talking cat that claims to be a spirit-keeper for an ancient realm. ｜ 会发光又会说话的猫，自称是旧日国度的守灵人。
- Out of awe and respect for him, some citizens have already formed a Crowbar Sleuth Fanclub, and have carried crowbars out with them onto the streets. A fever for Crowbar Sleuth justice is sweeping the city! ｜ 出于对他的崇敬，部分市民成立了「撬棍侦探」粉丝会，并手持撬棍走上街头。一场属于「撬棍侦探」的正义狂热正在风靡！
- Ahh... Seems the captain has forgotten about me for today. Guess I'll have to try harder to be up earlier tomorrow. ｜ 唉…船长该不会已经把我忘了吧？算了，明天一定要努力早起了。

- Once I've learned how to make it... will you two be my taste testers? ｜ 等我学会做这道点心…可以请旅行者和派蒙来试吃吗？
- How do you get on with your modern family? ｜ 和家人相处如何？
- You tell Kokomi everything that happened earlier with Water Droplet. ｜ 向心海说明了遇到「小水珠」后发生的事…

- Cheep! Cheep! ｜ 叽…咕叽！
- With her long-term sleep deprivation, whenever her anxiety peaks, she loses consciousness and I take over. ｜ 嗯，每当她的焦虑到达顶点，因为长期睡不好觉，她就会在这种情况下失去意识，接下来就是我登场的时候了。
- An artificed Bouncy Mushroom that looks no different from ordinary Bouncy Mushrooms. You can still jump on top of it to be bounced up to higher heights. ｜ 被拟想而出的「弹弹菇」，看起来似乎和寻常的「弹弹菇」没什么太大差别，依然将在上面跳跃的角色弹射到更高的位置。

- I was prepared to answer your questions... ｜ 本来已经做好准备，随时可以替你们答疑解惑的…
- I'm just glad that I could help. I mean, everyone has family they miss. ｜ 能帮上忙就好，谁没有惦念的家人嘛。
- Oh, I guess that makes sense. Then the only thing left for us now is to find a way in. Why don't we all just pool our money together and pay for the information? ｜ 有道理，现在最关键的还是找到引路的人。我们几个干脆凑一下钱，找他们打听一下？
- Mastery Talisman: Teatime ｜ 机巧符术·茶歇时刻
- I mean, to wrestle with things that even the gods would fear with our frail forms... isn't that what makes us "human"? That's what I believe. ｜ 以弱小之身与纵使神灵也为之恐惧的永恒角力，这才是人之所以为「人」的理由…我是这样相信的。
- The flowers fall and become soil, the wandering son returns home. Having stood against the lightning, the young man of the wind has seen his reputation rise.\nSome admire him, while others view him askance with jealousy, all while the obsessions of history hang over them like a cloud.\nIcy, iron-shod footsteps approach gradually, but what he hears is the wind, snow, and the hearth-fire... ｜ 落花作尘，游子归乡，风中少年因匹敌稻光而声名鹊起。\n数以万计的视线中，有钦佩与仰慕，有揣测与嫉妒，还有蕴藏在历史中的执念。\n冰冷似铁的脚步逐渐靠近，他听见的却是风雪与炉火的声音…

- Mwuhahaha! Ahahahaha! ｜ 哈哈哈哈哈哈。
- I'm afraid I have to go... ｜ 还有别的事。

- Talkative as ever, I see, dear child. ｜ 还是这么吵闹啊，小丫头。

- Am I... really not needed?\n ｜ 我是不是…真的不被需要呢？\n
- You've got it all wrong — those are Abyssal monsters! They're way more dangerous than Tepetlisaurs. So you thought they were just ordinary ones... No wonder you struggled! ｜ 你们都搞错啦，这明明是深渊变成的怪物啦！它们可比嵴锋龙凶多了，你把它们当成嵴锋龙，难怪会吃亏呢！
- Uh... ｜ 这…
- But to get there, won't we have to get through the herd of Koholasaurs? ｜ 那要过去的话，岂不是得先穿过龙群？
- Is selling Canned Knowledge really that lucrative? ｜ 销售罐装知识有这么赚钱吗？
- Hey there you two... I wasn't expecting your company here at Mt. Aocang. ｜ 两位，没想到能在奥藏山碰见你们。
- I was so enraptured that I wondered if it might be the music of the adepti themselves, you know? Haha. Thank you — I thought I'd never get the opportunity to hear it again. ｜ 我那时一下就听得入了迷，心里想，这就是仙乐吗？哈哈，谢谢您，还以为没机会再听到了呢。
- A bespoke triple-Silk-Flower variety... ｜ 想用这三种霓裳花…
- W—Well, uh, never mind what I just said! I hope you know how this works by now, yes? Well, if it interests you, you're free to give it a go. ｜ 咳！我…我刚才啥都没说！您应该了解这个小游戏的玩法了吧？如果有兴趣的话，请您来试试看吧。

- Okay, I'm ready to head back now. ｜ 好了，那么我准备回去了。

As you met and parted with her in a hurry, this time, Yoimiya warmly invites you to the Naganohara Fireworks Show. ｜ 小孩子们前来打听有关「大貉妖」的消息，然而实际上这种妖怪并不存在。得知了真相的小孩子们很受打击，幸好宵宫及时安慰了他们。 由于之前的相见与分别很匆忙，这回宵宫很热情地邀请你参加「长野原烟花会」。

- Oh wow... My Tranquilizer Gun feels much steadier in my hands now. I wanna see if I can shoot it with just one hand... Shall we go out for some target practice? ｜ 哇…握麻醉枪的手更稳了，想试试单手开枪的准度…我们出门找些目标怎么样？
- "What!? How come..." ｜ 「咦，居然会变成这样…」
- ...Oh, of course I'll still carry out my duty seriously if something really does happen. ｜ …啊，当然，如果真的遇到情况，我还是会认真履行职责的啦。

- They just want to know if it can be sold for Mora, don't worry about that! We just need to continue testing and gathering data, yeah? So, you'll need to give me some more Mora to buy Vibro-Crystals... ｜ 他们不就是想知道能不能卖钱，别管那个，我们需要的，就是继续实验并且收集数据，阿纳托尔，再给我点经费买振晶…

- Machines that can be found throughout Ochkanatlan. Legends say that the rulers of the Cinder City modeled them upon machinery from earlier ruins. Once upon a time, these machines were the means by which these rulers monitored and guarded everything. ｜ 遍布奥奇卡纳塔的机械，传说由烬城的统治者模仿从前遗迹的机关创造而成。一度，这些机械都成为统治者监控和警戒一切的手段。
- Compact assistance meka developed to increase the overall utilization rates of meka groups, providing aid for underwater projects. They were originally designed to remove junk, vegetation, and other underwater debris in order to prevent these from clogging up the vital parts of other clockwork meka, thereby minimizing failure rates. From another point of view, they are undoubtedly benefiting Fontaine's ecosystem greatly as underwater cleaners.\nCompared to other mass-produced models, this special "Gold Leader" assistance meka utilizes a clear gold outer casing along with special control equipment. The project team designed it to fulfill the role of a command relay station in particularly complex underwater environments, receiving and re-transmitting commands from the controller to all other meka within the group, effectively fulfilling the important role of leader.\nHowever, as the whole maintenance meka project stopped functioning, these leader meka lost their reason for existence. Only their highly recognizable clear golden casing gives them value in the eyes of the anglers who collect them. ｜ 为了辅助水下活动的发条机关，提升机队总出勤率而开发的紧凑型辅助机关。最初的设计目的是清除水下的垃圾、植物残渣等杂物，避免它们吸附在发条机关关键部位，从而尽可能降低发条机关的故障率。从另一种角度看，它们无疑也扮演着「水下清洁工」的角色，对枫丹的生态环境有益。\n相较于其他量产型号，这一特别的「澄金领队型」维护机关采用了澄澈金色的壳体，以及特别的控制设备。在开发组的设想中，在较为复杂的水下地形活动时，这种维护机关能作为一种高效能的「中继指挥站」，接收并向周围的维护机关分发控制者所下达的各类指令，可以说是宛如「领队」一般的重要机关。\n然而，随着维护机关项目的整体停转，这些「领队机关」们失去了存在的意义，唯有它们富有辨识度的，澄澈金色的外表，使得它们在一些鱼师的眼中具有极高的收藏价值。
- Let me think for a second. ｜ 容我思考一下。
- I... We had an argument... I was upset, so I ran off here by myself... ｜ 我…我和他吵架了…有些难过，所以才一个人跑到这里…

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 3 ｜ 好感等级达到3后开启

- Kitsune Saiguu said that she was going off on a long trip, and she's never been back since. *sigh* At the time, I wasn't the least bit inclined to take on the burden of managing the Grand Narukami Shrine. So she told me that as Guuji, I would be able to eat all the Fried Tofu I desired. As if that would be a convincing reason... That woman spoke so much nonsense, honestly, she could be so insufferable... ｜ 狐斋宫大人啊，说着出一趟远门，就再也没有回来。唉，我那时可一点都不想接手鸣神大社的麻烦事，她对我说，说我要是当了神社的宫司，就可以随心所欲地吃油豆腐了。什么糟糕的理由呀，吵吵闹闹的，令人头疼的女人…

- When an opponent's character would be defeated, ensure they are not defeated and are healed to 2 HP, <color=#{0}>12 usages</color>. Each time an opponent's character receives Arkhe: Ousia aligned DMG, the usages for this effect will be reduced by 1.\nYour opponent's Switch Character action will be considered a Fast Action. During the End Phase, all clockwork meka will receive a charge of Pneuma energy, transforming them into the corresponding form.\nWhen your characters use their Elemental Burst: Spend 3 fewer Elemental Dice. (Once per Round)\nWhen you announce the end of your Round: If your characters have used an Elemental Burst this Round, then deal 1 Arkhe: Ousia-aligned Piercing DMG to all of your opponent's characters. ｜ 敌方角色被击倒时免于击倒并治疗到2点生命值，<color=#{0}>可用12次</color>。但是每当敌方角色受到具有「始基力：荒性」的伤害，都会使此效果可用次数-1。\n敌方进行的「切换角色」行动视为「快速行动」。结束阶段中，为所有「发条机关」补充芒性能源，使其转换为对应的形态。\n我方角色使用元素爆发时：少花费3个元素骰。（每回合1次）\n我方宣布结束时：如果本回合中我方角色使用过元素爆发，则对所有敌方角色造成1点具有「始基力：荒性」的穿透伤害。
- Unfortunately, by making contact with us, it also grasped a truth that came before its own existence. Thus, it was forced to seek a valiant death. ｜ 只不过也因为接触了我们，触碰了甚至它诞生之前的真相。于是它不得不寻找一种壮烈的死法。

- A Sub-Space Boulder that hangs high in the air. Its core is made of Plaustrite unique to Liyue and it is made by casting rock masses into a broad floating platform. Its load-bearing capacity is excellent, and no matter how many things you build on top of it, it will neither slant nor sink. You could even build a floating town if you could link enough of these Sub-Space Boulders together. ｜ 高悬于空中的外景磐石，以璃月特有的「浮生石」为核心，熔铸大量岩体，构成宽阔的浮空平台。负重能力卓越，无论在这种平台上放置多少建筑，都不会造成半分倾斜或下沉。将这种外景磐石大量拼接，甚至可以承载空中的城镇。
