- So what is it exactly? It sure sounds serious if it's something you've got to investigate personally! ｜ 所以到底是什么案件，需要那维莱特亲自调查？肯定是什么惊天大案吧！
- Ooh... You don't need to worry about that! ｜ 唔…这个就不用你费心啦！
- Yeah, definitely a fishy character... It sounds like he was digging for info about the ancient names. ｜ 听下来这家伙真的有点可疑呢…他好像在打听关于古名的事！
- Ararakalari refers to Aranara abilities, and they seem to have many mysterious powers. ｜ 「兰迦拉梨」是兰那罗的力量，似乎能做到许多神奇的事情。
- Those mad believers of Collegium Phonascorum once tried to incorporate nonhuman creatures under the control of the Golden Symphony. To this end, they built twisted creations... ｜ 谐律院的那些狂徒曾试图将人类之外的生物也纳入到黄金乐章的统辖之下，为此他们打造出了这般扭曲的造物…
- Yup yup! How about you? Do you need some more time? ｜ 对呀对呀，你呢？需要再给你一些时间吗？
- Look for the final Bedrock Key ｜ 寻找最后一座「磐键」
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- No issue. You not getting hurt is good enough. ｜ 不用客气，你别受伤就算是帮大忙了。
- "Treasury" Key ｜ 「宝库」的钥匙
- You're right. I can't always be like this... Sometimes, it's better to take action than overthink every little thing. ｜ 谢谢提醒，我不能总是这个样子。比起原地考虑，有时候就是要先迈一步。
- Don't you have Alrani to help you? ｜ 不是有爱拉尼帮忙吗？
- Yep, a tasty snack is sure to work! Hehehe... ｜ 嗯，好吃的！这个办法肯定能成功的，嘿嘿。
- So this is the Duke... He sure looks a lot younger than Paimon imagined! ｜ 原来这位就是公爵…比想象中的样子年轻好多！
- Charged Attack DMG|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param6:F1P}+{param7:F1P}
- Wine Goblet of the Pristine Sea ｜ 无垢之海的酒盏
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Flower Arrangement: Sprawling Daybreak.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「花卉瓶栽-『盛放的曙红』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Sidekicks, hmm... ｜ 伙伴…
- Nice try, but Paimon won't fall for this, no matter how cool it sounds! ｜ 不要试图用听着很帅的台词糊弄过去！
- Moo, moo. ｜ 哞！哞。
- Furina ｜ 芙宁娜
- A monster from the Abyss that wields multiple types of Elemental Power and has gained extra limbs from its "evolution."\n\n<i>"The nature of the 'Abyss' is essentially irreconcilable with the elements. However, even the elements of gods can be entrapped and distorted before they are subsumed to become tools of the abyssal will. Just judging from outcomes and practical use, "Abyssal powers" seem little different from elemental items, from ones as paltry as the Treasure Hoarders' elemental containers to those as powerful as Visions..."</i>\n—Notes left behind in Hangeh Afrasiyab by someone. ｜ 驾驭了多种元素力量的深渊魔物，因为「进化」而获得了多余的肢体。\n\n<i>「『深渊』之本质归根到底是与元素所不能相容的。但即使是有神的元素也会为其所裹挟、扭曲，成为深邃意志道具。从结果与效益而言，所谓的『深渊』或许与小至盗宝团手中充满元素力量的器皿、大到『神之眼』没有过多的区别吧…」</i>\n——谁人遗落在逾渊地墟的笔记
- (Luckily he didn't check behind the tree. What should I do next?) ｜ （还好没来树后面调查，接下来该怎么办呢？）
- Because before you know it, the treasures would've become dirt, and ah! You'd realize that you've fallen for their tanuki tricks all too late... ｜ 不然等回过神来，宝物通通变成泥巴，那可就是一场欢喜一场空咯…
- CD|{param4:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param4:F1}秒
- Talk to Jifang and ask about Yakshas: The Guardian Adepti ｜ 与纪芳对话，询问《护法仙众夜叉录》的情况
- Hehe, Traveler, are you ready to play the stealthy ninja? ｜ 嘿嘿，旅行者，你准备好扮演忍者了吗？
- Oh... Let Arasaka know when you're all set then. ｜ 这样啊…那忙完了记得要告诉兰萨卡…
- "Ceaseless Clash" ｜ 「不息的争流」
- Oh, that's a good idea. A cup of coffee might help clear my head. Let's go. ｜ 好主意，来上一杯咖啡，可能会清醒一些。那我们快走吧。
- But, with Chief Biram's help, we were able to make some progress! ｜ 不过在首领庇兰的帮助下，还是获得了一些进展。
- Hmm... You do have a point. Though as the ancients say, "living waters silt once drawn." ｜ 嗯…你说得也有道理。但古人亦云：「活水取之则淤。」
- We can do it right here. ｜ 就在这里试试看。
- Accumulated 50 or more Adventure Coins ｜ 累计获得50枚及以上的冒险币
- Seed of Skandha Duration|{param6:F1}s ｜ 蕴种印持续时间|{param6:F1}秒
- Utilize the Thunderous Loops in the challenge and defeat enemies in synergy with your character's rapid movements ｜ 利用挑战中的轰雷之环，配合角色的快速移动击败敌人
- About the camp... ｜ 关于营地的情况…
- Alright, I got it. Traveler, could you come with us? ｜ 我知道了。旅行者，请再和我们同行一段吧。
- #An astute observation, {NICKNAME}... Tell {M#him}{F#her} the truth. ｜ #既已如此…就将实情告知{M#他}{F#她}吧。
- You're feeling lost now, just as you were feeling previously. I sensed that confusion, and thus came to you. Guiding people is an irresistible hobby of mine, after all. ｜ 正如上次，你迷茫了，我感知到那份迷茫，便来到此处。指引人是我无法放弃的甜蜜喜好。
- Unknown Weapon ｜ 未知武器
- Wait, what are futures contracts anyway? ｜ 等等，期货是什么？
- Tighnari, Forest Watcher in the Avidya Forest, is a promising young researcher well-versed in botany.\nAfter graduating from the Amurta with excellent grades, Tighnari declined several invitations to teach at the Akademiya and chose to stay in the rainforest with plants as company.\nThe morning dew shimmering amidst the fragrant trees, everything in the rainforest is so adorable and refreshing.\nThe only exception — and the biggest headache for Tighnari — is some fools who always confuse poisonous mushrooms with edible ones and could never learn a lesson from Tighnari's scolding. ｜ 道成林的巡林官提纳里，精通植物知识，是一名年轻有为的少年学者。\n以优异的成绩从生论派毕业后，提纳里数次拒绝了教令院的任教邀请，留在雨林中与植物作伴。\n晨间的露滴，林木的芬芳，雨林中的一切如此亲切，令人心旷神怡。\n——除了那些总是吃错蕈子的糊涂蛋们，怎么教训都不长记性，着实让提纳里头疼。
- Whatever the case, let's climb up that elevator. Whoever climbs the highest wins! ｜ …总之就是爬那个升降梯！看谁爬得更快更高！
- It was no trouble! ｜ 举手之劳罢了！
- Unable to join this player's world ｜ 无法进入该玩家的世界
- He initiated a fell ritual that aimed to restore the shattered "symphony" and revive the ruined realm. To this end, he did not hesitate to dissolve the will of our kin and plunder the souls of Fontainians everywhere. ｜ 他施行邪恶的仪式，试图修复破碎的「乐章」，重建灭亡的国家。为达目的，不惜溶解同族的意志，四处掠夺枫丹人的灵魂。
- The wine goblet from which the Thundersoother, who defeated the Beast of Thunder, once drank violet lightning. ｜ 平雷勇士的酒盏，据说平息了雷之魔兽的英雄曾用这尊酒盏满盛紫电为饮。
- Uhh, we... Umm... Nothing, never mind! ｜ 呃我们，那个…呃…没事，没事。
- Welcome to Floral Whisper. Are you looking to get someone a bouquet? It's the Windblume Festival, after all. ｜ 欢迎光临「花语」，呼呼，风花节到了，要给重要的人买一束花吗？
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- I... It can't be helped. The Ministry of Civil Affairs delivers supplies to many places during the Lantern Rite, and I still have my part to do... ｜ 我？我…我没办法啦，总务司在海灯节期间还要向很多地方分发物资，我还要再负责一部分…
- #Huh. I didn't know you were the independent sort like that, {NICKNAME}. ｜ #没想到，原来{NICKNAME}{M#少年}{F#少女}是这种有点独立性格的人呢。
- Oi! Shhh! Keep your voice down! ｜ 你干嘛！不知道小点声吗？
- Skill DMG|{param1:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:P}
- Life is short... ｜ 春宵苦短…
- ... ｜ ……
- Hmph, your sins will be judged, but the time for that has yet to come. The two of you over there, as envoys of the Akademiya, it is only polite to state your names first, no? ｜ 哼，汝的罪孽暂且留待日后再说。那边那两个小家伙，既然是教令院派出的使节，首先报上名来才合乎礼节吧？
- Water the flowers ｜ 给花种浇水
- Is Amber your proctor? ｜ 是安柏为你监考吗？
- Hmph. ｜ 哼。
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Thank you! And as per the adventurers' code, here's your reward. ｜ 谢谢你，哦对了，按照冒险家的规矩，这是你的报酬。
- Sacred Simulacrum ｜ 仙像
- CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- You've got to have a proper breakfast to get yourself in the right mood for work. ｜ 喝一顿丰盛的早茶再去上班，工作状态才会好。
- ...Alright, it's a deal. ｜ …嗯，一言为定。
- It was issued by the Akasha earlier today. Only you have the authority to send messages like that, so I thought it was your order... ｜ 是早些时候通过虚空发布的，这种信息的发布权限应该只在您的手里，所以…所以我还以为是您下达的命令…
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Flower-Feather Stable: Saurian's Repose ｜ 花羽厩舍-「龙的安眠」
- Well, if you don't do well today, we know who to blame, now don't we? ｜ 是嘛，那如果你发挥不好，就全都是阿乔的责任。
- "Not bad at all! Looks like I can't afford to get careless..."\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Dehya" starts with the Talent Card "Stalwart and True" equipped.</color> ｜ 「有两下子嘛！那我可不能大意了…」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「迪希雅」初始装备有天赋牌「崇诚之真」。</color>
- This is what we learned in the City of Freedom. ｜ 这是我在「自由」的城邦了解到的事。
- How did you know that I was worrying about finding a place to practice? ｜ 你怎么知道我正发愁找不到地方练功…
- Cast Healing|{param2:F1P} Max HP+{param1:I} ｜ 施放治疗量|{param2:F1P}生命值上限+{param1:I}
- There are other nice people here too... but none of them are as nice as Cater. He tells me all kinds of stories, and listens to mine, too... ｜ 这里也有其他人很好…可是没人会像卡特哥哥那么好，会给我讲很多故事，也会听我讲故事…
- Ah, you're here! Welcome to the Chasm Exploration Team's demolitions team base and water point! ｜ 啊，你来了！欢迎来到层岩巨渊勘探队的爆破组与饮料供应处！
- Bring the bag, boys. Bet you this Saurian'll sell for a good price. ｜ 哥几个，把袋子拿过来。哼哼，这只小龙肯定能卖个好价钱。
- A mysterious expert contracted by the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor. Extremely knowledgeable in all things. ｜ 被「往生堂」请来的神秘客人，知识渊博，对各种事物都颇有见地。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Vahumana Flag."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『伐护末那之旗』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Glory sends her best wishes. ｜ 葛罗丽向你问好。
- Use the Inscribed Mirror to get info on the animals' locations ｜ 使用「铭随流镜」获取小动物的位置信息
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- As you can see, we've only just begun. ｜ 如您所见，这才刚刚开始。
- Dynamic Skin Exchange ｜ 影幻牌面兑换
- I stand by my decision. ｜ 我会继续坚持这个选择的。
- *sigh* If only I could taste some authentic Grilled Ticker Fish once more... ｜ 唉，好想再吃一次正宗的「烤螭虎鱼」呀…
- I'll be old by then. ｜ #到时候{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}都老了。
- Yay, you're here too, Xilonen! ｜ 哇，希诺宁也来了！
- Pita pockets are travel-friendly and filling, so they're probably the food I eat the most. But if we're talking about more than just "filling," my favorite food would be... mmm, Fried Radish Balls, I think. ｜ 「口袋饼」方便携带，又容易吃饱，应该是我最常吃的东西了？如果不考虑肚子的需要，我最喜欢的食物…嗯，应该是「炸萝卜丸子」吧。
- The Little Witch and the Undying Fire (II) ｜ 小魔女与不熄灭的火·卷二
- Place ingredients and cover more area to increase the <color=#F39000>Tuning Rate</color> for this concoction. When the Tuning Rate reaches <color=#F39000>100% or higher</color>, you can concoct the potion and receive the finished product. ｜ 放入药材，覆盖更多区域，可以提升本次炼制的<color=#F39000>调和率</color>。调和率达到<color=#F39000>100%或以上</color>，即可完成炼制，获得药剂。
- When It's Windy ｜ 起风的时候…
- Hmm, when we first met in Chinju Forest... ｜ 在镇守之森第一次见面的时候…
- It's a deal! ｜ 一言为定。
- Yes, you should focus on enjoying everything that the street fair has to offer. And if you find anything is not to your satisfaction, we will welcome your feedback. ｜ 嗯，现在就请尽情体验街会的游玩项目吧，要是有什么不满意的，欢迎反馈给我们。
- Rope ｜ 绳索
- Tepano's Message ｜ 提帕诺的留言
- Alas... We once lived comfortable, carefree lives. This city used to be free of monsters. The first Marechaussee Hunter, Cassiodor, the "Golden Hunter," he was the one who drove them back. ｜ 唉…自那第一位逐影猎人，「黄金猎人卡西奥多」解放这座城市以来，我们的生活原本很富足…
- Aether ｜ 空
- I didn't expect to run into you here, of all places. ｜ 没想到，竟然在这里先碰着了。
- Even if we perceive differently, if we can communicate our feelings to one another, maybe the "essence" of things doesn't matter all that much after all. ｜ 就算眼中看到的东西不同，只要心情能传达到的话，事物的「本质」什么的也就无所谓了吧。
- Mirage Exploration ｜ 探索幻境
- Indeed... ｜ 确实…
- "If that happens, a lot of the pressure will be taken off the Corps of Thirty, and merchants wouldn't need to spend so much money on hiring bodyguards." ｜ 「到时候，『三十人团』的工作压力会减少很多，商人们雇佣保镖的开销也减少了。」
- <color=#00E1FFFF>Go to the floating isle... There, the final seal... can be broken...</color> ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>前往浮岛之上吧…那里，可以揭开…最后的封印…</color>
- Well, I will bring a guard with me, naturally — just in case. ｜ 我去的时候，自然会雇人与我同行，以防万一。
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Furnishings ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设购买获取
- So, the Vasara Tree out there should be able to bear Vasoma Fruits now, right? ｜ 这样的话，外面的莎兰树就可以结出恒素果了吧？
- I guess that's why everyone wants me to get more rest and relaxation... Apologies. ｜ 所以大家才会希望我多休息、多放松吧…实在是非常抱歉。
- Whoa, what was that just now? ｜ 哇，刚刚那是什么？
- Ah, right! If you get a slip with ill fortune, just tie it to that shelf, that'll do. ｜ 啊，对哦！如果你抽到凶签，把它捆到那个架子上就行了嘛。

---
### Part 097

- Obtain from quests ｜ 任务获得
- One Who Speaks Coldly ｜ 冰冷的说话者
- And that the things we once spoke of, they've all come to pass. ｜ 而且，曾经说过的话，我们都已经实现了。
- Entering Floor {0}, Chamber {1}. ｜ 即将前往第{0}层第{1}间
- Just who was this master you spoke of? ｜ 你说的主人到底是谁？
- Oh, and there's one more thing I forgot to mention! Please wait for a moment, I need to consult my notes... ｜ 对了！还有一件事，还有一件事！请您稍等一下，我看看笔记本…
- It sounds so convenient! ｜ 听起来真方便！
- I have heard that this is only found at Yujing Terrace these days... ｜ 我听说，现在几乎只有玉京台能看见这个…
- Oh, you should really be thanking Gaming, not us. ｜ 嘿嘿，这你还是要感谢嘉明！
- Otogi "Meichuu" Standing Lamp ｜ 御伽木「鸣驻」立灯
- H—H—Hello, e—e—esteemed Master of the Jinni! ｜ 您、您、您好，尊贵的「镇灵主人」！
- It's crab meat that's been rolled in flour, deep-fried, and then pan-fried together with ginger and garlic. When you finally plate it up, the crab seems to be lying on gold. ｜ 裹上面粉的螃蟹先用油炸，再跟姜蒜一起炒，盛到盘里的螃蟹就像躺在黄金上。
- Tiny Miracle's Hourglass ｜ 奇迹之沙
- Continue onward through the shattered space ｜ 在破碎的空间中前进
- Yeah, well, I couldn't even promise them we would make it through the team stage. ｜ 我也没办法拍着胸脯和他们保证，一定能让我们这个队伍通过团体赛…
- Ahem... Only from our failures do we learn to succeed. I'm no longer who I used to be. ｜ 咳…吃一堑长一智嘛，我也不是当初那个我了。
- Leaving already? Don't forget to come see me when you come to Cat's Tail for a night out. ｜ 要走了？要是你晚上有兴趣来猫尾酒馆，记得在客人席里找找我哟。
- I gave him some medicine, but it didn't really work that well. ｜ 虽然我也给他开过药了，但药效却不怎么明显。
- Are you two not getting along? ｜ 你们之间关系…不好吗？
- Scarlet Seal Duration|{param19:F1}s ｜ 丹火印持续时间|{param19:F1}秒
- Complete "Illumiscreen: Mora" ｜ 完成「玲珑霄灯图·摩拉」
- A sheet of paper Xingqiu found beneath his luggage. Someone seems to have left it there while he was napping. A poem entitled "The Five Kasen's Splendor: Aoi no Okina" is written upon it. ｜ 行秋在行李下面发现的纸片，似乎是有人趁着他打瞌睡放在那里的。纸上写有一首名为《五歌仙容彩·葵之翁篇》的诗。
- · All characters' Shield Strength is increased. When a character obtains an Elemental Shard generated by a Geo Elemental Reaction, a shockwave will be unleashed, dealing DMG to enemies nearby. Enlist Geo-aligned characters into your party to use this Ley Line Disorder to deal even more DMG. ｜ ·队伍中所有角色的护盾强效提升。角色获取岩元素反应产生的晶片时，会释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成伤害。在队伍中编入岩元素的角色，可以利用地脉异常效果造成更多伤害。
- Huh. Why do you wanna get stronger, Kichiboushi? ｜ 唔…吉法师为什么要变得更厉害呢？
- Yesterday? <color=#00E1FFFF>No boats came in or went out yesterday morning</color>, so the men who work at the docks had nothing to do. ｜ 昨天？<color=#00E1FFFF>昨天早上没有船进来也没有船出去</color>，码头上的叔叔们都很闲。
- Activation Device: King Deshret's Pillar ｜ 激活器件·「赤王之柱」
- Oh, we have an expert among us! Hey, why don't you play a match with me? It'll help me warm up, and maybe find some creative inspiration. ｜ 嚯，我这算是碰上行家了呀！要不咱们这就来上一局？也好让我找找灵感热热身。
- Ripple Electro Edge ｜ 流煌磨刃
- Calm down, now, you're a person from Inazuma too you know... ｜ 冷静点，你就是稻妻人。
- Thanks to your help, I now have most of the items I need. I will set off for Sumeru to sell them in a few days. ｜ 多亏了你，现在货备得差不多了。不日我就出发去须弥卖货了。
- You're looking for a young girl from the Children of Echoes, right? She's being chased by an embodiment of Abyssal power. ｜ 你们在寻找一个「回声之子」的小姑娘对吧，她在被深渊力量的化身追赶。
- Natashka ｜ 愚人众·娜塔希卡
- You're back. How did it go? ｜ 你回来了，一切顺利么？
- Talk to Fujiwara Toshiko ｜ 与藤原俊子对话
- Care to share what this is all about? ｜ 告诉我这是怎么回事？

- Emerge! ｜ 敕！
- How about it? Shall we start taking some photos? ｜ 怎么样，现在要开始留影吗？
- But how can you guarantee that? Wait, so you really do know something, don't you? ｜ 可是，你怎么能保证一定能找到…等等，你果然是知道些什么吧？
- But look at me now! Chatting with my friends, doing meaningful things together... ｜ 反倒是现在，和其他同伴一起聊天、做事，生活也有了色彩。
- Huh? What're all these Qingxin flowers for? Oh no, have you got a headache again? ｜ 咦？你怎么采了这么多清心回来，师兄，你是不是又头痛了？
- Sethos ｜ 赛索斯
- A nimble, fish-like mechanical construct reminiscent of the technology in ancient ruins. It can move in various liquid environments, including liquid Phlogiston — perhaps it was designed to detect and automatically approach heat sources. \nDue to this "heat-seeking" trait, skilled fishers can use heat-emitting bait to lure and capture them. When disassembled, they yield remarkable components from ancient civilizations, making these "mechanical fish" highly valuable... ｜ 行动灵巧，构型如同游鱼的小型机关，似乎与深古遗迹中的机械体有着的同源技术，能够在各种液体环境下运转，包括高热的液态燃素——抑或是其本身就有着侦测热源的设计意图，会自动趋近高热信号。\n正是因为其「寻热」的特性，技艺娴熟的鱼师能用散发热量的鱼饵将其诱捕。拆解后，还能获得古老文明的奇特装置。因此，这种「机关鱼类」可谓价值连城…
- Hang on! Just keep it in! ｜ 忍住！忍住啊！
- Are you Xavier's friend? ｜ 你是泽维尔的朋友？
- Also, this fellow isn't all that fond of popping out most of the time, so you'll have to wake it up from time to time. ｜ 而且，因为这家伙平时都不怎么喜欢出来，所以你得时不时叫醒它才行。
- Open your Inventory and check Persikov's manuscript to obtain the clues to finding the Crystalline Cores. ｜ 打开背包，查阅「佩尔西科夫的手稿」以获取晶核的线索。
- Give an item to the hilichurl ｜ 向丘丘人交付物品
- So, was that what caused all his strange behavior earlier? ｜ 所以，他会做出异常的行为，也是由于这次波动的影响吗？
- Surprise, surprise — Lyney refused an interview with me once again. Do you know how many times that is now? ...Uh, actually, I've lost count. But never mind! Evading me only further confirms my suspicion that he's hiding the news story of a lifetime! As long as I keep digging, I'll find it — and when I do, it will shake the world like no other news report in history! ｜ 好吧，林尼先生又拒绝了我一次。这是第几次了来着…没关系！林尼先生越是拒绝我，我就越能确定，他的身上藏着某些富有巨大价值的故事，这个故事的爆炸性一定是前所未有的。我一定要挖掘出来！
- It's no trouble at all... Patience is a virtue which I have in abundance. This is all part of a carefully controlled experiment. ｜ 自然是为了欣赏和实验。要知道，我可不是一般的有耐心。
- A meat and vegetable dish. The de-skinned radishes have gone into the pot first to cook before large hunks of fish and seasonings are added in. The whole combination is then stewed on a low flame. The large servings of food — best served with rice — give everyone present a feeling of satisfaction. ｜ 荤素搭配的菜肴。将去皮切段的白萝卜先下锅煮，再放入处理好的大块鱼肉，加入调味料，小火焖煮而成。大块的食物带给人大大的满足感，用来搭配米饭再合适不过。
- Enigmatic Page (IX) ｜ 神秘的书页·其九
- In addition, I left my home in Snezhnaya when I was young to come to Poisson and work in some trade. My business only thrived when I received Callas' patronage. ｜ 我年轻的时候离开至冬的家乡，到白淞镇做小生意。后来有了卡雷斯先生的扶持，才慢慢走上正轨。
- I also didn't expect Elisa to insist on bringing the pregnancy to term. She even asked me to leave my family, and travel far, far away with her. ｜ 没想到，埃莉莎居然坚持要生下孩子，还让我离开家里人，和她一起远走高飞。
- Only 54,000? That's just 10% higher than when he had that psycho hammer on my door... What a miser. ｜ 五万四千？和上次捶门的疯子的报价相比…只涨了一成。这也没涨多少嘛，真吝啬啊。

- Okay~ When you want to go fish bombing, just remember to find me! ｜ 好~想炸鱼的时候，记得来找可莉哦！
- Mmm... Black tea and a cute kitty. Truly, the best combo for standby mode. ｜ 呼…红茶和小猫，最适合「待机模式」了。
- Creating a god... Yes, we are using human wisdom to create a god! ｜ 创造神明…我们可是在以人类的智慧创造神明！
- The spells of the Masters of the Night-Wind are all based on dealing with spirits, and so are all our problem-solving methods. So for spirit-duffers, even our healing methods don't work on them. ｜ 我们烟谜主的法术与灵性密不可分，解决问题的手段也如此，所以对灵性白痴而言，一般的治疗手段都不起效。
- Yes, it's a matra seal, indicating that the goods have passed matra inspection. ｜ 这是风纪官的放行图章。印有这个标记，就意味着里面的货物已经由风纪官审查过了。

- Curry... ｜ 咖喱…
- Hey, Timmie... ｜ 那个，提米…
- I know I've been pressing and I'm sorry for that. But she really worries me... ｜ 我知道我催了好多次，真的很不好意思，但我真的很担心她，我…
- Me? Actually, I used alchemy to cheat a little, but anyway. ｜ 我吗？其实我用炼金术偷了一些懒，不过这些都不重要。
- The lunch rush isn't in yet, Shenhe, so I've got things covered for now. ｜ 申鹤，现在还没到饭点，顾客不多，我能招呼过来。
- The would-be Marquis of Carabas dispatched the Nekomata-in-Boots, who ran off in pursuit of the poor little minion. ｜ 于是虚假的卡拉巴斯侯爵放出穿靴子的猫又，开始追逐可怜的小职员。

- If you ever wish, you may train with me. ｜ 如果有心，可以向我来寻求试炼。

- Never Leave Home Without... Turbo Twirly ｜ 不能少了…冲天转转
- Compared to Little Mao, Paimon feels like she's completely out of her depth... ｜ …怎么办，我有种完全比不过小茂的感觉？

- You are a little lost, but you shake hands with Arakavi anyway...\nYou try not to use too much strength.\nArakavu's hand feels... interesting to the touch. ｜ 有点不知所措地和兰加惟握手了…\n不敢太用力。\n触感很特别。
- Well done, Director. You saw through it. ｜ 不愧是导演，这么快就意识到了「真相」。
- Wait, you won't know what you'll get? Why can't you order what you want? ｜ 不知道会拿到什么？为什么不能想吃什么就点什么呢？

- Wow, now our snowman won't melt either. Great! ｜ #哇，这下我们的雪人也不会融化了吧。太好了，{NICKNAME}。
- Dinner's served! Although it's just some basic field rations, it should still have all the nutrients you need. Please, dig in... If you have any equipment that needs maintenance, you can also give them to me. ｜ 晚饭完成了，虽然还是行军餐，有点简陋…但提供的营养肯定管够，请不要介意…如果有需要维护的装备，也请交给我吧。
- Miko, you're not leaving, are you? It feels like you never got to properly enjoy your vacation here... ｜ 神子，你这就要走了吗？总感觉你都没好好在须弥玩玩…
- Quicksand Treasure Hunter (I) ｜ 流沙的寻宝者·其一
- So, what do you think? Will you give the academy a try? ｜ 怎么样，你意下如何？
- Skills are ineffective when facing an opponent who weighs more than three times your own. ｜ 面对三倍以上的体重差时，「技术」亦会失效。
- This is Wangshu Inn? Hm, it does have the look and feel of a time-honored establishment... ｜ ——这里就是望舒客栈？也算是一家老字号了吧…
- Unfortunately, given the financial situation of the Knights of Favonius... Well, I'm sure you can imagine... ｜ 但骑士团的财政状况，不用我说你也想象得出来…
- Whew, this gal really jazzed up her guitar... ｜ 这把琴用处可真多啊…
- This trial introduces a new Quirky Curio, the <color=#FFCC33>Simulated Homing Missile</color>. After using this item, you will enter Aiming Mode and <color=#FFCC33>continuously accumulate Guidance Value</color> toward a targeted character. Once guidance is locked on, a homing missile will be launched at the targeted character. If you successfully <color=#FFCC33>knock back</color> the character with the missile, a large amount of Adventure Coins will be awarded. Conversely, when your character is <color=#FF5E41>knocked back</color>, you will lose a certain amount of Adventure Coins. <color=#FFCC33>You cannot collect new Quirky Curios while in Aiming Mode</color>. ｜ 本次试炼将新增奇逸道具<color=#FFCC33>「拟造引导飞弹」</color>，使用该道具后将进入瞄准射击状态，并对一名被瞄准的角色<color=#FFCC33>不断积累引导值</color>，当引导完成时将对该角色发射一枚持续追踪的飞弹。若旅行者使用飞弹成功<color=#FFCC33>击飞</color>角色，将获得大量冒险币奖励。若角色<color=#FF5E41>被击飞</color>则损失一定量持有的冒险币。<color=#FFCC33>在瞄准状态期间，旅行者无法获取新的奇逸道具</color>。
- Hehe, not to brag or anything, but we do have a good collection of fine goods! ｜ 嘿嘿，我们钓鱼协会，还是收藏了不少好东西的！
- Yeah. Everyone needs to stick together. Best to regroup somewhere else. ｜ 是啊，大家最好可以聚到一起去。
- I realized then that to the Grand Sage, the matra are nothing more than tools for the sages to assert and maintain their control over knowledge. ｜ 那时我意识到，在大贤者眼中，风纪官不过是贤者们统御「知识」的工具而已。
- Take care of yourself. ｜ 你多保重。
- Damaged News Clip ｜ 污损的新闻剪报
- That's right! Well done! Now, golden one, repeat that. ｜ 对啦！真不错！好，金发的孩子，你再来一遍。
- Oh, sure. I took some time to walk around this place and came up with a few suggestions. Maybe you'll get some inspiration... ｜ 好啊，我最近在这个地方到处走了走，想到了一些规划性的建议，我觉得说不定能让你有些启发…
- Don't worry. I'll give this another go. ｜ 没关系，我再试试。
- *sigh* Thirty years ago, when I followed Dominus Boethius to conquest in the far north, they were but a pack of primitives without any such skill for subterfuge. Where did they learn these tricks? ｜ 唉…三十年前，我跟随波爱修斯大人远征北境的时候，他们还不过是一群原始的野人，从来不会用这些奸诈的手段。究竟是从哪里学会了这些…
- They want to exercise? After all that food!? ...Sorry, everyone. I should intervene. ｜ 真是的，这种时候不能剧烈运动啊…不好意思，我得去拦住他们，先走一步了。

- ...Are you sure you are not a monster? ｜ …你真的不是什么怪物吧？

- Maybe if we collect some extra and sell it to merchants outside, we might be able to... ｜ 要是能收集一些多余的矿石，卖给外面的商人，说不定就能…

- I hate it when you try to act like a big brother! ｜ 又…又摆哥哥的架子！讨厌！

- Mualani's my first good friend! Before I met her, I never even knew that people as sweet as her existed, or how many fun things there are in the world! Look, this is a photo of us! She said we should jump right when they took the photo... I look a bit stiff? Hehe, you caught me! A lot of people were staring at us when we took this photo, so I was really nervous... ｜ 玛拉妮是我的第一个好朋友。遇到她之前，我都不知道这个世界上有这么好的人，还有这么多好玩的事情。看，这是我们合影的画片。她说是要在合影时一起往上跳…你说我动作看着有点僵硬？嘿嘿…被你发现了…当时镜头外有很多人在看着我们，让我有点紧张…
- "I once undertook a commission to 'persuade a dangerous warrior.' When I found him, he happened to be playing this card game. I picked up a few tricks from watching him — enough to defeat him and walk away with my payment in full..."\nHint: Kinich's deck centers on using Techniques and is geared towards triggering Burning reactions. He can obtain many buffs by triggering Burning reactions and using Techniques. ｜ 「我接受过一项委托，『说服某位危险的战士』，结果找到他时，他正好在玩这种卡牌游戏，于是我现场学了几招，打败了他，拿到了全额佣金…」\n【提示】基尼奇的牌组以「特技」为核心，并且擅长触发「燃烧反应」，在触发「燃烧反应」和「特技」后会获得诸多强化。

- A gamepiece based on Hilichurl Fighters. Each unit has 4 fighters.\nThe primitive wandering inhabitants of Teyvat's wildernesses, they are tribal warriors with a simple belief in the power of their physical prowess.\nCompared to the massive Mitachurls, they are far nimbler. In battle, their club-wielding style of fighting is more similar to ordinary soldiers, and they can sometimes even cooperate well with their companions, making them an excellent sample for researching teamfighting tactics. ｜ 以「打手丘丘人」为原型的兵棋，每个单位编有4名成员。\n提瓦特荒野中游荡的原始住民，朴实地信奉着肌肉力量的部落战士。\n相较于体型庞大的丘丘暴徒，它们的动作较为灵巧，手持木棍战斗的方式更接近普通士兵，偶尔还会与同伴打出不错的配合，是研究队伍作战的基本样本。

- Throwing out your fishing net costs action points. You can throw nets that have 3 different <color=#d27e35ff>catch AoEs</color> and action point costs. When the net touches the fish, it has a <color=#d27e35ff>fixed chance</color> of successfully catching said fish, which will net you action points according to the fish's size. The catch chance is affected by <color=#d27e35ff>fish size</color> and <color=#d27e35ff>net type</color>. ｜ 投掷渔网捕鱼时，需要消耗一定的行动点。可以投掷3种<color=#d27e35ff>捕捉范围</color>和行动点消耗量都有所不同的渔网。渔网触碰到鱼时，有<color=#d27e35ff>一定概率</color>成功将其捕获，并根据鱼的体型获取对应数量的行动点，捕捉成功的概率与<color=#d27e35ff>鱼的体型</color>和<color=#d27e35ff>渔网的种类</color>有关。

- Help Needed:\nHow do I become a real manly man?\nI've heard people say that a real manly man has to experience lots of adventures.\nI've also heard them say that eating meat can make you stronger. If I get strong enough, I should be able to take on any adventure, right?\nSo if anyone's willing to lend me a hand, please bring me <color=#3399CC>three servings of Chicken-Mushroom Skewer</color>.\nI will definitely become a manly man! ｜ 求助：\n到底怎么样才能成为男子汉呢…\n人家听说，成为男子汉首先要经历很多冒险。\n嗯…人家还听说，吃肉可以长力气，如果人家力气够大的话，冒险应该就不在话下了吧。\n如果有人愿意帮忙的话，就请帮人家拿<color=#3399CC>三份野菇鸡肉串</color>过来吧。\n人家一定会成为男子汉的！

- And sometimes I will ask him something particularly difficult on purpose and look at him expectantly, at which he will try his best to hide his embarrassment. ｜ 有时候我会故意问一些比较困难的问题，然后满怀期待地看着他，他就会竭尽全力掩饰自己窘迫的表情。

- ... ｜ ……
- I heard Lesser Lord Kusanali is currently celebrating her birthday in the city. As her familiars, the Pari have decided to bestow upon her a special gift! ｜ 我从过路人口中听闻小吉祥草王大人正于城内庆生，吾等花灵乃小吉祥草王大人之眷属，便想为之准备一份特殊的贺礼。
- Hmph... I doubt if there will be a "next time." But if you do get to tell my stories, feel free to share anything you know, as it will help flesh out my Yasnapati's record of my great undertakings. ｜ #哼…之后未必会再见了。不过，尽管与吾之「谒颂主」细说吧，好让{M#他}{F#她}更为详实地记述吾之功业！
- After arriving at Aaru Village, you see Alhaitham, who is currently reviewing his materials... ｜ 抵达阿如村后，见到了正在查看资料的艾尔海森…
- And please note that helping a fellow adventurer to complete a commission also counts towards your eligibility for a daily reward. ｜ 对了，如果你帮助你的冒险伙伴完成委托，同样会计算在领取礼物的数量之内。
- ...Still, I did leave the scene. I didn't want to be a nuisance to the Darknight Hero. ｜ 不过…我确实从现场离开了，毕竟在「暗夜英雄」面前，我可能只是个累赘。

- The current Calibration Value hasn't been saved. Are you sure you want to exit? ｜ 当前校准值未保存，确认退出？
- This is goodbye, my friend. Your memories over the past two hundred years are much more than a "blank canvas"... Cherish them. ｜ 这次应该是永别了吧，朋友…我不认为你这两百年的记忆全都是空白，请好好珍惜它。
- I know... Thanks, you guys, it's just that fireworks are banned in the city for a few days. I'm not that upset, really. ｜ 嗯…谢谢你们，只是这几天城内禁燃烟花而已，其实我也没那么不开心啦。
- Just take up a casual pose. ｜ 放松的姿势。
- Can you really use this to make medicine? I'll try it myself once it's done. ｜ 这东西真的能入药吗，做好了药，我得自己先试试。

- A bottle ornament with a golden frame and the appearance of an emerald gem. The "gemstone" is made of glass, and balances aesthetic appeal with cost... ｜ 金色框体与青色宝石外形的瓶体配饰，「宝石」由玻璃制成，兼顾了美观与成本…
- Of course. I have relatives in Liyue Harbor, and I've heard all about you, so I recognized you from the get-go. ｜ 那当然，旅行者，我有亲戚住在璃月港，你们的事我都听了好多遍呢，所以前面一早就认出你们了。

- Looks like someone was just here. Did they already figure out the little mechanism up ahead? ｜ 这里好像不久前就有人来过欸。是不是已经打开了前面的奇妙小机关了？

- This is too dangerous for you. ｜ 换人，对你来说太危险了。

- Consider it done. ｜ 交给我了。

- Guess I need to give him a bit of a talking-to later. ｜ 还是找机会好好和它聊聊吧。
- Hey, aren't each of your requests becoming less reasonable than the last? Also, for the last time, just call me "Daddy." ｜ 嘿，这孩子，要求怎么越来越离谱了！而且说了多少次了，要叫我爸爸。
- "...Jade engraved and carved. Offered at Chiwang, that the heavens may hear..." ｜ 「…苍璧既琢，黄琮亦镌；奉兹赤望，聆彼玄天…」
- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Tell me about your tea store. ｜ 关于茶铺。
- #{NICKNAME}, you're here! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我最好的伙伴，你来了呀！
- There has to be! There... is, right? ｜ 一定有的！应该有…吧？
- Companion: Multiple Entry ｜ 伙伴·多重登台
- It's not like the Fatui to pick sides in a business dispute. But the confident demeanor of their errand boy suggests there is substance to his words... ｜ 「愚人众」平常不会站在某个商人一边，但看那家丁的嚣张态度，应该所言非虚。
- Domain of Blessing: The Burning Gauntlet IV ｜ 祝圣秘境：茹焰的炼场 IV
- Still, I've got to admit that they still scare me when they're this close. It's a good thing we've got you around... ｜ 不过…说实话，离这些魔物这么近，我还是有些害怕…幸好有你陪着我。

- This is the Gilded Journey, and I'm the owner of this hotel. ｜ 这里是「金砂之旅」，我呢，就是这间旅店的老板啦。
- Wait for Nahida to enter the inhabitant's consciousness and talk to Setaria ｜ 等纳西妲进入居民的意识，与塞塔蕾对话
- Just as I anticipated. ｜ 如我所料。
- He has already stained the Tanit name... This means that he has cast aside the name of his mother, and must be punished. ｜ 他已经玷污了部族的名字…这就意味着他忘记了母亲的名字，应当接受惩罚。
- Game Master ｜ 主持人
- Far as I can tell... Fontaine's fleet doesn't need me anymore. Or rather, Fontaine has no intention to ever form another fleet like that. ｜ 据我所知…枫丹舰队…已经不再需要我这种人了。或者说，枫丹已经没有，也不打算再重建以前那样的舰队了。
- Which one is it, "retainer" or "attendant"? Make up your mind... ｜ 刚刚还说别人是家臣，现在又说人家是扈从…
- Get rid of them and bring these specialized cores to me. I need <color=#00E1FFFF>7</color> in total. Thanks! ｜ 把它解决掉，把里面这种特定的核心带给我，一共<color=#00E1FFFF>需要七个</color>。拜托了！
- Interestingly, I didn't have the same dream again after I left this place. So I became even more intrigued, was this really just some random dream? ｜ 而且奇怪的是，只要我离开这里，就不会再有这个梦。我更加感兴趣了，这真的仅仅是一个梦吗？
- A slime that uses a sturdy <color=#FFE14BFF>Geo Ward</color> to protect itself. If you use <color=#FFE14BFF>heavy Geo attacks</color>, a <color=#FFE14BFF>claymore</color>, or strong <color=#FFE14BFF>explosions</color>, you should be able to break through its defenses... ｜ 利用坚硬的<color=#FFE14BFF>岩元素护罩</color>保护自己的史莱姆。厚重的<color=#FFE14BFF>岩元素攻击</color>、<color=#FFE14BFF>双手剑</color>，或者剧烈的<color=#FFE14BFF>爆炸</color>，应该可以有效破坏护罩吧…
- Albedo creates a Solar Isotoma using alchemy, which deals <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color> on appearance.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Solar Isotoma</color>\nhas the following properties:\n·When opponents within the Solar Isotoma field take DMG, the Solar Isotoma will generate Transient Blossoms which deal <color=#FFE699FF>AoE Geo DMG</color>. DMG dealt scales off Albedo's DEF. \n·Transient Blossoms can only be generated once every 2s.\n·When a character is located at the locus of the Solar Isotoma, the Solar Isotoma will accumulate Geo power to form a crystallized platform that lifts the character up to a certain height. Only one crystallized platform can exist at a time.\n·Solar Isotoma is considered a <color=#FFE699FF>Geo construct</color>. Only one Solar Isotoma created by Albedo himself can exist at a time. \n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Hold</color> to designate the location of the skill.\n\n<i>This Geo bloom has an unusual property mirrored in the aim of alchemy. To rise from the earth, soar into the sky, and become the sun.</i> ｜ 炼成阳华，造成<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>阳华</color>\n具有如下特性：\n·以阳华为中心的领域中的敌人受到伤害时，阳华将会生成刹那之花，绽放造成<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素范围伤害</color>，伤害基于阿贝多的防御力。\n·每2秒只能生成一次刹那之花。\n·角色处在阳华上时，阳华将会凝聚岩元素的力量，形成将角色托起至一定高度的晶台。同时只能存在一个晶台。\n·同时只能存在一个由阿贝多自己创造的阳华，视为<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素创造物</color>。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>长按</color>\n可以调整技能生效位置。\n\n<i>这种岩花有着奇异的特性，和炼金术的目的一致。诞生自大地，却一直希望上升至高天，化作太阳。</i>
- #I'm {NICKNAME}. ｜ #我是{NICKNAME}。
- Well. After the divorce, she started using her compositions as a way of stirring up controversy... Pfft. I, for one, do not consider anything she writes to be true poetry. ｜ 呵，自从我们离婚后，她就用她的作品在搬弄是非…呸，她写的那些东西根本不配叫作品！
- Good idea. We'll be back in a jiffy! ｜ 对，我们快去快回。
- Ten years is nothing! We're in our prime! I don't know about you, but I'm going for gold! ｜ 十年怎么了？现在才是战士的黄金年龄！这次的「归火圣夜巡礼」，我可是志在必得！
- A kitchen knife... M—Mercenaries don't fight with kitchen knives! They use hunting knives! They're completely different kinds of things! ｜ 菜刀…能、能和猎刀比吗？根本不是一种东西！

- Energy Conversion: Ousia ｜ 能量转换·荒性
- Zhiqiong ｜ 志琼
- Let's get her some normal bait like we discussed earlier, alright? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，我们就按之前商量好的，给她换一份正常的鱼饵吧。
- "Spirit of the Fallen Dawnstar" ｜ 「陨落的晨星之灵」
- The Harvisptokhm seems to have heard us. The power of Amrita comes to our aid. ｜ 万种的母树似乎也听到我们的声音了，甘露的力量正在帮助我们。
- Ah, it's been too long. ｜ 好久不见。
- Increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>. On hit, attacks against opponents with less than 30% HP increase all party members' ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color> for 12s. Can only occur once every 30s. ｜ 攻击力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>30%</color>；攻击命中生命值低于30%的敌人时，队伍中所有成员的攻击力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color>，持续12秒。该效果30秒只能触发一次。
- Sorry, sorry, I shouldn't have brought that up. I wasn't planning to talk about sad things tonight. ｜ 对不起，对不起，不该提这个，今晚不想聊难过的事。
- So the truth was concealed by the last fragment, huh? ｜ 唔，所以最后一块碎片掩盖了这个真相吗？
- ...Yeah, but uh... She made a special request, but out of respect for her privacy... I can't really talk about it. ｜ …对方有特殊的原因，但涉及到隐私，所以…我不太方便详述。
- Squeak! Beep beep! ｜ 吱——嘎嘎——
- Kwak Yoon-sang ｜ 郭允相
- I took the liberty of setting up a business dinner, as per the Liyue custom. ｜ 我准备了一场——嗯，在这个国家，叫做「饭局」的见面仪式。
- Miitoboru ｜ 「大肉丸」
- Hey! Slow down, aren't you worried someone'll toss a rock and trip you or something? ｜ 喂！跑慢点啊，你不怕有人突然丢块石头绊倒你吗？
- That's not how that works. A Blubberbeast is going to find the surface dry and hot, so adding a little mint sauce ought to help it cool down, right? ｜ 好像不是这个逻辑喔，水里的膨膨兽上岸应该会很干很热，加一点薄荷酱反而能让它降温吧？
- Eh? Why are they called wolf pens, then? ｜ 欸——那为什么要叫做狼毫笔！
- Oh, going so soon? Not even up for a little wander? ｜ 欸，要走了吗，不一起逛逛？
- The Golden Apple Archipelago is full of many games that involve harpasta, and I and my friends spent a most wonderful summer here. ｜ 金苹果群岛上有不少跟羽球有关的游戏，我和我的朋友们在这里度过了一个非常快乐的夏天。
- I had no choice but to scale the walls with some simple climbing ropes and sneak in from above while the Corps of Thirty wasn't paying attention. ｜ 我就只好找来了一些简易的攀登绳索，趁「三十人团」不注意，从上面偷偷钻了进去。
- Rank 16–20 ｜ 等阶16-20
- Entrances and Exits to the Opera House ｜ 歌剧院的出入情况
- This level of success is an amazing accomplishment for a new work. Most new books don't sell 30% of what you've sold. ｜ 刚刚出道就有这样的成绩，属实厉害。要知道在初版数量相同的情况下，许多书连三成都卖不到。
- Kachina. ｜ 卡齐娜。
- And... a date, I guess. ｜ …顺便，也当作是我们的约会吧…
- So many names... Is the one who sent that threatening letter to Kiara on the list? ｜ 好多名字！给基娅拉寄威胁信的人就在他们当中吗？
- A fresh fillet of fish. Handled properly, it can make a rich dish. ｜ 鱼类的新鲜肉块。经过适当处理可以制成让人回味无穷的菜式。
- Wrrooo... ｜ 呜呜…
- I would think of us more as siblings. An equal and pure relationship, unaffected by academic considerations. ｜ 我们几个的关系，比较像兄妹吧？纯净无污染，没有任何学术力量介入的兄妹关系。
- 1005 ｜ 1005
- I'm not able to travel myself, but I do admire free spirits like yourself. So I helped them design a little something for you all. I hope you liked it. ｜ 我不能出远门，很羡慕你们这些自由自在的人，所以，也帮着做了一些小设计，希望你们喜欢。
- But I don't get it. Is the one Babel looking for really such a dangerous figure? ｜ 但是…我不懂…难道芭别尔寻找的就是这个危险的家伙吗？
- Defeat Maguu Kengou ｜ 战胜魔偶剑豪
- Is this it? Doesn't look like anyone's been here... ｜ 是这里吗…？怎么看也不像是有人待过的地方呀…
- The enemy seems especially afraid of Claymores... Well, Claymores are even bigger than Paimon, so of course they're scary! ｜ 对方好像特别惧怕双手剑的样子…不管怎么说，那可是比派蒙还高的超级大剑！当然很可怕！
- Sorry, we can't. We've got a meal with Kaveh later, and we have to check in with all the other contestants before then! ｜ 抱歉，我们已经和卡维约好要一起吃饭啦。在那之前还要采访其他人呢！
- You knew as soon as you saw the letter that we, not Urraca, were the ones speaking to you. It threatened you only because you know what you did. Your own guilt convicted you. ｜ 你一看到信就知道乌拉卡背后的人是我们。被威胁是因为你知道自己做过什么，你在心虚。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After you play an Action Card:</color> If, while this card is on the field, you have already played 3 Action Cards this Round, draw 1 card and create 1 $[K411]. (Once per Round)\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 3</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>我方打出行动牌后：</color>如果此牌在场期间本回合中我方已打出3张行动牌，则抓1张牌并生成1个$[K411]。（每回合1次）\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：3</color>
- Remember that so you won't get cheated by scammers. ｜ 请你一定牢记这一点，避免被来头不明的人骗取佣金。
- I'm not quite ready yet. ｜ 还没准备好。
- It's all my fault... I'm the reason he became like that... ｜ 都是因为我…都是因为我他才会那样…
- See you. ｜ 再见。
- It's possible that they may have been under orders to avoid your path. ｜ 或许…它们是被某人命令，刻意绕开了你的行进路线。
- Couldn't you consider this a special feature of this training ground? ｜ 也可以把这一点当成训练场的特色。
- Well aren't you a busy one? No problem, I'll get someone else to help me out. ｜ 你还真是个大忙人…那我去找别人帮忙，你忙你的去吧。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param8:P}/{param9:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param8:P}/{param9:P}
- Arawr! Aroawr! ｜ 啊呀！啊呀！

- It's part of being a matra. ｜ …风纪官的工作和职责就是这样。
- It is *garbled mechanical noises* performed at the direction of *garbled mechanical noises*. As such... *garbled mechanical noises*. ｜ 是在…（嘈杂的机械音）授意下进行的…（嘈杂的机械音），因此，…（嘈杂的机械音）。
- Put some spring in your step and your "discovery" glasses on, it's time to say "hi" to our animal friends! ｜ 放轻脚步，睁开发现的眼睛，和我们的动物朋友打个招呼吧！

- I've collected a number of schematics from making lots of music equipment in the past. Feel free to pick 'em up next time you swing by. ｜ 我也打造过不少相关设备，收集了一些资料。下次来我那时，都拿去吧。
- It doesn't matter how you find the Raw Meat, by the way. ｜ 无论用什么方法找到兽肉都没有问题。
- It seems like someone's gonna have to beat some sense into your thick skulls until you finally learn to respect these grounds! ｜ 看来必须要有人把你们揍趴下，好好认识认识脚下的土地才行了！
- We mustn't let Tatarasuna fall to the enemy! ｜ 不能让幕府军通过踏鞴砂！
- The Feline Firm (VI) ｜ 猫咪事务所· 卷六

- Why do you insist on getting involved in the world of demons and adepti? You're breaking the rules too often. ｜ 为何还要继续接近仙与魔的世界？你们的逾矩太频繁了。
- Sweets make people happy, so I guess that's where its popularity comes from. ｜ 吃甜食就是能让人心情愉快呀，也难怪大家都喜欢。
- However, no matter which modules or parts are installed, a machine is innately a construct that receives and executes commands. They can never possess self-awareness like us or other living organisms. ｜ 但无论怎么更换模块，机械本质上还是在接收和执行指令，没办法像人或其他生物一样拥有「自主意识」。

- You mean some kind of sport or physical activity? ｜ 你是说运动之类的吗？

- Opponents' HP increased by 50%. ｜ 怪物血量提升50%。

- What's the big deal? Didn't you see me chopping meat and making a soup? ｜ 可不咋的。没看到我切肉炖汤吗？

- You're right. ｜ 也是，您说得对。

- About marked young Saurians... ｜ 关于有印记的幼龙…
- Why, sure you are. ｜ 芭芭拉一定可以的。

- After the character's Elemental Skill hits an opponent, their ATK will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color> for 8s. After the character takes DMG, their ATK will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color> for 8s. The 2 aforementioned effects can be triggered even when the character is not on the field. Additionally, when not protected by a shield, the character's Max HP will be increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>56%</color>. ｜ 元素战技命中敌人后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>，持续8秒；受到伤害后，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>，持续8秒。上述2种效果角色处于队伍后台时也能触发。此外，不处于护盾庇护下时，生命值上限提高<color=#99FFFFFF>56%</color>。

- Near each of the four seals is a stone tablet that records ritual-related matters... But they have stood for many an age, and the handwriting is now barely legible. ｜ 这四处封印附近，各有一座石碑，记录着仪式相关事宜…只是年代已久，字迹已经难以辨认。
- The beauty of tea lies in the taste of sweetness that hides itself in the bitterness. Just like life, which has its ups and downs... ｜ 茶的美妙恰恰就在于那苦中带甜的味道，恰如人生一般，有苦有甜…

- So this inscription means... Well, Paimon didn't get all of it... but it seems like there's treasure hiding somewhere in a body of water! ｜ 这个碑文的意思…虽然其他看不太懂，好像是说有宝贝在水下面藏着吧！

- Yeah! Pinkie promise, pinkie promise! ｜ 要！拉勾拉勾！

- An old scroll lacking in detail and clarity. By following the images on it, some magical creatures can recreate a small part of its magic. ｜ 模糊地绘制了难解形象的古书断章。通过模仿其中的人物形象，一些魔物能小小地再现魔法的奇迹。

- There's another saying, how does it go... "As long as you have a good story to tell, you'll always find a way forward..." The same principle applies to antiques. ｜ 啊，那句话怎么说来着，只要你还有一个好的故事，便永远不会走投无路…「古董」也是一样。

- The Driftstone Raft comprises a propulsion device and 4 stone-raft components. Each of these components can be destroyed as a standalone part. Pick up Drift Energy and stay on top of the Driftstone Raft to replenish the device's energy. ｜ 「飘曳石筏」由驱动机关与4个石筏部件组成，每个可供站立的石筏部件，可能被摧毁。拾取「修复部件」且停留在「飘曳石筏」上，可以修复石筏。\n航行过程中，驱动机关将不断消耗「飘曳能量」。若能量耗尽，「飘曳石筏」将停止前进。拾取「飘曳能量」且停留在「飘曳石筏」上，可以补充驱动机关的飘曳能量。

- These pearls only grow alongside the coral of Watatsumi, and they will emit a cooling sensation in your palm as gentle as a moonbeam.\nSome local stories say that if held by a person in whose veins runs the blood of Watatsumi, these pearls will become brighter still, for these pearls are the blood that Watatsumi Omikami shed for its people. Other legends say that the great Omikami used a pearl as bright as the moon to shine upon Enkanomiya, leading the people who dwelt there up to the surface. As such, the Sango Pearls are akin to sacred relics to some.\nThe "pearls and waves" of the Sangonomiya emblem are said to come from these very waves that embraced Watatsumi and the bright gem that gave it light. ｜ 这种珍珠只与海祇的珊瑚相伴而生，在手中会散发出月光般的微微凉意。\n有本地故事传说道，在流淌着海祇之血的人的手中，这种珍珠会变得更为明亮，因为珍珠是大御神为了海祇人流的血；也有传说说，大御神用皓月般的珍珠照亮了渊下宫，将人们引领到了地表之上。也因此，海祇真珠对于一些人而言，有着圣物般的意义。\n海祇珊瑚宫的纹样「真珠海波」的由来，传说就是怀抱海祇的波浪，与照亮海祇的耀眼明珠。

- A special exhibit at the Magnificent Irodori Festival. It is a colorful vertical photo board with a hole in the head that allows the faces of the people taking the photo to blend in with the design, making it very popular and a must-see for visitors at the festival. This photo board depicts a happy family of tanuki. Some children have always wanted to hug the tanuki, but they can't find them, so many of them rush to take pictures with the board. The staff nearby will also be kind enough to find something for them to put their feet on so that the children's heads can reach the holes on the photo board. ｜ 「光华容彩祭」上的特色展物，绘有彩色图案的立式合影板，头部留出空洞，能让合影人的脸部与图案相融，充满趣味，因此人气极高，被游客们列入「容彩祭的必去之地」。这块合影板上绘制着和乐融融的狸猫一家，有些孩子一直想抱抱毛茸茸的狸猫，却找不到狸猫的行踪，所以不少孩子会抢着和这块板子合影。附近的工作人员也会贴心地给他们找来垫脚的东西，以便孩子们的脑袋够着合影板上的空洞。

- I saw many new and fascinating things in my journey. ｜ 在璃月的山间，在下见识到了许多新奇的事物。
- Talk to Beidou ｜ 与北斗商议
- Well, how was it? My experimental style and "Special Lighting" are quite something, no? ｜ 如何？我的「实验映影」和「特技光效」很华丽吧？
- Your comrades have all been brought to justice, but still, you dare to say this and that about my precious... ｜ 你的同伙都被我们绳之以法了，你还有胆对我家宝贝指手画脚，指指点点…
- #Well, I suspect that they call your {M#sister}{F#brother} their {M#Princess}{F#Prince} precisely because there is a succession of sorts. ｜ #你的血亲被深渊教团称为{M#公主}{F#王子}，正是因为这是种「继承」关系吧。
- True... But there are also times when you just want to power through. ｜ 但也会有放不下的时候…
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}
- Rosaria ｜ 罗莎莉亚
- Achieve victory with characters defeated less than twice during the battle ｜ 胜利时，角色被击倒次数小于2
- *bang* ｜ 嘣——
- I said relax, there's no need to go treading on eggshells. Do you really think the Eternity I pursue is something that can be shaken by Dango and Milk? ｜ 说了不必多礼，也不用这么心惊胆战的。我想要的永恒，岂是会被团子和牛奶撼动之物？
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param6:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param6:F1}点
- Alright, alright, it's on Paimon this time! What's one meal to the best guide in Teyvat? ｜ 咳，我请就我请好啦。身为提瓦特最好的向导，请顿饭算什么…
- Why did you join the Fatui? ｜ 你是怎么成为愚人众的…
- And secondly... well, we are a merchant fleet, after all. We've got to see if they've got any commercial worth, of course! ｜ 其次…毕竟我们是商船队嘛，当然是好好研究一下商业价值啦！
- After Paimon explains for some time... ｜ 一段时间过后…
- Sobek Oasis ｜ 丰饶绿洲
- You might not know this, but even fish from the same species can have huge differences between individuals because of differences in living environment and food. ｜ 你可能不知道，即使是同一种鱼，个体之间也会因为生活环境和食物的不同，而产生很大的区别。
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- Not to worry, at least we put some food to good use, no need to feel disheartened. ｜ 没关系，至少没有浪费可口的食物，你们也不必感到沮丧。
- It would be too late to start preparing when danger is already at the door. ｜ 如果等到危险临近再仓促准备，显然就于事无补了。
- Purchased from Realm Depot: Riches of the Realm ｜ 洞天百宝·洞天珍物购买获取
- "New drinks at the Cat's Tail. Your bartender today is: Diona." ｜ 「猫尾酒馆酒品上新，迪奥娜本日当班。」
- A bird feather that was picked up by the knight who walked with the North Wind in the snow. It still awaits the day when it will thaw. ｜ 与北风同行的骑士于雪中拾获的鸟羽，如今依旧静候解冻之刻。
- This was once a common folk legend in Teyvat.\n"The ancient dragons did not go extinct — they merely hid under the earth and have evolved to look like humans. They've even infiltrated various organizations throughout the world!" ｜ 曾经提瓦特也很流行的地摊传说。\n「古代的龙没有灭绝，而是躲进地下，进化出了人的样子。它们甚至渗透进了各国的机构。」
- Available right away ｜ 初始可用
- Haha, it would seem that you're still oblivious to your own economic worth. Three hundred thousand is nothing compared to the prestige of having the Light of Kshahrewar as one of my instructors. ｜ 哈哈，看来你对自己的商业价值还不是很清楚啊。能邀请到赫赫有名的妙论派之光，这点钱算什么？
- What rule? ｜ 什么规矩？
- Displays the location of nearby <color=#FFD780FF>resources unique to Mondstadt</color> on the mini-map. ｜ 在小地图上显示周围的<color=#FFD780FF>蒙德区域特产</color>的位置。
- Are you sure? Hasn't he turned you down several times already? ｜ 你确定？他不是拒绝采访好几次了？
- The Supplicant's Steps ｜ 瞻拜路途
- The dragon will need to rest for a very long time before it is fully healthy again. ｜ 它还需要休息很长时间，才能恢复到健康的状态。
- Sure. ｜ 我知道了。
- CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- Let me know when you're ready to go. ｜ 准备好出发了，就告诉我吧。
- Of course, I won't simply hand freedom to them on a silver platter. They have to fight for it and prove themselves worthy of it. Only freedom that is earned has true value. ｜ 当然，我不会直接把胜利的果实送到他们手里。他们需要向我争取、向我证明，只有这样得来的自由才有价值。
- I'm so bored... ｜ 真无聊…
- About Mavuika: Hair ｜ 关于玛薇卡自己·头发
- Hehe, Doushin Shikanoin was talking about you constantly the whole way here. I guess the universe answered his prayers. ｜ 呵呵，鹿野院同心刚才一路提到你们好几次。这就叫念念不忘，必有回响吧。
- Go to Quest Menu to access Quest Hints ｜ 打开任务面板查看任务提示
- Traveler... Unless I'm mistaken, you don't seem to have a Vision. ｜ 旅行者…你好像没有「神之眼」，对吧？
- Is something the matter? ｜ 您还有什么事吗？
- Duration|{param2:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param2:F1}秒
- "Believe in the Furina you see on stage. She is the one you can trust." ｜ 「相信舞台上的芙宁娜便好，那就是你们应该信任的形象。」
- This sounds harder to believe by the moment. ｜ 怎么越听越感觉不靠谱了！
- Hmm, what if Madam Kujou Sara's the one who got my letter... No, surely she wouldn't intentionally ignore it? ｜ 如果是九条裟罗大人收到了我的信，她不会故意不给我回信吧？
- Tidal Shadow ｜ 浪影阔剑
- Undo ｜ 撤销
- Whoa, you must be one powerful Yasnapati! ｜ #哇啊，好厉害，不愧是「谒颂主」{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}！
- Yeah... ｜ 嗯…
- Nechca seems to be doing pretty well today. Since she's been stuck indoors for the last few days, why don't we take her out for a walk? ｜ 妮赫佳今天的精神看起来挺不错的。她也闷了好几天，婶婶，不如我们带着妮赫佳出去走走？
- Collei ｜ 柯莱

### Part 098

- For every party member from Natlan or who has a different Elemental Type from the equipping character, the equipping character gains <color=#99FFFFFF>9.6%</color> increased ATK. When there are no less than 3 of the aforementioned characters, the equipping character gains <color=#99FFFFFF>48</color> Elemental Mastery. ｜ 队伍中每有一名纳塔角色或与装备者元素类型不同的角色，装备者获得<color=#99FFFFFF>9.6%</color>攻击力提升；上述角色不少于3名时，装备者的元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>48</color>点。
- Hello! Unfortunately, your request could not be fulfilled. Sorry for the inconvenience. ｜ 您好，这个没有呢。不好意思。
- Tales of Uninvited Guests ｜ 不速之客二三事
- Approach the opponent quickly and deal the final blow! ｜ 赶快靠近敌人，给它最后一击！
- Did Parvaneh just blush? You don't see that every day. ｜ 嚯…芭尔瓦涅那家伙居然还会脸红，真是稀奇。
- *sigh* I wonder what I should do... ｜ 唉，我到底怎么办才好呢。
- She's on top of a windmill. ｜ 安娜在一架风车上。
- Haha! I hope our paths cross again. Welcome to Liyue! ...Well, I can't speak for the whole of <color=#00E1FFFF>Liyue Harbor</color>, but you're always welcome in my store at least! ｜ 哈哈哈哈，有缘再见吧。欢迎你们来璃月——这话代表不了<color=#00E1FFFF>璃月港</color>，但我的小店永远欢迎你们。
- They can also be used as substitute energy sources for Abyss-corroded Source Mechanisms. ｜ 也可作为被深渊侵蚀的秘源机关的替代能源。
- This is him. We find his blood. Bad men did this. ｜ 是它。被那群人抓住了。
- Ehehe, mm-hmm! So, we got our sword — now we just need that shield! ｜ 嗯，那么，剑已经找到，只差盾了。
- (You find messy footprints around it.) ｜ （箱子的周围有凌乱的脚印…）
- Survivor of Catastrophe ｜ 雷灾的孑遗
- Touch ｜ 触碰
- If it was just about sticking to his principles, it wouldn't be an issue. But he tries to use the powers he's been given to force everyone else to adhere to his principles. ｜ 只是坚持原则的话倒也没什么问题，但是他的情况是，他试图用借来的权威迫使所有人接受他的原则。
- If you're willing to help complete some commissions, I can pay you. ｜ 如果你愿意帮忙完成一些委托任务，我可以付报酬给你。
- Wait... Don't! ｜ 他是想…
- "Abide until that day... Abide until that day...\nWhen every member of the Golden Troupe shall win the whole future as their prize." ｜ 「…待到那一日，待到那一日…\n『金色剧团』的每一位成员，自当赢得整个未来作为奖赏。」
- Complete 10 transmutations at the Elemental Crucible ｜ 在「原素烘炉」处完成10次炼金
- Octric ｜ 深渊咏者·奥奇里克
- <color=#FFCC33>{0}%</color>/{1}%/{2}%/{3}% ｜ <color=#FFCC33>{0}%</color>/{1}%/{2}%/{3}%
- You are... ｜ 你是…
- Lady Miko is a widely renowned kitsune youkai in Inazuma, so it's natural for young youkai like myself to approach her with reverence. But contrary to my expectations, she was surprisingly amiable. She even came to visit me in person and taught me lots of useful stuff about how to survive in human society! Things like proper human etiquette, ways to approach people, and different fried tofu recipes... Huh? That last one was just for her? ｜ 神子大人是稻妻远近闻名的大妖怪。我这样新生的妖怪，难免心生敬畏。但没想到，这位狐妖大人非常和蔼可亲，不仅主动来见我，还教会了我很多有用的知识。比如人类社会的礼仪、与人交往的方法、还有油豆腐的炸法什么的…咦？你说最后那个不知道也行？
- Follow the golden bee ｜ 跟随金蜂前进
- It's complicated. ｜ 我的来历比较复杂。
- That's right! He's a great businessman! ｜ 我的哥哥是一位大商人！
- Old Treasure Hoarder Notes ｜ 破破烂烂的盗宝团笔记
- ...I'm sorry, who are you again? ｜ 你是？
- I can't give you the original copy, but... Wait a second, where did I put my Kamera... I remember placing it inside my bag... ｜ 虽然原件不能给你们，不过…等一下，我的留影机去哪了…我记得放在包里…
- Each person gets 1 <color=#00E2FFFF>berry</color>. ｜ 一人一个<color=#00E2FFFF>树莓</color>。
- Current Score: #1# ｜ 当前总得分：#1#
- Uh, w—well... ｜ 这、这个…
- About Chiori ｜ 关于千织…
- Underwater Speedrun! ｜ 海底大竞速！
- The good news is that nobody dissolved in the water. The bad news is that there was still a huge flood. ｜ 好事是人们并没有真的溶解在水里，坏事是涨起来的大水还是造成了灾害。
- Still, no wonder. The great works of Remuria are worth the admiration of all peoples! ｜ 也难怪，雷穆利亚的伟迹，的确值得众人景仰。
- New-Type Purification Mek D-503 ｜ 新式净化机关「D-503」
- My, my. Yoimiya has quite a determined spirit. I like it very much. ｜ 哎呀呀，宵宫这股倔强劲儿，我还真是挺喜欢的呢。
- Hmm... like this? ｜ 这…这样吗？
- My name is Razor. Home... is here. ｜ 我叫雷泽，家…家这里。
- Charged Attack DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Is this a letter from Julien? Let Paimon have a look... ｜ 旁边这是…这是于连留下的信吗？让我瞧瞧…
- Customs of Liyue: Flower Ball ｜ 璃月风土志·绣球
- Thanks for your consideration, but no need. ｜ 谢谢你的好意，不过不用了。
- With us by your side, you'll never fight alone! ｜ 我们就在你的身边，我们不会孤军奋战！

- Ah! Ha, so it's you. How've things been going? Well, I trust? ｜ 嗯，哈，原来是你呀，怎么样，最近还顺利吗？
- Complete "Illumiscreen: Glaze Lily" ｜ 完成「玲珑霄灯图·琉璃百合」
- After using this skill, the Waverider will not take DMG for a while. ｜ 使用后的一段时间内，「浪船」将不会承受伤害。
- Revitalize the Ley Line Blossom to claim a reward.\n\n<size=24><color=#E0902CFF>{0} {1}</color> required. Continue?</size> ｜ 激活地脉之花以收取秘宝。\n\n<size=24>激活将消耗<color=#E0902CFF> {0}个 {1}</color>，是否确认激活？</size>
- After all, I, too, was guided back to the right path by an adeptus. ｜ 毕竟，我能重新走回正道，也是多亏了仙师教诲。
- Before you begin, listen to Asakawa's explanation concerning the warehouse. ｜ 在开始调查前，先听听浅川对仓库的介绍吧。
- The Temple of Silence's heir. Burdened with secrets, he comes from the sands. ｜ 缄默之殿的继承者。背负着秘密，自沙中而来。
- "People fail to recognize that it's the Akasha that ensured the purity of our knowledge." ｜ 「人们没有意识到的是，恰恰是虚空保证了我们知识的纯洁。」
- "The Silver Tongue" ｜ 「伶牙俐齿」
- For Old Time's Sake ｜ 久久望故人
- A soup with a complex recipe. A turbid and muddy looking fluid, a single glance is enough to tell this is a failed creation. Perhaps the only thing in Fontaine that would accept such "food" are the Tainted Hydro Phantasms roaming beside the water... ｜ 工序繁多的汤品。浑浊不清的液体，一眼看过去就知道是失败之作。能接受这样一份食物的，可能全枫丹只有那些在水边彷徨的浊水幻灵了吧…
- The charts we are using now are just revised versions of the ones left by the previous navigator. ｜ 因为我们现在使用的海图，完全是在上一任航海士留下的基础上所做的修订版。

- Elemental Shock ｜ 元素冲击
- But there are stories to tell you before nightfall... ｜ 在黑夜到来前，还有故事要同你诉说…
- Some opponents will enter the field with time bombs on them that will explode after a period of time, dealing DMG to nearby characters, after which this bomb will transfer to the nearest on-field opponent, resetting the bomb's timer. The bomb will transfer using the same rules after an opponent carrying it is defeated. The maximum bomb timer and bomb DMG will decrease and increase respectively with each transfer. These modifications can stack. Max <color=#f39001>4</color> stacks. ｜ 部分敌人登场时持有定时爆弹，经过一段时间后定时爆弹将爆炸，对附近的角色造成伤害，此后，爆弹将转移至场上最近的另一名敌人身上，重新开始计时；持有爆弹的敌人被击败后，爆弹将以同样的规则进行转移。每次转移后，爆弹的爆炸时间都将缩短，造成的伤害也将提升，爆炸时间缩短和伤害提升的效果至多叠加<color=#f39001>4</color>层。
- Abyss Mage ｜ 深渊法师
- According to the Sakoku Decree currently in effect, foreign visitors must apply for a Residence Permit if they wish to stay on Ritou for a long period of time. ｜ 根据稻妻现行的锁国令，异国的来客如果想要在离岛长期停留的话，需要办理驻留许可哦。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param5:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param5:F1}点
- Obtained through capture ｜ 捕捉获得
- Dead Ley Line Branch ｜ 地脉的旧枝
- Uh, do you really have to get all that fuzzy-wuzzy with a Sumpter Beast? ｜ 噫…称呼驮兽用不着这样肉麻吧！
- Sounds great! Hehe, but we'll only help you on one condition! And that is that you have to mail us a copy of your food map once you're done making it! ｜ 嗯，不过，嘿嘿，我们的帮忙也是有条件的…等你以后做好了美食地图，得给我们寄一份呀！
- Portable Waypoint ｜ 口袋锚点
- Ah, hello! What can I help you with? ｜ 啊，你好！有什么需要帮助的吗？
- Master Trainer, "People of the Springs" ｜ 「流泉之众」训练大师
- It would be nice, of course, if they could come. But regardless, it would not be polite of us to not even give them so much as notification that the event is occurring. ｜ 他们愿意到场是最好。但无论两位老师意愿如何，我们如果不知会一声，也不太合适…
- No, I have no recollection of ever meeting you. ｜ 没有，我对你毫无印象。
- But I like how you think. So I'll indulge your martial arts hero aspirations for now. ｜ 但我觉得不错。那我就陪大侠走一趟吧。
- *sigh* How I wish Mr. Zhenyu could attend this competition. These royalties can't be left to pile up like this much longer... ｜ 唉，「枕玉」老师可千万要出席这次比赛啊，这稿酬…这稿酬可不能再堆下去了…
- The shipwreck seems to be nearby... ｜ 巨大的沉船似乎就在附近…
- Let's show our opponents our real strength this round! ｜ 好，这回我们要拿出真正的实力，让对手见识一下我们的厉害！
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Restores 300 HP for the selected character. ｜ 为选中的角色恢复300点生命值。
- "But we gotta keep a close eye on those Fontainians. Word is that the Pinkies are real good at underhanded hijinks. We've got to station people at this camp so no one gets ideas about cutting us off from the rear..." ｜ 「…但一定要盯好了那群枫丹佬，听说『小指会』最擅长玩阴的，一定要保证这个营地有人驻守，以防让人抄了后路…」
- The House of Daena is the last quiet place in the whole Akademiya now. I was originally planning to stay here a little longer... ｜ 现在整个教令院只有智慧宫算得上清净，本来想在这里多待一会儿…
- Not books? ｜ 书本不行？
- Complete "Mimetic Replication: Weasel" and earn a 1-star rating ｜ 完成「仿生摹行·鼬类」，且获得一星评价
- Awanyu ｜ 「阿万尤」
- You can't change shifts? ｜ 不能换班？
- You misunderstand. I mean you're the extra meal. ｜ 我的意思是，你就是「加餐」。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Continue on your journey and maybe that moment will come to pass. ｜ 就在你接下来的旅途中，去见证那一刻吧。
- Yeah, although, uh... she looks like a bottle right now, you should've asked for her consent first. ｜ 对呀，虽然…呃，虽然她看起来是个瓶子啦…但是应该先问问她的意见才对。
- Or maybe it's because I came to the show with some pre-conceived expectations? I did happen to see the original draft of Merieux's script a while back. ｜ 也有可能是因为我之前看过一点梅里埃的「原剧本」？所以有些先入为主的印象。
- #Wonderful! She should still be trying to fish<color=#00E1FFFF> at the south side of the village</color>... So please, {NICKNAME} give her some pointers! ｜ #那真是太好了！那孩子现在应该还在<color=#00E1FFFF>村子南边</color>尝试钓鱼…就拜托你教教她了，{NICKNAME}！
- <color=#00E1FFFF>Aba mosi dada</color>... If you can't remember what it means, you can just check the handbook, right? ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF> Aba mosi dada</color>…没记住的话，就再查一下手册吧？
- Suspicious Shawarma Wrap ｜ 奇怪的烤肉卷
- A safe way to get Lanoire out of the Fortress of Meropide would be to win a game of Coupon Millionaire, and doing so requires lots of Coupons. Completing commissions may be a good way of obtaining them... Caterpillar likely left leads on the blackboard. Go check it out. ｜ 要将莉诺尔带出梅洛彼得堡，稳妥的做法是在特许券大富翁的游戏中获胜，为此，需要获得大量特许券。接取委托获得报酬或许是获取特许券的有效手段… 卡特皮拉应该在黑板上留下了线索，不妨去看看吧。
- I guess only those who have thoroughly accepted this dream will be able to come here. ｜ 估计只有完全接受了这场梦境的人，才会来到这里。
- #So, I want to ask Nara {NICKNAME} to come with me to the Head Mushroom's habitat. ｜ #那么，我想请求那菈{NICKNAME}随我一同，深入「一头菇」生长的地方。
- Nothing suspicious here, just normal magic props... Let's head in further! ｜ 似乎都是些常见的魔术道具，没有我们要找的线索…我们再往深处看看吧！
- Never mind, then. ｜ 那就算了吧。
- If you ignore those two factors, you're setting yourself up for failure, no matter what your mental state is. ｜ 没有这两个外因，再好的状态也持续不了多久。
- Last time, he got duped into buying and reselling dried Bulle Fruit, and ended up falling into serious debt. Now he's got creditors hounding him day in and day out. ｜ 上次他被人骗去倒卖泡泡桔干，结果桔干没卖出去，反而欠了一大笔账。那些债主每天都在找他麻烦。
- I was very young then, and I remember seeing posters for the Interdarshan Championship all over the city. I couldn't help but mention it to my father. I even told him that I really liked the look of the diadem — it was so unique. ｜ 那时我还小，走在城里看见到处都是学院争霸赛的海报，忍不住向老爹提了这件事。我还说那个冠冕很特别，很漂亮。
- Paimon even paid attention to Finches out in the wild because she played... and she discovered some little quirks that most people miss! ｜ 因为玩过这个桌上游戏，我还在现实中观察过一段时间的团雀呢，然后从团雀身上发现了很多…容易被疏忽的小特点。
- Thanks to you, my soul has become whole, and I now recall everything. Incredible. ｜ 托汝之福，吾现在魂魄完全，已回想起了一切，真是不可思议。
- It sure ran away quickly. ｜ 跑得倒是挺快。
- #Oh, {NICKNAME} and Paimon, I believe Zhongli was heading to Mt. Hulao. So, make sure you're hiking up the right hill! ｜ #哦，对了，{NICKNAME}，派蒙，那个山叫琥牢山，别走错山头了。
- The Duke and Clorinde are gone... ｜ 公爵和克洛琳德不见了…
- Coherent and to the point. Plus, the length seems about right. ｜ 主旨清晰，表达到位，我认为这种长度足够了。

- You must remain calm. Do not allow yourself to be affected by the lingering wrath of bygone gods. ｜ 你们要尽量平心静气，当心不要被魔神邪念所扰。

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启

For each point of Attrition Energy consumed, the amount of healing is increased by 1. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>行动阶段开始时：</color>累积3点「久续之能」。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>敌方角色使用技能后：</color>扣除1点「久续之能」。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>结束阶段：</color>如果计数器「久续之能」不为0，则治疗所有我方角色2点，并消耗所有「久续之能」，每消耗1点「久续之能」就使此治疗量+1。

- The cost of pursuing eternity has been great for the Almighty Shogun... and for all of Inazuma. These wounds will take time to heal, and as someone with a mediating role to play in the political process, I will be sure to fulfill that which is required of me. ｜ 为了追求「永恒」，将军大人以及整个稻妻，都付出了不小的代价。伤口需要时间来愈合，作为政局的调和者，我必然会尽到我的责任。
- I think it's high time you started talking, and what I'd really like to know is... Why did you murder Cesar? ｜ 现在你可以和我们聊聊了吧，我们想听听看…你为什么要杀害塞萨尔。
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Huh? Two children? Paimon thought Baptiste was the only... Ah! You mean... ｜ 咦？两个孩子，我还以为只有巴蒂斯特…啊！难道说…
- Maybe some researcher planned on observing the sea when the sea monsters are out and about. I feel sorry for the people on the ship. ｜ 估计是哪个学者，打算趁着海兽出没出海观察吧，真替船上的人捏把汗。
- Oh no, oh please, oh no, no, no... ｜ 天呐，天呐，这可真是…
- I had an epiphany when I got divorced, and it was like waking from a long dream: the Windblume Festival should never have been associated with love at all! ｜ 自从我离了婚才如梦初醒，风花节和爱情本来就不应该扯上关系的嘛！
- Does she need us to step in or not? ｜ 哎呀，这我们到底是去还是不去呀？

- Since I usually set up my stall by the docks, I avoid perfume like the plague. Because Celestia forbid those lusty sailors catch a whiff and come hunting for the source! ｜ 我平常在码头附近摆摊，可不希望香膏引来更多色眯眯的水手…
- Ugh, I don't know what the higher-ups are thinking, they really should have sent some more people by now. This zone is far too big for only one person... ｜ 唉，也不知道上面是怎么想的，一直没有再派人来这里。我一个人，又怎么能面面俱到呢…
- You... Would you accompany me to witness this world's end and greet the descension of eternal night? ｜ 你…你愿伴随本皇女见证这世间万象的终焉，迎候那永世幽夜的降临吗？
- To be honest I wish I'd grown up here rather than in Liyue Harbor. Life would have been simpler, but more content. ｜ 其实我很希望能出生长大在这里而不是璃月港，那样我会有更平淡但是更幸福的一辈子吧。

- If you keep nagging me with such absurd prices, I will lose my patience. Why don't we settle the deal at the standard rate set by Margaret? ｜ 总是用低价试探我的话，我会生气的哦？还是用玛格丽特小姐定下的标准价格成交吧。
- And now there goes Jeht... What should we do? ｜ 婕德也走掉了，我们该怎么办呢？
- I hope she can... ｜ 希望她能…
- Calling from the Masters of the Night-Wind ｜ 来自烟谜主的使命
- Hello ｜ 初次见面…
- A dated miniature hourglass that serves no practical purpose. It seems as elusive as time itself. ｜ 老旧的微型沙漏，不具有实用性。与岁月一样不可捉摸。
- Linorea has been enraged by that Damestier... again. ｜ 因为莉诺蕾娅「又」被那位达梅婕小姐给气到了。
- Time marches forward relentlessly... People change, traditions change... ｜ 岁月如梭啊…人会变，传统也会变。
- In the few short days it took to prepare for the Sabzeruz Festival, the children have all grown very fond of you. ｜ 准备花神诞祭的这短短几天里，孩子们就都喜欢上你了。
- ...Sounds like you've had an eventful life. Alright, well... my name is Eide. And you are correct — I was once Khaenri'ahn. ｜ …看来你也经历过许多，好吧…我叫埃德，如你所说的，我是曾经的坎瑞亚人。

- Tingfang is waiting for a meal delivery at some place in Qingce Village. You cannot use your wind glider or climb during the delivery, or the food will be damaged. Get it to him in one piece within the time limit. ｜ 订餐的廷方先生正在轻策庄某处等待餐品送达。运送餐品期间不能使用风之翼、不能攀爬，否则餐品会受到损坏。在限定时间内，将餐品完整地送给廷方先生吧。

- Hee-hee! ｜ 嘿嘿！
- A decoration specially for use by the Knights of Favonius alchemy shop. An array of blue and beige colored flowers, it was supposedly created by a certain member of the Logistics Company as an "item to build up the atmosphere." ｜ 骑士团的炼金店铺专用的特别装潢，栽有蓝色与米色的花卉，据说是某位后勤小队队员打造的「氛围营造品」。
- Once you train enough, I'm sure you'll finally be able to fly freely without needing a wind glider! ｜ #等到{NICKNAME}修行有成果了，一定就可以不靠风之翼自由飞行啦！

- A snack shaped like a snapper. Fresh out of the oven, this taiyaki gives off a titillating aroma while it is still a mite scalding to the touch. A single bite causes the sweetness to melt in your mouth instantly. The feeling is akin to watching a fish in a pool bathed in sunset's gleam, its scales attaining a golden sheen. ｜ 鲷鱼形状的点心。刚出炉的时候微微烫手，散发着令人精神振奋的甜香。一口咬下去，甜蜜感瞬间融化在嘴中。仿佛黄昏时分池中的一尾鱼，鳞片上闪耀着温暖的金色光芒。
- Mmhmm. I'd really like to figure that one out too. After all, it might explain where I come from. ｜ 嗯嗯，我也很关心这个问题。毕竟也关乎我的起源。
- Yes, thanks again. You've rescued our entire family... we are indebted to you. ｜ 嗯，再次感谢你，你是我们全家的救命恩人。

- Though... All the places we've been have their own charm, too. It's not like Fontaine is just better than everywhere else, right? ｜ 唔…不过，之前去过的地方，也有各自的特点，倒也不见得枫丹什么都比较好吧？
- With the wind~ ｜ 顺风顺水~
- It's a free-for-all tournament whereby people engage in a hearty fight to celebrate, or simply to eliminate bad luck. It's a festival where both martial artists and monsters put their grievances aside and forget their identities, just to enjoy the sheer excitement of fighting. ｜ 通过酣畅淋漓的打斗，来进行庆祝、或者消除晦气的乱斗大会。无论是武人还是魔物，都能摈弃成见不问身份，在其中为了纯粹的热血而混战的祭典。
- Our problem is, therefore, solved. ｜ 这问题总算解决了。
- My, my... These Mist Flower Corollas are of fine quality indeed. ｜ 嗯…这些冰雾花花朵的质量还真不错。

- Exactly! I dunno why Kinich partnered up with him. Why didn't he pick me instead? ｜ 就是！真不知道基尼奇哥哥怎么会选中那家伙当伙伴，怎么不选我呢？
- Jumpy Dumpty is tons of boom-bang-fun! \nWhen thrown, Jumpy Dumpty bounces thrice, igniting and dealing <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color> with every bounce.\n\nOn the third bounce, the bomb splits into many mines.\nThe mines will explode upon contact with opponents, or after a short period of time, dealing <color=#FF9999FF>AoE Pyro DMG</color>.\n\nStarts with 2 charges.\n\n<i>Jumpy Dumpty is Klee's good friend! She can't help but introduce him to everyone.</i> ｜ 投出带来无限快乐的蹦蹦炸弹！\n蹦蹦炸弹会连续弹跳三次，每次弹跳都会引发爆炸，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n第三次弹跳后，将分裂成许多诡雷。\n诡雷会在接触到敌人或一段时间后爆炸，造成<color=#FF9999FF>火元素范围伤害</color>。\n\n初始拥有2次可使用次数。\n\n<i>蹦蹦是可莉的「好朋友」…可莉总是忍不住向人介绍他们。</i>

- Master also said she hoped that I can take this opportunity to rejoin human society. But now that I'm here, I wonder if I've been removed from the world for too long. There's so much basic knowledge that I lack. ｜ 同时，师父也说，希望我借此机会重新回到人类社会。只是现在看来，我与世隔绝太久，缺少许多常识。
- Says the guy who messed the whole thing up in the first place! ｜ 你可少说两句吧！
- Bye. ｜ 再见。

- I—I don't think it's because they love the wood... ｜ 应该不是喜欢木头…
- How about this? I'll treat you to a meal in two days at the Coupon Cafeteria. We should have a better handle on things by then. ｜ 这样吧，两天后在特许食堂，我请你们吃饭，那时候事情也应该有后续了。
- That's good, that's good. As long as things go well, the Qixing will have no reason to come down too hard on me... ｜ 那就好，那就好，只要没出事，「七星」也不会怪罪得太厉害吧…
- Last time, when we followed you through that door, we were sent out of the Domain... which means not all the doors in this place are real! ｜ 上次跟着你穿过那道门之后，我们就被送出了秘境…说明这个地方的门并不一定都是真门！
- Huh? But aren't you already in first place? ｜ 啊？可是你不是排在第一吗？
- So I come here and wait for the boats from Snezhnaya whenever I have a free moment. I guess it's also a way for me to show how much I miss them. ｜ 我有空了就会来这里等待从至冬国来的船，这也是我寄托自己思念的一种方式。
- Oh, uh... O—Okay! Nice to meet you too, Mi— *ahem* Emilie. ｜ 啊…好、好的！我也很高兴认识你，艾梅…莉埃。

- A Sub-Space Boulder that hangs high in the air. Its core is made of Plaustrite unique to Liyue and it is made by casting rock masses into a moderately-sized floating platform. Its dimensions are just right to fit one house atop it, all the better to enjoy ascetic solitude in the skies. Placing many of these together and adjusting them by height might even help you build a stone stairway to heaven. ｜ 高悬于空中的外景磐石，以璃月特有的「浮生石」为内核，熔铸坚固的岩体，构成尺寸适中的浮空平台，恰能容纳一座房屋，享受云中隐居的空寂。有序排布多座磐石的高度后，还能搭建通往高天的石阶。
- *sigh* I got mad just at the thought of it, but I can't just quit writing. So I came here for peace of mind. ｜ 唉，我想了就来气，但还不能停止工作，所以才来这里图个清静。

- Behind the Scenes ｜ 灯后勤绩
- Please leave the rest to me. If you really are interested in this, I can teach you step by step. ｜ 剩下的请交给我吧…不过如果您想要了解的话，我可以慢慢教您。
- We got good business going between us, it's pretty reasonable, but if you can give us more... I'm sure we all know I'll scratch your back in the future. ｜ 我们的生意很好，很合理，如果多给我们一点…将来感谢的机会，我想朋友们会更能体会到我的诚意。
- Dendro Slimes draw power from the flower on their heads. Burning it off will weaken them. Beware of their ambushes. ｜ 顶端的花朵是力量的源泉，但被烧毁后会变得虚弱。当心被它埋伏！
- Hee-hee, it all makes sense now that you're speaking my language! ｜ 嘿嘿，你这么解释我一下子就明白啦。

- Y—You changed back! ｜ 变、变回来了！
- Fujin's adeptal energy has transformed into many Spirit Carp that are scattered all over Chenyu Vale.\nCollect the energy within Spirit Carp and transfer it into the Votive Rainjade within Carp's Rest to increase its level and obtain the blessings of Chenyu Vale. ｜ 浮锦的仙力化作众多「苍灵鲤」，散落于沉玉谷山野各处。\n收集「苍灵鲤」的仙力，将其汇入锦落庭中的「祀珑」，可以提升其等级，获取沉玉谷水土的赐福。
- Huh. Is that so? ｜ 是、是这样吗？
- This is a big mistake for a magician to make. But thankfully, I do have a backup plan... Now, who wants to hear a story? ｜ 对魔术师来说，这也算是一种「失误」。好在我准备了救场的方案——一个有趣的故事，不知道各位是否感兴趣呢？
- Let's go after him! ｜ 我们也从这里追上去！
- Report back to Cloud Retainer ｜ 向留云借风真君回报
- The situation is grim. We must hurry to the fourth location. ｜ 情况有些严峻。我们赶紧去第四个坐标吧。

- Mascot...? ｜ 吉祥物…
- She knew that I wouldn't be used to the food here, so she changed the taste up for me... That's so sweet of her! ｜ 之前她看出了我吃不惯稻妻的料理，特意为我调整了口味…真是太贴心了！
- Talk to Arama ｜ 与兰罗摩对话
- And even when they do get angry, they never hurt people. The most one will do is butt you lightly with its head... Despite the fact they're strong enough to crack rock. ｜ 不过，就算它们发脾气，也不会伤害人，最多只是用头轻轻顶一下…虽然这一下子就能把山岩撞裂啦。
- If you can convince even him to see your point of view... ｜ 如果连他都能说服…
- I'm afraid that it's true. ｜ 似乎确实如此。

- That's good. I hope it's a little more satisfied with the way I am now, hehe. ｜ 那就最好了，希望现在的我，能让它稍微满意一点，嘿嘿。
- Hmm, I see. Well, Traveler, what do you make of all their opinions? ｜ 这种种意见，在你看来又是如何？
- They are probably used to get sugar. ｜ 说不定只是为了熬糖用的呢，呼呼。

- "In essence, the great battle in space is no different from the armed conflict between commoners which took place ten years ago on that barren planet..." Soon, the name of that man shall be known across the Galaxy, matching that of the Emperor. ｜ 「上演在星海的大战，本质其实与十年前那场贫瘠星球的草民械斗并无二致…」不久后，那个男人的名字，就将和帝国皇帝的名字一样，被整个银河熟知。
- That will involve dealing with different types of buyers... ｜ 这样一来，就要和各种买方打交道了…
- No, nothing... Actually, forget that. Yes, to be quite honest, I really need some help. ｜ 没什么…唔，算了，我确实需要帮助。

- Increases Shield Strength by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>. Scoring hits on opponents increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color> for 8s. Max 5 stacks. Can only occur once every 0.3s. While protected by a shield, this ATK increase effect is increased by 100%. ｜ 护盾强效提升<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>。攻击命中后的8秒内，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>8%</color>。该效果至多可叠加5层，每0.3秒只能触发一次。此外，处于护盾庇护下时，该效果的攻击力提升效果提高100%。

- Whew, that's all the information we could get, Paimon thinks. That was super tiring! ｜ 可算把情报都调查得差不多了，和他们说话真费劲！
- Gorou, you're a lucky dog today! So what is the grand prize, anyway? ｜ 五郎，我发现你今天果然特别走运！说起来，特等奖能得到什么？
- However, I don't have money to buy any lacquerware. That's why I want to make one for myself. ｜ 我没钱买漆器，所以就想要自己做一个。
- Hmm, it seems like the Traveler established a connection to Irminsul. That was a message left by Greater Lord Rukkhadevata's residual consciousness in Irminsul... perhaps her last memory before she died. ｜ 旅行者看来连接上了世界树啊，那是世界树中，大慈树王残余的意识所留下的一段讯息，也或许是她临死前最后的回忆。

- Laetitia ｜ 莱提西娅

- "This magnificent building was once home to the Minghua Bank. It is spacious, enjoys plenty of natural light, and comes with a fantastic sea view. It is being sold for purely financial reasons, and I hope that the new owner makes good use of it." ｜ 「此宅原是明华钱庄故楼，面海朝阳，宽敞气派。今因资金周转缘故转让，望来者好生利用。」
- Glad to hear it. ｜ 喜欢就好。
- That may be so, but still... ｜ 就算是…
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Fontaine's aquabuses are pretty cool. But imagine if they could run without tracks. Then you could go anywhere you want pretty much without having to move a muscle! Traveling would be way less tiring.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>But you already fly everywhere. Does that even get tiring?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Fly... Fly? Wait, that's it! If we could find a way to make the boats float in the air, then they wouldn't need rails anymore. Hehe, and we could call them "airboats"!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>C'mon, let's go apply for one of those, uh... oh yeah — "patents"! We can't let Paimon's genius go to waste. Quick, before someone else beats us to it!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Patents don't work like that... You can't just have a name for your invention. You also need to provide details of the original technical solution that makes your airboats float.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Technical, huh? Hmm... Okay, got it! We just need to attach a giant propeller on top of the boats!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Okay... But how would you prevent the boat from spinning along with the propeller? And how would you control the direction of movement?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Um... Uh... Ugh. Paimon never realized flying was so complicated! It's always been second nature to Paimon...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hmm... Well, there might be an easier solution if we ditch the direction and speed control requirements?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh? Really!?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Yeah. It involves starting at a high altitude and flying downwards at a rapidly-increasing velocity.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hey! That isn't flying, that's free-falling! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>枫丹的「巡轨船」好方便！要是没有轨道也能用就好了，去哪儿都不用自己费力气。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙不是一直在飞吗？也会觉得累吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>飞…飞…对哦！要是能让「巡轨船」飞起来的话，不就不用轨道了吗！嘿嘿，就叫它「飞空船」好了！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>快，我们去申请哪个什么…「专利」！这么天才的点子，可不能让别人抢了先！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>只想出一个名字可申请不了专利啊，还得有能让船飞起来的方案。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>方案吗？唔…比如说…比如说…在船顶安一个巨大的螺旋桨！ \n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>那怎么保证船不会跟着螺旋桨一起转？又怎么控制飞行的方向？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这个…那个…唉，飞行原来是这么麻烦的事吗？我平时都没注意到…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…不过不考虑方向和速度的话，还有一个简单的方案。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？真的吗！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>找一个足够高的出发点，然后向下加速飞。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>喂！那不就是坠落吗！
- If only we had someone from the Children of Echoes here, we could have consulted them about the quality... Though as I see it, they're all pretty much the same anyway. Every kind of material has its use, after all. ｜ 要是有回声之子的人在就好了，可以叫他们去看看石头的品质如何…不过在我看来都大同小异啦，无论什么样的材料都会有用武之地。
- Quick! Follow them! Their encampment must be around here, whatever was hidden in the rock scraps must be there! ｜ 快跟上他们，周围肯定有他们的营地，矿石里的东西一定都在那里！

- (Gah, why do my experiments keep getting interrupted!? I was getting somewhere good, too...) ｜ （可恶，怎么实验总是被打断，明明才刚刚有了起色…）
- You said before that you looked like this because you got sick, after all, everyone has things they'd rather not tell anyone... And you're also so good to Lanoire, and she trusts you too... ｜ 之前你说自己是因为得病才是这副模样，毕竟每个人都有不想告诉别人的事…而且看你对莉诺尔也很好，她也很信任你…
- About Tighnari ｜ 关于提纳里…
- A signature chicken dish in Sumeru. The chicken was first marinated with red spices, and then roasted in a tandoor. The process of making this Sumeru classic does not involve any fancy skills, and the use of such a humble clay oven might be surprising to some. In Sumeru, a tandoor to a veteran chef is as important as a trusty sword to an adventurer. ｜ 须弥特有的禽肉菜肴。不需要任何花哨的技法，只需将被香料腌制成红色的鸡肉放置于土炉中，烤熟即成。很难想象这一经典须弥美味诞生于其貌不扬的土炉之中。据说在须弥，土炉对于老厨师们的重要性，就像是一直陪伴冒险之人出生入死的剑一般。

- And if you were to ask my house, it would argue that it could make better use of the Mora by building yet another storage extension. ｜ 再问一问家里的房子呢，呃，它说可能需要再买一间仓库。
- Th—Then I will go as well! ｜ 那、那我也要去！
- You're thinking of the Dendro Archon, right? My tribe's power over dreams is nothing compared to that of an Archon. ｜ 是须弥的神明大人吧，烟谜主对于梦境的掌握，自然远远不如神明的权能。
- An elegant red cedar bookshelf from Liyue that also has room for porcelain ornaments, hence its name, the "Curio Stand."\nIt is held that the people of Liyue value both porcelain and books, and will rue the loss of both equally.\nHowever, the selection of such earthenware is also a rather particular art, and it might be best to ask a professional regarding the ideal places to put them — Ying'er from Scent of Spring, for instance. ｜ 雅致的璃月书柜，以朱红漆面的「垂香木」制成，留有摆放瓷器饰品的空间，常被称为「百宝阁」。\n有道是璃月人的生活中，瓷器与书画同等重要，不可或缺。\n不过甄选瓷器也有不少讲究，还要在合理的位置摆放，建议咨询行家，比如春香窑的莺儿小姐。
- A drink made from Grainfruit. Originally invented as a type of medicine by a certain shaman of the Masters of the Night-Wind, the recipe has been altered over time and is now a common drink at social gatherings. ｜ 颗粒果制成的饮品。由烟谜主部族的某位萨满发明，最初的目的是为了治病，随着时间流逝配方添添减减，如今已经成为了聚会时的常见饮品。
- Dear Traveler,\nThe "Core of the Apparatus" event will end soon. Please remember to take part and claim your rewards in time~ ｜ 亲爱的旅行者：\n「炉心机造」活动玩法即将结束，欢迎旅行者及时参与活动，获取活动奖励，并兑换摆设~
- Max Duration|{param3:F1}s ｜ 最大持续时间|{param3:F1}秒
- It's only normal, isn't it? Bet you'd be curious too if there was someone you'd heard loads about but never met! Even Master Jean says he's a living legend... Pretty hard not to get hyped up after hearing that. ｜ 很正常吧，如果有一个你经常听说却从没见过的人，你也会非常惦记的嘛！琴团长还老说他是骑士团的「当代传奇」，真吊胃口。
- Oh, no need! You guys look super busy, so we can go find him ourselves. ｜ 不用这么麻烦，你们看起来都很忙，我们自己去找他也行。
- Elemental Burst: I ｜ 元素爆发·其一
- *sigh* I know what you're going to say. Miss Katheryne was just haranguing me back there. I told her that I now understand the situation... More or less. ｜ 唉，我知道你要说什么，凯瑟琳小姐刚刚跟我发了好大一通牢骚，我已经大致明白情况了。
- I heard that Liyue will be hosting a Lantern Rite music festival this year. As a musician myself, how could I possibly resist the temptation to come take a look? ...Or a listen? ｜ 听说璃月今年要办海灯音乐节，我作为诗歌创作者，怎么忍得住诱惑不来看看呢？

- You want to spar with me? Of course, but no complaining if you lose! ｜ 哦呀，想和本堂主切磋一下？好呀，别说我欺负你噢？
- I'm just saving time, Kimosi. This is hardly the moment for storytelling — we're right in the middle of investigating the recent thefts at the Tephric Ruins. ｜ 省点时间吧，基莫西，现在可不是讲故事的时候，我们本来是来调查「喷发遗迹」最近的失窃案件。

- Your help would be much appreciated! Let's search the nearby area, I'm sure we'll find some in no time. ｜ 你们愿意帮忙的话，那就最好了，我们一起到周围找一找，应该很快就找齐了。
- We're looking to start a housekeeping class at the Commission headquarters. I was just wondering whether that might be something that interests you. ｜ 是这样的，我们最近打算在社奉行所开办一个家政课堂，不知道两位有没有兴趣。
