- "Of course, the old rules still apply, and all ingredients for the competition will be provided from stores of soon-to-expire food by the granary, so feel free to eat to your heart's content! Every stomach left unfilled is a lifelong regret!" ｜ 「当然啦，老规矩我们也不会忘，本次大赛使用的食材依旧是由谷仓提供的临期食材，大家一定要放开吃！不要留下任何遗憾！」
- ...Hmm? ｜ 咦？
- Hmm, which way is it from here...? ｜ 该往哪里走呢…
- Leave it to me. ｜ 交给我吧。
- Though she is of noble birth, Keqing tries to keep her luxuries to the bare minimum that would befit her position as one of the Liyue Qixing.\nAnd when she is outside the borders of the prosperous city, she will often head deep into uninhabited areas to strengthen her knowledge and sharpen her will.\nShe has experienced countless challenges, but unlike backpackers and adventurers, she does not bring anything with but her hairpin and her sword.\nAs long as it is infused with Electro, a hairpin can become a knife of unmatched sharpness. Cutting grass, chopping firewood, skinning game, and carving bone are all well within its capabilities.\nIf faced with a drop of great height, she only needs to pin it into the ground, tie rattans to it, and rappel down.\nIt also serves as an incredibly sensitive security device when camping out. Any unusual movements nearby will cause it, when tipped over and placed perpendicular to the ground, to alert and awaken Keqing immediately.\nIt can even be used to fish: Keqing just hurls it into the water when she's feeling peckish, and there will always be a few fish that will get knocked out by the electric shock — and of course, finding a stick to grill the fish on is not a problem either.\nSome narrow-minded folk have ridiculed Keqing's hairpin for being old and worn, but this does not anger her. Indeed, she considers it a point of pride.\n"Its weathered form is what gives it its charm." ｜ 贵族大小姐出身的刻晴目前保持着身份所需最低限度的奢华，以匹配她璃月七星的地位。\n而在繁荣市井之外，她常常会深入荒无人烟之地，博物强识，磨砺意志。\n她曾亲历无数险境，但与冒险家和背包客不同的是，她的征程上没有大包小袋，只有发簪与佩剑形影不离。\n只要附着雷元素力，发簪就能化为一柄锐利无比的小刀。割草砍柴自不用说，为猎物剥皮剔骨之类粗活也是小菜一碟。\n若是遇上高低落差过大的地势，只需将发簪钉入地面，绑上藤条，就能轻松速降。\n在野外露宿时，睡前将发簪颠倒直立于地面，就是极为敏锐的警报装置，只要身边有异常的风吹草动，它就能马上唤醒刻晴。\n甚至当肚子饿了，刻晴只需向水中扔出发簪，总有几条倒霉的鱼被电晕过去——连烤鱼的竹签都不用准备了。\n若是有没见识的人调侃刻晴的发簪稍显陈旧，品相不佳，她不仅不生气，还会表现得格外骄傲。\n「它沾染风霜的模样，才是最有魅力的。」

Can be triggered even when the character is not on the field. ｜ 元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>10.5%</color>。元素战技命中后，角色流失3点元素能量，并在此后的6秒内，每2秒恢复<color=#99FFFFFF>4.5</color>点元素能量。该效果每10秒至多触发一次，角色处于队伍后台也能触发。

- Legends say that the first Lochknight concealed themselves in the remote wilderness with the Lochfolk, intending to use self-exile and rigorous training in an attempt to repay a sin fated to be beyond redemption. Now the land has long returned to deathly silence, with the long, chill winds still blowing through the deserted valley. ｜ 传说最初的纯水骑士曾与精灵隐遁于僻幽的荒野，意图以自我放逐与苦修来偿清注定无法赎还的罪业。如今此地早已再度归于死寂，唯有凄冷的风依然如初吹过空寂的幽谷。

- To Lan Yan's mind, the process of weaving rattan goods is a simple one.\nThe first step is to gather enough vines.\nIn the verdant mountains, the first rays of the morning sun are the purest, and as the last birds to rise lend their voices to the dawn chorus, Lan Yan sets off towards the wooded slopes with her trusty bamboo basket and pruning knife in hand.\nThe vines like to grow where the soil is moist, though whether they prefer to bask in the sunlight or take shelter in the shade appears to be a matter of temperament and personal preference.\nDifferent vines are suited to the weaving of different objects. A folding screen, for example, requires a certain stubborn resilience. Lan Yan often looks for such vines in old-growth forests, with their ancient trees towering high overhead — to climb and cling on to such imposing trees requires a more rugged constitution.\nIn contrast, a woven flower basket calls for vines of a more supple nature. These vines are often found by the water's edge, where the thirsty rattan palms send out myriad soft offshoots that cover the ground like a carpet. Such soft vines can be bent to form the shape of a basket without snapping.\nOnce enough vines have been collected, it is time to return home and process them.\nThe woody cores can be used to shape and weave a solid frame, while the skin, once peeled away, can be woven into a fabric-like material that helps give rattan goods their finished shape. Both of these materials must first be washed and dried.\nLan Yan likes to sing while she soaks and stirs the rattan strips — and as she pulls them out of the water, one by one, to dry them in the courtyard. Sometimes her mother and father will join her, and they will talk and laugh while they lay the strips out in the sun.\nOnce the cores and skins have been processed, then comes the most crucial part of the process — weaving.\nRattan weaving requires significant concentration — warp and weft, along and across. From a pile of cores and strips of skin, a perfectly sculpted object begins to take shape.\nLan Yan views the fruits of her labor not so much as products, but as living entities, lovingly birthed by her hands.\nEven if two of her creations might appear indistinguishable to an outside observer, she can tell them apart by the subtle changes in touch and force applied, the order of her weaving, or the emotions she felt while she made them. Each of her rattan children has its unique feel.\nWhile weaving, Lan Yan maintains a singular focus on her task. She is not easily distracted by idle chatter, nor the excited cries of her neighbors' cats and dogs, nor graceful swallows swooping beneath the eaves. There are times — perhaps to escape the noise — when she will take her work to a familiar mountainside to sit in silence and weave.\nUnlike her family at home, the flowers, birds, fish, and insects that roam freely in the forested hills feel no need to leave a quiet space for Lan Yan to weave in.\nThe most mischievous offenders are the little foxes, who, indulging their natural curiosity, come to watch Lan Yan as she works, nudging and sniffing at her jugs and jars, spilling her varnish and inadvertently waterproofing their paws.\nThe panicked foxes then trample on the flower basket she has been weaving, leaving shiny paw prints in their wake. Thanks to this unique touch — the innocence of the wilderness — this basket will become one of Lan Yan's favorite creations.\nThat is how rattan weaving is — simple yet never boring, and this experience is one of Lan Yan's most cherished and happiest moments in a life spent devoted to her craft. ｜ 蓝砚觉得编藤的工序并不复杂。\n首先她需要采集足够数量的藤枝。\n清晨山中的阳光最纯净，一些晚起的鸟儿会在太阳完全升起后才开始歌唱，蓝砚往往会在这时候带着竹筐和砍刀，进山采藤。\n藤类喜好在湿润的环境中生长，有些藤喜阳，有些藤耐阴，就像人的脾气一样千奇百怪。\n不同的藤适合用来编不同的器皿。编屏风用的藤需要硬挺一些，蓝砚会去古老的树林中寻找，那里的树木长得高大，攀附在树木上的藤也生得更有骨气。\n编花篮的藤需要柔软一些，蓝砚会去水边寻找，那里的藤会伸出无数柔软的枝桠，在地面上铺展开薄薄一层网，这种藤枝条柔韧，易弯不折。\n采集完毕后就该回家处理藤枝了。\n藤芯和去了皮的藤枝用来塑形，藤皮编出的块面用来维形，都得先洗后晒。\n蓝砚喜欢边唱歌边搅和大缸里的藤条，再把它们一把把捞出来，铺在院子里干燥的地上。有时候蓝砚的爸爸妈妈也会来帮忙，一边聊些家常一边帮忙晒藤。这个步骤中的笑声最多，也最简单。\n初步处理好藤枝与藤皮之后，来到了最重要的编织步骤。\n编藤是一个需要高度集中的步骤，在一经一纬、一横一竖的织造中，一个本无骨骼、也不具形貌的器皿在她的手下诞生。\n蓝砚并不仅仅把它们当作自己的作品，而是从自己手下诞生的新生命。\n即便它们形制完全相同，外人眼中根本看不出区别，但她自己知道，在编织时她下手轻重不同，先编了某一面后编了另一面，编这一只腰包时心里欢欣，编那一只时心里沉静，都会使这些新生命有不同的气质。\n这时候的蓝砚不常与家人闲聊，只是专心编藤，邻居家来串门的猫儿、狗儿还有过路的燕子都无法让她分心。偶尔她也会带上工具与原料，去自己熟悉的山头上安安静静坐着编藤。\n山上的花鸟鱼虫自由得很，并不会像她的家人一样自觉给蓝砚留出安静的空间。\n最调皮的是小狐狸，经常有那么几只好奇的狐狸过来瞧蓝砚做活，小狐狸们到处嗅探、用爪子推搡她带上山的瓶瓶罐罐，弄得蓝砚带来的清漆被洒得到处都是，本来这些漆是要被刷到器皿上用以防水的，现在它们全都被沾到了小狐狸们的爪子上了。\n被吓坏的小狐狸们惊恐地把爪子按到了她刚编好的花篮上，给花篮表面留下了几个亮晶晶的爪印，反而显得野趣盎然，后来成为了蓝砚最喜欢的作品之一。\n编藤就是这样一件简单有趣的事，也是蓝砚至今的生命中最快乐的事之一。

- In those days, a new nation had just been born, and as far as we were concerned, the possibilities were yet endless. ｜ 那时，新的国度刚刚诞生，对于我们而言还有着无数的可能性。

- Don't worry, we're very familiar with the area. We won't miss any clues! ｜ 放心，我们对这里很熟悉，不会错过任何可疑的线索的！
- To live a peaceful and comfortable life, one must meet a few requirements first: Congruous personality and logic, adequate fighting prowess, a slow-paced job, and a cushy house in the vicinity of one's office.\nAlhaitham has checked all the boxes above. He would never deny that no place suits him better than the Nation of Wisdom, where social capital is linked to one's academic abilities.\nHis current house, which is located near the Akademiya, is one of the academic resources that he gained through promising research projects. This house's story dates back to Alhaitham's student years. If his classmates still remember him, they will recall that he was not one to mingle with the crowd. As a result, he has only participated in one joint research project. Despite its eventual success, the project resulted in a huge quarrel and a parting of ways. Little do people know about Alhaitham's part in this story, though they might be acquainted with the other protagonist: The Kshahrewar architect Kaveh.\nThis academic incident is not very widely-known — and in truth, the tale of two geniuses falling out due to differing perspectives is an all-too-familiar one in the Akademiya. But even though their collaboration did fall through, neither of them will deny the other party's exceptional brilliance. As for their research, the Akademiya would later transfer the relevant assets to the researchers involved as per regulation.\nAlthough the two did not continue that research, its great success in the early stage still serves as compelling proof of Alhaitham's academic ability. Later, the Akademiya even used this project, which they had forgotten to cancel, as a reference for allocating housing resources, and as such, Alhaitham was given a very decent house befitting his participation in this ingenious project. But the other contributor, Kaveh, had never approached Alhaitham regarding that allocation. It wasn't until later that Kaveh had someone inform Alhaitham and the Akademiya that he was not in want of a house and thus had no use of this property.\nWhen next they met, Kaveh had gone bankrupt. According to Alhaitham, this former friend of his possesses a personality and values that are not congruous with his abilities. The two differ on too many things and cannot reach a consensus even today.\nAllowing Kaveh to stay in this house provides Alhaitham with an interesting research topic: Legally and socially speaking, since Kaveh has previously forfeited the right to his half of this house, he should pay the landlord during his stay. However, paying rent would, to some extent, deny his contribution to the research, which contradicts the academic spirit.\nAn intriguing matter to consider, but Alhaitham has no interest in the answer. Thus, he has taken his broke former colleague in, collects rent as the rightful landlord, and gives his colleague some household chores. He is well aware of the dissatisfaction Kaveh might have, but it matters not to him. As far as Alhaitham is concerned, Kaveh is a familiar face, similarly lacks familial attachments, and is the polar opposite of himself as a scholar — that is to say, an excellent mirror. Human vision is limited, but it can be perfected through the presence of another genius. Taking this opportunity, Alhaitham will be able to observe other aspects of this world and thus understand more things that may have otherwise been unfathomable. ｜ 想过上平静舒适的生活，需要满足几个条件：自洽的人格与逻辑、适当的战斗能力、悠闲的工作，以及一处离办公室近又极度宜居的房产。\n上述几点，艾尔海森早就达到。任何时候他都不会否认，他适合生活在学术能力与社会资源挂钩的学者之国。\n艾尔海森如今的住处位于教令院附近，是靠优质课题得来的学术资源之一。说到这套房子，难免要提及他学生时代曾参与过的课题。同届学生若还记得艾尔海森，应该知道他不是喜欢参加集体活动的人。至于他唯一一次与他人合作研究，哪怕课题无比成功，结局也是大吵一架分道扬镳。人们未必清楚艾尔海森是这个故事的主角之一，却可能认识与他闹翻拆伙的那个合作者：妙论派建筑设计师卡维。\n这起学术事件流传并不广，说到底，在教令院这种地方，两位天才因性格观念不合无法继续维持合作可不是什么稀罕事。不过即使合作关系破裂，双方也不会否认彼此有着难得一见的聪明头脑。至于当年被搁置的合作课题，后来也依照相关规定被归入研究发起人名下资产。\n散伙后，双方都没再对该课题付出什么精力，但它前期是那样成功，为艾尔海森的学术能力做了强有力证明，以至于后来教令院评估分配房产资源时也将这忘记被取消的课题列为参考，给他和他的这项课题配备了一套相当不错的住宅。而课题的另一成员卡维，起初根本没来找他商量过资源所属问题，日后才得知，卡维已托办事员转告院方及艾尔海森：自己已有住处，用不到该资产。\n很久不联系，再见面时卡维已经破产。艾尔海森对这位从前的朋友评价是：拥有与能力不相称的观念和性格。他们对太多事物的观点背道而驰，至今仍无法达成一致。\n让卡维暂住家中成了一个相当有趣的议题：已知一个人拥有某资产的部分份额又已自愿放弃，从法律及社会角度来说，他来这里借住理应缴纳房租，但从学术角度来说，付租金一事或多或少是否认了他在研究中的所有努力，并不符合学术精神。\n思考这件事很有趣，不过艾尔海森不关心答案。他收留破产的前课题合作者，理所当然地收取租金，还将一些日常琐事抛给对方处理。他当然知道卡维会对此有怨言，那也没什么。在艾尔海森看来，与一个同样没什么家人、相互知根知底又和自身截然相反的学者接触，等同于看见镜子的另一面。人的视觉从不是完美完整的，但通过另一个天才，就有可能达到。以此为切入点，他将观察到世界的其他面，继而理解更多原本无法看透的事物。

All three factors must be present, making it exceedingly difficult to replicate the glory of the Zubayr Theater anywhere else... ｜ 闳阔的圆形舞台，以祖拜尔剧场为摹本，还原了建筑的整体设计，只差部分摆件和装饰，就与那座著名的剧场别无二致。\n当然，对于一场成功的演出而言，舞台上的陈设、热爱这份事业的剧团成员、以及长年累月的磨合与练习，三者缺一不可。要想在别处重现祖拜尔剧场的辉煌绝非易事…

- An Inazuman metal stove made using traditional techniques. Its design is quite compact and can be moved about quite easily. It is very commonly used, and it is claimed that it can heat a wok about twice the diameter of the stove mouth with great efficacy.\nInazuma once had a period in which "raw foods" were all the rage, and while some fish did indeed have very delicious meat and eating raw food does provide some fine variety, one eats like this long-term at the risk of catching certain diseases. Such raw food would, in turn, depart from the central core of Inazuman gourmet when these inexpensive and easy-to-use stoves came into vogue. ｜ 采用传统设计的铁制稻妻炉具，较为紧凑，便于搬运，据说能将尺寸两倍于炉口的铁锅有效加热，泛用性极强。\n稻妻曾经历过一段「生食」盛行的时期，虽说某些鱼类的肉质鲜美，偶尔尝试生吃，别有一番风味，但长期如此，必然会付出罹患各种疾病的代价。这种便宜好用的炉灶流行开来后，「生食」也就逐渐离开了美食屋台的核心位置。

- An opposing piece based on a Electro Hilichurl Shooter.\nHaniyyah was once forced to flee in a bad state after being shot by electrified arrows while playing with her Fungi buddies by the water. It is said that this gave Souka inspiration for the former's current fluffy hairstyle...\nThe Lil' Electro Hilichurl Shooter will deal Electro damage using its arrows. ｜ 以「雷箭丘丘人」为原型设计的对手棋子。\n海妮耶在水边和蕈兽伙伴们玩耍时，曾被丘丘人远远射来的雷箭电击，难得狼狈一回。据说这给了左右加灵感，设计了她现在蓬松微卷的发式…\n「小小雷箭丘丘人」会射出造成雷元素伤害的箭矢。

- Aimed Shot|{param5:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param5:F1P}
- Corrosion Resistance {0}.\n{1} Max Bokuso Box Energy.\nThe Bokuso Box can disperse greater darkness.\nThe Bokuso Box will mark out nearby Tokoyo Legumes and Aphotium Ore on the minimap.\nUsing the Bokuso Box will also mark out nearby treasure chests and challenges on the minimap. ｜ 抗侵蚀强度 {0}。\n睦疏之匣能量上限 {1}。\n睦疏之匣可驱散更强大的黑雾。\n睦疏之匣会在小地图上标记周围的常世之荚和渊海髓矿的位置。\n使用睦疏之匣，会在小地图标记周围的宝箱和挑战的位置。
- I shall lead the way. Our path gets smoother the further we proceed, it would seem. ｜ 接下来的路由我来指引就好，看来前路越来越顺利了呢。
- I know that many of the younger generation see me as a sort of legendary figure. Why, my stories and my accomplishments can even be found in Kshahrewar textbooks. ｜ 在很多后辈看来，我也算是个「传说中的人物」了，妙论派教材还有我履历呢。
- Ohh... how unfortunate. I shouldn't have gotten greedy. After all, in the long run, gambling is always a losing game. 50 thousand Mora, my goodness... ｜ 嘿哟，倒霉。我不该贪的，不赌就是赢的道理都忘了，五万摩拉啊，唉。
- We were just about to ask you the same thing! We didn't expect to run into you in these parts. ｜ 我们也很意外呢，没想到会在这里碰到你。你来「花羽会」做什么？
- Ah, Master was so happy then... ｜ 那时，主人多快乐呀…
- The Pari once scattered across the land seem to have all returned. ｜ 嗯，流散在大地上的花灵，似乎都已经回到花海来了。
- Go to the submission event to listen to what the readers like ｜ 在征文现场打听读者喜好
- You're back. How's it going? Did you manage to get those pictures? ｜ 你回来了，怎么样？你记录到画片了吗？
- Guardian's Clock ｜ 守护座钟
- Don't worry, everyone, we can do it! ｜ 没事，我们可以的！
- Whether on the battlefield or off it, Kokomi tries to "know thy enemy" as much as possible.\nShe tends to predict all possible scenarios beforehand and devise strategies to address them, which are then delivered as directives to those who enforce her will.\nThis has given rise to the issue of some of these directives being rather thick and heavy, but this method has guaranteed the stable development of Watatsumi Island.\nToday, Watatsumi Island moves each day towards greater prosperity, and as more talented people have been appointed to office, the directives that Kokomi has to deliver have decreased.\nAs far as she is concerned, that is something worth celebrating. ｜ 无论身处战场内外，心海都力争做到「料敌于先」。\n事前就推断所有可能出现的状况，将每一种对策都汇编成锦囊，交给执行者去落实。\n虽然因此造成了部分锦囊过于厚重的问题，但这种方式也为海祇岛安稳发展提供了保证。\n如今，海祇岛日渐繁荣，越来越多有才志士得到任用，心海派发的锦囊也逐日减少。\n在心海眼中，这是一件值得高兴的事情。
- I'll take note. ｜ 我们会注意的。
- What made her angry this time... ｜ 莉诺蕾娅怎么又生气了…
- Then he took the kid's candy as his prize and ate it right there in front of him. ｜ 还赢走了这个孩子手里的硬糖，当着他的面吃掉了。
- CD|{param3:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param3:F1}秒
- Energy Regeneration|{param4:F1} ｜ 元素能量恢复|{param4:F1}
- What are you doing here? ｜ 你在这里做什么呢？
- The predeparture preparations are complete. It's time to go to the location you and Mualani agreed on... ｜ 出发前的准备都已经完成，是时候前往与玛拉妮约定好的地点了…
- And, in the process, you forgot... ｜ 却偏偏忘了…
- Signora, the Eighth of the Fatui Harbingers.\nUnlike other Fatui who use the authority granted by Delusions, her Delusion is meant to shackle a flame that will devour everything. As opposed to a weapon used to kill, it might be more fitting to consider this a tool of imprisonment.\nAnd it was the embers of that flame, which had accumulated over many long years, that would break through the frosty seal of the Delusion and apply a warped rouge upon her.\n\nThe crimson dawn was reflected in her pupils, and at last, she unfolded her flaming wings and flew towards the light.\n<i>"But that light is not the dawn, dear Rosalyne. That is a sea of flame that will consume everything."</i>\nA voice spoke to her amidst the light.\n\nYet it mattered not, for she knew in her heart that the flames had devoured her long ago. ｜ 愚人众执行官第八席的「女士」。\n与行使邪眼之权能的其他愚人众不同，邪眼是抑制啃噬一切的烈火的器物。比起厮杀用的兵器，说是刑拘道具才更为贴切。\n而这就是漫长的岁月中积郁的余烬，冲破邪眼霜封后为她涂抹的扭曲妆容。\n\n瞳仁中倒映着破晓的赤红，她最后展开烈焰之翼向黎明飞去。\n<i>「但那并不是曙光，亲爱的罗莎琳。那是焚尽一切的火海。」</i>\n在光芒中，一个声音这么对她说。\n\n但这也没什么所谓。因为她心中明白，自己早已被烈火吞没。
- In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Complete "Springtide Advent: Show of Force" and obtain a score of {param3} in "Theater Mechanicus" during the "Hues of the Violet Garden" event ｜ 在「堇庭华彩」活动中，完成「机关棋谭」的「春几回·小试锋芒」并获得{param3}评分
- "They..." Warning. Functions damaged. Shutdown imminent... "Ah, looks like this machine is..." ｜ 「它们…」警告，机能受损，即将关闭…「啊，看来这台机体…」
- Good thing Tighnari's nose is so sharp... Has he been in this kind of situation a lot before? ｜ 多亏了提纳里嗅觉灵敏…啊，难道说，这也是在野炊中时常会发生的事吗？
- It's not every day you come to Liyue. Let's keep looking and see what else we can find. ｜ 难得来璃月，我们顺路过去看看吧，可能还会有其他的好东西。
- Furnishing ｜ 摆设
- That was close! I thought you were gonna get left behind... I'm so glad you're okay, that was terrifying... ｜ 刚才真是千钧一发呀！差点以为魈要留在里面了…幸好你没事，吓死我了…
- ... ｜ ……
- Fully-Charged Aimed Shot|{param7:P} ｜ 满蓄力瞄准射击|{param7:P}
- Found the key yet? ｜ 钥匙找到了吗？
- Are you sure? This must be really important to you. ｜ 真的可以吗？对优菈来说，这是很重要的东西吧。
- Are you okay...? ｜ 你没事吧…
- Mr. Bai ｜ 「白老先生」
- But what if they don't make it in time...? ｜ 这样真的来得及吗？
- Hey, we asked out of kindness! ｜ 喂，我们是出于好心才问的！
- You still keep Lily company? ｜ 你还在陪莉莉玩？
- Let's head inside and see! ｜ 我们也进去看看吧！

- A machine created from the union between Fontaine's intricate device and special energy technologies. Based on whether it's imbued with <color=#FFE14BFF>ousia or pneuma</color> energy, the machine will operate differently in battle. When either energy is annihilated upon being <color=#FFE14BFF>attacked by its opposite</color>, an Overloaded state will be induced, causing the machine to lose energy and its combat capabilities. ｜ 基于枫丹的精密装置技术与特殊的能源技术，制造出的机械。基于其外显的<color=#FFE14BFF>荒性或芒性</color>能源特征，在战斗中能采取不同的行动；而这种能量特征在被<color=#FFE14BFF>对立性质的攻击</color>湮灭后，将会因为供能过载而失能，失去战斗能力。
- Season Fortune Slip ｜ 本期签文
- I told Dehya to just stay at our place when she took one of those jobs a few days ago. ｜ 这几天她接了我家的工作，我就让她直接在家里住下了。
- Ah, it's you, youngster. ｜ 哎呀，年轻人，是你。
- "Fantastical amber that, upon being shattered, will summon a sudden torrent of rainfall. This should come in handy..." ｜ 「奇妙的琥珀，敲碎以后会在附近降下大雨，应该可以利用…」
- {0} Exploration Progress: {1}% ｜ {0}探索进度{1}%
- But there's a chance that you'll unearth some Iron Coins while you're looking for treasure... ｜ 但是你在挖宝藏的时候，也许有时候会发现「铁钱」…
- Yeah! Your teammates left you high and dry, and you made sure they didn't feel guilty about it! ｜ 我也想说，就连那些狠心把你丢下的人，你也一直在帮他们开脱。
- Corrosion Resistance increased to {0}.\nThe Bokuso Box can now <color=#FFCC33FF>directly mark</color> the locations of Three Realms Gateway Offering <color=#FFCC33FF>treasure chests</color> and <color=#FFCC33FF>challenges</color> ({1} maximum at one time). ｜ 抗侵蚀强度提升至{0}。\n睦疏之匣可<color=#FFCC33FF>直接标记</color>出「三界路飨祭」中<color=#FFCC33FF>宝箱</color>和<color=#FFCC33FF>挑战</color>的位置（最多可同时标记{1}个）。
- Complete Incandescent Tempura on Playful Leisure ｜ 成功通过「线香烟火天妇罗」乐玩难度
- A ruined Khaenri'ahn workshop.\nOne imagines that it might have other titles in their language. ｜ 曾属于坎瑞亚人的遗迹工坊。\n在他们的语言中应该有着其他名号吧。
- Find a way to disperse the purple mist and save Mihir ｜ 设法驱散紫雾，解救米希尔
- I've found a nice spot for the setting. Let's get going then. ｜ 取景地我已经选好了，我们赶紧出发吧。
- "Houilles" ｜ 「维耶」
- Will you not open your eyes to the truth? It was Remus who betrayed us, betrayed Phobos. That was the true prelude to tragedy. ｜ 你还不肯睁开眼睛好好看看事实吗？是雷穆斯背叛了我们，背叛了「福波斯」，这才是悲剧的序章。
- A three-legged cup. Once, many heroes were gathered around the bonfire, raising their cups high in toast and drinking their fill while discussing their wishes and ambitions. ｜ 陶制的三足杯，曾有诸多英雄在篝火边举杯酣饮，谈论各自的野心与期冀。
- So what were they? Monsters or something...? ｜ 那是…妖怪？
- Yeah! Honestly, Paimon was at a complete loss when she saw so many sick people on the hot-air balloon platform. ｜ 是呀。其实在气球台子上见到那么多精神失常的战士，我们也不知道该怎么办才好。
- You're good people. I can see that... But my brother and those two were... friends. ｜ #{NICKNAME}{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}和派蒙姐姐一看就是好人，但我哥哥…他和刚才那个两个人是…同伙。
- I never knew you had such a sharp tongue... ｜ 真看不出你原来是如此牙尖嘴利之人…
- So Paimon thinks you probably shouldn't use your elemental abilities during the tournament. Y'know, just to avoid any misunderstandings. ｜ 为了不被误解，你在比武的时候也不要使用元素力吧。
- Go to open the door to the gunpowder storehouse ｜ 前往打开火药库房的大门
- Reward for reaching Reputation Lv. 4 (Fontaine) ｜ 枫丹的声望等级达到4级时获取。
- Fully-Charged Aimed Shot|{param5:P} ｜ 满蓄力瞄准射击|{param5:P}
- Something... for us? ｜ 送给我们？为什么？
- Good Morning ｜ 早上好…
- Please come visit me more with Sorush! ｜ 请多多和斯露莎姐姐一起来玩哦！
- But I'm just an ordinary person with ordinary abilities. The best I can do is to do some sweeping around the Cathedral. ｜ 我是个普通人，只能做一些力所能及的事。比如为教堂做清洁…
- Researcher ｜ 学者
- Combat ｜ 战斗
- Remember to enjoy the scenery while you're on the way there! ｜ 你沿途过去的话，也要记得看看美景哦。
- Here, is this what you're looking for? If I'm not mistaken, it's used exclusively for ritual purposes. ｜ 客人看看，是这个吗？我没记错的话，这是一种祭祀专门香。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Kid Kujirai has something to share... ｜ 鲸井小弟有什么事情想要分享…
- In that case, let me try again — this time using both Leyla's body and the shard as mediums. ｜ 既然如此，我要再试一次，用勒拉的身体与这块碎片一起当作媒介。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- For any passengers in the mood for a shopping spree, Bertin's House of Curiosities and Damoville Purveyor are both excellent options with a wide variety of Fontaine's specialty goods available. ｜ 如果乘客想要尽情消费，大肆采购枫丹的特色商品…白棠珍奇屋和达莫维百货都是不错的去处。
- Hey! These Secret Source Servants... ｜ 咦，这些秘源龙仆…
- Paimon neither! This is a real surprise... ｜ 是呀是呀，这可真让人意外…
- So I released a few Sumeru-native Anglers into Cider Lake before going to my business meeting. ｜ 所以我在谈生意前，往果酒湖里放生了几条须弥的特产「角鲀」。
- Witness the awesome meteorological power of Bennett's phenomenally bad luck. ｜ 见证班尼特足以影响天气的厄运。
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Whatever the case, please take these as a token of my thanks, and go put on some extra layers. ｜ 请拿上这些报酬，赶快回去多添点衣服吧。
- Domain of Mastery: Thundering Valley ｜ 精通秘境：初雷幽谷
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- That's right. We were worried when it happened and organized a search party. ｜ 确实是这样。当时，我们都很担心，所以组织了搜救队进入森林。
- Obtained from Limited-Time Event ｜ 限时活动获取
- Gifts and Gifts in Return ｜ 赠礼与回礼
- For now, why don't I take you to see Estienne? He's a guard, but he's cool, if you catch my drift! ｜ 至于现在嘛，不如我带你们去见见艾蒂安。虽然是看守，不过我真想叫他一声好兄弟！
- Duration|{param2:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param2:F1}秒
- What sort of end are we talking about? ｜ 什么结局？
- Fate is called such precisely because it cannot be altered or reversed. ｜ 无法更改，不可违逆。正因如此，命运才是命运。
- Ha. Whatever happens, I look forward to seeing her coming performance. ｜ 呵呵，不管怎么说，就让我期待一下她这次的表现吧。

### Part 099

- Any musician who wishes to attain greatness must study the musical theory left behind by Remuria. ｜ 雷穆利亚文明留下来的乐理可以说是每一个想要在音乐上有所造诣的音乐家的必修课。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param8:P}/{param9:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param8:P}/{param9:P}
- So, if our research data from before can be retrieved, I'll be able to think of a way to persuade my supervisor to restore the Hydrology Monitoring Department... ｜ 所以，要是能回收先前的研究数据，我就能想办法说服主管，让她重新恢复原本的水文监测部门…
- You're injured? ｜ …你受伤了？
- So be it. We shall use the upgraded Guizhong Ballista to fight off that god. All the adepti here can lend their strength to man it. ｜ 如此一来，我们就能用「新归终机」对抗魔神。在场的诸位仙家，也都能够为它注入仙力。
- ...If her true identity was exposed, she and her brother would face pressure from both Snezhnaya and Fontaine. ｜ …如果身份暴露，她跟弟弟就得承受至冬和枫丹两方的压力。
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- Yo, good morning. I'm about to head off, coming with me? ｜ 哟，早。我准备出发了，一起来？
- I want to... make wine, and find answers. ｜ 我想，自己酿酒，找答案。
- Hilichurl Peculiarities ｜ 丘丘人的怪癖
- Very persuaded indeed! ｜ 感兴趣！
- Eh, not that great... How about you try it? ｜ 马马虎虎嘛…你自己也尝尝？
- Shikanoin Heizou ｜ 鹿野院平藏
- Well, then you might as well move out of my house. ｜ 那不妨从我家搬出去。
- Duniya ｜ 度尼娅
- Achieve victory on Dire difficulty within {param4}s ｜ 在{param4}秒内赢得「极意」难度比试
- Boon of Crystal Flame ｜ 晶焰之祝
- Nothing but the usual minor problems one runs into while on the road. ｜ 都是旅途中的小事。
- Little Guy? ｜ 小家伙？
- See that rock up ahead? Yeah, that one! Let's pass it from the left side! ｜ 前面那块石头，对就是这块，从左边经过它就好！
- Treacherous Thunder IV: Mighty thunder will strike character ｜ 危险落雷IV：将降下强大的落雷攻击角色
- That's also strange. Of course, everyone has different perceptions of the passage of time... but how could one person feel like it's only been 1 day and someone else 20 days? ｜ 这里也有问题。不同人对时间流逝的感知不一样…就算有个体差异，也不应该差这么多才对。
- The seal? ｜ 封印？
- What now? ｜ 还有什么事？
- Well, maybe then she could... reconsider what she really wanted in her life. ｜ 那时候奥蕾丽，就可以重新考虑关于她自己的事了吧。
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 6 ｜ 好感等级达到6后开启
- Unable to analyze the density of the substance before us. It appears to have a mass of... zero. ｜ 无法从密度分析眼前的物质。似乎重量为…零。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Find the treasure area indicated by the Illumiscreen ｜ 找到「玲珑霄灯图」上标注的藏宝地
- A graceful bird with broad wings and slender legs.\nIt has beautiful violet feathers and enjoys walking across streams or paddy fields in silence. It is referred to as the "Uraume Bird" in ancient Inazuma songs. Once present everywhere, they seem to have become more and more rare. Perhaps the Realm Within can provide a suitable place for them to rest. ｜ 高贵优雅的鸟类，生着宽阔的双翼与修长的腿。\n长着堇色的美丽羽毛，喜欢沉静地漫步在溪流或稻田之中。在稻妻的古歌中称之为「里梅鸟」，曾经有着非常广泛的分布，但近来似乎越来越少见了，也许壶中洞天能为它们提供一方宁静的栖息之地吧。
- Night Raven Flight Attendant ｜ 夜鸦乘务员
- Valley Wall Corner: Like Gathering Waves ｜ 秀谷墙隅-「如聚波澜」
- Clorinde said Neuvillette offered to deliver her gifts to Wriothesley. ｜ 克洛琳德说，那维莱特忙完工作后会帮她将礼物送到公爵那边…
- My hobbies? ...Sewing, practicing gliding, and helping people! Hmm? Sounds familiar? Well, that's because... I want to be someone that gives people that warm feeling, too. ｜ 爱好嘛…缝纫、练习飞行，还有帮助他人！嗯？你说听着有点耳熟？因为…我也想成为「能照亮别人的人」。
- This perfume... Dear Semaine, are you reminding me to focus my attention on you? ｜ 这款香水…亲爱的瑟米安，你是不是在提醒我，在这段时间我应该把注意力放在你身上？
- We've finally turned that device off. The forest is finally free of further harm. ｜ 总算是把这个装置关掉了，这下森林也不会再受到伤害了。
- Charged Attack DMG|{param8:F1P}+{param9:F1P} ｜ 重击伤害|{param8:F1P}+{param9:F1P}
- How very reliable. Don't forget, Mihir and Rashnu will also be able to assist you. ｜ 那真是太可靠了。别忘了，米希尔和拉沙鲁也会协助你们的。
- Aimed Shot|{param5:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param5:F1P}

- (Dain and Khaenri'ah... It's worth a shot.) ｜ （戴因与坎瑞亚…就当作赌一次吧。）
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Rhythm Ball: Detonatorball ｜ 节拍撞球·爆轰球
- Body tissue left behind by a Fungus that has been exposed to intense elemental stimulation.\nThere was once a protracted debate among Amurta researchers on whether the Fungi should be categorized as plants or animals. In the end, they reached an agreement and closed the case for good — the Fungi shall be its own category, neither plant nor animal. ｜ 蕈兽的部分身体组织，在外界元素的剧烈刺激下才会形成。\n生论派的学者们曾对蕈兽究竟属于植物还是动物展开过旷日持久的论战。最后两派达成和解，将蕈兽单列在动植物之外，并不再讨论。
- That's not something we'd be thankful for at all! ｜ 这根本不是什么值得感谢的事吧？！
- Swimming Prohibited ｜ 禁止游泳
- I was not permitted to say a single word when I was around those children. ｜ 在他们身边时，不被允许开口说出任何一句言辞。
- Do you want to go with me now, or do you want to head over by yourself later? ｜ 你是要现在和我一起走，还是等下你自己过去？
- Poonam Basu ｜ 帕娜姆·巴苏
- Trust you to only know these sorts of things... ｜ 派蒙只有在这种时候才像个好向导。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>You know what's strange? Clockwork meka are extremely intricate, and yet people regularly manage to fix them just by whacking them a few times. How does that work?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>I guess if a gear or drive shaft comes loose, sometimes whacking it or giving it a shake is enough to make the parts latch back on to each other.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Huh? Paimon didn't follow that...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Well, simply put, if the meka isn't actually broken, a little tap can nudge the parts back into the right places.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>But on the other hand, if one of the parts is damaged, then no amount of whacking is ever gonna fix it.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Ohh! So it's like knocking sense into people. It works fine as long as they've got a brain, and they're just having a dumb moment. But if they're a total airhead, there's nowhere for the sense to go!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>...Wait, why are you staring at Paimon's forehead?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Don't worry, I'm not gonna whack you in the head. It wouldn't work anyway.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Phew, well that's a relief— Wait... Hey! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>奇怪…明明发条机关的结构都精密得不得了，为什么有时候出了故障，只要拍一拍就能好？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>大概是机关里面有哪个齿轮或者传动杆松动了吧，拍一拍晃一晃，让它们扣上了就行。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸？还是不太懂…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…简单来说，就是这些机关本身就没有多大故障，拍一拍就能让零件回到正常的位置。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>反过来说，如果是零件本身受损，就算拍散架了也修不好。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哦哦…是不是说，就像有的人只是偶尔迷糊，拍拍脑门就能清醒过来。有些人本来就迷糊，就算再怎么拍也还是一样迷糊！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>…等等，你为什么盯着我的脑门看？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>放心吧，我不会拍的，反正拍了也没用。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>这还差不多…等等——喂！

- Hmm. "...even if not old enough to drink, one should still learn to discuss the different qualities of wine..." ｜ 「…即使没到喝酒的年龄，也要学会谈论美酒的品级…」
- Question for ya! Do my horns look boring once you get used to them? 'Cause, uh, I was thinking of switching up the style, going for a total overhaul, you know? I'm thinking paint them in rainbow stripes and then strap a few Fireflies on for good measure! Eh, eh? I bet that would turn some heads on the streets... like "Dude, you're rockin' those sweet rainbow horns, man!" ...Ah, man, this is totally genius! I'm gonna round up the gang and get them working on it ASAP. ｜ 我头上的角，看久了会单调吗？要不用涂料把它弄成彩虹色吧，再抓点萤火虫绑在上面，走在街上炫彩夺目，想想就觉得很帅！本大爷果然是天才，我这就让兄弟们行动起来！

- A potted plant with vivid, fresh orange flowers that comes in a pot shaped like a mountain range. It gained its name from being the spitting image of fire and can be found within the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. However, unlike its eponym, which indicates a certain transience, these flowers stay in bloom for a long time indeed. They also possess great resilience against bug infestation and drought, making them perfect for newcomers to the art of gardening. ｜ 以山峦造型的花盆为底，热情四射的橙色鲜花为景的盆栽，因花瓣的外形酷似焰火而得名，可见于圣火竞技场内。但与名字中所蕴含的「短促且易逝」的寓意不同，这类花朵其实拥有很长的花期，以及出色的抗虫害与耐旱能力，非常适合刚入门的盆栽爱好者种植。

- A basic, common component often found in various creations of an ancient civilization, the function of which seems to be ensuring that these creations continue operating. Due to their close similarity in makeup to the components used in Pursina's Spikes, they can be used to replace its damaged parts. To think that Pursina's Spikes need such priceless objects to repair them... What a terrifyingly high-maintenance device. ｜ 常见于古代文明所留下的种种造物之中，似乎是保障它们运行的基础元件之一。由于「普尔希娜光钉」所使用的零部件材质与之类似，因此可以用它替换损坏的零部件。竟然要用如此珍贵的物品来维修，「普尔希娜光钉」的使用与维护代价实在高昂。

- When the attacking side <color=#CA6445FF>captures a stronghold</color>, the following buffs will apply: Characters' <color=#CA6445FF>Phlogiston consumption decreases by {0}%</color>; in the Nightsoul's Blessing state, Mualani's <color=#CA6445FF>Movement SPD increases by {1}%</color>; and <color=#CA6445FF>All Elemental RES is reduced by {2}%</color> for nearby enemies within a small area.\n\nAfter the attacking side <color=#CA6445FF>breaks all enemy barriers</color>, Mualani, in her Nightsoul's Blessing state, will release a shockwave at the enemy's position <color=#CA6445FF>when dealing Normal Attack DMG</color>, dealing True DMG. A shockwave can be released in this way once every <color=#CA6445FF>{3}</color>s. ｜ 进攻方<color=#CA6445FF>占有据点</color>时，将获得以下增益效果：角色<color=#CA6445FF>消耗的燃素降低{0}%</color>、玛拉妮在夜魂加持状态时，<color=#CA6445FF>移动速度提升{1}%</color>，附近小范围敌人的所有<color=#CA6445FF>元素抗性降低{2}%</color>。\n\n进攻方<color=#CA6445FF>破除了防守方的全部结界</color>后，玛拉妮在夜魂加持状态下对敌人<color=#CA6445FF>造成普通攻击伤害时</color>，将在敌人的位置释放冲击波，造成真实伤害，每<color=#CA6445FF>{3}</color>秒至多通过这种方式释放一次冲击波。

- A hero needs to be strong, that much cannot be contested. Not long after he graduated from the Learning Lodge, he would seek Elder Leik out on his own to suggest how he might gain this strength.\nTo secure the Elder's approval, he even brought all he owned, hoping that it might constitute a worthy price:\nGrappling hooks and trap-making equipment, freshly-harvested castor beans, two large pots of tapioca flour, a bag of Grainfruit seeds, a freshly-slaughtered forest boar, and a small amount of Mora.\nThe Elder laughed and rejected Kinich's offer of remuneration, on one condition, that Kinich learn what it truly meant to be a hero on his journey.\nIn truth, the Elder had always cherished high hopes for the boy, for he could see a reflection of the ancient heroes within him.\nAt the same time, he believed that Kinich required proper guidance, for should he set out on the wrong path, he could do far greater damage than your average villain. Thus, a new trade was agreed upon.\nIn this way, Kinich would live alongside Elder Leik in the mountains and forests for many years.\nAnd even as the Elder taught Kinich about the history of Natlan and the heroes of its various tribes, he would also recommend many notables to the lad.\nA fletcher who made special arrowheads, a witch doctor specializing in Saurian poisons, an old hunter skilled in the use of ropes and grappling hooks, an expert in escape and evasion from dire situations...\nKinich would never reject such expertise, and learned much from them day and night, but this alone did not satisfy him, and on designated rest days, he would return to the mountains to hone his combat skills.\nWithout a formal teacher in this regard, he would imitate the motions of wild animals as they hunted. Some were agile, others cunning, and others fierce, and so he took their strengths and incorporated them into his own unique martial arts.\nAs his abilities grew, Elder Leik would also guide Kinich to take on more duties within the tribe, beginning with courier work.\nKinich proved skilled at this beyond even many adults, doing all that they could in half the time.\nWith his skills, it was no surprise that people would gradually come to him, offering payment in exchange for more dangerous services, including the slaying of powerful Saurians.\nThe Elder initially assumed that Kinich might come to ask his opinion, but not once did this happen.\nIn this regard, the young man was like a veteran of over ten years, always able to judge the merits of any commission and negotiate suitable payment.\nAnd when there was falsehood or concealment involved in such commissions, Kinich would forcefully weigh the cost upon the scales of his heart and adjust the price accordingly, regardless of whether the other party might refuse.\nSuch behavior, of course, led to some criticism, and there were important folk even within the tribe who felt that Kinich did not give his work enough care.\nBut the young man would never explain himself, simply continuing to set the prices he saw fit for each assignment he was given.\nEven Elder Trinidad, who had charge over ritual matters, took issue with this at one point, and sought to summon the lad for questioning. However, Elder Leik stopped him.\n"Come now, no need for all this fuss. The lad knows what he's doing."\n"It's preposterous! The Scions of the Canopy have never called any such person a hero!"\n"And that's where you're mistaken. He has never been a Scion of the Canopy. He is a scion of the mountains — the only sort of hero he will become is the sort he wishes to be." ｜ 要想成为英雄，强大的实力必不可少，从讲学小屋毕业没过多久，基尼奇就单独找上利克长老，提出了变强的想法。\n为了使利克长老同意，他还带上了他拥有的一切，期望作为对等的代价：\n钩爪和陷阱工具、新鲜收割的蓖麻、两大罐木薯粉、一包颗粒果种子、一只刚死不久的林猪，还有为数不多的摩拉。\n老学者笑呵呵地拒绝了基尼奇的报价，他只提了一个条件，他要基尼奇在变强的路上学习什么是真正的英雄。\n其实他一直都记挂着小基尼奇，他在他身上看到了昔日英雄们的身影。\n同时他也认为，这一切都需要正确的引导，如果基尼奇不慎走入歪路，他的破坏力也将远超普通的恶徒。于是，新的交易达成了。\n就这样，接下来的好几年，基尼奇都在山林与利克长老身边度过。\n利克长老在教导基尼奇纳塔与各部族的英雄历史之余，还给他推荐了各种奇人异士。\n铸造特殊箭头的制箭师，专研龙类毒素的巫医，精通绳与钩锁的老猎人，极端险境下的逃生专家…\n基尼奇每样都来者不拒，日夜浸泡其中，但光这些都还不足以让他满足，在固定的休息日，他还要返回山中磨练自己的战斗技巧。\n没有老师，他就模仿山林野兽捕猎的动作，有些灵敏，有些刁钻，有些刚猛，他取各家之长，融汇成了自己的独特武艺。\n实力在增长的同时，利克长老也引导基尼奇承担更多的族内事务，起先是一些信使的工作。\n基尼奇完成得比很多大人都要好，普通信使需要的时间，他只用一半。\n得益于他的出色身手，渐渐有人找上门来，付钱委托他做些更危险的活，包括猎杀强大的龙。\n长老最初还以为基尼奇会来询问他的意见，但基尼奇一次都没有。\n在这方面，他好像一个十多年的老手，总能判断委托的好坏，以及为自己谈下合适的报酬。\n有时委托中也会出现一些虚假与隐瞒，这时基尼奇就会用自己心中的那杆秤强行平衡报价，哪怕对方不愿意。\n这样的行为理所当然会惹出些非议，族中也有德高望重的人认为基尼奇做事不够讲究。\n但基尼奇从不解释什么，依然在一件件的委托中评估合适的价码。\n有次就连负责祭祀事宜的特立尼达长老都有了意见，打算召来基尼奇质询，但利克长老立马阻拦了他：\n「没必要去问，那孩子知道自己在做什么。」\n「荒唐！悬木人的英雄从没有他这样的！」\n「不，你错了。他从来都不是悬木人的孩子。他是群山的孩子，他只会成为自己想要成为的英雄。」
- Oh my, why could that be? Perhaps I have been concerned that mein Fräulein could offend her friends and have been attempting to soften her words? ｜ 哎呀哎呀，为什么呢，难道是我太担心小姐得罪好朋友，特意时时刻刻挽回吗？
- Marechaussee Hunter ｜ 逐影猎人
- Very good, very upbeat! As you can see, me and the boys welcome you here. Please help yourself to a hot meal! ｜ 很好，精神很棒！如你所见，我和兄弟们非常欢迎你途经此处，请随意休息，分享热腾腾的食物吧！
- My grandfather deeply regretted that he never managed to reconcile with my great-grandfather, so he left the plant exactly as it was. ｜ 爷爷因为懊悔他们父子未能和解，所以也一直原封不动地保留着它。
- After a quick discussion, you nod to the guards and agree to follow. They lead you all the way to the audience hall of the palace. ｜ 短暂商讨过后，你们点头答应了卫兵。他们一路指引，将你们带入了王宫的觐见厅。
- I'll draw up an outline. Let's meet up at the Speaker's Chamber later — after all, we'll still need the Pyro Archon's final approval. ｜ 具体的规则我来筹划。等下在话事处碰面吧，此事最终还需要火神大人准许。

- Ooh, it lit up! Paimon wonders if these ruins have any other stone tablets like this one? ｜ 欸？好像发光了！不知道遗迹里还有没有这样的石碑呢？
- Flowing Melodies and Rainbow Branches ｜ 流韵虹枝
- *sigh* It's a long story, so I'll spare you the details. But anyway, so the main reason I'm traveling all around Teyvat is to promote our music festivals. But I have some... personal reasons, too. ｜ 唉，说来话长，就不展开了。说回我自己吧。我走遍各地，除了宣传音乐之外，还有一点私心。
- I would love to answer that question, but the truth is, I've never made a precise calculation myself. ｜ 我非常愿意解答你的疑惑，可惜我自己也没有准确统计过。
- I'll defeat all the monsters head-on. ｜ 我会打倒所有魔物的。

- If I point at your sword, then we must face each other in battle. ｜ 指向刀那么我们只能刀剑相向…
- Follow the light to where it ultimately leads. ｜ 循着光线的引导抵达了终点。
- Ningguang's formal wear. The long cyan skirt traces her elegant curves, and the butterfly wings at her ankles lend the outfit a touch of light grace. ｜ 凝光的礼服装扮。绀蓝长裙勾勒出丽人优雅的曲线，脚踝上的蝶翼又为她平添了几分轻盈。

- Traveling can be eye-opening. ｜ 出去看看也好。
- Gotta say, your friend's quite a character... Still, Humbly Enough isn't that hard to make, so I don't think we'll have any problems with this order. ｜ 你的朋友，还真有个性…不过这道「知足常乐」也不算难做，这回应该没啥问题。

- The main character suddenly awakens to the use of disguises, allowing him to freely change his appearance and voice... Let's call it the Illusory Mirror! ｜ 主角突然觉醒了超一流的伪装能力，能够自由改变外形和声音的那种…那个…「万镜化形」！
- Great weather for practicing martial arts, but perfect weather for reading. Hey, what's that ridiculous look for? You look as if you're trying to decipher some strange text written on my forehead. ｜ 练功的好…啊不，是看书的好时节啊。好啦，我脸上又没有写字，别一直盯着我看了。

- Companions? Hah! Bunch of greedy churls, they are. I wouldn't trust them as far as I could throw them, to say nothing of working with them. ｜ 同伴？哼，我的那些「同伴」都是些贪得无厌的家伙，我可不敢信任他们，更别提和他们合作了。

- The soil looks like it's been disturbed... Maybe Tejima buried something precious here — something that's kept him in the village all these years? ｜ 土壤有被动过的痕迹…难道说手岛先生是在这里埋藏了什么宝贝，才一直留在这里的吗？

- Oh, look at you, forcing your logic through. Most impressive. ｜ 派蒙学会强词夺理了，可喜可贺。

- A volume out of the "Wonders and Folklore of Liyue" collection, which serves as Liyue's own version of "Tour of the Land of Liyue," an encyclopedia of folk beliefs and customs by Masudi, a scholar from Sumeru. Due to the archaic nature of the author's writing style, it was largely dismissed by the public and publishers alike. "Yakshas: The Guardian Adepti" introduces the readers to the various yakshas who fought side-by-side with the Geo Archon. ｜ 须弥学者麦苏迪所著民俗百科全书《琉璃岩间国土纪行》的璃月版本《匣中琉璃云间月》，因文笔佶屈聱牙，内容艰深难读而备受书商与读者冷落。《护法仙众夜叉录》是其中一册，本册介绍了曾与岩之神并肩作战的诸位夜叉之事迹。

- A wondrous picture frame created using the best Cuihua Wood available. The canvas has been steeped in paints saturated with Sub-Space Creation energies and has become exceedingly supple. It also has the unique ability to resonate with you and implant precious memories upon its surface.\nAfter meeting certain friends you invited into your Serenitea Pot, Tubby thought long and hard before preparing these picture frames for you. "The unforgettable moments that you spent together may have been the greatest gift of all," she says. ｜ 由品质绝佳的「萃华木」制作而成的奇妙画框，画布曾在蕴含着浓郁外景之能的染料中浸泡，质感尤为细腻，还有着独一无二的奇妙功能：旅行者与画框共鸣后，方可将记忆中的珍贵时刻重现在画布之上。\n接触到旅行者邀请至壶中洞天的一些友人后，阿圆深思熟虑，为旅行者准备了这种画框，她的看法是——「一起度过的难忘时光，也许就是最令人惊喜的礼物。」
- The hilichurls have been startled awake ｜ (test)惊醒丘丘人$HIDDEN
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- We make a great team, don't we? ｜ 我们的配合也越来越默契了呀。
- I've been living in the wilderness all my life, so I rarely get the chance to enter the city. Even my mushrooms are sent into the city via convoy. ｜ 我一辈子生活在野外，没什么进城的机会。就连往城里运蘑菇，也都是运输队代办的。

- Recommended ｜ 优势

- About Lan Yan: Inheritors of Qimen Arts ｜ 关于蓝砚自己·奇门世家

- So the human brain— Nope, nuh-uh, Paimon doesn't wanna think about this... ｜ 人脑…不行，我不要想了，好吓人…

- Within a certain distance, attacks can be used to activate mechanisms. These mechanisms will reset after a while. If you find that a mechanism is currently damaged, try switching to Evernight — they will fix themselves right up. ｜ 在一定距离内可以通过攻击来激活的机关。一定时间后，该机关会重置。如果发现有的机关破损了，不妨在「常夜」状态再看看。它们会将自己补全。
- \nAfter the demonstration, Tadhla shows you her hands soaked by the blood of her prey, a faint smile appearing on her lips.\nThis is the first time that she has revealed any trace of her emotions. ｜ \n演示结束后，塔德菈为你展示了她血淋淋的双手，嘴角浮现一丝孩子般的浅笑。\n\n这是她第一次将感情的痕迹表现在脸上。
- But what if it suddenly moves...? ｜ 这…万一它再动起来…
- Contestant ｜ 选手
- That's the spirit. Go and make me a winner! ｜ 那就拜托你了，这次一定能行…
- I feel like a Nilotpala Lotus that's been reunited with its leaves, or a Sango Pearl that's found its shell. ｜ 这种感觉，就像月莲找到了莲叶，珊瑚真珠找到了贝壳。
- Level 1 Aimed Shot|{param6:P} ｜ 一段蓄力瞄准射击|{param6:P}
- Is that so? But I didn't see any new flower pots in her house... ｜ 是这样吗？但是我也没看见她屋子里多几盆花啊…
- Yeah, I was THIS close to winning. *sigh*... Definitely not the result I wanted, but, still, not too surprising. Kachina's always been strong. ｜ 只差那么一点儿就赢啦。唉，真可惜…不过输给她也正常，她原本就很强嘛。

- "Just a friendly guy who's happy to help." ｜ 「乐于助人」。

- So, I just kinda wanted to ask if maybe... any of you have ever met an adeptus like that? ｜ 这次打扰你们，也是想冒昧问下：你们认识这样的白鹤仙人吗？
- Not good, we must stop him! ｜ 快拦住他…不好！

- It was nothing. We all just want Nechca to get better. ｜ 没关系，特拉佐莉。只要小妮赫佳健康就行。
- It's the top pottery workshop in Liyue. They're experts in every part of their craft, from shaping the clay, to firing in the kiln, to glazing the finished product... ｜ 那可以说是璃月港最好的私窑了，而且虽说是私窑，但不管是练泥、制胚还是施釉，每个步骤都不输官窑…

- With Razi's help, we're finally ready to get started. Hopefully, the children will like our carvings this time. ｜ 有了拉齐的点子，我们终于可以开工了，希望这下小朋友们能高兴起来。
- Allow me to introduce our newest skin lotion, Butterfly Dew. I'm sure many of you have already read about this product's trials in the newspapers. ｜ 本次推出的美妆新品名为「蝶彩露」，肯定有不少顾客已经在美容杂志上看到过关于这款护肤液的试用体验。
- A flower stand personally made by Sakuya. She has asked around a great deal to be able to make a flower stand of this sort... ｜ 由咲耶亲手制作的花架。为了制作这种制式的花架，她特意去请教了不少人…
- Notice ｜ 公告
- Say, Inazuma has become a lot more stable lately — why haven't we received any new commissions...? ｜ 说起来，最近稻妻的局势平稳了许多，我们却依然没接到什么新委托呢…

- Several days ago, I was {0} when I saw a Hydro Abyss Mage. I've heard that it's a very dangerous monster. After all, a monster that can use Hydro attacks could trigger someone's rheumatism. I hope someone can take this creature out. ｜ 前几天，我{0}的时候，看到了一个水深渊法师。听说是很危险的魔物，毕竟，既然能用水元素战斗的话，说不定也能让人风湿发作。希望有人能出手处理一下。
- Sorry, that was a joke. Please don't take it to heart. ｜ 抱歉，瞬移的事情是在开玩笑，还请不要放在心上。
- The helmet of a legendary gladiator from ancient times, who would proudly stretch out his bloodied arms to welcome the thunderous applause of his audience. ｜ 古代传奇角斗士的头盔，曾沾染了无数敌手的鲜血，也曾骄傲地接受无数观众的欢呼。

- Thank you so much! I feel energized with all this good food. ｜ 谢谢你！有了这些好吃的，我也能提起劲了。
- Perhaps your words will take root within my heart, and one day, my desire to see the world beyond will sprout and grow. ｜ 不过，你的话或许会成为一颗种子。让我去外面看看的想法，在未来的某一天发出枝芽。
- A falcon feather worn on ceremonial occasions. It displays the dignity and resolve of Liyue Harbor to the outside world. ｜ 在仪仗场合佩戴的鹰翎，用以向外人显明璃月港的威严与决心。

- A humanoid figurine taking a picture while hanging onto a street lamp. - When everyone sees the Almighty Shogun safely returning, their spirits will be lifted. ｜ 见到将军大人顺利归来，所有人一定会士气大振。
- But any amount of dissatisfaction within our ranks weakens our negotiating position. We will have to work all the harder if we want these talks to be a success. ｜ 但因为海祇岛的士兵尚有不满之意，我们在和谈中天然处于劣势。想要争取和谈圆满完成，需要花费更多力气。
- Speaking of ninja dogs, I actually saw one the other day on the beach north of Konda Village. ｜ 说到忍犬，前几天我在绀田村北边的沙滩上也见到了一只忍犬。

- When any party member uses an Elemental Burst, the Elemental Roundabout effect is generated, which increases all party members' Elemental Mastery by 100 for 20s, stacking up to 3 times. If this effect is triggered again at 3 stacks, a shockwave that deals AoE True DMG will be unleashed. ｜ 队伍中任意角色施放元素爆发后，将产生「元素圆舞」效果，使队伍中所有角色的元素精通提高100点。该效果持续20秒，至多叠加3次。叠加3次后在持续期间内，若再次产生该效果，将释放冲击波，造成范围真实伤害。

- This has been a long shift... I'm getting hungry. ｜ 站岗太久，肚子有点饿了呢…

- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 5 consecutive strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nDrains Stamina over time to perform continuous slashes.\nAt the end of the sequence, performs a more powerful slash.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多五段的连续挥砍。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n持续消耗体力，快速进行连续的斩击。\n重击结束时，会进行一次格外有力的挥砍。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。

- Using his logical and precise deductions, we were able to find solutions to many previously intractable problems. ｜ 许多我们之前解决不了的问题，都被他用理性的精准思维找到了解决方法。

- Medium-sized, round fish with horn-like cartilage that is used to dig underwater burrows, build shelters and drive away creatures that try to harm them. \nThis species' whole body is pink and the tail fin is green, colors that are associated with the Zaytun Peach. These fish are, as their name suggests, so sweet that they are considered "ideal for dessert."\nDoubtless, owing to various factors, the fish dessert that the fish chefs were hoping to create did not pan out. Because this type of fish is rare and expensive, it is often farmed as an ornamental fish. \nThere is a large customer base that doesn't want to spend too much Mora on this kind of pufferfish, but nevertheless can't get enough of its bright colors. There are even enterprising businessmen who have managed to reverse this phenomenon, modeling their Zaytun Peaches after these pufferfish. The sales of those are pretty good. ｜ 体型圆润的中型鱼类，生有犄角般的软骨结构，据说它们会用这一结构开凿水下洞穴，建造栖身之所，或是驱赶试图伤害自己的生物。\n通体粉红，尾鳍嫩绿的角鲀，常让人联想到墩墩桃。鱼如其名，它们的口感确实相当甜美，以至于被鱼师们认定「用来做甜品都不为过」。\n当然，在种种因素的影响下，鱼师们期待的鱼肉甜品并未获得成功。加上这种角鲀较为少见，价格高昂，难以作为食材，人们通常将它作为观赏鱼养殖。\n由于不想花费大笔钱财购买这种角鲀，但又喜爱其明艳色彩的客户基数较大，甚至有商人反其道而行之，当真用墩墩桃制作了这种角鲀的模型，销量还相当不错。

- Unlike the Akademiya, I won't turn down anyone who's interested, rich or poor. As long as someone wishes to learn more about architecture, I'll accept them into my training center. ｜ 而且我的学员也不局限在教令院，凡是对建筑学感兴趣的人，无论贫富我都竭诚欢迎。
- Th—that's why the Matriarch wants me to d—do some research here to r—reverse engineer our own Anahitian Blessing. ｜ 所、所以，芭别尔主母要我在、在这里研究，如何才能反向做、做出我们自己的…「丰沃之惠」。
- Lv. 70+ Azhdaha Challenge Reward ｜ 70级以上若陀龙王挑战奖励
- He's always taken care of my brother and I, and I greeted him as I was passing by. He looked so surprised, too! ｜ 他之前很照顾我和哥哥，我路过的时候就和他打了个招呼，他还一副很惊讶的样子呢。
- A little. Didn't wanna overdo it. ｜ 我吃过了，虽然没敢吃太多。
- Teahouse Round Stool: Pain Point Reduction ｜ 茶室圆凳-「折痛辞」
- Help Needed:\nHmm... Some guests would like a drink that'll leave a deep impression.\nA special wine needs to be brewed with special ingredients.\nIf anyone is willing to help, please gather <color=#3399CC>three Flaming Flower Stamens</color> for me. ｜ 求助：\n呃…有一些客人，希望喝到更加特别…更加让人印象深刻的酒。\n唔，特别的酒，自然要用特别的材料来酿造。\n如果有人愿意帮忙的话，就请帮我搜集<color=#3399CC>三份烈焰花花蕊</color>来吧。
- Repair the Guizhong Ballista ｜ 修理「归终机」
- If you have time, you should stay in the village for a month or so. That way, you can see the full process, from leaf picking to the moment the tea's served up on tables. ｜ 要是小友时间充足，大可以在庄里多住一段时间，这样就能看到茶叶从采摘到走上茶桌的全过程了。
- Oh. Yes. I'd forgotten about that. ｜ 哦对，好像有这么回事，我都忙忘了。
- CD|{param7:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param7:F1}秒
- Hey, you over there! St—Stop! This stuff is ours! Hands off! I'm warning you...! I—I could totally qualify for the Night Warden Wars! ｜ 那边的，住、住手！这些都是我们的！不许动！告诉你，我、我可是能参加「巡夜者战争」的！
- An adeptus who grants wishes... To think that people could be so easily deceived by such blatant lies... ｜ 那些人…居然会被「实现愿望的仙人」这般诳语所骗…
- #I would feel more comfortable sending Yelan. She is privy to a secret art practiced by her clan, plus, she has extensive experience in battle. If anything was to happen to {NICKNAME}... ｜ #若是夜兰，她家传秘法，又身经百战，我暂且放心。若是{NICKNAME}，万一在里面有何差池…
- #Be at ease, I will guide {M#them}{F#them} down a safe path. ｜ #请你…请您放心，我会为{M#他们}{F#她们}指引一条安全的道路。
- Increases all party members' CRIT Rate by 15% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色暴击率提升15%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Event Card ｜ 事件牌
- If he lacks the ability, then he wouldn't be able to find the truth in the first place. In which case, it would be better to keep him away from danger altogether. ｜ 同时他如果缺少相应的「能力」，就无法找到真相，如果是那样的话，还是让他远离危险比较好。
- Whatever the case may be, let's just have a look at those Warding Stones first. ｜ 无论如何，我们还是快去看看那两座「镇石」吧。
- Well, that's just the thing, see? All my other tenants have already paid theirs. She's the only one left. ｜ 可不是嘛，其他的租客都把房租交了，就剩她了。
- Exactly... everyone knows you can't trust the Tenryou Commission. I heard they've been secretly coordinating with the Fatui and plan to continue their attacks. ｜ 是啊…天领奉行那些家伙根本不值得相信，我还听说天领奉行的人秘密勾结愚人众，打算继续对我们开战呢。
- What are you two doing here, exactly? ｜ 你们是来做什么的？
- Alright, then, we won't ask more questions. Just be a good girl and don't wander around. ｜ 好啦，我们不问了。素达蓓要好好听话，不要乱跑哦。
- Also, do you have any of Sumeru's regional specialties on hand? I believe they're called... <color=#00E1FFFF>Kalpalata Lotuses</color> and <color=#00E1FFFF>Sumeru Roses</color>. ｜ 还有，在须弥生长的一些特产，你那里有么？我记得名字好像是…<color=#00E1FFFF>劫波莲</color>和<color=#00E1FFFF>须弥蔷薇</color>。
- More Characters ｜ 更多角色
- Obtained from the Imaginarium Theater ｜ 于「幻想真境剧诗」中获取
- Then what's your goal on this trip, Jebrael? ｜ 那么哲伯莱勒此行的目的是？
- I'm a prop engineer for Zubayr Theater. Other than designing and making props, I also maintain the venue. ｜ 我是祖拜尔剧场的道具工程师，除了设计和制作道具之外，也兼顾场地设施的维护工作。
- Where did Acomitl go? Get out here, you little smooth-talking squirt! ｜ 阿科米蒂呢？油嘴滑舌的小崽子，给我出来！
- A mushroom? ｜ 蘑菇？
- In show business, while you're onstage, you constantly have to be in control of everything you're doing to manage your image. So when you're offstage, it's a relief to finally loosen up a little. ｜ 做这行就是这样，上台得时刻保持状态。现在是在台下，可以把这根弦略微松一松。
- Hello there, Mr. Krosl. How's business been? ｜ 克罗索先生，近来生意还好吗？
- Maybe the people have always had a considerate god watching over them. ｜ …或许，人们确实拥有一位好神明。
- Of course I am. As a person living alone in a faraway land, this machine and my creativity are all that sustain me. ｜ 那是当然了，我孤身在外，能够依靠的就只有这个机器和制造工艺了。
- Who are you? Who sent you to listen in on our conversation? ｜ 你是什么人，谁让你来偷听的？
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Rawr! ｜ 呀！
- Cashflow Supervision ｜ 金流监督
- Masked Weasel ｜ 面具鼬
- In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Long story short, as a talented beast tamer, sometimes she needs to command a certain level of "respect" to prevent people from trying to scam her. ｜ 简单来说，对于才华卓越的驯兽师而言，有时需要一些「威严」，让某些人对她心怀畏惧，防止被他们算计。
- Monsieur Os ｜ 呜斯先生
- That doesn't seem right... ｜ 好像不太对呢…
- #Huh. These images look kinda weird. Let's try arranging them a bit differently, {NICKNAME}... ｜ #唔…总觉得有些影像看上去还是很奇怪的样子，{NICKNAME}，再试试别的摆法吧…
- Mother wrote that she'd always wanted to go to a local Inazuman festival. She said that sometimes, on a clear night, if you looked out from our house, you could see lights off in the distance. ｜ 母亲写到，她一直想参加稻妻本地的民间祭典。她说，天气晴朗的夜晚，自家中向远方眺望，偶尔能看见祭典的灯火。
- (The will imprisoned within the statue has dissipated. Silence alone answers you.) ｜ （禁锢在雕像中的意志似乎已经散去了，回答你们的只有沉默。）
- Well, a life's at stake here, so it looks like we'll have to deal with that first before we'll get the chance to ask her about the incantation stuff. ｜ 暂时没机会问咒语许愿的事了。救人要紧，还是等这件事解决后再说吧。
- Pyro Specter ｜ 火飘浮灵
- You learn of the Pyro Archon's battle against The Captain, as well as her sacrifice. ｜ 你们从火神口中得知了她与「队长」的战斗，以及将力量献出的事。
- My father once told me that such ores were born from the influence of Ley Line energies, and are more valuable than Crystal Ores by far! ｜ 听我爹说，这些矿石是受到了地脉能量的影响变异而成的，这比水晶矿可珍贵多了！
- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Click}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} to navigate to quest objective ｜ 点击追踪任务
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有敌人
- Hehe, thank you for the kind words, but I honestly don't need physical freedom as long as I can connect my consciousness to the Akasha. ｜ 呵呵，谢谢你们能这么说。不过其实，能够将意识连接虚空的我，也并不需要身体上的自由。
- Zhiqiong ｜ 志琼
- Sing, Ho, For the Greatness of Fat! ｜ 哦！伟大的脂肪！
- Fortune Slip ｜ 幸运签
- They are modeled after the slim wings of Crystalflies. The metallurgical process used to make them is quite unique, and they are encrusted with dazzling gems... ｜ 外型上再现了晶蝶的薄翼，使用独特的金属工艺制成，再镶嵌上迷人的宝石…
- Wangshu Inn is located in the heart of Dihua Marsh, and provides the finest in both food and scenery. It is no wonder that travelers are fond of staying here. ｜ 望舒客栈地处荻花洲中部，美景美食并收，往来旅客大多喜爱在此休憩。
- What surprised me is how the freshness of the fish still shines through, despite how heavily seasoned the dish is... ｜ 没想到用了这么多佐料，却还是能尝出鱼肉本身的鲜嫩…
- He wrote me a letter? ...And he got you to deliver it? ｜ 他写信给我了吗？谢谢，还麻烦你给我带来…
- Have you finished sweeping yet? ｜ 落叶都扫除掉了吗？
- Let things slip, huh... Okay, we just have one question. Did you see a girl walk by? ｜ 说漏嘴…哎呀不管这个了，兰萨卡有看到一位女孩子从这边路过吗？
- "Even after all flesh, bone, and entrails have been sliced away, I still lie nestled with you in the marrow that remains." ｜ 「…割掉所有的肉、骨与内脏，我仍在骨髓中与你同床。」
- As for the Philanemo Mushrooms... I remember that you can find some under the eaves of the houses in the southern part of the city. ｜ 慕风蘑菇的话…我记得在城里南边房子的房檐下应该就能找到一些。
- And these are my companions. Would you mind if they join as well? ｜ 他们是我的同伴，参与进来没关系吧？
- Damage Transmitter ｜ 损伤响振晶
- You followed me here? You've got guts, I'll give you that. ｜ 你们也跟来了么？胆量倒是不小。
- Don't you think such a person would deserve a seat at the mages' table? ｜ 这样的人占一个魔女头衔，不过分吧？
- I've been growing crops for years, but growing flowers must be different. ｜ 是啊，虽然我种地种了好多年，但种花跟种地还是不同。
- When my daughter got lost in the mountains, it was Milray who helped bring her back. ｜ 当初我的孩子在大山里迷路，就是它帮忙带回来的。
- Best get enough rest. ｜ 好好休息。
- They aren't worth a lot, but I still bought them with Mora — they didn't just drop from the sky into my lap. ｜ 虽然那些货不值多少钱，但再少也是摩拉买来的，不是天上掉下来的。
- #{NICKNAME}, Paimon, and Mr. Dvorak, right? Hehe, I've known them all for quite a while. ｜ #{NICKNAME}、派蒙还有德沃沙克大叔，对吧，都是老熟人了。
- 6-Hit DMG|{param6:F1P} ｜ 六段伤害|{param6:F1P}
- Oh, I see. ｜ 原来是这样啊。
- And you, Tang Wuchou, are you seriously still dreaming of growing that "great Glaze Lily garden" of yours? ｜ 还有唐无仇，你还想着要开什么琉璃百合大花园嘛。
- I also dislike exams. ｜ 我也不喜欢考试。
- Ehehe... Sorry about that. Sounds like just drinking juice still isn't quite enough for my stomach. ｜ 呃，不好意思。虽然已经喝了不少果汁，但感觉胃里还是空空的。
- Imagine, you'll be able to eat and drink whatever you please, just as if Yujing Terrace was your very own kitchen! ｜ 从此以后吃香的、喝辣的，就算是搬到玉京台也是指日可待！
- Maiden's Passing Youth ｜ 少女苦短的良辰
- A hot spring party sounds like a great idea! ｜ 温泉派对是个好主意！
- A lady's child has fallen prey to the maladies of loneliness, imagining himself to be the Water Imp Prince. Alas, pitiful soul! You decide to help him. ｜ 一位夫人的孩子身陷孤独病，将自己幻想成了传说中的水妖王子特尔克西。噢！多么可怜的一位小病人，你们决定要帮助他。
- Only I still stand guard here. ｜ 最后只剩下我还坚守在这里。
- "It's the fighting spirit." ｜ …而是追求武道的心」。
- Suspicious Fontainian Onion Soup ｜ 奇怪的枫丹洋葱汤
- Those tax-dodging merchants could not have trembled more had they tried. Oh, how the dutiful citizens — like you and I — cheered and clapped to see that sight! ｜ 一时间那些偷漏税款的大商贾是人人自危，而像咱们这些本分人，那是拍手称快呀！
- Secret Art: Musou Shinsetsu ｜ 奥义·梦想真说
- Open-Air Workshop ｜ 开放式烘炉工坊
- We could give it a go... ｜ 试试也没问题…
- A Quiet Day in Liyue Harbor ｜ 璃月港平静的一天
- Tri-Karma Purification DMG|{param3:F1P} ATK+{param4:F1P} Elemental Mastery ｜ 灭净三业伤害|{param3:F1P}攻击力+{param4:F1P}元素精通
- D—Did something just shoot by? ｜ 刚，刚才是不是什么冲过去了？
- My past? That's something I can talk freely about. ｜ 关于往事…倒是也可以跟您随便聊聊。
- Teatime with "N" ｜ 魔女的茶点时间
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Great! Now we have the monitoring data from both the Pate de Fruit and Crepes Suzette Stations! ｜ 好耶！这样一来，就拿到「果果软糖站」和「桔桔薄饼站」的监测数据啦！
- "...Don't worry 'bout us! The lads have all grown up. We can handle ourselves. Please, old man, just take this as a little somethin' from us to you..." ｜ 「…请不要担心我们，小伙子们都长大了，我们都能独当一面了。我们的心意，还请老爷子您收下…」
- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- I want to decipher the fortune slip... ｜ 我要解签…
- I wanted to touch that crown. But at the moment, I could hear the distant cries of my mother. It turns out, she figured out I was lost, and got her neighbors to go looking for me. ｜ 我很想去摸一摸那顶王冠。但就在这个时候，远处传来了老妈的呼声。原来她发现我跑丢了，就叫上左邻右舍一起来找我了。
- But if it's that difficult, why are you cooking here? ｜ 不过，既然这么困难，为什么要在这里做汤呢？
- Wings of Soaring Flame ｜ 烈火腾燎之翼
- "Fashionista Profile: Mequignon" ｜ 「时尚人物志：梅琪妮」
- Then I'll be your helping hand. ｜ 那我来做可莉的帮手。
- CD|{param2:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param2:F1}秒
- It was a good experience. In the sky, just speaking requires you to muster all your strength since the winds are so strong. ｜ 不错的体验。人在空中时，由于四周风力太强，说话必须竭尽全力。
- Hehe. I haven't ever asked you to before, have I now? ｜ 呵呵，我也没要求过你呀？
- A fresh fillet of fish. Handled properly, it can make a rich dish. ｜ 鱼类的新鲜肉块。经过适当处理可以制成让人回味无穷的菜式。
- How about, "Topped with pearly white dumplings so fine." ｜ 那就写…「汤里丸子粒粒如珍」…
- <color=#00E1FFFF>"Fortify the bones, that movement be supple when the time comes."</color> ｜ <color=#00E1FFFF>「坚其筋骨，适时而动。」</color>
- Baizhu ｜ 白术
- Yeah, and I was a little worried. ｜ 嗯，我觉得很担心。
- That sounds like the wisest course of action... and there just so happens to be a Garde nearby. ｜ 报警是个不错的选择…旁边刚巧有一位警官。
- The Pretty Finchball Takes the Field! ｜ 华丽雀雀球登场！
- Food ｜ 食物
- Create an artificed blank Domain ｜ 拟想空置秘境
- Momoyo should be done making that dummy by now, right? ｜ 百代小姐现在应该已经把假人做好了吧？
- See you around. ｜ 再见。
- Deals $[D__KEY__DAMAGE] $[D__KEY__ELEMENT]. ｜ 造成$[D__KEY__DAMAGE]点$[D__KEY__ELEMENT]。

- This is a war declaration from the Abyss Order to the Darknight Hero. ｜ 这是，深渊教团对「暗夜英雄」下的战书。

### Part 100

- Xiao: Serious ｜ 魈·认真
- Mercenary, Corps of Thirty ｜ 「三十人团」佣兵
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Check potion requirements... ｜ 查看药剂需求。
- So Tanger's supposed to be here in Gandharva Ville looking for inspiration, but how do we find him? ｜ 说是丹吉尔先生来了化城郭取材，可是要怎么才能找到他呢？
- Looks like there's no other choice! Let's look around, maybe we can find another way... ｜ 没办法了，去周围看看吧，也许能找到进去的方法…
- And how are your studies going on that front? ｜ 那你们现在成果如何？
- Everyone was so scared then. Some Aranara even hibernated. Luckily, Arama was brave and punished the smoke. Arapacati was furious and made them leave. ｜ 当时，大家都好害怕，还有的兰那罗吓得休眠了。幸好兰罗摩勇敢，惩罚了烟。兰帕卡提很生气，所以让他们出去。
- I wouldn't mind learning how to shoot a cannon! ｜ 我也可以学习多用途舰炮！
- What? I'll have you know that I'm an Honorary Senior Researcher. ｜ 哦？我可是荣誉高级研究员。
- Requests ｜ 居民请求
- You don't look so good. ｜ 你的脸色真的很不好。
- Journey Through Hilinigmatic Terrain ｜ 奇境谜丘探幽行
- Create ｜ 制作
- Painter Vermeer seems to be looking for Qingzhou... ｜ 画家梵米尔似乎找清昼有什么事…
- Kusayla's Letter ｜ 库塞拉的信件
- Huh, you destroy— I mean, undid the bindings on the Bedrock Key so easily! Guess we were right to put our faith in you two! ｜ 原来这样就能轻易破坏…呃，解除掉「磐键」的约束了！信任前辈果然没错！
- I'll tell you more about flowers next time if you like. ｜ 没事，芙萝拉以后也会告诉你花的事情。下次再来哦，呼呼。
- An agile and wise soul, endowed since birth with a well-maintained elegance and pride.\nThese cats are conscientious and cautious, elite hunters amongst their kind. Due to humans often delegating the vital task of defense against vermin to them, they are sometimes also called "watch-leaders." And though cats are free animals by nature, these "watch-leaders" take their rat-catching duties very seriously. In Liyue, such cats are fondly known as "Catcher-General Kitty," so much so that children's books and toys of this sort are quite popular amongst kids. ｜ 灵巧而富有智慧的生灵，抱持着与生俱来的优雅与骄傲。\n谨慎而机警的猫咪，是猫咪中天生的精湛猎手。由于经常被人类赋予看守仓库防备鼠辈的重任，因而被称为「警长」。尽管猫咪是本性自由自在的动物，但这些「警长」对于捕鼠的职责似乎更加上心。顺带一提，璃月人会亲切地称之为「猫咪捕头」，以之为主题的童书与玩具也颇受璃月的孩子们欢迎。
- A third soaked package is pulled out of the water by the wire after a while. ｜ 一段时间后，第三个湿漉漉的包裹被鱼线拉出了水面。
- I'll certainly do my best... ｜ 这事我也只能尽力帮忙…
- Heh. Guess your "boldness" does mean that you fit the bill! You did experience that Test with us, after all. ｜ 原来如此…经历过「试胆大会」的巫女…确实很有「胆识」呢！难怪神子会让你来！
- Wait, so what you're implying is... ｜ 难道说…
- This is just a temporary goodbye. We'll see each other again. ｜ 现在只是暂时的分别，我们还会再见的。
- Collect the Xiao Lanterns ｜ 收集霄灯
- But this only prolongs their suffering. Judging by their current appearance, they seem to have nothing left but the bitter memories they have to endure alone. ｜ 但这也不过是延长了她们的痛苦，看她们如今的样子，估计除了需要独自忍受的苦痛追忆外，早已什么都不剩了吧。
- Yeah, very likely. ｜ 嗯嗯，是的吧。
- If you hadn't gotten me out of that cage, those fellows would have turned me into a blood urchin... ｜ 多亏了你们帮我打开了笼门，不然的话，那帮家伙一定会把我搞成血海胆的…
- You're a doctor? ｜ 你是医生？
- This is the choice of her own will: To no longer live as a Falcon, but as a friend. ｜ 这是她出于自己的意志所做的选择…不再作为「猎鹰」，而是作为「朋友」而活。

- Mein Fräulein flatters me. I see no reason to refuse. ｜ 感谢小姐的赏识，那我就恭敬不如从命了。
- You got it, Madame Ping! ｜ 交给我们吧，萍姥姥。
- (Now is not a good time for guests...) ｜ （现在可不是待客的时候…）
- Indomitable Diamond-Breaking Will ｜ 勇士气概！穿破乱石！
- Please, bother someone else if you don't mind. ｜ 去找其他人吧，拜托了。

- Woof, woof! Woof! ｜ 汪汪！汪！

- Ah, Paimon kinda gets it now. You're gonna use adventurers to get the data you need for your line of toy Champion Duelists. Is that it? ｜ 啊！我好像有点听明白了…打着「决斗代理人」旗号的玩具，却让冒险家来提供数据，是这样吧？

- Sticky Finchball: A cute and friendly-looking Finchball. After this ball is launched, it will <color=#FFCC33FF>stick to the first Finchball it comes into contact with and carry it along</color>. This effect will be canceled once it stops moving. ｜ 贴贴雀雀球：外表格外可爱，看起来很友好的雀雀球。投出该球后，该球将<color=#FFCC33FF>与触碰到的第一个雀雀球贴在一起，带着它共同移动</color>。移动结束时，将解除该效果。
- Let's depart. You go ahead. ｜ 走吧，你先请。
- ...Alright. ｜ …我明白了。

- Get out more... ｜ 要多出门…
- By the way, are you guys here to see Cyno? I think I just saw him walking in that direction when I was on watch nearby. ｜ 说起来，你们是来见赛诺前辈的吗？刚刚在附近望风的时候，我好像看见前辈往那边走了。

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Gosh. That's amazing... I'm sorry, I still didn't know if I could trust you, but now it seems I can. ｜ 这样啊。太好了…对不起，其实我之前并没有完全信任你们。
- That is, indeed, the tower where the sacred scripture is stored. If you look closely to the cave right over there, you'll find a secret passage that will swiftly take you to the tower. ｜ 没错，那就是存放着圣典的塔楼。有条密道能让各位迅速抵达那里，只要你们在那边的山洞里仔细找找。
- Don't worry, Diona, you got this! ｜ 有迪奥娜出手，事半功倍。
- Score {param2} points ｜ 得分达到{param2}
- Let me think... The aroma was quite uniform, unlike that of a spice blend. It was also unfamiliar to me, so I would venture that it was a Mondstadt specialty. ｜ 我回忆一下。气味纯粹，不像是复合香辛料。闻起来相对陌生，像是蒙德特产。
- The remains... of the Third Descender? ｜ 第三降临者…的遗骨？
- H... Here, Paimon! Catch! ｜ 派…派蒙！这个给你！
- Heh, and you left the strongest one in the village, didn't ya? Who do you think you are? You really thought we'd fall for your little "business deal" nonsense? ｜ 你们是把最厉害的那个人留在村子里了，对不对？所以我说，少拿生意做借口。你以为自己很高明吗？

- Hut of Plenty: Permanent Pick ｜ 沃陆棚屋-「久驻之选」
- Yes, but I have a hunch. ｜ 嗯，不过我稍有头绪。
- A dueling table with cards and other necessities commonly seen at The Cat's Tail. The tablecloth is decorated by a lightly colored map, with its expanse detailing a lake, some land, and an island.\nFor the so-called "player-philosophers" of Genius Invokation TCG, almost anything displayed on the table can influence one's mental state. A map could cause them to throw up more Location Cards to aid their efforts, becoming an "external factor" of influence for the match.\nOf course, veteran players think this is mostly bunk. "Playing cards is about playing cards. Stop thinking about things outside the game!" ｜ 猫尾酒馆客位上常见的「对局台桌」与牌具组合，桌布上有着浅色地图状的花纹，描绘了一片兼有湖泊、陆地与小岛的区域。\n坊间曾有所谓的「七圣召唤理论家」宣称，牌桌上的任何因素都有可能影响到牌手的思路，画有地图的桌布会暗示牌手，让他们倾向于打出支援牌中的场地卡，这是对局前可以考虑的「额外因素」。\n当然，老道的牌手大多认为这是邪门歪道，「对局中运用牌组的思路才是关键，不要把太多场外的东西牵扯进来！」

- Hilinara... ｜ 丘丘那菈…

- Aaaanyway, Paimon has a funny feeling that it'll definitely be a fish next time! ｜ 唔，我有预感，下次肯定能够钓到鱼的！

- But, somehow, I still think I understand. According to Mother's plan, only one of us was going to make it until the end... And I always hoped that person would be you. ｜ 不过，我完全可以理解未来的自己。按照母亲的计划，最后我们当中只能有一个人活下来…我希望那个人是你。

- More About Navia: I ｜ 想要了解娜维娅·其一
- A timepiece kept by the hero who conquered thunder and lightning. The tiny shards of Electro crystal within flow back and forth with the passing of time. ｜ 镇服雷电的勇士持有的时计，其中的雷之碎晶随流逝如雷如电的时间泻落。
- To me, eating means leaving all my exhausting work and research behind for a time... ｜ 对我来说，在享受美食的时候，我会把那些让人疲倦的课题和研究统统抛在脑后…

- Why don't we go and have a look at your next backup spot? ｜ 那我们快走吧，去下个地方看看。

- The winds shall heed my call. Ride my wind currents between ruin platforms, and dodge Dvalin's attacks. ｜ 我会升起风场，在平台之间迂回来躲避攻击吧
- This body has no need of rest. But I am an assistant to the one within. If she wishes to rest, I must follow her will. ｜ 此身并不需求休憩，但我终归是「内在」的协助者，静养既是她的意志，那么随她所愿。

- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。
- I guess we can... ｜ 可以是可以。

- "As I was exploring by myself, I discovered this waterway. The waters here are clean and cool, perfect for taking a break and wash all the ill-fortune accumulated on the way off."\n"There are some gentle elemental creatures nearby who move most slowly, rare beings who have no quarrel with the rest of the world... I drew the waterway on the map. I hope the Traveler can follow it and find this place." ｜ 「独自勘探的路上，发现了这处水泽。池水清凉洁净，在这里放松一下正好，将一路上的晦气洗濯一空。」\n「附近徘徊着一些温和的元素生物，慢悠悠的，罕见的与世无争之物…将它画在了地图上，如果前辈能顺着地图来到这里就好了。」

- I knew it... I knew it all along! You agreed to my commission without even asking about the details. It's because you had a plan, right? ｜ 我就知道…我就知道！发布委托时，你没有追问任务的细节就抢先答应接下，全都是因为你早就有计划了，对不对？

- Bye! Maybe our next meeting will be in somewhere else! ｜ 再见！下次再见面，没准就是在别的地方咯！

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Hey, you little rascal! You're really gonna grovel before this piece of work? ｜ 喂！你小子，对这凶神恶煞的魔头低声下气的，有没有点出息？
- #Paimon is not a silver bird! And gold... Well, this is {NICKNAME}. ｜ #我才不是什么银色的鸟呢！我是派蒙…金色的是{NICKNAME}。
- Pahsiv! But, shiny, round, Melusine... ｜ 珀西芙！但是，金灿灿的，圆滚滚的，美露莘…
- Sound like they're a couple of socially reclusive scholars. If Paimon were in their shoes, she'd be showing up to all the events, signing autographs, selling cards... and probably getting complimentary food and drink! ｜ 看来是两位很低调的学者呢。换作是我，早就到会场签名售牌，顺带白吃白喝了吧？
- Okay, let's take turns shouting his name! ｜ 好，我们三个轮流喊！
- Asmerom ｜ 阿斯麦隆
- Fine! I'll give you all the space you want. Let's go, Benben. ｜ 好啦知道啦！我回避就是，奔奔，我们走。
- You're finally here, Traveler! You have to help me! ｜ 你总算来了，旅行者！你可得帮帮我！
- Character In-Residence ｜ 家园入住角色
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Five hundred... One thousand... One thousand two hundred...\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: What are you up to, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Aaah! ...Sorry, you made Paimon jump...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Hehe, Paimon was counting her Mora. She's been saving up a lot lately! In a few days time, she'll finally have enough to go buy a surfboard from the People of the Springs!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Then, Paimon can zip and zoom along the Spiritways, just like Mualani!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: ...Spiritway surfing? You?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Well, yeah... You don't sound very happy about it, what's wrong?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: I'm gonna miss you, that's all. I've enjoyed traveling with you... So many happy memories.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Wait, what!? Stop making it sound like Paimon won't survive!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Paimon's thought this through, y'know. Even if she falls off, it'll be fine — 'cause Paimon can fly!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Mualani definitely has it harder in that sense... How does she even do it? The Spiritways get so steep and go so high, but she makes it look really easy.\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}</color>: I don't think Mualani finds it hard at all, actually. You can tell by the big smile she has on her face even while performing highly complex maneuvers.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon</color>: Wait, so it's not hard, and Paimon's just... useless? ...That's worse! ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>五百摩拉…一千摩拉…一千二百摩拉…\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>在做什么？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>呜哇！吓我一跳！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嘿嘿，你知道吗，我最近攒了不少钱，过几天我也要去「流泉之众」买个冲浪板！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>然后我就可以像玛拉妮一样，唰地一下滑过「游隙灵道」啦。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>小派蒙…冲浪…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>等等，为什么你的眼神中带着几分怀疑？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我会想你的。和你一起旅行的日子，我一直都很开心…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>等下！不要说得像是我回不来啦！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我已经提前做好准备了！就算摔下来也没有关系，毕竟我会飞嘛。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不过这么一想，游隙灵道那么高、那么陡，玛拉妮是怎么玩转的呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>对玛拉妮来说，在「游隙灵道」上滑行应该不算什么难事吧。你看她表演高难度动作时候脸上的笑容就知道了。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>那岂不是就是在说我没用吗？！
- Seems like your friend still has a little catching up to do. ｜ 看来您这位好友还蒙在鼓里呢。
- #Listen, {NICKNAME} hasn't rested very well, right? ｜ #你姑且不论，{NICKNAME}本来就没有休息好吧？
- Whitewashing, you say... But Paimon remembers you saying something different earlier! ｜ 「粉饰」…我怎么记得你之前不是这么说的？
- After hooking a Flamegranate in, shoot it forth to dispel the Abyssal taint and ignite the braziers. ｜ 勾取火榴果后射出，可以驱散深渊污染，并点燃传火盆
- To Touch the Face of Heaven ｜ 触及苍穹的容颜
- Pensive ｜ 沉思
- So I had to go further in to gather Wolfhooks... ｜ 我还想要采钩钩果的话，就只能往深处走了…
- You're secretly distributing Delusions... ｜ 你在暗中推广邪眼…
- Dad went through all kinds of setbacks and betrayals in his adventures, and I just realized that I'm on the same unfortunate path as him. ｜ 老爹在他的冒险里，也遭遇了那么多的波折和背叛…这种不幸，如今又降临在我头上。
- Phew... ｜ 呼——

- There is a saying in Inazuma: "What are bandits but the children of war?" In times of tumult, even the harvest is a battlefield... See how this unfolds in the latest volume of "A Legend of Sword"! ｜ 「所谓山贼，乃是战争之子女。」稻妻曾有如此名言…战乱年代，收割米粮亦是战争！《沉秋拾剑录》，第一剑，徐徐而出！
- If we keep heading west from here, we'll eventually reach Mondstadt, the City of Freedom. ｜ 从这里向西走，就可以抵达自由城邦「蒙德」。
- There is a furnishing-related game. You will be able to activate this once the game ends ｜ 存在正在进行的摆设组合游戏，游戏结束后方可开启
- Someone to show you around the Inazuma of today and give you tips on where to eat and how to have fun! Alright, let's go go go! ｜ 就是帮你介绍现在的稻妻，告诉你什么好吃什么好玩的人！好啦好啦，出发吧。

- Obtained from fishing ｜ 钓鱼获得
- A stone plate with ancient text on it that seems to have once been part of a certain building. The desert sands play host to many an unknown wish. Who made them, and who carries them now? The shape of this symbol should be derived from the lightning that is ever so rare a sight in the desert. ｜ 刻有古老文字的石板，似乎原本是某种构筑物的一部分。在沙海中沉睡了不知几许，又不知承载了谁人的祈愿。其上的文字形状的来源应当是在沙漠中很少得见的闪电。
- "Phantom Weasel"? ｜ 怪盗貂？
- But since the Spike has some very fine moving parts, I need to check if it has been affected while in transit. In theory, though, everything should be fine. ｜ 不过因为「普尔希娜光钉」有一些比较精密的部分，得确认是否在搬运过程中被影响了…当然理论上应该没有什么问题。
- The old man over there, who is constantly murmuring, "May the Anemo Archon bless us." ｜ 就是边上那个总是念叨着「风神保佑」的老东西。

- <color=#FFFFFFFF>Each time after your character is targeted by and takes DMG or is healed:</color> Accumulate 1 point of <color=#FFFFFFFF>Battle-Readiness</color> (Max 2 points).\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When you play a {SPRITE_PRESET#3003}Weapon or {SPRITE_PRESET#3004}Artifact with an original cost of no more Dice than you have <color=#FFFFFFFF>Battle-Readiness</color> points:</color> Clear all <color=#FFFFFFFF>Battle-Readiness</color> points and play that card for free. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>目标我方角色每次受到伤害或治疗后：</color>累积1点<color=#FFFFFFFF>「备战度」</color>（最多累积2点）。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>我方打出原本费用不多于<color=#FFFFFFFF>「备战度」</color>的「{SPRITE_PRESET#3003}武器」或「{SPRITE_PRESET#3004}圣遗物」时：</color>移除所有<color=#FFFFFFFF>「备战度」</color>，以免费打出该牌。
- But anyway, Paimon's really curious about that mysterious island that lady just mentioned! ｜ 不过话说回来，那位大姐姐提到的神秘岛真的让我很好奇呢。
- Certified Player Pruniere, an Aquabus Maintenance Worker who can usually be found in the Court Region Waterway Hub. After finishing the basic water maintenance work, Pruniere still has a surfeit of free time, and thus has developed superb skill at playing Genius Invokation TCG. Some opponents have commented that his playing style is "like that crowbar of his: simple, yet effective." ｜ 协会认证牌手普吕尼埃，常在廷区水道枢纽活动的水道检修员。完成了基本的水道检修工作后，普吕尼埃的空闲时间还算充裕，因此，他练得一手漂亮的七圣召唤牌技，部分牌手评价他的打法「像他那根撬棍一样简单而有力」。
- Is she eating her dinner? ｜ 她有好好吃饭吗？
- During the course of completing a single challenge, have Battlegoat's charge collide with Ironclaw's headbutt 2 times. ｜ 在完成一次挑战的过程中，使「战羊」的蛮骑突击与「铁爪」的头鸟坚壁相撞2次。
- (Looks at you expectantly.) ｜ （期待地看着你们。）
- Every new batch of recruits must be baptized by the Tsaritsa's will through the words of her Harbingers. This has always been our rule. ｜ 每一批新人兵士都要经历「执行官」的训导讲话，经受女皇陛下意志的洗礼，这是一直以来的规矩。
- The words of someone as extraordinary as a witch can probably only be truly understood when something surreal happens to you. ｜ 像魔女这类角色的发言，只有在某一天真的遇到什么事以后，才能真正弄明白吧。
- The milky foam doesn't have much taste to it... ｜ 奶泡没有太多味道…
- 小N ｜ 小N
- Justice... ｜ 正义…

- Oh, anything and everything. ｜ 哈哈，什么都聊。

- Hey! You over there! What are you doing? ｜ 喂！那边那个，在干什么呢！
- Interesting Things ｜ 感兴趣的见闻…
- Next time she shows up at my place asking for a favor, I'm giving her a proper talking-to... ｜ 等她下次来家里求我办事，我可要跟她好好说道说道…

- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- I can't think of any reason why you and the Matriarch might come into conflict. ｜ 我想不到主母会和你起冲突的理由。
- A nautical chart featuring nearby currents and climates that somehow found its way into Liyue via foreign traders. ｜ 详尽记载了大陆周边海流气候的海图，是从异国经由商路流落到璃月的奇异典籍。

- Ei ｜ 影
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param5:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param5:F1}点
- Life is all about living in the moment. What use is there in worrying about the future all the time? We'll cross that bridge when we get to it. ｜ 人活着就是要着眼当下，管那么多未来的事做什么，还是以后再说吧。
- Gloomy Guard ｜ 阴沉的守卫
- I miscalculated. ｜ 是我失算了。
- Whirling snow. ｜ 雪纷飞。
- What's going on? Maybe I should go talk to Erinle to get some medicine... ｜ 到底是怎么回事。不然我还是找恩琳去拿点药吧…
- Yes, everything's ready. I've packed some great wine and smoked ham — your parents will love it. ｜ 当然，我带了酒和熏制火腿，你父母会喜欢的。
- Your opponent rerolled {0} time(s) ｜ 对方进行了{0}次重投
- Maybe you've forgotten, but this whole Sub-Space Creation thing is nothing new to me. ｜ 你是不是忘了，我对这种「外景」之能早有耳闻。
- I'll be fine — Granny's just worrying too much. I'm feeling fine now, so I should be able to do it safely. Besides, it's probably our only hope of bringing Leyla back. ｜ 不会有事的，奶奶太操心了。我的身体基本没问题了，现在应该能找到安全的办法。我想，只有这样才能找回勒拉的灵性。
- I may be old, but I was once a researcher too. I should be able to contribute to the village's development somehow. ｜ 我虽然年纪很大了，但毕竟以前是学者，应该也能为村子的发展尽些绵薄之力吧。
- Adventurer ｜ 冒险家
- (This must be Milray's mysterious friend, then. The one spreading the rumors about Sacred Flame Crystals "beguiling human hearts"...) ｜ （眼前这只应该就是米莱的神秘朋友，圣火结晶会蛊惑人心的传闻也是来自于它…）
- Combat Knowledge ｜ 战斗知识
- About Festival Utsava... ｜ 关于无忧节…
- There's no need to be nervous! Paimon's sure that Lesser Lord Kusanali will feel everyone's gratitude. ｜ 不用紧张~小吉祥草王一定能够感受到大家的心意的！
- Oh, it's you. Why are you still wandering on the upper levels of The Chasm? ｜ 哦，是你们啊，你们怎么还在层岩巨渊上层逗留…
- Lesser Lord Kusanali, y—you've done so much for Sumeru, and I... I didn't even have a chance to do anything for you... You don't have to do this. ｜ 小吉祥草王大人，您为须弥做了太多，而我…甚至没能为您做任何事…您不必这样。
- Phew... All's well that ends well, huh? ｜ 呼——圆满解决了呢。
- I have to admit though, my heart was thumping super hard the entire time I was laying on the ground. I was scared that everyone would notice, hehe. ｜ 虽然…那时候躺在地上，心跳声是扑通扑通响了好一阵子，我都怕被听出来呢，嘿嘿。
- Ah, this place... Few visit it... After all, it's dangerous here. ｜ 啊呀，这里，很少有人来呢…因为毕竟是，危险的地方。
- Dendro: The Essence of Flora ｜ 草元素·撷草瞻华
- To appreciate magic, you should focus on the show happening on stage rather than getting caught up in trying to see that which has been intentionally hidden. ｜ 魔术的欣赏，应该集中在舞台上呈现的过程，而不是被刻意隐藏的手法。
- Adventurer ｜ 冒险家
- About manifestations of the Wayob's will... ｜ 关于「大灵」意志的显化…
- Flame-grilled over scorching heat — crispy on the outside, tender on the inside! ｜ 猛火强烤，外酥里嫩！
- Nonetheless, I believe it to be greatly fortuitous that we met. I do not regret it. ｜ 但与你相遇，仍然是一大幸事，我不后悔。
