- After using the Elemental Burst <color=#FFD780FF>Plains Scorcher</color>, the Traveler gains 20% <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG Bonus</color> for 9s. ｜ 施放元素爆发<color=#FFD780FF>灼火燎原</color>后，旅行者获得20%<color=#FF9999FF>火元素伤害加成</color>，持续9秒。
- Manager's Reply ｜ 管理人员回复
- A falcon feather worn on ceremonial occasions. It displays the dignity and resolve of Liyue Harbor to the outside world. ｜ 在仪仗场合佩戴的鹰翎，用以向外人显明璃月港的威严与决心。
- About Golden Nara... ｜ 关于金色那菈…
- It will only be complete once all three objects are gathered together. ｜ 将三份合起来，才是一个完整的物件。
- I might have failed this time, yes, but we got some new experimental data. I shall succeed next time for sure! ｜ 虽然这次失误了，不过也拿到了新的实验数据！下回一定能成功…
- Sometimes, when I get sick of being in the Court of Fontaine, I get a strong urge to head off somewhere else for a while, and get a change of scenery. Somewhere without unruly customers, or tabloids spreading lies. ｜ 在枫丹廷待腻了，偶尔就想出来旅游一趟。没有不守规矩的顾客，也没有胡说八道的报纸。
- I did not recognize that symbol at all. Whether that's because I've never seen it, or because my memory fails me... it's hard to say. ｜ 我对那个图案没有印象。很难说是没见过，还是记忆模糊造成的。
- Gain {0} points after destroying this ball and cause an explosion that deals DMG to nearby Target Balls. ｜ 击破该球后获得{0}分，并发生爆炸，对周围的其他标靶球造成伤害。
- Continue heading over to the game venue ｜ 继续前往游戏场地
- Hmm? Can you draw too, Paimon? ｜ 咦，派蒙也会画画吗？
- Exquisite curtains from Liyue that divide indoor spaces. Its ability to adorn walls and ceilings is excellent, allowing it to create a unique atmosphere for guests. ｜ 精致的璃月布帘，分隔室内空间，装潢墙面与天顶的效果良好，能够为住户营造别致的氛围。
- Mr. Arataki is generous and easygoing by nature, and is reluctant to get bogged down with fighting spurious allegations. Plus, the fact that he is an oni can make certain topics a little tricky to navigate... ｜ 只是荒泷哥天性洒脱善良，不愿计较。再加上他的鬼族身份，有许多事都不好开口…

- Had I known you were here, we wouldn't have... ｜ 嘁…没想到，栽在了这里…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- On the Vasara Tree grows a Vasoma Fruit, with which you can obtain the Bija. Your adventure in this Ashvattha's Concourse will come to an end once you collect the Vasoma Fruit here. ｜ 莎兰树已经结出了恒素果。这种果实，应该就是惟耶之实所需的。如此一来，只要取得恒素果，这处觉树之堂的冒险就结束了。

- Ndenge ｜ 恩德盖
- Are you okay? ｜ 你没事吧？
- There's no need for us to continue this project if you still want to keep hiding things from us. I don't work with individuals I can't trust. ｜ 如果你还是什么都不愿意说，我们也没必要继续合作了。我不会接看上去就很可疑的工作。
- What about the overdue library book? ｜ 那还书的事…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Huh, maybe laughter is the key to making fear go away! If things get scary later, we can all start laughing at the top of our lungs! ｜ #难道说笑声可以驱散恐惧？{NICKNAME}，如果之后感到害怕的话，我们也要大声笑出来！
- Yasnapati? Paimon doesn't know what that is, but coming from you, it can't be anything good, really. ｜ 「谒颂主」？虽然不知道是什么，不过从你嘴里说出来总感觉没有什么好事…
- I'm led to believe that long, long ago, the Seven Archons used to stay in regular contact with each other. I'm a bit of a special case though, so I don't have any memory of that time... Now that things have settled down in Sumeru, I think it's about time I made contact with them again. You're on familiar terms with some of them, right? Would you mind introducing me? ｜ 好像尘世七执政之间在很久很久以前还会定期联络，只是我的情况比较特殊，已经不记得这段经历了…既然须弥的混乱告一段落，我觉得我该重新见他们一面。你熟识的那几位神明，能为我引荐一下吗？
- During my travels recently, I chanced upon a roadside stall offering tourists the opportunity to try their hand at the ceramic arts... So I decided to have a go... ｜ 我最近出了趟门，看到路边有供游客亲自体验陶艺制作的摊位，就尝试了一下…
- A carefully compiled notebook featuring the essentials needed to pass a magic exam. ｜ 精心编纂，只留下考试重点的魔导参考小册。

- For example, I was thinking about how to break all these wooden dummies in one fell swoop. ｜ 比如，一口气把这些木桩全部破坏掉的方法…
- ...Oh, look's like me eyes have sprung a leak. Apologies, must be that salty sea breeze, haha... ｜ …啊我流泪了吗？真不好意思，海边风有点大，哈哈…
- He left home only to find that it's still better here. He's been through quite a bit, though I suppose it all ended well. ｜ 总归是因祸得福吧，这小子离家转了一圈，吃了不少苦头，才知道家里的好。
- I have decided, and as a Pari, my word is law! ｜ 我已经决定了！作为花灵，我的话才是最高准则。
- When the Sun Is Out ｜ 阳光很好…
- Not with my eyes, that's for sure. I... "see" it by availing myself of the "Mikage Furnace Emergency Response Procedures (Trial Version)." ｜ 我并不是用我的眼睛看见的。而是用这一本《御影炉心·应急处理流程指南试行版》…「看见」的。

- "Clear the area!" ｜ 「清退！」
- Hehe, thanks, you two! I can't tell you how great it is to have you by my side. Almost makes me feel like I've been blessed by the Goddess of Fate, too! ｜ 嗯！谢谢你们。有你们在身旁真好，说不定我也被命运女神赐福了呢？

- You knew him, and you fought for Natlan all those years ago... Why don't I recognize you? ｜ 你认识阿伊祖，又在纳塔战斗过一段时间，那我不应该没见过你…
- You don't need a script? Wow, well, now I'm excited. See you there tomorrow night. ｜ 连剧本都不需要？真是期待啊，既然如此，我们明晚在活动现场见。
- Hey! ｜ 喂！
- Command Combat Units of at least Lv. 50 ｜ 指挥了至少为50级的交战单位
- #Hmm... This seems like the spot where {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} should stand. ｜ #唔…这里好像应该是{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}该站的位置吧。

- Then let me do my duty as a "representative"... ｜ 那本「代表」就负起责任…
- So... that means that the kimono design, and the international dishes... ｜ 意思是说，设计图纸跟异国料理…
- Haha, that's the spirit. Now, please try opening the barrier blocking the entrance. ｜ 嗯，气势真是不错。那么，就先请试着打开入口的屏障吧。

- Alright, I should be getting back to work now too. Now, why did I put the ore from before... ｜ 嗯，我等会也要去忙了。上次的矿石放在哪了来着…
- Do you mean it's not impressive enough? ｜ 不够印象深刻吗？
- I've heard Jack say that you can lure Large Slimes out by constantly defeating smaller ones. ｜ 我还听杰克说，如果想引出大型史莱姆，就要先不断消灭小型的史莱姆。
- But we can always take a few more. This is his parting gift to Lenne, after all. ｜ 不过我们也可以再拍几张，毕竟大伴先生这首诗是送给莱内先生的践行礼物。
- They may even stay hidden in some dark corner for a very long time, waiting for the right moment to ambush you. They'll do anything to keep their prestige intact. ｜ 为了挽回面子，他们可以一直蛰伏在暗处，伺机偷袭。
- So there is a way to save them. ｜ 这样说就是有解救的方法…
- #Oh my! So you aren't the Commerce Guild's {M#Young Master}{F#Young Lady}! ｜ #哎呀，原来不是商会的{M#少爷}{F#小姐}！
- Hah! You outlanders have such a rule as well? ｜ 哈！你们外国人，也有这规矩吗？
- Guess it's time to head to the sacred mountain's entrance, then! ｜ 是时候前往圣山的入口了吧！
- Is that how it is? Fine, you do have a point. ｜ 是这样吗？好吧，这么说也有道理。
- Of course not! When it comes to deciphering ancient scrolls, I have great confidence... some confidence... well, a certain degree of confidence in my abilities! ｜ 怎么会呢，对于古卷织物的解读啊，姐姐我可是很有信心…一些信心…呃，可是很有一点点信心的！

- Break the "treasure" seal ｜ 解除「宝物」的封印
- Yes, but his faith and determination were conveyed to the Dendro Archon, so she blessed him in the form of a dream. ｜ 是的，但一定是他的虔诚与决心已经传达到了草神那里，所以草神才以梦的形式赐福。
- Those returning to the tribes must light them with their own hands. The flames will illuminate the path ahead, and show the tribe that the person has made it back. ｜ 回归部族的人要亲手点燃它。火焰会照亮你的前路。人们也就知道那个人平安归来了。
- Shalmar and I came up with the setting of the Future Stars together. They used to be called Parvo Cores. I mean, "Future Star" is just a much better name than that, right? ｜ 未来星的设定就是我和沙尔玛一起想的。它以前叫帕沃核心，未来星这个名字可比帕沃核心有意思多了，对吧。
- Down at the dock, you and Noelle meet Sha'yin, a Millelith seeking the assistance of the Knights of Favonius. You follow him to Stone Gate to help with the arrest of some Treasure Hoarders on the run. ｜ 诺艾尔与你在港口遇到了寻求西风骑士协助的千岩军沙寅。 为了帮助千岩军追捕流窜的盗宝团，诺艾尔与你一起前往石门…
- If you two could take a little time out of your busy schedules to take this commission, I'll definitely come up with some way to make it worth your while! Right, that researcher from the Akademiya is also quite the generous client... ｜ 两位如果能百忙之中抽一点时间接下我的这份委托，报酬我一定会想想办法的！对了，教令院的那个学者，他出手还挺阔绰的…
- Yeah, yeah... alright. ｜ 哈哈…好吧。
- Tisoc ｜ 提佐科
- I had thought that the Ruler of Death might have a change of heart after seeing the people of Natlan come together and fight so bravely. But... ｜ 我之前认为，纳塔人的奋战能够改变「死之执政」的意志，但是…
- (It seems that after everyone forgot Greater Lord Rukkhadevata, their understanding of Sumeru's history also changed...) ｜ （…看来大家遗忘了大慈树王之后，记忆都发生了变动，对须弥的历史认知也产生了变化…）
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- I'm so overjoyed that I gave a portion of my wedding budget to the Master of Stars as an offering. After all, if not for him, I wouldn't be getting my fiancé back, in which case I wouldn't need it anyway... ｜ 于是我开开心心地把嫁妆献给了「星辰天君」。毕竟若不是他帮我找回夫君，这嫁妆可能一辈子也用不到了…
- Leave the Apple ｜ 放置苹果
- Across the Wilderness ｜ 「跨野寻踪」
- The Sacred Mountain lies before you... If... that is... you can eliminate the enemy cloaked in shadow. ｜ 圣山就在汝之身前…如若…就须清除…阴影之敌。
- Oh, and don't forget to claim your investigation rewards. ｜ 对了，不要忘记领取这次调查的报酬哦。
- Aye, indeed, I knew from the start that this one was different from the others. ｜ 这枚玉佩的材质，看上去就和别的货不一样。
- (Hold it just a minute there. Didn't Sumida say that Tsurumi Island's civilization has vanished for several millennia now?) ｜ （好奇怪，我记得墨田小姐不是说，鹤观的文明消失了几千年吗？）
- Current Ascension: {0} ｜ 当前等阶 {0}
- "Windwheel Aster" ｜ 「风车菊」
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- A valuable Ornamental Fish that may be kept as a pet in the Pool of Sapphire Grace and Shaded Clarity.\nA peculiar type of fish with a single horn. Round and firm, its belly is as bouncy as a balloon... Actually, there really is a balloon-like swim bladder in there.\nWhile the Phony Phlogiston Unihornfish can provide graffiti enthusiasts with precious paints, they can only live in liquid phlogiston environments. Thus, the Graffiti Alliance began to explore raising this kind of fish in ordinary aqueous environments. To accomplish this, the previous Graffiti Alliance's leader's previous predecessor began to work with the Natlan Fishing Association, expending an enormous sum to import clockwork fish from Fontaine, using "Maintenance Mek" tech to build an ecological simulation mek with onboard data collection capabilities and conduct extensive observations and research. Alas, the results were most disappointing: the horn-like crystal structures on Unihornfish heads ceased to shine with flame-like light after the fish left their liquid phlogiston environment, and so, the plan ended in failure.\nFortunately, due to the way their dorsal fin extends above the water while they swim, these mek Unihornfish look kind of like sharks from a distance. Thanks to this, the People of the Springs ended up buying an appropriate quantity of these "Pseudoshark Unihornfish" from the Graffiti Alliance and Natlan Fishing Association. They are used for giving tourists who go surfing a thrilling yet safe experience, as well as to scare lawbreakers in certain waters. ｜ 珍贵的观赏鱼，可被饲养于「灵沼云池」和「澄波游影」中。\n生有独角的奇特鱼类，体型圆润敦实，鱼肚富有弹力，堪比气球…其实真的内置了类似气球的浮力舱。\n「拟似燃素独角鱼」能为涂鸦爱好者们带来珍贵的颜料，却又仅能在液态燃素环境中生存，「涂鸦联盟」开始探索在普通水域饲养这种鱼类的可行性。为此，「涂鸦联盟」的上上上任盟主联合纳塔钓鱼协会，斥巨资从枫丹引入了发条鱼类，即「维护机关」的技术，开发了内置数据收集系统的生态模仿机关，进行了一番观察和研究。结果令人遗憾，离开了液态燃素环境后，独角鱼的晶体角状物再也不会焕发出火焰般的光彩，这一计划以失败告终。\n好在，这种机关独角鱼游动时，远看水面以上的部分，就如鲨鱼的背鳍，「流泉之众」向「涂鸦联盟」和纳塔钓鱼协会适量购买了这种「伪装鲨鲨」，用于为冲浪的游客提供刺激而安全的体验，以及在部分水域震慑不法分子。

- Ooh! Have you got any leads, then? ｜ 哇！已经有情报了吗？

- All Oculi for this element have been gathered ｜ 该元素神瞳已完全收集
- No, I refuse to escort you into the desert. ｜ 不可以，我不会护送您进入沙漠的。
- Hmm... Don't know her. Never seen anyone like that in mine life! ｜ 呶…不认识。没见过这样的人。

- At night, you can see three pillars of light in the surrounding area. ｜ 在夜晚这里看向四周因该可以看到三道光柱。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- It's about the toy trade. I hear that toys from Snezhnaya sell very well in Liyue, and now I'm feeling some regret. ｜ 是关于玩具销售的事情。听人说至冬的玩具在璃月卖得很好，令我有些懊悔。
- An agile and wise soul, endowed since birth with a well-maintained elegance and pride.\n"Mommy, look, that kitty looks like a dirty wee ball of snow!" This mischievous cat's name did indeed originate from a young child's faux-pas. Gray Snow Cats are very playful creatures, and any time or place can become a war-zone for their frolicking — much to the chagrin of their owners, who must always then give them baths. \nBut there are no such worries in the Realm Within — the realm is so clean that the cats can play outside and roll around the to their hearts' content without so much as a speck of dirt sticking to them. ｜ 灵巧而富有智慧的生灵，抱持着与生俱来的优雅与骄傲。\n「妈妈快看，那个咪咪好像一坨脏脏雪！」这种调皮猫咪的名字正是来自一个顽童的言语冒犯。灰雪猫是一种非常活泼的猫咪，各种场地都能成为它们嬉戏打闹的战场，往往苦了那些总要给它们洗澡的主人。\n不过在壶中洞天，这样的烦恼不复存在——这里的环境极为洁净，即使猫咪们在未被绿草覆盖的土地上翻滚，也不会沾染任何脏污。
- Sacred Sakura Cleansing Ritual: Yougou Cleansing ｜ 神樱大祓·影向祓行
- *rumble* ｜ 咕——
- What's going on here? ｜ 这是怎么回事？
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- Now that someone else is here, let's take a moment to calm down. ｜ 现在也有外人在，我们不如借这个机会都冷静冷静。
- Ah, precision all comes down to using your eyes. Where to slice into a particular cut of meat, how much oil to use, how to tell when a dish is done cooking... ｜ 嘿，所谓「准」，就是放亮眼睛，一块肉从哪里下刀、一勺油舀起多少、一锅菜要到什么时候起锅…
- Whom do you suppose "Fischl" truly is? ｜ 您认为，「菲谢尔」究竟是什么？
- No one questioned it, and yet its presence contrasted so starkly with the area as I remembered it... it seemed as if I was the only one to have noticed it appear suddenly out of thin air. ｜ 没有人质疑这件事。神樱的存在与我的记忆有着明显出入，似乎只有我能感觉到它是凭空出现的。
- Good, that's it... And here's another one! ｜ 很好，就是这样…还有一个了！
- I think I'll stay behind. That way, if something does go wrong, you'll have someone on the ground to get you some help. ｜ 我还是留在这里等你们回来吧，如果出了什么问题，也能第一时间接应你们。
- Welfare Meals ｜ 福利餐
- I thought you were Ellin for a second there... ｜ 我还以为是艾琳…
- I... don't see anything. ｜ 可是…我什么也没看到。
- Inazuma Remarkable Chest Reward ｜ 稻妻地区奇馈宝箱奖励
- About the Ode of Resurrection somehow taking effect before victory... ｜ 关于为何「还魂诗」在胜利之前生效…
- #Affirmative. There is no need to worry, {M#Mr.}{F#Ms.} {NICKNAME}, Ms. Paimon. ｜ #肯定。 {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，派蒙小姐，无需担心。
- Not bad. Quite suitable for writing a lantern riddle. ｜ 不错，这里也够我写一句灯谜了。
- Exploration Knowledge ｜ 探索知识
- Take care, Yoimiya. ｜ 路上保重。
- The "tiger cubs" at Vimara Village seem to be really active. You agreed to tell stories for the children upon Rana's urging. ｜ 维摩庄的「小老虎」似乎非常有活力。在拉娜的怂恿下，答应了给孩子们讲故事的要求。
- B—But surely that means we still haven't found our "Guardian"? And if that is so, then we won't be able to fulfill our "calling." ｜ 但、但是这样的话，我们还是没找到那位「守护者」。这样的话，「使命」就没法完成。
- Convert Wood ｜ 木材转化
- Continuous Regeneration Per Sec|{param2:F2P} Max HP+{param3:I} ｜ 持续治疗|每秒{param2:F2P}生命值上限+{param3:I}
- I believe there may still be some clues there. ｜ 我想那里应该还留存有一些线索。
- He just experienced something terrible, got hurt, and was tricked by bad people, so he thought that his friend, the Anemo Archon, no longer needed him. ｜ 只是遇到了难过的事情，受了伤害，又被坏人骗了，所以以为，风神朋友不要它了。
- Yashiro Commissioner, I'm sure you've heard the news... The Tenryou Commission has now occupied Ritou, refusing to leave until we hand Lady Hiiragi over to them. ｜ 社奉行大人，相信您已经知道了…眼下离岛全是天领奉行的人，他们迫不及待地想要接走柊小姐。
- This position will let you capture the most details possible, but you won't be able to see the surrounding scenery well... ｜ 距离拍摄目标最近的机位，能够拍摄出最为丰富的细节，不过缺乏对周围场景的刻画…
- Dalong and Little Le are very happy to have received the popsicles and want Chongyun to play with them. Although Chongyun is not well-versed in matters of play and enjoyment, he decides to give it a go after some encouragement from you. ｜ 收到冰棍的大隆和他的妹妹小乐非常开心，想要重云陪他们一起玩。虽然重云很不擅长娱乐之事，但在你的鼓励下，他决定试试看。
- Etienne needs 8 servings of Raw Meat. ｜ 安托万需要8份兽肉。
- That all you got? I expected more from Swordfish II. ｜ 就这点能耐？果然剑鱼二番队的人就是虚有其表。
- The Grapes of Warmth ｜ 温暖的葡萄
- How are your investigations going? ｜ 调试得还顺利吗？
- Obtained from Limited-Time Event ｜ 限时活动获取
- Obviously, our cooking can't compare to what you'd find at restaurants in the city, but they're pretty delicious as field rations go. ｜ 比不上城里的饭馆也没关系，作为行军餐已经很可口了。
- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> If you want to adventure together with Benny's Adventure Team, you have to come prepared.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Domains are very dangerous, so you should always take care to double- and triple-check your supplies in advance.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Paimon's heard that the Adventurers' Guild has compiled a list of 463 different ways of dying in these domains...\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> If Bennett got you killed by accident, Paimon and Bennett would never forgive ourselves!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> ...Why am I the only one dying here?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Well, that's because according to the numbers, Paimon can avoid 322 causes of death just by floating!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> I suddenly don't feel like exploring these domains... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>如果要和「班尼冒险团」合作探索秘境，就一定要做好准备。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>秘境是很危险的，出发前要多检查几遍物资和工具，不能大意。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我听说在这些秘境里，光是冒险家协会统计过的死法，就有四百六十三种…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>如果班尼特不小心害死了你，我和他的良心都会很不安的！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>…为什么死的只有我？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>嗯，根据统计，因为我会飞，所以可以至少免疫其中的三百二十二种死法！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>我忽然不太想去秘境探险了…
- Please go after those bandits. Don't let me slow you down. ｜ 请快去追捕贼人吧，莫要让我拖累了足下的脚步。
- Beydim's identity... ｜ 关于佩迪姆的身份…
- ...It's done. My cooking training has finally been completed successfully. What do you think? I'm sure it's the best delicacy to a Nara. ｜ …完成了。我的「烹饪修行」，已经抵达了完满的终点。如何？对于那菈来说，想必是最好的美味吧。
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- For a commoner like you, it's best that you stay far away from this hellhole. ｜ 你这样的平民，最好还是远离这块是非之地吧。
- Father said that he's seen a lot of machines, both intact and dismantled, so he can teach me how to fix Seymour. ｜ 父亲大人说，以前见过很多机器，也见过很多机器拆解以后的样子。所以，能够教我治好西摩尔的办法。
- Tell me about the Almighty Shogun... ｜ 关于将军大人…
- Climbable. "Sticks to Ground" objects can be mounted here. ｜ 可以攀爬和布设贴地物件。
- Yes, as far as I know. She left for Fontaine some time ago, and started a new life for herself. She's still doing work related to architecture, though. ｜ 挺好的。母亲她去了枫丹，有了新的家庭，不过还从事建筑相关的工作。
- As Though Caught in a Dream ｜ 如入幻梦
- That was nothing! You've just been at this longer than I have! ｜ 没什么了不起的！你只是…打牌的时间比我长罢了！
- Flipclaw Strike DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 翻正爪击伤害|{param9:F1P}
- There was only one way to discover the identity of Aloy's parents — victory at the Proving, the tribe's annual hunting contest, in which the victor would be free to ask for a reward.\nShe would train hard all her life for that event, but when the moment of trial came, the ritual would end in tragedy.\nMysterious assassins slew the participating Hunters, and it was only through Rost's sacrifice that Aloy was able to escape.\nLater, Aloy would learn that she was the true target of the attack, for she had almost exactly the same face as an enigmatic, ancient woman. ｜ 要从族长口中得知埃洛伊的生父母身份，只有一个办法，那就是在部落年度的狩猎竞赛——「试炼仪式」——中取胜，其中的胜者可以自由索求一件恩赏。\n从记事起她便为此刻苦训练，但当试炼之刻到来时，仪式却在灾难中落幕。\n神秘的杀手袭击了参赛的猎人，而罗斯特牺牲了自己的生命，让埃洛伊逃过一劫。\n后来，埃洛伊了解到袭击的真正目标是她自己，因为有一名神秘的古代女性，长相与她几乎一模一样。
- Enter the big tent ｜ 进入大帐篷
- Eek! Nara... So tall, so scary... ｜ 噫！是那菈…好高、好可怕…
- I have to go now. ｜ 打扰了。
- Daily fishing limit reached. Your catch has been released... ｜ 今日钓鱼数量已达上限，鱼儿已被放生…
- Sorush ｜ 斯露莎
- We originally arranged to use a Dusk Bird to send messages every once in a while, so that I could be informed of their progress or raise supplies to send to them as the situation required. ｜ 本来约好了隔段时间用暝彩鸟报个信，好让我也知道他们的进展，看情况可能还需要我再筹措一些补给给他们送去。
- Please write down the names of your desired wares on the slip, pin it on the Order Board, and patiently wait for our clerk to respond. At Mondstadt General Goods, we strive to fulfill your every need! ｜ 请将希望进货的商品名写在便条上，贴在订货板上，等待店员留言回应。蒙德百货，尽力满足您的一切需要！
- Chiori! Are you alright? Sorry for taking so long, I got caught up and... Whoa! Wh—What happened to your shop? ｜ 千织！你没事吧？抱歉我现在才赶来…呜啊！你…你店里怎么都成这样了？
- That'll depend on how good you are. Try killing half an enemy more than me, for starters. ｜ 哦吼，那就要看你的本事了。争取先比我多干掉半个敌人试试吧。
- Break bricks within the time limit to score points ｜ 请在限定时间内击碎游艺方块以获取积分
- Ahem... Of course, the Sage-Lord of Fungi is too dignified for petty arguments with lesser organisms. ｜ 咳咳…「蕈之贤主」不和没见识的浮游生物一般见识。
- Kaeya approaches, flanked by several other knights... ｜ 凯亚带领数位西风骑士走了过来…
- Forest Sanctuary: Sapwood Blade ｜ 森林的瑞佑·原木刀
- If you don't have any more questions, please leave. I want to be alone with him. ｜ 没什么事就请离开吧，我想和他单独待一会儿。
- Face the facts, Rahman — it's not gonna happen. You should understand that more than anyone. Have all your years as a merc taught you nothing about placing hopes in a ruler? ｜ 清醒些吧，你比我更明白这种事不可能发生。拉赫曼，你做了那么多年佣兵，怎么可能对统治者心存侥幸？
- I'm not sure, but there must be many who believe so. Not only have more and more people been borrowing it, but they've all been specifically asking for "the marked-up copy." ｜ 不清楚，但这么想的人一定不少，所以越来越多人借阅这本小说，而且指定要借「有记号的那一本」。
- I bet he's onboard a ship right now, working away... Best you go find him quick. ｜ 估计他这会儿就去船上干活了…你赶紧去吧。

- Other than defeating monsters, what other commissions do adventurers take? ｜ 嗯…对冒险家来说，除了清扫怪物之外，他们还会接受什么委托？
- Then next time you ride the Clementine Line, I'll definitely provide even better commentary! ｜ 下次搭乘克莱门汀线的时候，我肯定会为您提供更到位的讲解！
- Okay, then let's also do as Chiori said and meet up with her at Uther's factory in two days. We'll gather the evidence then. ｜ 我们也按照千织交代的，两天之后再去厄舍的工厂与她会合，搜寻犯罪证据吧。
- Pah! These Fontainian frogs done near bumped me off! ｜ 呸！这些枫丹皮娃子，好险被他们摘了瓢！

- Hah, you shouldn't underestimate me like that... but still, I like your decisiveness. ｜ 哦？可别小看我哦，不过这种气势我很喜欢！

- ...! ｜ ……！
- Focus on my voice, Qiqi. You are not feeling sleepy. You are the most awake person in the whole world. Even if everyone else falls asleep, you are going to stay wide awake. ｜ 听我说，七七，你一点也不困，你是世界第一清醒，就算所有人都睡着了，你也是清醒的。
- It seems a bit worn down, like someone chucked it off some high height... Well, whatever. Let's go pass it to that Fatui member. ｜ 本来感觉就有些破破烂烂的，被从那么高的地方摔下来…不管了，我们先带去给那个愚人众看看吧！
- Pfft. To think that outlanders these days no longer recognize the uniform of the Maison Lumitoile... ｜ 咳…真是的，没想到现在的外国人，居然连「幽光星星庭」的制服都认不出来了…

- Dried fish that has been grilled slowly over a charcoal flame. Fish air-dried overnight have a tinge of the salty sea wind and give off a tantalizing flavor when grilled. Many Inazumans who dwell near the sea know this taste well indeed. ｜ 炭火慢烤的鱼干。风干了一夜的鱼，外皮浸润着海风的气息，经烤制后迸发出诱人的咸香，是许多沿海而居的稻妻人最为熟悉的味道。

- ...? ｜ …？
- I must apologize to you for all that has transpired. ｜ 之前发生的事，我必须向你表达我的歉意。
- Let's think about our current situation... To save Dunyarzad, we have to escape the samsara of the Sabzeruz Festival... ｜ 先思考一下目前的状况…要想拯救迪娜泽黛的话，就要想办法从「花神诞日的轮回」中脱困…
- The prophecy of the apocalypse... My master believed that he could stop this future of destruction from coming to pass. We did much to prepare for this. It was a powerful magic, and also an evil plan... ｜ 末日的预言…我的主人，他认为自己可以逆转毁灭的未来，我们为此做了许多准备，那是伟大的魔法，也是邪恶的计划…
- No Wasted Effort ｜ 可不能功亏一篑
- Fulfiller of Commissions, Flame Bearer of the Canopy. ｜ 悬木游火，受任皆偿。

- You can't? Oh well, but this still counts as a way to enter a wind current... ｜ 学不会吗…确实，不过这也是进入风场的一种方法啦…
- Then you have my thanks, Ms. Yun. Ahem... Spark Knight Klee, do you remember what the Knights of Favonius Handbook says? ｜ 啊，那可太麻烦云小姐了。嗯…火花骑士可莉，你还记得《骑士团指导手册》的内容吗？
- You gotta treasure the small joys in life! ｜ 平平淡淡也珍贵！
- Of course! How could you even think of pulling this off without me? ｜ 当然，这种事怎么能少了我？
- A card face that can be obtained from Genius Invokation TCG. For reasons unknown, the printing method used here allows you to see slightly different images on the card face when you view it from different angles... ｜ 「七圣召唤」中，可以获得的牌面，不知道利用了什么样的印刷方法，在不同的角度观看牌面的牌画时，似乎能够看到牌画中的内容也有些微的不同…
- "Oh my, an empty shelf! What a lifesaver!" So she cried happily. "Dear shelf, could I place these books in your care?" ｜ 「天哪！一个空架子！真是救命了！」女孩高兴地叫道：「亲爱的架子，我能把这些书交给你保管么？」
- Don't worry. I'll give this another go. ｜ 没关系，我再试试。
- I have already written your Appointment Letter, which you'll need to show them on arrival. Once that's out of the way, please lead them in ridding the area of ronin. ｜ 委任书我已经写好，你给他们看一下就可以了。那些流浪武士，也麻烦你一起清剿。
- Bamboo Shoots that have been swallowed by Anemo Slimes. Who knows what special flavor they might add... ｜ 被风史莱姆吞下过的竹笋，不知道会不会带上什么特别的味道…
- We've met bake-danuki on the other islands before... Could this all be a big trick of theirs!? ｜ 我们在其他的岛上也遇到过妖狸吧。这些是不是都是妖狸的把戏？！
- Ameyalco Waters ｜ 溶水域
- Glacier and Snowfield ｜ 冰之川与雪之砂
- The Omikami has an envoy, and the clergy set a seal upon its skeleton and used its power to break the connection between Watatsumi and Enkanomiya. ｜ 大御神大人有一神使，神人们在它的骸骨上设置了封印，用它的力量屏断了海祇与渊下的联系。
- Aimed Shot|{param4:F1P} ｜ 瞄准射击|{param4:F1P}
- What do you mean? I don't know what's going through your head... Look, all I'm saying is, I can't be by your side 24/7 like Paimon can. There's gonna be times when we're apart. ｜ 什么嘛，你们想到哪里去了。我是说，我又不能像派蒙一样，一直陪在你身边，总有见不上面的时候呀。
- Only afterward did I start hearing the horror stories about Benny's Adventure Team... *sigh* ｜ 直到后来我才听说「班尼冒险团」的臭名昭著…唉…
- Ugh... let's fight first and talk later! ｜ #不管怎么样，先迎战吧，{NICKNAME}！
- You could have just given it to me alongside the rest of the batch. ｜ 刚才直接让我一起安置就好啦。
- #This is so tasty! {NICKNAME}, you've gotta try it! ｜ #真好吃！{NICKNAME}，你也尝尝看！
- Then my duty as her eternal familiar is to drag her back out of her own head and into the real world. ｜ 那把她从自我的世界里揪出来，便是我作为「永恒的眷属」的践行。
- Then what is it? ｜ 那是什么？
- We've arrived! Has the calm breeze and gentle swaying of the boat made you sleepy? ｜ 终点站到了哦，您该不会是在船上吹着轻风，摇摇晃晃，有了困意吧？
- That said, this is contingent upon our research progress... ｜ 当然，前提是研究的进展顺利…
- Yes... Well, even though I don't really know what your wish is, the poem is quite interesting. ｜ 嗯…虽然我不知道你要许什么愿，但这诗是很有趣。
- *whimper* Klee doesn't want him to separate us. ｜ 呜…可莉很怕他把我们分开。
- Whatever happened to "principles are principles"? ｜ 你刚刚才说了原则就是原则。
- That's right! Paimon thinks that it still cares a lot about you. ｜ 嗯！我觉得，它肯定还是很关心你的。
- Low/High Plunge DMG|{param8:P}/{param9:P} ｜ 低空/高空坠地冲击伤害|{param8:P}/{param9:P}
- Here you are helping other people out, when you're supposed to be kicking back and relaxing... ｜ 明明是凯亚的假期，却在给别人帮忙…

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge {0}: Aerial Dodgeball</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Challenge Rules</color>\n1. During the challenge, collect an <color=#FFCC33FF>Adventure Coin</color> to score 1 point, and collect a <color=#FFCC33FF>Large Adventure Coin</color> to score 5 points. Reach the target score to complete the challenge.\n2. The challenge will contain <color=#FFCC33FF>Fluffy Launchers</color> that will launch normal and tracking barrages at characters during the challenge. Avoid the barrages and destroy Fluffy Launchers to cause more Adventure Coins to appear.\n3. During the challenge, all party members will have reduced CDs, and the characters will not consume Kuugoryoku while in the Windfavored state, but will be unable to use Elemental Bursts.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Trial Character</color>\nWanderer\n\n\n ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>挑战{0} 天空躲避球</color>\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【挑战规则】</color>\n1.挑战中拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>冒险币</color>时获得1分，拾取<color=#FFCC33FF>大型冒险币</color>时获得5分，达到目标积分时挑战成功。\n2.挑战中会出现<color=#FFCC33FF>「绵绵发射器」</color>发射弹幕和追踪弹幕攻击角色，躲避弹幕并击毁它，会产生冒险币。\n3.挑战中，队伍中所有角色将获得冷却缩减，且当角色处于「优风倾姿」状态时将不消耗空居力，但无法使用元素爆发。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【试用角色】</color>\n流浪者\n\n\n

- Stock up on goods... ｜ 进点货…

- Is that the amount of confidence he had in me? And what if I was never able to make it to where I am now...? ｜ 他就这么相信我吗？要是我根本…就走不到这里呢？
- I was the one running though... ｜ 明明都是我在跑。

- How was Alrani at Akademiya? ｜ 爱拉尼在教令院怎么样？

- Excuse me? ｜ 嗯？
- Let's go with Lakelight. ｜ 要「湖光」好了。
- Recipe: Minty Bean Soup ｜ 食谱：薄荷豆汤
- Would a five-year-old child and a fifteen-year-old teenager be the same? Perhaps returning here simply reminds me of the past, and of who I used to be. ｜ 五岁的孩童和十五岁的少年，会是同样的人吗？或许是因为回到这里让我想起了过去的事情、过去的自己吧。
- *sniff* Then I'll leave the music in your hands... ｜ 呜呜，乐谱的事情就拜托你们了…
- Parvaneh, please, give this Traveler a moment. They just helped us out... I think your research can wait a bit, right? ｜ 芭尔瓦涅，你先稍等一下，这位旅行者刚帮了我们的忙，你这个研究先缓缓吧。
- I'd say that they saw it around... here. There, it should be marked on your map now. If you think it'll be of any use to you, feel free to take a look. ｜ 位置大概在这里…给你标在地图上了。如果你能用得到的话，就去看看吧。
- Hehe, none taken, Madame Lan. ｜ 呵呵，蓝师傅客气。
- Kurosawa would come regularly to purchase large quantities of foodstuffs. He'd always put the payment on his own account. ｜ 黑泽先生会定期在我们这里购买大量粮食，不过用的是他自己的薪水。
- Go to the area where the monsters have appeared ｜ 前往魔物出没的地点
- Not yet attempted ｜ 暂未挑战
- Namecard style.\n"In a land far, far away, there was a kingdom known as the Grand Alliance, and the people living there could throw ever-changing, quick, and powerful Kaboomballs." ｜ 名片纹饰。\n「在好远好远的地方，有个叫『大联盟』的王国，住在那里的人能丢出变来变去、又快又厉害的『魔球』。」
- Heizou presses his lips close to your ear and whispers:\n"Something vital is missing on this island..." ｜ 平藏把嘴唇贴近你的耳边，轻轻吐出了一句话——\n「…这片岛屿缺少了重要的东西…」
- It seems... I still have lots to learn... ｜ 果然…还有很多要学习的地方…
- Dada Zido ｜ 「达达·齐多」
- An ancient ruined city that was once used by a now-bygone secret order as an ad-hoc site of assembly.\nNow, all that remains to rule the roost are beasts bereft of language or intellect. Defeat them, and you may claim precious artifacts. ｜ 一度被过去的秘密社团用做临时集会所的古代废都，它曾是更古老的团体所使用的据点之一。\n如今占据这里的只有不具语言与智慧的魔物。将它们击败，或许能获得珍贵的圣遗物吧。
- Although we cannot meet, we still keep writing to each other. I'm glad that we're aware of each other's well-being. ｜ 虽然无法见面，但我们常常互通书信。我能知道他健康平安，他能知晓我诸事顺利，目前这样我就满足了。
- (This little thing is about Paimon's size, and the way she talks is kind of funny... Why's Pyrrho calling "Lady" in that reverent tone?) ｜ （明明和我差不多大，说的话也怪怪的…可是毕洛那家伙居然毕恭毕敬地管这个小东西叫「大人」？）

- You explain Lechlade's situation. ｜ 说明了勒克莱德的情况…
- It's just that Qica's not very familiar with how you climb mountains, and... ｜ 就是在爬山的时候，奇卡的动作有些不熟练…
- Now that you mention it, I'm getting a little peckish myself... ｜ 这么一说，我也有点饿了…
- "There is an appointed time for all things to live and die, just like the ceaseless cycles of night and dawn."\n"May the stories within this lamp grant you dreams worth looking forward to." ｜ 「万物生灭皆有定期，如同黑夜与黎明往复不息。」\n「就让这盏灯中的故事，给你值得期许的美梦吧。」

- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。

- The cats around them got scared and ran around, shedding their fur everywhere... ｜ 周围的猫被吓到之后乱跑，毛掉得到处都是…

- Lumidouce Harbor Type-05 Combine Lifter ｜ 柔灯港五型复合起重机关
- <color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>\nPerforms up to 4 consecutive strikes.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>\nConsumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash a solo dance, dealing Physical DMG to nearby opponents and changing her Arkhe alignment. If Salon Members or the Singer of Many Waters summoned by her Elemental Skill "Salon Solitaire" is present, their lineup will switch in response.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Arkhe: Seats Sacred and Secular</color>\nAt intervals, when Furina's Normal Attacks hit, a Spiritbreath Thorn or a Surging Blade will descend based on her current Arkhe alignment, dealing Pneuma- or Ousia-aligned <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro DMG</color>.\nWhen Furina takes the field, her starting Arkhe alignment will be Ousia.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>\nPlunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>普通攻击</color>\n进行至多四段的连续攻击。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>重击</color>\n消耗一定体力，释放独舞的气场，对附近的敌人造成物理伤害，并切换自身的始基力属性。如果场上存在元素战技「孤心沙龙」召唤的「沙龙成员」或「众水的歌者」，「沙龙成员」或「众水的歌者」也会更换为对应的阵容。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>始基力：圣俗杂座</color>\n每隔一段时间，芙宁娜的普通攻击命中时，将根据芙宁娜当前的始基力属性，在命中的位置降下灵息之刺或流涌之刃，造成具有芒性或荒性的<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素伤害</color>。\n芙宁娜登场时，始基力属性为荒性。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>下落攻击</color>\n从空中下坠冲击地面，攻击下落路径上的敌人，并在落地时造成范围伤害。
- You just need to recite the key secret code to open the door behind the reverie! ｜ 只需念出最关键的那句暗号，就能开启遐思幕后的门扉！
- Mr. Zhongli, what do you make of this rock? ｜ 钟离先生，你觉得这块石头如何？
- But you're my guest and I live to serve, so if you have any other thoughts on the matter, please do share them with me. ｜ 不过主随客便，你有什么点子的话，可以跟我说。
- The Knights are in charge of internal security, but those foolish monsters outside the city walls are the specialty of the Adventurers' Guild. ｜ 骑士团负责蒙德城内，而城外那些蠢蠢欲动的魔物，就是我们冒险家协会的专长部分。
- ...I see, so... I take it you discussed your terms with Beidou in advance, then. ｜ 原、原来是这样，和大姐头提前谈好了条件啊。
- I didn't know who Sachin was, nor did I care. After joining the Akademiya Extravaganza Planning Committee, I found out that he was an important member of the Vahumana Darshan who sponsored the event. ｜ 当时我不知道萨齐因是谁，也不怎么关心。加入学院庆典策划委员会后，才知道他就是赞助学院庆典的因论派名宿。
- "Three six-armed giants reside in the city in the lake. Two guard the statue, one, the treasure." ｜ 「湖中之城里住着三只六臂巨人，两位守护着神像，一位守护着众神的财宝」
- EH!? ｜ ——噫！
- Already done. ｜ 已经拿到了。

- I don't know how I got ashore, but I did, and seemingly without injury too... ｜ 我都不知道是怎么逃上岸的，还好没受什么伤，潜水服也没损坏…
- Haha, you can't say that for sure! Poetry is spur-of-the-moment creations. Anyone viewing the same sights and experiencing the same atmosphere would surely understand. ｜ 哈哈，怎么能这么说呢。诗歌是随心而为的创作，处在同样景致氛围下的人，一定都能感受得到。
- You arrive at the mine, the scene of the incident, and begin your investigation. A series of clues makes clear that there is nothing ordinary about this disappearance. What is the connection between the mysterious person behind this incident and the missing miners? Where did the missing miners disappear to? You have to know the truth. ｜ 抵达案发矿区，你们展开了调查。接二连三的线索表明，这起失踪事件并不简单…隐藏在事件背后的神秘人物，与失踪矿工之间究竟有何联系？消失的矿工去了哪里？你十分在意。
- By contrast, this variety thrives in any dark, damp location, often in large clusters. Morphologically, it is distinguished by the profusion of petals and densely packed stamens, though its powerful scent gives it away just as easily. ｜ 而山阴或者潮湿之地，霓裳花多生得瓣大而蕊密，香气扑鼻，堪称花团锦簇。
- As long as a Traveler like you is able to record what happened, then a backup of sorts will exist for times and tides of Teyvat. ｜ 身为旅行者的你，只要能够「记录」，那么，提瓦特的时代与历史，就获得了一种「存在的备份」…
- You and Paimon describe the incident that just happened underwater to Delaroche, stressing how the "Active Odor Imitating Bait" will attract aquatic monsters and threaten the fishing spot...\nThough you don't know much about the ecological relations between aquatic monsters and regular fish, you've met your share of scholars, and find yourself more than capable of imitating their manner of speaking... ｜ 你和派蒙一起向德拉萝诗讲述了刚才发生在水下的意外，并着重强调了「气息模拟主动诱饵」吸引来的水生魔物会对鱼点构成威胁…\n虽然不太明白水生魔物和普通鱼类之间的生态关系，但你们见过不少学者，极其到位地模仿了他们的口吻…
- Not to worry. He has no plans for me at the moment. As for me, I've just thought of a way in which we can destroy him utterly. ｜ 不用担心，他暂时还不打算对我做什么。而且就在刚才，我已经想到了彻底消灭波爱修斯的办法。
- Should you prove victorious, you can clear your name and defend your honor, and thus remove the need for a trial. However, defeating a Champion Duelist is no mean feat. ｜ 若是战胜了「决斗代理人」，您就能摆脱罪名，维护自己的名誉，无需再被审判。当然，想战胜「决斗代理人」可不是什么轻松的事。
- Dar al-Shifa ｜ 活力之家
- You are reaching rather outside of your bounds, Yashiro Commissioner, if you seek to involve yourself in other clans' affairs... Might I be so bold, then, as to question your motives in doing so? ｜ 您的手伸得这么长，连别人的家事也要管，那我是不是也可以擅自揣度一番大人您的用心呢？
- Outstanding | Score Multiplier ×{0} ｜ 卓越 积分倍率 x{0}
- Um, you're welcome? ｜ 呃，不用客气？
- Hello. ｜ 你好。
- Thanks for your patronage! Please wait a moment while I make preparations and arrange delivery. ｜ 谢谢惠顾，等我准备好之后，就雇人把货物运过去。
- That was well done — whether it was dealing with Ioroi's illusory tricks, or the way you defeated those demons. ｜ 相当漂亮，无论是五百藏的障眼法，还是您击败妖物的手段。
- This student from the Akademiya has set up a new game through Alchemical Divination. But is it really connected to one's fate...? Anyway, as an Adventure Challenge, it is worth a try. ｜ 教令院的学生通过「炼金占卜」设置了新的牌局，不过这真的会和命运有关吗…不过，作为冒险模式的游戏值得一试。
- Fontaine Remarkable Chest Reward ｜ 枫丹地区奇馈宝箱奖励
- Ah, uh... It's nothing, really. There are actually some other factors that I've been speculating about... ｜ 过、过奖啦…其实还有些别的理由，是一直以来的猜想。
- Ugh... I specifically picked those flowers out. You can't find such good flowers just anywhere... ｜ 呜…那可是我专门挑出来的花，那么好的花，可不是能轻易找到的…
- Jinwu said that there should be an observation point for the demolitions team that overlooks the cannon and that we'll be able to adjust the signal from there, which will let us unlock the cannon from a safe distance. ｜ 听瑾武姐说，在能俯瞰大炮的高处应该设置着爆破组的观测点…从那边可以调节信号，用来在安全距离外解锁大炮。
- Many varieties of plants grow in fecundity in this marvelous space, seemingly by the grace of Sub-Space Creation in harmonizing the various specialties that these plants possess such that even ones that come from the desert and the forest can coexist side by side, thus orchestrating a beautiful chorus of flower, tree, and wild grass.\nFor researchers who love plants, such areas are veritable treasure troves for research, though these vibrant woods will also prove sites of unique interest to ordinary passers-by. ｜ 多种植物繁茂生长的奇妙地域，似是借助壶中洞天的外景之能，调和了不同物种的特性，使得来自沙漠和雨林的植株共存无隙，谱写一曲花卉、灌木和荒草的协奏曲。\n对于喜爱植物的学者而言，这样的区域堪称研究的宝地。而在普通过客的眼中，交织着斑斓色彩的林野，倒也别具一番趣味…
- Hehe, that means we did a good deed this time, right? ｜ 哦哦，看来我们还真是做了件好事呢。
- Increases all party members' ATK by 66 for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色攻击力提高66点，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- It's the same place again... This place is almost like a flight of stairs that connects all the dreams together! ｜ 又是同样的地方，看来这里就像是连接整个梦境的楼梯。
- Is there anything you'd like to do? ｜ 有什么想做的吗？
- I know that you only want to be seen by people you trust. It's rash of me to butt in... ｜ 我知道你们只想被信任的人看见，我的出现实在是有些鲁莽…

- "Mountain King" ｜ 「山王」
- Shouldn't a merchant be... guarding their shop and cargo? If you hadn't told us, we would never have guessed what you are! ｜ 一般来说，商人不应该…守着自己的店铺和货物吗？你要是不直说，我们完全猜不到你的身份！

- Colorful staple food. Too much moisture was lost during the cooking process — at this point, it would take some imagination (and some extra water) to recoup the intended taste. ｜ 色彩缤纷的主食。制作过程中流失了过多的水分，需要靠些许想象力和额外添加的水，才能还原应有的口感。
- 34th Independent Investigative Squad Deployment in Mont Esus (Eastern Quadrant) Disciplinary Procedures ｜ 第三十四独立侦察小队驻芒索斯山东麓纪律规定
- Whoever's eavesdropping outside, come on in. ｜ 在外面偷听的人，你进来。
- Wenze ｜ 文泽
- Because this remedy is saturated with Tatarigami energy, it's normal that it would attract them. ｜ 因为药方中渗透了大量「祟神」的能量，把它们吸引来也是理所应当了。
- Report back to Sumida ｜ 向墨田回报
- Do you get the feeling... ｜ 你有没有觉得…
- How did the photos turn out? ｜ 画片效果怎么样？
- #Oh, {NICKNAME}, you're back. Did you bring the crystals? ｜ #{NICKNAME},你回来啦。带回晶石了吗？
- Anyway, as you've passed two trials, you've naturally earned the right to visit Wangshan Hall. Please come with me! ｜ #总之，既然{M#少侠}{F#女侠}已经顺利通过了两重试炼，那自然也就有了觐见王山厅的资格。请随我来！
- Hold CD|{param8:F1}s ｜ 长按冷却时间|{param8:F1}秒
- "Thank you for this invitation. It'll be an honor to see your card-playing skills." \nHint: Emilie's deck focuses on Summons and Burning reactions, and is geared towards triggering Burning reactions to deal significant damage. ｜ 「感谢你邀请我，能见识到你的牌技是我莫大的荣幸。」\n【提示】艾梅莉埃的牌组以「召唤物」与「燃烧反应」为核心，擅长通过「燃烧反应」打出大量伤害。
- Wonderful. You are indeed a mighty adventurer, and a mighty sympathetic one, too. Just as the papers said! ｜ 太棒了，您果然和报纸上写的一样，既是个实力强大的冒险家，又富有同情心。
- Select a character to equip with this <color=#FFD780FF>Technique</color> ｜ 请选择要装备<color=#FFD780FF>特技</color>的角色
- Well, luckily my sister and I both know enough about cooking that we won't go hungry... ｜ 幸好我和姐姐的厨艺都还不错，自己做些吃的也还可以…
- In this Stage, enemies will be coming simultaneously from two different directions. If you wish to achieve victory, you must pay close attention to the Stage and the way enemies arrive. ｜ 本次棋阵中，敌人将从两个方向同时来袭。如果想要获得胜利，需要更仔细地观察棋阵，还有棋阵中敌人来袭的方式。
- (That means the Ley Lines are in an even worse state than the last time I was here.) ｜ （相较于上次来这里的时候，地脉的情况似乎又恶化了。）
- A Preprint fragment found within a mysterious cave that depicts the huge flowers visible from a Choo-Choo Cart entering the valley. It seems that a projection at the correct angle from the Streaming Projector can restore a missing part of the mural... ｜ 在神秘洞窟之中发现的「先成图」残片，描绘着「呼呼飞车」驶入山谷之时可见的巨大花朵。通过正确位置的「聚流映灯」投射至壁画之上，似乎就能修复壁画中缺失的一块区域…
- How about you? Did you find anything else? ｜ 你们还有别的发现吗？
- No need to thank me. Rather, thank your own sense of perseverance instead. Long have you stood in line to meet me, have you not? ｜ 不用说什么谢谢，你要谢谢你自己有这份毅力，终于排队等到了见我的这一天。
- And everyone would realize that the outside world isn't a bad place, because there are good people like you in it... ｜ 然后，大家就会发现，雾海外面的世界一点也不坏，还有像你们这样的好人…
- Complete 1 Domain Challenge ｜ 通关1次秘境挑战
- Um... But then again, throwing money around willy-nilly is, y'know, kinda irresponsible... ｜ 唔…等一下，话虽这么说，但乱花钱总归不是好事…
- We solved it! ｜ 解开了！
- Calm down, Eide. ｜ 冷静，埃德。
- What's this? Huh... A conch? Paimon doesn't know what it's for, but... let's hold onto it for now. ｜ 这是什么，呃…是海螺吗？虽然不知道有什么用…但还是先留着吧。
- Let's take the cat back to Lan. ｜ 带回去给岚姐吧…
- #"Ahem. The queen had a pretty and powerful priestess friend, who couldn't bear to see the queen go on this way."\n"That was when a traveler came to the kingdom. {M#He}{F#She} and {M#his}{F#her} companion were both smart and brave."\n"So the priestess thought, 'Ack-ack-ack! They are agile and resilient. If they're willing to help...'" ｜ #「咳咳，话说回来，女王还有一个又漂亮，又厉害的祭司朋友，她不忍心看到朋友一直关在宫殿里。」\n「这时候，旅人来到了这个王国。{M#他}{F#她}和{M#他}{F#她}的同伴既聪明、又勇敢。」\n「祭司心想：『叮叮叮，这些旅人身手矫健、意志坚强。如果有他们的帮助的话…』」
- Maybe if they try hard enough? ｜ 努努力的话也许可以？
- I can thus confirm that a huge Snowboar does indeed live there! ｜ 旅行者，我能确定，这里绝对生活着一头巨大的雪猪！
- Adjust the time to 16:00 – 18:00 the day after tomorrow ｜ 将时间调整到2天后的16-18点
- *sigh* Yes, yes, she treats me like a brother. And we'd get along better still, if she didn't like hanging out with the ladies more! ｜ 唉，对，她拿我当哥哥看。我们感情说不定还能更好呢…要不是她更喜欢跟女孩子玩！
- Mei ｜ (test)$UNRELEASED
- You have two seconds... ｜ 请讲…
- Curses... Forest Rangers. ｜ 巡林员…不好…
- Complete editing and receive a Rave review ｜ 完成剪辑并获得特别好评
- Yes, we are responsible for surveying the landscape and updating older maps... It's one of the Adventurers' Guild's duties. ｜ 对，就是负责勘定一下以前的地图，然后看看有没有什么变化…这也是冒险家协会的职责之一。
- Will This Really Work? ｜ 真的能出成果吗？
- Wow... She's so gentle and caring, like a nice older sister! ...Unlike those guys over there. ｜ 哇…这个姐姐可真是个温柔的好人呢，跟那边几个可不一样…
- Vibrant Pinion ｜ 琦色灵彩之羽
- The stone walls of a lofty tower, embellished with reliefs and featuring central doorways for passage. It is common for the walls of Natlan-style courtyards to be decorated with reliefs, ornaments, and graffiti, thus transforming them into a series of "murals" with distinct themes. Placing doorways at their center enables the viewer to traverse the boundaries between various creative realms, a wondrous experience indeed. ｜ 「昂扬高塔」所使用的石质浮雕墙壁，在浮雕的中心开有门洞，可供人在其中穿行。纳塔式的庭院习惯以浮雕、配饰和涂鸦来装饰墙壁，力图将墙壁打造成一幅幅带有不同主题的「壁画」，而将门洞开在「壁画」的正中央，则会营造出穿行在各种不同创意之间的感受，颇为奇妙。
- I'm sure some Xuanwen Beasts might be extremely weak to the point that even poorly-equipped hired guards can manage them. ｜ 玄文兽之中，想必也存在极弱的个体，能被轻装的镖师暂时应付。
- Hmm, the plants in this flower bed are harmless varieties created to lift people's spirits. You may enjoy them without worry. ｜ 喔，这花坛里的植物基本无害，它们的作用是让人心情愉悦。安心观赏吧。
- Let's go! We'll get to the bottom of this! ｜ 走，我们现在就去揭开真相！
- <color=#FFE14BFF>Electricity</color> intermittently arcs off of Electro-Charged beings, shocking <color=#FFE14BFF>Hydro-affected opponents</color> nearby. ｜ 如果周围有<color=#FFE14BFF>附着「水元素」的敌人</color>，「感电」反应会间歇性地向周围<color=#FFE14BFF>放电</color>。
- Talk to Caterpillar ｜ 与卡特皮拉对话
- The current situation in Inazuma is such that, if the Outlander Affairs Agency got involved, there would be no way to resolve things peacefully. Fortunately, I was paying attention to what you were doing. ｜ 现在稻妻的这个局势，要真的闹到远国监司去，这事就真的没法收场了，还好我留意了一下你们那边。
- ...Did that all get a little heavy for you? I think you prefer me when I'm just teasing you, don't you? Hehe... ｜ 刚才的话题是不是有些太过严肃了，你还是更喜欢被我捉弄吗？呵呵…
- Stadium of the Sacred Flame Notice ｜ 「圣火竞技场」公告
- The founder of the Abyss Order... Alberich... ｜ 创立深渊教团的亚尔伯里奇…

- Then it looks like this book has a new owner. ｜ 看来你已经是这本书的新主人了。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- There was certainly no shortage of inspiration, but I haven't managed to think of any ingenious solutions to the puzzles yet, without which the plot still feels pretty weak... ｜ 灵感倒是找到了，但还没有精彩的解法，这样也没法构成像样的情节…
- What!? ｜ 什么？！
- Look, I serve in the Millelith, and my job is to guard this bank. I've been watching that guy for a long time now — the one pacing around by the entrance. ｜ …我是负责看守钱庄的千岩军，我观察那个人很久了，就是那个在钱庄门口徘徊的家伙。
- And bam! One lightning bolt from the sky hit my boat dead on, wrecking it, and I was hurled into the sea. ｜ 然后，突然一道雷正巧劈在我的船上，船毁了，我也掉进了海里。
- "That precious thing in my life I mentioned? Her name is Lanoire, and she's absolutely lovely. She's like a little flower sprouting out of a crack in the rock, determined to grow even in the absence of sunlight or rain." ｜ 「我的宝贝，她叫莉诺尔。她可爱极了，像岩缝里长出的小花，在没有阳光和雨露的地方也自顾自地顽强生长。」
- Lyney's Statement ｜ 林尼的自述
- CD|{param12:F1}s ｜ 冷却时间|{param12:F1}秒
- Obtained from Mega Meka Melee ｜ 「机枢巧物前哨战」活动获得
- The hands of time will never come to an end, but the same cannot not be said for those cherished years of the young maiden's life when she was doted upon. ｜ 指针的旋转不会有尽头，但少女受人宠爱的岁月则相反。
- *footsteps* ｜ 哒哒哒……
- The Causality of the Sabzeruz Festival ｜ 因果命运的花神诞祭
- Fractured Fruit Shard ｜ 碎果残块

- But we can all appreciate beauty. ｜ 「但是美是共通的。」

- ...Father? ｜ …老爹？
- Defeat opponents ｜ 击败魔物
- It's just... Your place is so nice, and your invitation made me so happy, I'm not sure what to do... ｜ 你的家很好…你的邀请更是让我开心得不知道怎么办才好…
- This is your team? Cool... I like the vibe. I'm Bennett, leader of Benny's Adventure Team. Any chance we can team up? Please? ｜ 这就是你的冒险团吗？真好啊…又热闹，又有人情味。啊，我是「班尼冒险团」的团长班尼特！能把我列入你们的合作伙伴吗？拜托了！
- Fontaine's End ｜ 枫丹的结局
- "Ouranides of Ouranopolis" ｜ 「乌兰诺珀里斯的乌兰依代」
- Every time he drinks coffee, he will cough non-stop in his room. He even goes hoarse in the process. ｜ 每次爸爸喝完咖啡之后，都会整夜在屋子里咳嗽个不停，说话的声音也会哑掉。
- That's not at all what I expected to hear. ｜ 挺意外的。
- Wait! Paimon's got it! You must be here for one of your magic shows, right? ｜ 啊，难道说，是有什么魔术表演吗？
- Mela ｜ 梅菈
- Go to the upper level of the floating island in the northwest to retrieve the Firestone(s) ｜ 前往西北侧浮岛上层回收火石
- What's so surprising about that? They're probably just giddy with joy at having their wish come true! ｜ 这有什么值得大惊小怪的，肯定是被突如其来的喜悦冲昏了头脑啊！
- So, Shiki Taishou, tell me. What did my music make you feel? ｜ 来吧，「式大将」。告诉我，你从我的音乐中感觉到了什么？
- I... *sobs* ｜ 呜…呜呜呜……
- Head to the designated location ｜ 前往指定的位置
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Hmm, what pose should I carve for the provisional head priestess in this time... ｜ 唔，接下来雕个什么样的代宫司大人好呢…
- Follow {param0} Seelie in the Desert of Hadramaveth to their Seelie Courts. ｜ 在千壑沙地追随{param0}个仙灵，并点亮仙灵之庭。
- Mm. I've marked them down on your map. Perhaps that will be of some help to you. ｜ …嗯，我已经帮你在地图上标出来了，也许会对你有帮助。
- Special Bamboo Slip ｜ 特制的「竹签」
- It made short work of that Abyss Mage! ｜ 深渊法师一下子就被解决了。
- Chat: Spoils ｜ 闲聊·收获
- Why are you here? ｜ 你为什么在这里？
- After all, with epic power comes epic responsibility! ｜ 这就是能力越大，责任越大吧！
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- To his credit though, Mr. Heinry managed to turn the whole fiasco into a huge publicity stunt for Fonta. Their sales really rocketed for a while off the back of this. ｜ 不过，安里先生倒是借着这件事，又给枫达做了一波巨大的宣传，大大地提高了一波枫达的销量。
- ...A boat? ｜ 这是…船？
- Starsnatch Cliff ｜ 摘星崖
- #We should probably get going ourselves. And uh... {NICKNAME}, on your way over, please check in on the soldiers. ｜ #我们也该离开了…另外，{NICKNAME}，你可以关注一下路上的士兵们。
- Oh, so you'll be able to see what it looks like on the inside without ruining Tlazolli's Inscription? ｜ 欸！这么说…我们不用弄坏特拉佐莉女士的这个名刻，就能知道它里面长什么样了？
- Thanks, Thoma! ｜ 谢谢托马先生！
- Looks like we're almost done! ｜ 好像快完成了！
- Have a swimming contest with Chevreuse ｜ 与夏沃蕾比赛游泳
- Scribbled Notes ｜ 潦草的笔记
- That said, the ones over there are tougher, and there's more of them. ｜ 不过那里的流浪武士数量更多，战斗力也更强。
- Wait a second... You don't think Chiori might have gone looking for him, do you? Y'know, so she can, uh... finish what she started? ｜ 啊！你们说，千织该不会真去揍他了吧？
- Well then, let us be off. The first step in our preparations shall be to obtain some prize <color=#00E1FFFF>Noctilucous Jade</color> worthy of a deity. ｜ 好了，我们动身吧。筹备仪式的第一步…是要取得品质足以匹配神灵的，最上等的<color=#00E1FFFF>「夜泊石」</color>。
- You think so? Hahaha, that's good... Ah, I do wish that it would come true... ｜ 是吗？哈哈哈，那就好，哎呀…希望我这愿望，真的能实现…
- Uh, it's not just Lynette, Freminet is also here. Do you still remember him? ｜ 呃，其实不止琳妮特，连菲米尼也一起来了，你还记得他吧？

- Well, that's both kittens found. Let's bring them back to the shrine. ｜ 这样子，两只小猫都找到了，我们带着它们回神社去吧。
- Could All Uninvolved Machinery Please Leave Immediately? ｜ 无关机械请立即离场！
- The low humming noise it makes rises and falls, almost like... the sound of breathing. ｜ 其中传来的，犹如低鸣般起伏，就仿佛，啊，就仿佛有人在呼吸一般的声音。
- Hate the city it was supposed to protect? ｜ 憎恨它本该守护的那座城市呢？
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- A potted plant that can be found in the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. It has a unique blue shade with large leaves and a rigid trunk. When the wind blows by, the leaves will sway in the wind, as if responding to its song. The blue color of the plant itself reminds people of a leisurely, cozy beach, hence the name "Echoes of the Shore." ｜ 可见于圣火竞技场内的盆栽，其内种有形态独特的蓝色植物。这种植株的叶片尺寸庞大，主干质地坚硬，当风吹过时，叶片会规律地随风摆动，仿佛在回应风的歌声。而盆栽蓝色主色调又会使人联想起闲逸而舒适的水岸，因此也就有了「水岸的回声」这一称谓。
- The night is much cooler than the day, which makes it all the more reason to take better care of your health. Besides, you should stay where there's more greenery... ｜ 但正是因为昼夜温差大，才更要注意身体啊。而且，你还是待在绿色植物比较多的地方比较好…
- Fallen: I ｜ 倒下·其一
- #Anyway, there's no time to lose, kind {M#sir}{F#lady}! Please come with me to the Fontaine Research Institute to find my supervisor and request the key to the central processing station! ｜ #总之，事不宜迟，好心的{M#先生}{F#小姐}，请您陪我回枫丹科学院，找主管申请中枢处理站的钥匙吧！
- Before I answer your question, let me ask you one: What do you think Teyvat is like? ｜ 在回答你的问题之前，我想让你先思考另一个问题：你认为，提瓦特大陆是什么样的？
- Fate is called as such, for it cannot be changed, nor can it be reversed. It can only but be accepted. ｜ 正是因为无法更改，无可违逆，只能接受，命运才会被称之为命运。

- You are the strongest warriors we have. Put down your weapons, and I promise you that no harm will come to this young saurian. ｜ 你们都是人类之中不可多得的强者，放下武器，我保证不会危害这头小龙的性命。
- My answer then was "no" — and now that the Rite of Parting has ended, Liyue Harbor's present state proves that I was right! ｜ 当时我就说过不会。现在正式送别了岩王爷之后，璃月港的现状也证明了我没说错！
- Discard Changes ｜ 放弃修改
- I'd like to observe your intelligence by means of a practical test of your capabilities — much as we did for the physical test. ｜ 和体能测试类似，我想通过实验观察你的智能水平。
- The way I see it, this is just a way of banking some credit so Ematol might actually feel guilty the next time she plays a prank on me. ｜ 我只是用这种付出的方式，静静地提醒她，下次再想对我恶作剧的时候，要怀有内疚之心。
